I've heard that the IPC has also received Penacony's invitation, so forgive me if I'm mistaken, but you must be the representative. The IPC's elite certainly does have an extraordinary air about them. I suppose such an exceptional figure such as yourself wouldn't mind paving a convenience for us?
我没听错吧——行个方便？这话不该由我对各位说吗？
I must be hearing things: Paving a convenience? Shouldn't I be saying this to you instead?
我已经在这里等了十多分钟了，您知道对我而言，十多分钟等于多少信用点吗？
I've been waiting here for more than ten minutes. Do you know how many credits ten minutes is worth to me?
想必是笔天文数字吧，所以现在，砂金先生，我这儿有一笔您不容错过的「投资」。
It must be an inordinate number, which is why, now, Mr. Aventurine, I have an investment that you absolutely cannot miss out on.
公司影响力遍及寰宇，说话的分量自然也重，我们希望能借您的身份——为{M#他}{F#她}做个担保。
The IPC's influence runs deep and wide, and their word wields the utmost authority. We hope to borrow your status to vouch for {M#him}{F#her}.
如此一来，您不仅能省下许多宝贵的时间，还能结交一批新朋友。
As such, you won't just be sparing much of your invaluable time but also forging new friendships.
这倒有意思。那这些朋友能为我带来什么？
Well, this is interesting. And how will my new friends benefit me?
这就是个更值得一聊的话题了。同为<color=#dbc291ff>「钟表匠」</color>的客人，我们何不先在匹诺康尼落座，再慢慢花时间了解彼此呢？

Now this is a topic very much worth getting into. Just as we are guests of the <color=#dbc291ff>Watchmaker</color>, why don't we make ourselves comfortable in Penacony before getting to know each other more elaborately?
可以，可以。不过领航员小姐，我必须得指出——
Sounds good. But Ms. Navigator, I must point out that—
如果我出手，那这省下的时间应当是我为自己争取来的——而不是你们带给我的。
If I do something about it now, the time saved is from my own effort, not a favor from you all.
…但您说的后半句，我特别喜欢！朋友，对，没什么比朋友更珍贵，更何况是无名客这样光明磊落的开拓者。
...But what you said in the second half, I loved it! Friends, yes — nothing is more precious than friends, especially a righteous Trailblazer like a Nameless.
往后我这趟匹诺康尼之旅，就得劳烦各位「开拓」朋友多多照顾了。希望我们——相处愉快。
Going forward on this Penacony trip, I'll be counting on all my "Trailblazer" friends here. Looking forward to a delightful time with you all.
很高兴您能这么说，那担保的事……
I'm glad you've put it this way. So about the vouching...
小姐，你都看到了。看在我的面子上，让这位{M#先生}{F#女士}入住吧。
There you go, Miss. Please allow {M#him}{F#her} to check in on my account.
我和家族的「星期日」先生有约，稍后会拜托他出面应付这事。放心，绝不给你添麻烦。
I have an appointment with The Family's Mr. Sunday. I will ask him to handle this matter later. Don't worry, I won't cause you any trouble.
家族可不能让客人们带着负担入梦啊。
The Family cannot allow guests to enter a dream while bearing burdens.
说到就到，瞧瞧这是谁来了——星期日，匹诺康尼最英俊的男人！还有闻名宇宙的歌者「知更鸟」。
Speak of the devil, look who's here! It's Sunday, the most handsome man in Penacony! Along with the singer renowned across the universe: Robin!
他说你是匹诺康尼最英俊的人，真有意思。
He said you were the most dashing person in Penacony, how interesting.
让您久等了，砂金先生。这边请，我们借一步说话。
I've kept you waiting, Mr. Aventurine. This way please, let us speak in private.
星穹列车的各位，请来这边稍事休息。
Astral Express guests, please come this way and rest your feet.
那个，请问，你…不是，您难道是……
Wait a minute, I'm sorry, but are you... the...?
那位歌手，艾普瑟隆的超级巨星…《使一颗心免于哀伤》是您的作品，对吧？
The singer, Epsilon's superstar... If I Can Stop One Heart From Breaking. That's your song, isn't it?
没想到这么可爱的小姐也是我的歌迷呢。
I never thought a cutie like yourself would be a fan of mine.
啊，果然是那位「知更鸟」！居然能在这里见到本尊……
Ahh, it really is Robin! To run into her in person here...
能与各位相遇也是我的荣幸。
It is an honor to meet everyone.
您和那位先生一样，都是匹诺康尼的家族成员？
Are you also a member of The Family on Penacony like him?
实不相瞒，我和各位一样都是客人。匹诺康尼是我的故乡，但长大后我就离开了这里，此次有幸受邀，回来为「谐乐大典」献唱一曲。
Truth be told, I am a guest like everyone. Penacony is my hometown, but I left when I was older. I was graciously invited this time to return and sing a song at the Charmony Festival.
您口中的星期日是我的兄长，匹诺康尼当地的话事人之一，也是此次「谐乐大典」的主办人。他听闻列位遇到麻烦，便携我前来提供帮助。

The person you speak of is Sunday, my senior, and one of the local leaders of Penacony. He is also the organizer of this era's Charmony Festival. He heard you all ran into some difficulties, and sent me here to provide aid.
可惜还是到得晚了些，给各位带来了不好的入住体验，实在抱歉。
Alas, I arrived a little later than usual. I sincerely apologize for any unpleasantness during your stay.
请放心，我已吩咐艾丽小姐尽快解决「系统故障」——再给各位升级房型作为补偿。酒店稍后就会安排合适的房间。

Please be at ease, I have instructed Miss Alley to resolve the system error as soon as possible. I have also upgraded your rooms as token compensation. Please wait a moment for the hotel to arrange for suitable accommodation.
砂金先生与「橡木家系」有约，先行入住了。我代他向星穹列车的各位致歉，并期待将来与各位一同共事。

Mr. Aventurine has an appointment with the Oak Family, and has checked in prior. On his behalf, I extend his apologies to everyone of the Astral Express, and wish for an amicable partnership moving forward.
感谢您愿意从中斡旋。不过单独为我们升级房型是否不妥？据我所知，一同收到邀请的派系来宾应该不在少数吧。
Thank you for stepping in to resolve this matter, but are you sure about the rooms? I wouldn't want your other guests to feel we were being given preferential treatment...
您放心，家族会负责出面沟通。各位惠临匹诺康尼，我们作为<color=#dbc291ff>实际管理人</color>理应为各位排忧解难。

Please rest assured that The Family will personally undertake communications to handle this. It is only right that we — <color=#dbc291ff>as the actual administrators</color> — relieve you of any problems during your visit in Penacony.
抱歉占用了各位宝贵的时间，我们就不打扰了。如在匹诺康尼有任何需要，家族随时为您效劳。
I apologize for taking up everyone's precious time, and we shan't keep you any longer. If you need anything else while in Penacony, The Family stands ready to serve.
愿各位在梦中度过一段美妙的时光。
May your dreams be beautiful and pleasant.
总算到了。大家先回房间放行李吧。
We're finally here. Let's all head to our rooms first and put down our bags.
瓦尔特，我们先喝一杯？匹诺康尼的「苏乐达」很有名哦。
Welt, how about a drink first? Penacony's SoulGlad is very famous.
…说吧，我们或许在想同一件事。
...Go on. We may be thinking of the same thing.
你还记得列车收到的「邀请函」吗？
Do you remember the invite that the Express received?
「诚邀*家族的贵客*莅临匹诺康尼，与其他来宾一道，参加盛大的欢宴。」——正是因为这份邀请，我们才会出现在这里。
"The Family's esteemed guests are cordially invited to Penacony to participate in our grand celebration." That's why we're here in the first place.
记得不错——但这邀请函还有下文。
You recall correctly, but there was more to this invite.
「…将梦中的不可能之事尽收眼底，寻得匹诺康尼之父『钟表匠』的遗产，而后解答：生命因何而沉睡。」
"...Witness the impossible in the realm of dreams, find the Legacy of the Watchmaker, Father of Penacony, and thus the answer to the question: Why does life slumber."
我不记得邀请函中有这么一段…你是说，其中还有密文？
I don't remember that part of the invite... You mean, there was a hidden message?
这就是耐人寻味的地方。家族送来的「邀请函」是一只八音盒，转动发条便会伴着谐乐发出声音。
This is the part that intrigues me — the invite sent by The Family was nothing more than a music box that, when wound, would play an accompanying tune.
可送抵我们手中的这只却有些奇怪…它播放的乐音背景中掺杂了一些不和谐音。
But the box that was sent to us was slightly unusual... The music it played had off-key notes in the background.
我转录下这些杂音，它们与列车跃迁时的引力波频率完全吻合，而以列车引擎的空间曲率为密钥——我得到了上面这段话。

I recorded these dissonant notes, and they were a perfect match with the gravity wave frequency when the Express made its warp jump. Also, the Express engine's spatial curvature was its encryption key.
...A distress call method regularly used by the Nameless.
还不能下定论，也可能是假面愚者搞的鬼。只看手法，「谜语人」或异问魔也做得到。
I can't be certain. It may be a Masked Fool's trap. From the execution itself, the Riddlers or Inquisition Spirits could have done this themselves.
在你们处理罗浮星核的时候，我第一时间告诉了帕姆。
When we were handling that Luofu Stellaron matter. I told Pom-Pom about it first thing.
难怪你刚才要求出面，那位公司使节也说出了「钟表匠」这个名字。恐怕他收到的邀请函中也有类似的密文——并且同样被破译了。
It's no wonder that IPC ambassador also mentioned this "Watchmaker." The invite he received must also have contained a hidden message, and it seems like he decoded it.
…还有件令我在意的事。当说到邀请函时，那位家族话事人是这么回应的：「作为匹诺康尼的实际管理人，家族理应为各位排忧解难」。

...There's something else on my mind. When the invite was brought up, that Family leader mentioned being one of the "actual administrators" of Penacony, and that it was their duty to "relieve" us of any problems.
现在听来，这话多少有些言外之意。而他身边的知更鸟小姐…我虽不懂歌唱，但也能听出她声音中的古怪——即将登台献唱的歌者，嗓音怎会透出一丝古怪？

In hindsight, there was more to that statement. He also had Miss Robin with him... I'm no singer, but her voice sounded a little strange... Would a singer really take to the stage if their voice wasn't in top shape?
你怀疑家族并非邀请函的发出者，并且——对我们有所隐瞒？
Are you saying... you suspect that The Family did not send the invite, and... is hiding something from us?
不无可能。家族向其他派系发出邀约，本就是件不同寻常的事。你的发现也印证了或许有第三者参与其中…我收回前言，这场「盛会」不简单哪。

It's possible. The fact that The Family sent out invites to the other factions is already unusual. And your discovery confirms that there could be a third party involved... I take back what I said: This "event" is becoming more interesting with each passing second.
Why didn't you tell the others?
如果这只是匹诺康尼或家族的内部事务，我们不应随意插手。
We shouldn't interfere if this is just an internal affair of Penacony or The Family.
但你也说了，这事或许与「开拓」有关。
But you said so yourself: This could concern the Trailblaze.
Well, I did, which is why...
…所以在出发前，我就告诉小三月和丹恒啦。
...before we set off, I told March 7th and Dan Heng about this.
原来只有我被蒙在鼓里啊。
So I was the only one kept in the dark then.
我也是刚刚才知道邀请函的事…
I too just found out about the invite thingy...
因为你一路上都睡得死死的，没机会和你说嘛。
That's because you were zonked out the whole ride. No one had the chance to tell you.
有本银河球棒侠在，都不成问题！
Ain't no biggie when Galactic Baseballer is in the house!
匹诺康尼形势复杂，还是谨慎点为好。
Penacony's situation is getting complicated. Let's tread lightly.
邀请函究竟是哪一方势力寄出的，将一众派系召集至匹诺康尼的目的是什么，家族又为何知情不言…此行疑点众多，在查清更多事实前，不可贸然出手。

Who sent the invite, what is the purpose of gathering all the factions into Penacony, and why does The Family choose to remain silent about their knowledge of this... There are too many unanswered questions. We must use the utmost caution before we go deeper.
眼下就先专注于列车长的请求，一边收集情报，一边享受「美好的假期」吧——匹诺康尼毕竟是闻名宇宙的度假胜地，很多人可能一辈子都来不了哦。

Right now, let's just focus on the conductor's request: We'll collect intel while enjoying this "wonderful vacation." Penacony is, after all, a famed resort of the cosmos. Not many get a chance to even visit in their lifetime.
这是我的房间，你怎么在这？
This is my room. What are you doing here?
别紧张，我就是过来沾沾喜气。它现在是你的房间了，但半个系统时前——还是我的。
Calm down, I'm just here to soak in the festive vibe. This may be your room now, but half a system hour ago, it was still mine.
幸运的楼号，幸运的楼层，幸运的房间号，我费了好大工夫才订到这么个宝地…送给你了，要好好珍惜啊，朋友。
A lucky block number, a lucky floor, a lucky room number. You have no idea how much I went through to book this precious space... And now I've given it to you. Treasure it well, friend.
You were the one who transferred it to me?
不然呢，还能是家族白给的？
Of course. What, you thought The Family acted simply out of their own good will?
You were the one who arranged the check-in?
不不，我只是把自己的房间让给了你。
No no, I only let you have my room.
Well, it doesn't matter. You need to leave.
I'm not sure I like that tone...
这匹诺康尼可是货真价实的梦想之地，全银河有多少人愿意花上半辈子时间，就为拿到一张白日梦酒店的入场券？
Penacony's a true-blue land of dreams. How many across the stars would spend half their lives, just to acquire an admission ticket into The Reverie?
好好想想，能入住这里的都是些什么人物。要不是我出谋划策，家族哪敢得罪那些名流大咖，来给你这位「不速之客」开后门？

Think about the type of people who can even afford to stay here. If it wasn't for my brilliant plan, you think The Family would offend those bigwigs, just to sate the paltry whims of an unsought guest such as yourself?
所以坐下来聊聊吧——于情于理，我都有这个资格，不是么？
So sit down, and let's have a chat. With everything said and done, I think I deserve at least this much, right?
What do you want to talk about?
Cutting to the chase, I like that.
你应该找姬子，或瓦尔特。
You should go talk to Himeko or Welt.
错了，我要找的人就是你。
Wrong. You're the one I seek.
简单来说，朋友，我需要你的帮助。你或许还不知道，匹诺康尼远没有它看上去那么简单，家族的眼线遍布这里，我不想明说，你明白的。
Simply put, my friend, I need your help. You may or may not know this, but Penacony's far murkier than it seems. The Family's eyes are everywhere, but you get the drift.
我的目的很简单，帮公司拿回一些本属于它的东西。如果你愿意帮我，事成之后，你会得到丰厚的回报，还有「存护」的庇护。

My goal is simple: Help the IPC retrieve some things that belonged to them in the first place. If you agree, when this is done, you will stand to reap great rewards, as well as the Preservation's protection.
毕竟你和其他人不同。你很特别，特别到足以掀翻整张牌桌。那股*力量*，你不想使用它吗？或者…你不想摆脱它吗？你不想靠它名扬宇宙吗？

It's clear you're not just one of the crowd. You possess a distinct quality, so magnetic that it could sway the outcome of any game. That *power*, you really don't wish to use it? Or... you don't want to be rid of it? Why not use it to etch your name across the stars?
那众人恐惧却渴望的力量，就在你双手一握中……
The power that men both fear and desire is right in the palms of your hands...
...{M#Mr.}{F#Miss} Stellaron, have I hit the nail on the head?
I don't know what you're talking about.
Your acting's good, I like that.
I'm warning you, you need to leave now.
Warning me! Hahaha, you're too funny.
你不用现在答复我，思考也需要时间。等时机成熟，我自然会来找你。
You don't have to answer me now. Sit on it for a while. When the time is right, I will look for you again.
当然，你也可以和同伴商量，甚至反过来利用我，我很欢迎——因为这也是在向我展示你们的价值。
Of course, you can confer with your colleagues as well, or go as far as to use me in turn — I welcome that notion. Because it will also show me your true value.
我从不做赔本买卖的，希望各位「朋友」…别让我失望。
I don't do deals where I'm on the losing end. So, I hope that "friends"... don't let me down.
I cannot make this decision on my own.
我说了，不用急着答复，因为无论如何…结果都不会变。
I already said there's no rush to give me an answer. Because no matter what happens... the outcome will remain the same.
我说了，不用急着答复，因为无论如何…结果都不会变。
I already said there's no rush to give me an answer. Because no matter what happens... the outcome will remain the same.
哦对了，临走前，咱们再玩个游戏吧。很简单，猜猜筹码在我哪只手里——就当是认识一下，好让你更了解我这人的性格，和做事方式……

Oh yes, before I go, let's play another game — a simple game, to get to know each other better. You just have to guess which hand the chip is hiding in. It'll help you get a better grasp on my personality, and the way I do things...
叮——一枚筹码被抛向空中，又眨眼间消失不见，取而代之的是两只紧握的手，横在你的面前。
Ding— A chip is tossed into the air, and in the blink of an eye, it disappears, replaced by two clenched fists held out in front of you.
左还是右？准备好——我要揭晓答案了。
Left or right? Get ready, I'm about to reveal the answer.
…哦，好像还没问你选哪边呢。但没关系，因为——
...Oh, I didn't get your answer. But that's fine, because...
怎么了，拉帝奥？别愁眉苦脸的了…嘿，我才注意到，你那英俊的石膏头呢？
What is it, Ratio? Why the long face... Hey, I just realized, where's that handsome bust of yours?
你迟到了，整整4分<unbreak>16</unbreak>秒。你最好是用这段时间解开了阿基维利陨落之谜——如果没有，那我会忠告你别去找无名客的麻烦。
You're late, by four minutes and sixteen seconds. You'd better have solved the mystery of Akivili's fall. Otherwise, I'd suggest not tangling with the Nameless.
找麻烦？连你也这么觉得？就没人相信我真的只是想和他们交朋友？
You mean you don't believe me when I say I truly wish to befriend them?
聒噪的家伙可交不到朋友。一个小知识：阿蒂尼孔雀是宇宙中叫声数一数二难听的鸟类，而你这身行头正像一只花枝招展的孔雀……
Clamorous people do not make friends. Fun fact: The Attini Peacock boasts one of the universe's more jarring songs, and your choice of attire is somewhat peacock-esque.
…看来这只孔雀的羽毛还被人拔光了——行李被家族没收了？
...It seems this peacock is short of a feather or two. The Family's been rummaging through your things, haven't they?
嗯，都被那穿灰西装的给扣了，所有的礼金，还有存放「基石」的匣子…嗯？你往哪走呢？
Yeah, by that gray-suited fellow. All the cash gifts, and the box containing the Cornerstones... Eh? Where're you going?
打道回府，告诉公司有个蠢货把一切都搞砸了。
Back home, to tell the corporation that some idiot ruined everything.
几块石头罢了，这么悲观干嘛？没了又怎样？
It's nothing more than a few rocks, why so serious? Who cares if they're gone?
没了那块「砂金石」，你就只是个被公司判了死刑的茨冈尼亚奴隶——还是说，你脖子上那行「商品编码」也是琥珀王的恩赐？
Without that aventurine stone, you're nothing more than a doomed Sigonian thrall sentenced to die by the IPC. Or is that serial number on your neck a cherished memento from the Amber Lord?
…哦，可以啊，幽默！看来我们这位博学的朋友是好好备过课了。
...Hah, you're funny, I'll give you that! It appears our erudite friend has done his homework.
这是我的工作，不然一个赌徒要怎么替公司收复{RUBY_B#边陲监狱}匹诺康尼{RUBY_E#}？
It's my job. How would a gambler wrest {RUBY_B#Frontier Prison}Penacony{RUBY_E#} back for the IPC otherwise?
放心吧，教授，我有的是办法。家族害怕公司搞事，所以才处处针锋相对…搞不好，匹诺康尼从始至终就是「同谐」的阴谋。

Don't worry, Doctor, I have my ways. The Family fears interference from the IPC, hence their constant intervention... Or, to play devil's advocate, perhaps Penacony might have always been a ruse under the guise of "the Harmony?"
要我说，那封邀请函就是个自导自演的幌子，或许是他们想在谐乐大典上做点什么出格的事……
If you ask me, that invite is nothing but a self-planted diversion, a red herring. Or maybe they're thinking of pulling off something big during the Charmony Festival...
…又或者邀请者另有其人，但他们默许了，想将计就计再布个更大的。无所谓，家族也好，「钟表匠的遗产」也罢，能为我所用就行。
...Or someone else made the invite, and they acquiesced to elevating the magnitude of the plan. Regardless — be it The Family or the Watchmaker's Legacy, as long as they're all useful to me.
Get to the point. What's your plan?
现在没必要讲那么清楚——还不是亮出底牌的时候。
No need to expand on that now. It's not yet time to reveal my trump card.
该死的赌徒，合作的前提是互相信任——茨冈尼亚人的学前教育里不包含这个吗？
Damned gambler. Any true collaboration demands trust. Did that notion somehow escape your Sigonian upbringing?
所以你也不信任我，这不就行了？还有，我没读过书，我父母也确实没教过这个——很遗憾，他们还没来得及教就走了。
So you don't trust me either. Now that was easy, wasn't it? Also, I didn't go to school, and my parents didn't teach me any of that. A pity, they left before they could impart any life lessons.
别在意。但他们教过我「朋友就是埃维金人的武器」——在「同谐」虎视眈眈的情况下，咱们的「朋友」确实越多越好。
I'm not offended. But they did teach me that friends are weapons of the Avgins. Even under the watchful eye of the Harmony, we need as many friends as we can get.
我想想啊，流光忆庭和星穹列车已经接触过了，泯灭帮…多半没戏，纯美骑士团还不知道是否会赴约，至于「酒馆」的家伙们……

Let's see, the Garden of Recollection and the Astral Express have already made contact. The Annihilation Gang... I can't really count on them. The Knights of Beauty haven't given their answer, and as for that bunch at the Tavern...
…说到这个，刚才遇见个女人，说是巡海游侠。我总觉得哪里不对劲，你去帮我探探她的底细……
...Speaking of which, I ran into a woman just now who introduced herself as a Galaxy Ranger. The whole conversation felt off. Help me look into her...
…不至于这么讨厌我吧？唉，看来还是得靠自己了。
...You don't really disdain me that much, do you? Well, seems like I'm on my own again.
欢迎光临白日梦酒店——愿您有一段难忘的度假体验！如有搬运行李到客房的需求，随时可以找我。
Welcome to the Reverie! May you have an unforgettable holiday! Should you need assistance with moving your luggage to your room, feel free to contact me.
听说这座酒店非同一般。
I hear this hotel is pretty unique.
是的！白日梦酒店不仅为大家提供客房，还连接着匹诺康尼的现实与梦境。来自银河各地的客人在这里沉入梦境，开启美梦之旅。

Yeah, it is! The Reverie does not only provide accommodation for its guests, it is also connected to both Penacony's reality and dreamscape. Guests from all over the cosmos come here to immerse themselves in a marvelous, dreamy journey.
好深奥的问题！也许不是所有的梦都是虚假的…至少匹诺康尼的梦不是。应该这样说，它…是另一种现实。
A good question! Maybe not all dreams are false... Well, at least the ones in Penacony aren't. Or perhaps should I say they are... another reality.
Won't I get tired out from all that dreaming?
酒店的「入梦池」会提供舒适的梦境体验，您不用担心！
The hotel's Dreampool provides a comfortable dream experience, so don't you worry about that!
在这里工作的体验怎么样？
啊…您是在问我吗？嗯…还不错，这里人来人往，能听见许多客人讲起他们的冒险见闻。
Er... Are you asking me? Hmm... It's not too bad. Many guests come and go, and I get to hear all about their adventures.
等入梦后，您就能体会到我说的了，匹诺康尼一定不会让您失望！
You'll know what I mean when you enter a dream. Penacony will not disappoint!
嗯！现实中的匹诺康尼就是这座酒店。而梦中的匹诺康尼…是奇迹诞生的地方，奢华的享乐之地，盛大的筵席永不落幕！
Yes! This hotel is Penacony in real life. And the Penacony in the dream... is a place where miracles are born. A land of lavish joy, a grand banquet where the curtains never fall!
唔，很难用词语形容它的美妙。总之，您一定会为之惊叹的！
Mm... It's hard to describe its magnificence in words. In any case, you will surely be awed!
听说家族举办了一场盛会。
I hear The Family held a grand event.
您的消息真灵通！那是家族提供的一个机会，也是盛会之星的传统。
You are well-informed indeed! It is an opportunity provided by The Family, and a tradition on the Planet of Festivities.
大家齐聚一堂，享受着欢乐，追逐着机遇，孤注一掷赌上自己的一切，最后将梦想化作现实！
Everyone gathers in the hall, reveling in merriment, pursuing opportunities, staking all they have on one desperate gamble, and finally, their dreams become reality!
I have nothing else to ask.
祝您在匹诺康尼度过一个愉快的假期！
May you have a pleasant stay in Penacony!
不好意思，可系统里确实没有您说的这个名字……
I'm sorry, but your name really isn't in the system...
但星穹列车收到的信息里，写明了已为我们预订了房间，麻烦您再检查一遍吧。
But in the information I received from the Astral Express, it states that we already reserved rooms. Please check again for me.
我再为您查询一下，请稍等……
Yes ma'am, please give me a moment...
星穹列车，铂金客房共四间…分别是瓦尔特•杨先生、姬子女士、三月七女士，以及……
The Astral Express, four platinum guest rooms... whose names include Mr. Welt Yang, Miss Himeko, Miss March 7th, and...
…丹恒先生。确实只有以上四位的预订信息。
...Mr. Dan Heng. These are the only four names on the reservation list.
是啊，酒店的预订信息里似乎没有你的名字……
Yes, your name isn't on the hotel's reservation list...
遇到了点麻烦。酒店的预订信息里似乎没有你的名字……
We've run into some trouble. Your name isn't on the hotel's reservation list...
And yes, I'm Mr. Dan Heng, reporting for duty.
…我明白了，难怪这里没有{NICKNAME}的名字。我们答复家族的时候，{M#他}{F#她}还没有登上列车。
...I understand. No wonder {NICKNAME}'s name here is missing. When we responded to The Family's invitation, {F#she}{M#he} hadn't even arrived on the Express.
您看这样可以吗？与我们同行的丹恒行程临时有变，没办法入住，能麻烦您把为他预留的房间转让给这孩子吗？人数也对得上。
Something came up in Dan Heng's schedule, and he couldn't make it. I have an idea — could you reassign his room? It's still the same number of people.
这孩子是我们星穹列车的新乘客，我们可以为{M#他}{F#她}的身份作担保。
{M#He's}{F#She's} a new passenger aboard our Astral Express. We can vouch for {M#his}{F#her} status.
I— even if that is so, I'm afraid...
不，我不是怀疑您的身份，只是……
No, I'm not doubting your status, it's just...
嗨，朋友，还好吧？刚才开了个玩笑，希望你不要介意。
Hello, friend. How have you been? I sincerely hope you don't mind.
我为我的失礼道歉，拿去吧，<unbreak>10000</unbreak>信用点——一点见面礼，算是我的补偿。
My apologies for any perceived slight. To show my sincerity, I offer you <unbreak>10,000</unbreak> credits as a gesture of goodwill.
不打不相识，朋友！现在我们就算真正认识了。
What're friends without friction! Now we're truly acquainted.
你一点都不了解朋友是什么。
You have no idea what friends are.
有骨气，我喜欢！你这个朋友我交定了——拿着，<unbreak>20000</unbreak>信用点！
Such integrity, I like it! I must have you as a friend — here, <unbreak>20,000</unbreak> credits!
It's fine, I don't mind it.
我为我的失礼道歉，拿去吧，<unbreak>10000</unbreak>信用点——一点见面礼，算是我的补偿。
My apologies for any perceived slight. To show my sincerity, I offer you <unbreak>10,000</unbreak> credits as a gesture of goodwill.
这就对了！朋友之间不用那么见外。有什么需要的尽管开口，我都包了。
That's the spirit! Nothing should come between friends. Tell me whatever you need, it's on my tab.
Thank you, but we can spare the gifts.
够正直，我喜欢！你这个朋友我交定了——拿着，<unbreak>20000</unbreak>信用点！
How upright, I like you! I must have you as a friend — here, <unbreak>20,000</unbreak> credits!
我还有事，先走一步。相信我们很快会再见的。
Please excuse me, I have some matters to attend to, so I must depart, but I'm sure we'll meet again soon.
哎，还真是一波三折。既然那位星期…星期日先生打了包票，我们总算可以正常入住了吧？
*sigh* It's just one surprise after another. But since that mister... which day was he? Sunday. Since Mr. Sunday has vouched for us, I guess we can finally check in normally?
我也是，现在只想赶紧进到房间，在床上狠狠打滚……
You and me both! I can't wait to get inside and just flop and roll on that comfy bed...
等我们办完手续就可以了。
You'll have to wait for us to finish checking in first.
I hope we don't run into any more trouble.
有句话怎么说的来着？「祸不单行」……
How does the saying go? "Trouble comes in pairs"...
也有种说法叫「否极泰来」。
There's also the saying: "From misfortune comes bliss."
家族的名字都这么奇怪吗？
Are all The Family names so strange?
This is just a stage name... I guess?
我也这么想，这应该是匹诺康尼或家族的某种规矩吧。
I thought so too. It's most likely some rule of Penacony's, or The Family's.
好了，现在大堂也没人排队，我们去找艾丽小姐吧……
Okay, there's no queue in the lobby now. Let's go find Miss Alley...
星穹列车的各位贵客，入住手续已经办理完成了。先前带来的诸多不便，万分抱歉。
Esteemed guests of the Astral Express, your check-in procedure is complete. Please forgive us for any previous inconvenience caused.
这是各位的「梦境护照」——它是酒店客房的房卡，也集成了您在「白日梦酒店」需要的全部功能和信息，并提供智能协助。
This is your Dreamscape Pass: It serves as your hotel room key, as well as a directory of all the amenities and information you require at The Reverie. It even provides smart assistance.
同时，它还是一份特别的匹诺康尼纪念品，独一无二，只属于您！
At the same time, it is also Penacony's special one-of-a-kind souvenir that belongs only to you!
您可以活用梦境护照提供的「打卡」功能，记录您在美梦中的点点滴滴，收获各种快乐，并制作出专属于您的「梦境手账」——
You can use the Dreamscape Pass's provided clock-in feature to record every moment of your wonderful dream, save your favorite happy bits, and create a Dreamscape Scrapbook that is uniquely yours.
具体的使用方法，梦境护照也会为您提供完整指引。
Regarding the method of usage, the Dreamscape Pass will guide you through the process.
愿各位在匹诺康尼尽情享受美梦，乘坐那边的电梯就可以抵达客房了。
I wish you all pleasant dreams in Penacony. You may take the elevator over there to reach your guest rooms.
好耶——我们现在就出发吧！
怎么了，还不打算入睡？是找不到房间，还是有心事想找我聊聊？
What's wrong? Not turning in? Can't find your room, or do you have something on your mind?
谈及盛会之星，就不得不提到「钟表匠」，匹诺康尼家喻户晓的大亨。财富、名誉、地位…他靠双手打拼出了所有人向往的事业，成为梦想的象征。

One can't discuss the Planet of Festivities without mentioning the Watchmaker — Penacony's household name and figure. Fortune, fame, status... He built everyone's futures with his bare hands, and became the symbol of dreams.
但这些故事有多少是真…却无迹可寻。钟表匠的出身和过去众说纷纭，也有人怀疑他只是一个家族虚构的形象。

But the veracity of these stories... remains untraceable. Many have their own opinions on the Watchmaker's origin and past, and there are even some who suspect he is a conceptual construct of The Family.
暂时，我不认为这封邀请函真的和钟表匠有关，他的遗产…更像是一种引人耳目的说辞。
For now, I do not think this invite is linked to the Watchmaker. His legacy... It sounds more like a marketing hook to drum up more traffic, if nothing else.
别有用心的公司使节，巧舌如簧的精明商人，张扬轻浮的阔绰公子…也许都是吧，直觉告诉我，他还有深藏不露的一面。

An IPC ambassador who knows more than he lets on, a silver-tongued businessman, a flamboyant and debonair aristocrat... He could be all of them. My instincts tell me he's much more than meets the eye.
在形势明朗前，我们最好和各方都保持良好的关系，但同时也要保持警惕。
Before the dust settles, we should maintain amicable relations with all camps, while keeping our guards up.
梦中的匹诺康尼被划分为十二片独立的梦境，听说初次入梦时，不同人去往的目的地也不尽相同。
The dream Penacony is divided into twelve individual dreamscapes. I've heard that the destinations vary for different people when they first enter the dream.
我的话…会期待「热砂的时刻」，那里的野风、酒馆和{RUBY_B#「苏乐达™盛会海选•热砂分会场」}盛会海选{RUBY_E#}更有无名客的开拓色彩。「朝露的时刻」也是个不错的选择，可以借机拜访下家族。

As for me... I look forward to the Moment of Scorchsand — its wild winds, taverns, and {RUBY_B#SoulGlad™ Festivity Auditions • Scorchsand Venue}festive choices{RUBY_E#} have more of a Nameless Trailblaze vibe. The Moment of Morning Dew is also a decent choice — I can use that chance to visit The Family.
因为种种意外耽误了这么久，想必你也累坏了吧——开拓之余，也别忘了好好放松哦。晚安，做个好梦。
You must be exhausted from everything that's happened so far. Even if you're Trailblazing, you mustn't forget to relax. Goodnight, and sweet dreams.
这里的装潢实在是有些…吵闹。这就是银河上流人士的生活么……
The decor in here's a little... loud for my tastes. So this is how astral high society does things, huh...?
据说是匹诺康尼的历史名人，他的传奇经历口口相传，激励人们来到盛会之星追逐梦想。真是个有趣的人，想来其遗产也极具吸引力吧。

They say he's a historically important figure in Penacony, and tales of his life have been handed down over generations. Such tales encourage believers to come to the Planet of Festivities to pursue their dreams. He's an interesting fellow, that's for sure, and his legacy still has the power to draw people in.
不过，他为何会与邀请函扯上关系，又为何会出现在疑似无名客发出的密文里…我暂时也没有头绪。
But how and why he's involved with that invite, and why his name popped up in the encrypted message allegedly sent by a Nameless... I've got no leads for now.
家族信仰「同谐」，他们救苦援弱的善迹在星间闻名遐迩，匹诺康尼的稳定与繁荣与之息息相关。
The Family believes in the Harmony, and their altruism is well-known across the stars — a trait that is intimately tied to Penacony's stability and prosperity.
但也有些势力始终对家族保持关注，认为他们温和的言语中另有它意…但考虑到家族对访客一贯的友好态度，我们暂时不用过分担心。

But some factions have always been wary of The Family — suspecting that their benevolence and eloquence belie an ulterior motive... So far, it seems to me that The Family treats their guests with courtesy, so I don't think we need to worry about that for now.
梦中的匹诺康尼被分成十二个时刻，我个人对「太阳的时刻」很感兴趣，那是一座承载了匹诺康尼历史、文化的观赏梦境。
The dream Penacony is divided into twelve moments. Personally, I'm interested in the Moment of Sol — it's a visual dreamscape steeped in Penacony's history and civilization.
匹诺康尼大博物馆、初醒图书馆、折纸大学…这些地方都有可能存放着我们想要探寻的过去。
Penacony's Grand Museum, the Primal Waking Library, the Paperfold academy... The pasts that we chase may be stored in these places.
通过客房的入梦池就可以去往「真正的匹诺康尼」，准备好了就出发吧。祝你在梦中玩得愉快。
Past the guest room's Dreampool is the real Penacony. Let's get ready to move out. Pleasant dreams.
哇，你是不是也激动得睡不着觉！我已经迫不及待想见识梦中的世界了！
Can't sleep from all the excitement, huh? I can't wait to experience the dream world!
Where are you thinking of going?
那肯定是「薄暮的时刻」啦！来度假胜地怎么可以不去购物天堂！我已经准备好装满购物袋了！
The Moment of Dusk, obviously! How can you not visit the shopping paradise when you're at the resort of all resorts! I'm all ready to fill my bags to the brim!
嗯…买完东西之后，就换上美美的晚礼服，去匹诺康尼大剧院欣赏知更鸟小姐的演唱吧！
Hmm... After doing my shopping, I'll get all dolled up in an evening gown to attend Miss Robin's show at Penacony Grand Theater!
说来有些在意，杨叔似乎也发现了，知更鸟小姐的声音听着有些疲惫…我不知道怎么形容，就是和平时不太一样？
You know, it's weird. Welt noticed it too, about how Miss Robin's voice sounded somewhat weary... I can't quite put my finger on it, but it was different than usual?
是不是之前的银河巡回演唱会累到了？这种情况还坚持演出，知更鸟小姐真是艺人的楷模啊！
Could she be tired out from her Cosmic Concert Tour? Insisting on performing under such circumstances, Miss Robin is a superstar among celebrities!
开始我还以为这次真是来度假的，但现在…我觉得这场「盛会」一定非同一般！各方势力解读谜语，争夺遗产，简直和侦探小说一模一样！

Here I was, thinking of some good ol' relaxation, but nope! This "event" is a wild ride! The various factions deciphering the riddle, a power struggle of past legacies — feels like we're in a live-action detective saga!
说不定还会有亲人反目、家破人亡、阴阳两隔、血流成河之类的经典桥段，那可太刺激了……

Who knows, maybe we'll even witness classic scenarios like family feuds, tragic losses, worlds torn apart, espionage situations, rivers running red with blood, stuff like that! This is simply too thrilling...
You've got quite the active imagination.
I too wanna see a river of blood!
Just kidding, how could that be possible?
放心，反正天塌下来，也有杨叔和姬子姐姐顶着呢，要好好享受难得的假期哦！
Don't worry, Welt and Himeko will have our backs if things go wrong. Let's just make the most of it all while we're here.
…厉害啊朋友，才来匹诺康尼没多久，就学会邀人入伙了。
...Well played, friend. You haven't been in Penacony long, but you already know how to rope people in to your cause.
别误会，刚刚只是想提醒你——这地方鱼龙混杂，不怀好意的家伙可太多了，记得多长个心眼，比如…记得关门。
Don't misunderstand, that was a mere reminder. This place runs deep, with plenty of unsavory characters. Don't forget to stay on your toes. Like... keeping your door closed.
那我先走一步，{NICKNAME}！祝你们过得愉快。
I'll make my exit now, {NICKNAME}! Have a pleasant stay.
I said, why haven't you left?
<color=#ff3a3e>…难道是我走错了？这不应该，出声打扰你们前，我再三确认过房间号的……</color>
<color=#ff3a3e>...Have I come to the wrong room? This can't be. Before I said anything, I even made sure that I had the right room number...</color>
<color=#ff3a3e>莫非是厢区…不，楼号也弄错了？抱歉，这座酒店太大了，走廊布置也很相似，稍不注意就会迷失方向……</color>
<color=#ff3a3e>Do I have the wrong wing... or even the wrong block? I'm sorry, this hotel is huge, and the hallways all look the same. It's easy to get lost in here...</color>
<color=#ff3a3e>开个玩笑，别紧张，这的确是你的房间。我只是偶然路过……</color>
<color=#ff3a3e>I jest. Take it easy, this is indeed your room. I was just passing by...</color>
<color=#ff3a3e>我也在找自己的客房，听见这边有动静…便来一探究竟。幸好你没关门，不然就危险了——那个男人显然不怀好意。</color>

<color=#ff3a3e>I'm trying to find my own room too, and I heard a commotion here... so I came to take a look. Luckily your door was open, or it could've gotten dangerous. That man looked like he was up to no good.</color>
<color=#ff3a3e>调侃一下，别在意，这的确是你的房间。此前在走廊上，我见那位先生轻手轻脚，不像是回自己房间，就有所提防……</color>

<color=#ff3a3e>I was just teasing, please forgive me. This is indeed your room. I saw that man snooping about while I was in the hallway, it didn't seem like he was searching for his own room, so it made me wary...</color>
<color=#ff3a3e>后来又看见你走进同一间房间，多少就明白了。刚才情况紧急，一时想不到其他说辞…擅作主张，希望你不要介意。</color>

<color=#ff3a3e>...Is that so? I haven't been able to shake off this familiar feeling since just now... Maybe this is what they call déjà vu, hehe. Or it could purely be serendipity.</color>

<color=#ff3a3e>This may sound embarrassing, because I would sometimes forget stuff I really shouldn't have from past experiences... It's just a habit of mine, don't mind me.</color>

<color=#ff3a3e>...Yes, it was a dream. I had a dream on my way here, and I think you were in it... A blink of a thought in my head...</color>
{NICKNAME}——这是你的名字，对吧？很高兴认识你。
{NICKNAME}, this is your name, isn't it? Pleased to meet you.

*smiles* You forget, that man mentioned it before he left. My memory's not very good, but it's not so bad that I can't remember details from just minutes ago.
<color=#ff3a3e>巡海游侠，黄泉…这是他们称呼我的方式，你随意使用吧。我们应该还会再见面的。</color>
<color=#ff3a3e>Galaxy Ranger, Acheron... This is what they call me. You can call me whatever you want. We will likely meet again.</color>

Lastly, a gentle reminder... There are people who possess unwavering resolution and faith, even unto death, and they do not wield such conviction for good. And on that man's face, I see such a similar expression.
如果身配一柄刀，总要用它斩下些什么。而一名赌徒在满盘皆输前，也一定会破釜沉舟，孤注一掷…我只能言尽于此。
One who wears a blade must use it to cut eventually. And when a gambler has nothing to lose on the table, he will surely go for broke and bet it all on a final hand... That is all I can say.
在做出选择前，你应当知晓这些。告辞了。
I thought you should know all this before making a choice. Goodbye.

不好意思，可以告诉我回大堂的路该怎么走吗？这附近的走廊实在太像了……
Sorry, can you point me in the direction of the lobby? All these hallways really look the same to me...
你为黄泉指明了路，她向你再三道谢。
You show Acheron the way, she thanks you again and again.
你靠近「入梦池」，甜蜜的女声自房间四周传来，空气中有香气氤氲，二者一同将你裹入怀中。这香氛甘冽、深沉、奢华。这令你想到熟成的果实，又像霞光中的远海。

You approach the Dreampool and hear the sweet voice of a female singer coming from all around the room, fragrance permeating the air. Together, these two elements envelop you in their embrace. The scent is sweet, profound, and luxurious — reminiscent of ripened fruits and a distant ocean painted by the hues of a setting sun.
Perhaps, it's time to enter the dream.
你伛身，躺倒在入梦池中央。冰冷的流质没过你的腰肢。女声继续在你的耳边轻语，伴有晚钟声，野风掀起荒原的簌簌声，知更鸟、沙鸥、天鹅与渡鸦的宣叙调……

You curl your body, lying down in the center of the Dream Pool. The icy liquid rises above your waist. The gentle female voice continues to whisper in your ear, accompanied by the tolling of evening bells. The wild wind rustles through the barren plains, while nightingales, seagulls, swans, and ravens add their symphony to the choir...
钟摆震荡。你期待着自己会进入哪一片梦中，昏昏欲睡……
Pendulum swings. You wonder what dream you'll delve into and slowly drift into drowsiness...
The fall didn't hurt at all!
呵呵，毕竟这里是「梦境」嘛。
Hehe, well you are in the Dreamscape, after all.
呵呵，这对第一次进入「梦境」的人来说是很正常的。
Hehe, that's a normal reaction for first-time visitors to the Dreamscape.
呵呵，别担心，你已经顺利抵达「梦境」了哦。
Haha, there's nothing to worry about — you've arrived at the Dreamscape.

Seems like our guest here hasn't gotten used to the transition. Fret not, feeling a sense of weightlessness is normal for new visitors.
知更鸟，请你帮助我们的朋友更好地适应这场美梦吧。
Robin, please guide our friend in getting more comfortable with the new environment.

Robin gives a slight nod to her brother, then locks her emerald gaze with yours. She smiles, and you see ripples shimmering in the depths of her lake-green eyes, followed by a mighty vortex emerging from the depths of the pool.
你的视野变得黯淡，感到身体开始溶解，与流质合而为一。你们共鸣，震颤，以令人沉静的频率浑合。你的心脏正在鼓动，引领一场协奏。

Your vision dims as your body dissolves, becoming one with the fluidity of the time-space. You resonate with and become attuned to the serene fusion of frequencies. Your heart drums, leading this symphony.
没事的，放轻松，很快就会过去。
Don't worry, just relax. You'll be feeling like your normal self in no time.
和声响起。「吸气。」{RUBY_B#他们}它们{RUBY_E#}歌唱。「呼气。」{RUBY_B#她们}它们{RUBY_E#}歌唱。本能令你照做，你感到胸腔中凝滞的流体重新流动。
The choir starts. "Inhale." They sing. "Now Exhale." They chant. Instinct compels, and the stagnant fluid in your chest begins to flow again.
暖意自其中传来，充盈全身。你们的旋律渐慢、渐弱，像一首摇篮曲。一道七色的幻象轻轻抚摸着你的头顶，为你阖眼，动作轻柔，满是怜爱。你感到惬意，沉沉睡去。

A gentle warmth emanates from within, saturating every inch of your being. Your melodies slow down, fade away, like a lullaby. A seven-colored illusion delicately caresses the top of your head and closes your eyes, its movements tender and compassionate. You feel contentment and drift into a deep slumber.
当你再度睁开眼时，方才遭遇的一切仿佛被压缩在一瞬间。你的思绪已经捕捉不到它们了，但身体却因为这刹那安眠而精力充沛——这活力简直前所未有。
You open your eyes and feel a vitality like no other. The difficulty you were experiencing a moment earlier feels like a distant memory.
你现在已经完全掌控梦境了，{NICKNAME}——欢迎来到匹诺康尼。
You should be feeling fully in control now. {NICKNAME}, welcome to Penacony.
什么意思？你对我做了什么？
What does that mean? What did you just do to me?
我只是稍微调整了一下你的精神状态，让你感觉舒服些。
I've merely changed your state of mind for you to feel more at ease.
你刚才是在对我洗脑吗…
我只是稍微调整了一下你的精神状态，让你感觉舒服些。
I've merely changed your state of mind for you to feel more at ease.

It was a song with a harmonic tune.

Relax. She just did some tuning on you with the resonance of the Harmony to allow you to control your limbs freely in the Dreamscape.
匹诺康尼的美梦本质上是由「忆质」构成的世界。只有掌握它的性质，你才能在其中自由行动。
Essentially, the dream of Penacony is a world formed by memoria. Only by fully understanding its nature can you move freely within it.
就像是刚接触游泳的人，经常会因为无法准确地适应浮力而沉入水中；但只要身体习惯了水流，你便可以自如地漂浮在水面上。
It's like learning to swim — it's easy to sink at first when you aren't accustomed to the water, but once you get the hang of it you can float and swim on the surface effortlessly.
That's a great analogy. I get it now.
呵呵，承蒙谬赞。我们对忆质的理解也只是浅尝辄止而已。
Thanks for the compliment. In fact, we don't really have an in-depth understanding of the memoria.
是啊。不过，我们对忆质的理解也只是浅尝辄止而已。
Indeed. But still, we don't really have an in-depth understanding of the memoria.
这么说，我能随便浮在空中？

呵呵，理论上可以，但非常困难。毕竟我们对忆质的理解也只是浅尝辄止而已。
Theoretically, you can, but it would be very difficult to pull off. After all, we don't really have an in-depth understanding of the memoria yet.
除了流光忆庭的忆者，一般人很难随心所欲地操纵忆质。但没关系，在「同谐」的调律下——基本上，你可以依赖现实的物理法则理解梦中世界。

Unless you're one of the Memokeepers of the Garden of Recollection, it can be difficult at first to manipulate the memoria as you wish. But once you've been tuned by the Harmony, you can use the same laws of physics from the real world to understand how the dream world works.
哎呀…你瞧我，职业病又犯了。我总是改不掉这好为人师的毛病。

Don't mind him — he's always like that. Please enjoy the beautiful dreamscape The Family has built for everyone. We shall take our leave. Have a blast!

Welcome to the Gallery of Thoughts! You can think of this as the entrance to the Golden Hour. I'm here to provide guidance to our guests.
咦，您记得我吗？我好开心。

This dream bubble is indeed pricey. Still, please give it some consideration!
The price tag is off the charts. You might as well go rob a bank!
温馨提示，抢劫在匹诺康尼是极其严重的犯罪行为！
Please allow me to remind you that robbery is a serious offense in Penacony.
Well, are you going to buy it?
非常感谢——期待您下次光临！
Thank you. Hope to see you next time!
太可惜了——期待您下次光临！
What a shame. Please come again!
啊，对了！鉴于您是首次在本店体验梦泡——这枚「纪念贴纸」送给您！您可以用它来装饰您的梦境护照，记录您独一无二的匹诺康尼之旅！
Oh, right! As this is your first time using the dream bubble, here's a sticker for you! You can use it to decorate your Dreamscape Pass and commemorate your unique trip to Penacony!
（还以为上来就能找到无名客的线索，果然没那么容易……）
(I was hoping I would find some clues about the Nameless up here... Well, can't expect it to be that easy...)
She went that way. Get her!
(What's going on? What's all the commotion about?)
Don't even think about running away, you stowaway!
S—Sorry for bothering you! Please, I need your help...
保护美少女我义不容辞！
I'll do my best to protect a pretty young lady!
Hey, look! She has an accomplice!
Good work! Now we can nab them both in one go!
行了行了，小子们——到此为止。
你们是怎么办事儿的？睁大眼睛瞧瞧，这姑娘是我们要找的偷渡犯吗？
What's gotten into you all? Open your eyes and take a good look. Is this lady the stowaway we're looking for?
你不知道么？棕色头发、灰马甲——这位就是家族派来看护谐乐大典的治安官啊。
Don't you know him? Look at his brown hair and gray vest. He's the officer sent here by The Family to maintain order at the Charmony Festival.
原、原来如此…报告长官，我们正在捉拿偷渡犯——就是这个小姑娘，可疑得很，一定是她！
I—I see... Sir, the thing is, we're trying to apprehend a stowaway, and that young lady there looks very suspicious. We're sure she's the one!
放屁。你们再好好看看？目击报告说是个银色的家伙，你们给我抓银色头发的小姑娘？能是一回事儿吗？还和客人打上架了？！

That's nonsense. Take another look, will you? The witness report says that the suspect is a lad with silver hair, and you guys are going after a girl with silver hair. Does that even make sense? She's our guest!
Well, just get out of my way and I'll take care of this.
实在不好意思，让尊贵的客人看笑话了。
Sorry for all the trouble you went through back there.
我是猎犬家系的加拉赫，那些蠢货是我豢养的幼犬。
I'm Gallagher from the Bloodhound Family, and those idiots are some young Bloodhounds I've been training.
他们还年轻，不懂事，误会了我的命令，竟然把匹诺康尼的贵客当成了犯人…哎，真是有失礼数。我谨代表猎犬家系向两位致以诚挚的歉意。

Because of their youth and inexperience, they mistook an honored guest of Penacony for a criminal... This is indeed a regrettable mistake. I'd like to offer my sincerest apology to you on behalf of the Bloodhound Family.
猎犬家系是梦境的守门人，在这里负责包括缉拿偷渡犯在内的一系列安保工作。
The Bloodhound Family are the guards of the Dreamscape. We're in charge of the security here, and our duties include arresting people who try to enter our world illegally.
此前我们收到通知，说有不法分子借着盛会的幌子潜入了匹诺康尼。眼下正是谐乐大典前夕，别有用心之人不在少数……

We got a tip that some criminals were planning to take advantage of the festivities around the Charmony Festival to sneak into Penacony. Now that the festival is just around the corner, there are likely many shady characters lurking around...
放心吧，小姐。我相信这是一场误会，这么可爱的女孩怎么会是偷渡犯呢。
Don't worry. I believe this is just a misunderstanding. How could such a lovely girl like you be a stowaway?
…谢谢。如果没有您出手相助，我真的不知道该怎么办了。
...Thanks. Without your kind help, I wouldn't know what to do.
我还有事，先告辞了。如果你们有需要，就找附近的幼犬联络我吧。祝你们享受这场美梦。
I need to get going. If you need help, you can reach out to me through the young Bloodhounds in this area. I wish you an enjoyable experience in this land of dreams.
多亏你刚才出手相助！不然我可能真的要…被抓走了。
I owe you a big one! If it hadn't been for you, I might have been... taken away by them.
Well, my help doesn't come free...
我…我知道，受人恩惠就要付出回报！
I... I understand. It's only right to return the favors I receive!
我才注意到…你是无名客，对不对？是第一次来匹诺康尼吗？
By the way, I've just noticed... You're a Nameless, right? Is this your first time here on Penacony?
因为你身上别着星穹列车的徽章呀，我在大银幕上见过！
You have the Astral Express badge on you. I saw it on the big screen once!
我还知道，你们经常在银河各地到处旅行——你是受家族邀请来的吧？我…我可以担任你的向导！
I also know that you guys often travel around different places in the cosmos. Did The Family invite you here? I—I'd be happy to show you around!
Are the Nameless really that famous?
当然了，星际和平播报前不久才宣传了你们的光辉事迹！
You bet! The Interastral Peace Broadcast recently did a whole segment about your glorious achievements!
我还知道，你们经常在银河各地到处旅行——你是受家族邀请来的吧？我…我可以担任你的向导！
I also know that you guys often travel around different places in the cosmos. Did The Family invite you here? I—I'd be happy to show you around!
想要签名的话，今天不行…
我不是这个意思！虽然崇拜无名客是真的……
That's not what I meant. Though I do admire the Nameless...
我是想说，你是受家族邀请来的吧？我…我可以担任你的向导！
The Family invited you here, right? I—I'd be happy to show you around!
虽然被猎犬家系的人当成了偷渡犯，但我其实是本地人哦——鸢尾花家系的艺者「流萤」！尽管只是临时演员……
Although the Bloodhounds mistook me for a stowaway, I'm actually a local. My name is Firefly, and I'm from the Iris Family. I work as a stage performer, although right now I'm just an extra...
没有演出的时候，我也承接格拉克斯大道周边的接待工作，如果你不介意，我可以带你体验各种有趣的东西！只要好好工作，也许就不会被纠察了……

When there are no acting gigs, I work as a guide near Glaux Avenue. If you don't mind, I can show you all the exciting things around here! Maybe if I do my job as a guide, people will stop suspecting me...
太好了，我正缺一个导游。
That's awesome! I happen to need a tour guide.
不客气，毕竟你帮了我大忙嘛！
Glad to hear that. After all, you just did me a huge favor!
今天没演出，向导工作也不是时时都有嘛…来这里的都是上上之宾，大多都有护从随行……
I'm not booked for any performances, and most visitors to Penacony don't need tour guides anyway... They're all big shots who have their own entourage with them.
Well, you have a job now.
Looks like life on the Planet of Festivities can be pretty tough...
没有没有！匹诺康尼是梦想汇聚的地方，盛大筵席永不落幕！只是大典将近，压力是会比较大……

No, it's not like that! Penacony is where people realize their dreams. There's always a festive atmosphere here! It's just that things can get a little crazy with the Charmony Festival drawing near...
I'm counting on you for a good tour then.
不客气，毕竟你帮了我大忙嘛！
Glad to hear that. After all, you just did me a huge favor!
我？不，不是的…我还不是家族一员，只是在为他们工作……
Me? No, I'm not one of them — not yet. I merely work for them...
你注意到她垂下睫毛，环顾四周，尤其注意哄闹的人群，仿佛有什么东西正藏身其中。但很快，她又收敛情绪，将视线放回到你身上。
You notice her lowering her lashes and looking around, paying close attention to the crowd, as if something is hiding in it. But she quickly collects herself and returns her eyes to you.
…不说这个了！我带你去游览城镇…我们走吧！
...We can talk about that another time! Right now, I wanna give you a tour of the town... Here we go!
谈起大多数人入梦后的第一站，那自然就是「奥帝购物中心」！这里的梦境贩售店超级出名。
The first stop most people head to as soon as they arrive in the Dreamscape is the Oti Mall! The Dreamscape Sales Store here is super famous.
除此之外，还有各种奢侈品、服饰、潮流玩具店，甚至是车行——只要你的「苜蓿币」足够，想买什么东西都不成问题。
There are also stores that sell luxury goods, apparel, trendy toys, and even cars... As long as you have enough Alfalfa coins, you can buy anything you fancy.
这些物品不仅能在梦中流通，也可以通过额外服务「带回」现实。不过，车行的销售窗口现在暂时不对外开放…只能等以后有机会再去买车啦。

Items purchased in the Dreamscape can also be brought into reality through an extra service. Unfortunately, the transfer of automobiles to the real world is not available at the moment... You can come back for them next time.
购物中心外边就是广场，来这里——我请你吃好吃的～
Just outside the mall is the plaza. Follow me! I'll buy you a nice meal!
（借机了解一下当地，也不是坏事。）
(It's not a bad idea to get to know about this place.)
就是这儿啦。你听说过这种说法吗——在梦里，「饥饿」是最珍贵的香料。
We're here. Hey, have you ever heard of this saying that goes, "In a dream, hunger is the most precious spice?"
这里有匹诺康尼绝大多数的特色美食，像是钟表披萨、橡木蛋糕卷、苜蓿色拉…还有经典苏乐达！你随便挑吧，我买单！
Well, you can find all kinds of local delicacies here — Clockie Pizza, Oak Cake Rolls, Alfalfa Salad, and the classic SoulGlad! Feel free to pick anything you like! Today it's my treat!
Thanks. That's very nice of you!
No worries. You can buy me a meal next time!
I should warn you, I do have very expensive tastes...
应、应该没问题吧，我还是有点积蓄的……
Th—That shouldn't be a problem. I have some savings left...
Are you done ordering? Then I'll pay up.
我最喜欢这家店的橡木蛋糕卷，每天都要吃一个。
I love their Oak Cake Rolls! I get one from here every day!
唔，所以每天只能吃一个……
Well, that's why I only have one per day...
没、没问题的！反正是在梦里……
I—I won't put on any weight since this is all a dream...
我们边走边吃吧，去下一站～
Let's walk while we eat. It's time to head to the next stop!
…已经点好了吗？你…挺有眼光的呢！哈哈…那、那我买单了……
...Are you done ordering? You... you have great taste! Haha... I... I'll get the bill...
这里就是刚才提到的奢侈品商店。
This is the luxury store I told about you earlier.
再往下走就是格拉克斯大道——黄金时刻的主干道。
If we keep going, we'll reach Glaux Avenue, which is the road to Golden Hour.
这边这边，给你看个有意思的东西～
Please come this way. Let me show you something interesting.
看，这尊雕像就是匹诺康尼大名鼎鼎的卡通人物——「钟表小子」！
Look! That's the statue of Clockie, Penacony's famous cartoon character!
来自匹诺康尼最长久、最著名的卡通动画，讲述了主人公钟表小子与他的伙伴们，在美梦小镇中生活的冒险故事——至今已经连载万集以上了！

It's the oldest and most famous animation from Penacony. It follows the adventurous life of Clockie and his friends in the town of Dreamville. To date, over <unbreak>10,000</unbreak> episodes have aired!
是啊，我也觉得他很可爱！
I know, right? Isn't he adorable?
His character design is a little... surrealist.
呃…是因为动画风格比较复古吧。
Um... I guess it's because the animation has a retro style.
这个形象真的没有风险吗…
Isn't having a clock as a character a bit... ominous?
欸，风险？为什么？钟表小子可是匹诺康尼家喻户晓的大明星，应该没什么问题…吧。
Ominous? Clockie is a household name here. There would never be anything ominous about him... right?
不过你知道吗？据说钟表小子的原型，就是那位大名鼎鼎的——「钟表匠」。
By the way, do you know that Clockie's design is said to be inspired by none other than the legendary Watchmaker?
你竟然不知道？他可是匹诺康尼历史上的传奇大亨，梦境世界的奠基人，将「梦想」化作现实的人！
I can't believe you haven't heard of him. He was a legendary tycoon in the history of Penacony — the founder of the Dreamscape, the man who turned dreams into reality!
关于钟表匠的出身，人们众说纷纭：有人说他是来自天外的行商，有人说他是监狱星的囚犯，还有人说钟表匠只是一个符号，其实根本不存在这号人物……

There are different stories out there about the Watchmaker's origin. Some said he was a traveling merchant from beyond the sky, some claimed that he was exiled to Penacony as a prisoner... Some speculate that he wasn't even a real person, just a symbol...
没人知道他究竟是什么来历，但人人都想复现他的成功，成为下一个钟表匠！
The true story is anyone's guess, but everyone aspires to emulate his success and be the next Watchmaker!
他的事迹传向银河，令那些心怀梦想的人们蜂拥而至，一场又一场宴席造就了如今的盛会之星。在匹诺康尼，这个名字无人不知，无人不晓。

As his inspiring story became known across the cosmos, those with a dream flocked to Penacony in droves. They held feast after feast, eventually building the Planet of Festivities we have today. Everyone in Penacony knows this name.
虽然动画里的「钟表小子」只是个冒冒失失的吹牛大王…不过，我还是最相信钟表匠是一位无名客的说法！毕竟开垦梦境这种事，听着就很「开拓」！

The cartoon character Clockie is portrayed as reckless and full of hot air, but I believe the real Watchmaker was a Nameless! After all, creating the Dreamscape sounds like just the kind of thing a Trailblazer would do.
…啊！我突然意识到——如果钟表匠真是无名客，那他岂不是你的老前辈？哎，你想和他拍照留个念吗？我可以帮你哦。
...Hold on... If the Watchmaker really was a Nameless, wouldn't that make him your predecessor? Would you like to take a picture with him?
My pleasure! Here, give me your phone.
I think I'll pass. I'm allergic to camera lenses...
这样啊…那我们就去别的地方吧。
I see... Let's go somewhere else then.
Aha, I know how this goes. You're gonna charge me a lot just for taking the pic, aren't you?
Of course not! What were you thinking?
你似乎听到了某种细嫩又尖锐的求救声。如无意外，这可怜的呼喊应该是钟表小子……
You hear a pitiful cry for help. The cry is...
咦，怎么了？钟表小子脸上有什么东西吗？
Eh, what's that? It looks like there's something on Clockie's face.
救救！救救啾！揪我出来啾！救救啾！
Help! Help me! Pull me out! Help me!
钟表小子的眼睫毛似乎在请求你把它揪出来——这听起来可真是太*梦境*了。所以，你会怎么做？
The eyelashes are begging to be pulled out — which feels a little too much like a dream.
你想合影留念吗？那就把手机交给我吧，我来拍～
You want a photo with him? Sure! Please give me your phone. I'll take it for you!
好啦！看上去真不错，你好上相呀。
It's done! It came out great — you're very photogenic.
救救！救救我啾！揪我出来啾！啾！
Help! Help me! Pull me out! Please!
虽然你与钟表小子合了一张完美的影，但那撮眼睫毛似乎并不领情。
You took a nice pic with Clockie.
它依旧喋喋不休，希望有人——意思是*你*——能来救救可怜的它。
But the eyelashes are still begging for help.
嗨！嗨嗨嗨！谢谢，你！美丽的，人！
Hey! Hey, hey, hey! Thank... you, beautiful person!
我会，报答你！到大树，去！到大树，去！我会，给，你好看的！
I'll... repay your kindness! Go to... the tree! Please go... there! There! I'll show... you something... nice!
发出一声可爱又古怪的啼叫后，这只有棱有角的小鸟飞向了远方。
After letting out an adorable chirp, the bird flies away.
它在临走前似乎提到了「报答」——前提是要你到一个叫「大树」的地方去。
Before it left, it seems to have offered some kind of "reward." The main thing is that you need to go to "the tree" first.
或许…你可以在那里和它重逢，看看那「好看的」东西究竟是什么。
Perhaps... you can meet with it again there. See just what exactly the "nice" thing is.
钟表小子的雕像…怎么了吗？你刚才怎么突然跳起来了？
Is there something wrong with Clockie's statue? Why did you suddenly jump just now?
我救了一只有棱有角的小鸟。
I rescued a bird — a bird with sharp edges and points.
有棱有角的小鸟…可我好像什么都没看见欸。
A bird with sharp edges and points... Umm, I don't think I saw it.
我把他的眼睫毛拔下来了。
眼睫毛？可钟表小子没有那种东西呀……
I can actually jump in this world!? Color me surprised!
是哦，你刚才跳起来了…很突然。
Really? You jumped just now — it was really sudden, too.
嗯…既然你没事，那我们就出发去下一站吧。离这里不远，跟我来～
Well... If you're okay, let's move on to the next stop, which is just a stone's throw away from here. Please follow me...
看到远处那座建筑了吗？那就是著名的「大剧院」——匹诺康尼的另一个重要地标！
Can you see that building in the distance? That's the famous Grand Theater, another great landmark of Penacony!
有没有觉得它的轮廓很独特？因为在现实中，它曾是阿斯德纳的中央监狱。是家族在梦境中将其修葺一新，改造成如今光芒万丈的匹诺康尼大剧院。

Has a pretty unique shape, doesn't he? In the real world, it was originally the central prison of Asdana. The Family renovated it in the Dreamscape and transformed it into the glorious Penacony Grand Theater.
从建成的那一刻起，大剧院便不断地为整个美梦世界奏响《谐乐颂》。
Since the moment it was built, the Grand Theater has graced the entire Dreamscape with its rendition of the Odes of Harmony.
而在一纪一度的谐乐大典上，家族成员会在剧院中齐聚，恭迎{RUBY_B#「同谐」的化身}「齐响诗班」{RUBY_E#}降临，为匹诺康尼带来恒久安宁的祝福。

During the once-in-an-era Charmony Festival, Family members will gather at the theater to welcome the {RUBY_B#Embodiment of Harmony}Harmonious Choir{RUBY_E#} that blesses Penacony with everlasting peace.
我们所在的地方，正是黄金时刻中最好的观景地点！你看，这里还专门设置了望远镜呢！这一纪的谐乐大典马上要开幕啦，记得提前来这里占位哦。
And here we are! The best viewing spot in all of Golden Hour! Look, there's even a telescope here! When the Charmony Festival arrives, remember to be here early if you wanna get a seat.
接下来带你去个能好好玩的地方。
Next, I'll bring you somewhere you can really have fun.
前面就是苏乐达主题休闲区——「艾迪恩公园」。这里人多，要跟紧我哦。
That place up ahead is Aideen Park — everything here is themed around SoulGlad. It's a little crowded, so make sure you stay close to me.
这里就是黄金时刻规模最大的公园，也是匹诺康尼汽水文化的标志——那座超级巨大的汽水瓶，就是苏乐达企业的总部大楼！
This is the largest park in Golden Hour — it represents the soda culture of Penacony. That gigantic soda bottle houses the headquarters of the SoulGlad Enterprise!
据说，苏乐达起源于监狱时期流行的甜味药水，由苏萨先生发明，因此得名苏萨水。后来星际行商艾迪恩发现其中商机，便买下了苏萨水的配方。

SoulGlad is said to have originated from a sweet medicinal syrup popular during the Prison Era. Invented by a man named Sousa, it was thus called the Sousa Juice. Aideen, an interstellar traveling merchant, saw the potential in the beverage and purchased the formula.
他在其中打入大量气泡，更名为「苏乐达」，还创造了「糖浆主义」——声称饮用苏乐达是一种全新的生活方式，并借此缔造了如今的商业奇迹。

Aideen then carbonated the beverage and renamed it "SoulGlad." He also pioneered the school of thought known as "Syrupism," in which he promoted the consumption of SoulGlad as a new kind of lifestyle. And just like that, he created a commercial miracle.
你知道吗？苏萨水最初的配方中，有一种被称作梦见草的原料彻底灭绝了。所以现在只有在匹诺康尼的梦里才能尝到「元年苏乐达」的味道。

Did you know? One of the ingredients in the original recipe for Sousa Juice, known as Dreamleaf, has gone extinct. That means the only place you can get a taste of Epochal SoulGlad is in Penacony's Dreamscape.
也只有在这里，你才能充分理解「糖浆主义」的真正内核……
This is also the only place where one can fully experience the core values of Syrupism...
她突然顿住了。你注意到某一瞬间，女孩的目光变得小心谨慎，直刺向你的眉心，又或是你身后的某处……
She abruptly freezes. In that fleeting moment, you notice a cautious shift in the girl's gaze, piercing directly into your brow, or perhaps somewhere behind you...
下一刹那，女孩温和的面容恢复如初。她向你报以一个恰到好处的微笑。
Firefly returns to her warm and gentle disposition.
…事不宜迟，我带你四处转转吧！
...Time waits for no one! Let me show you around!
这些正在演奏自己的乐器们，被称作「美梦剧团」。
See these musical instruments playing themselves with no human performers? That's the Sweet Dreams Troupe.
在匹诺康尼之梦中，有许多物品、设施受到忆质影响，拥有了自我意识。它们被家族驯化，成为了服务宾客的美梦剧团。

In Penacony, many objects and facilities have gained self-awareness due to the influence of the memoria. After being tamed by The Family, some of them formed the Sweet Dreams Troupe to provide entertainment for guests.
不过，这些小东西也会受到危险的情绪或记忆影响，变成四处破坏的「惊梦剧团」…如果不小心撞上了，一定要向附近的安保人员求助哦。

Be careful, though — sometimes these animated objects can be affected by dangerous emotions or memories and transform into the destructive Dreamjolt Troupe... If you ever run into them, go ask the security guards nearby for help.
呀，那有一位游乐设施的管理员！
Hey, there's a ride attendant over there!
我去帮你领些「艾迪恩代币」吧——这样你就可以随意游玩这些游乐设施了。
Let me get some Aideen Tokens for you. With those, you'll be able to try any of the attractions here that you fancy.
您好，管理员先生。我的朋友是第一次来匹诺康尼，可以为{M#他}{F#她}兑换一些艾迪恩代币吗？
Hi, there. This is my friend's first visit to Penacony. May I get some Aideen Tokens for {M#him}{F#her}?
当然没问题，请出示一下您的梦境护照。
Of course. Please show me your Dreamscape Pass.
姓名——{NICKNAME}…好了，请拿好您的护照和这些代币。祝您游戏愉快。
Name— {NICKNAME}... Here's your Dreamscape Pass and tokens — be sure to keep a good hold of them! Have a good time!
总共十枚哦。您现在可以尽情享受匹诺康尼的各种游乐设施了。
Ten. You may now enjoy the attractions in Penacony to the fullest.
谢谢您！{NICKNAME}，我们快去体验下附近的游乐设施吧，目标就暂定为——用光所有代币！
Thanks! {NICKNAME}, let's try out some of the games nearby. Our goal is to use all the tokens!
Let's live it to the fullest!
不会的，这个玩起来很快的，一眨眼就输…就花光了！你试试就知道啦！
Not at all! You're going to lose — I mean — spend all of them in no time once you start playing! Just try it and you'll see!
Let me see which one we should try first...
考虑到你是第一次来，不如就从最简单的开始吧，美梦排排乐和幸运转盘都很容易上手哦。
Since this is your first time here, I say we start with the easiest games. The Dreamy Slots and Lucky Wheel are pretty straightforward.
你先玩哦，我去买点喝的。
You keep playing. I'll go and get some drinks.
（流萤好慢啊…怎么还没回来？咦，她往酒水吧方向去了…）
(What's taking Firefly so long? Eh, she's heading toward the bar...)
（点数全部花完了，去找流萤吧。）
(I've used up all the tokens. Time to meet Firefly.)
呀…怎么啦，已经玩够了吗？
What do you say? Ready to call it a day?
正好，我也有点累了。我们在酒水吧坐会儿吧。
I'm a bit tired too. Let's sit down at the snack bar for a while.
这片梦想之地——匹诺康尼——「黄金的时刻」，还是很棒的，对不对？
Penacony's Golden Hour is pretty amazing, isn't it?
还不错，这里的一切都很梦幻。
It's nice. Everywhere is just magical.
是啊，一个博爱而宽容的梦…就像家族本身。
I know, right? It's a dream that's loving and forgiving to everyone, just like The Family.
你听起来有些悲伤…为什么？
倒也谈不上悲伤。只是…这梦境太过博爱，太过宽容了。
I'm not sad. It's just that... this dream is so loving and forgiving.
一般般，比不上我去过的其他世界。
It's alright. I've seen better places on other worlds.
不愧是无名客。但对我来说…家族的「万众一心」铸就了它，也让这梦境变得博爱而宽容，就像家族本身。

I'm not surprised to hear that from a Nameless. If you ask me, I'd say it was the unity of The Family that brought this dream into existence — and the dream has become just as loving and forgiving as The Family.
它浩瀚，又深沉。像一片海洋，就连籍籍无名的小人物也可以安眠其中。
It's vast and deep like an ocean. Even the humblest people can find solace here.
…我真的很感谢，你选择出手相助。也因此，我才能向你介绍这座乐园——它愿意接纳我，尽管我不属于这里。我也爱它，所以才想要…同别人分享。

...I really appreciate your help earlier today — that's why I took the chance to introduce this beautiful place to you. It was willing to accept me, even though I didn't belong here. I've grown very fond of this place, and that makes me want to... share it with others.
I am... At least for now...
不要把情感寄托在这种东西上。
You shouldn't attach your feelings to stuff like this.
你说得对…但人们无所依靠时，总归会想要找些什么来安慰自己的。
You're right... But when people have nothing to rely on, they always seek out things to find comfort in.
我…我是有合法身份的…现在……
I... I'm a lawful resident... at least now I am...
{NICKNAME}，能再靠近些吗？——再近些，我想问你一个问题……
{NICKNAME}, could you come closer? Closer, please. I have a question for you...
…请问，你是一个人来匹诺康尼的吗？
我的朋友去其他梦境了。
My friends went to the other Dreamscapes.
I am. At least for now.
It depends on what you want to do.
你或许意识到了，也可能没有，但我刚才一直在带你绕远路，去各种各样的地方，这是因为……
I'm not sure whether you have realized it or not, but I took you through a very long, scenic route and visited all kinds of places just now because...
——别回头。我确定他的目标就是你，从我们和加拉赫先生告别起就没跟丢过。
Don't turn around. I'm certain that you're his target. He's been on our tail since we parted ways with Mr. Gallagher.
我想过这人是不是你的朋友，但直觉告诉我不是。
I wondered whether he was a friend of yours, but my instinct told me he wasn't.
他身高大约一米八上下，误差在两公分以内，体格健壮，明显锻炼过。步幅很长，但听不见踏地声，很轻巧。这种步法不会留下脚印……

He's about 5 feet <unbreak>11</unbreak> inches tall, give or take. Judging from his strong build, it's clear that he's well-trained. He walks in long strides, but his steps are light and barely audible. That way of walking doesn't leave footprints...
…看来他很擅长战斗——隐秘的那种。他手掌宽大，但手指细长、灵活。我猜他习惯用刀。短刀，匕首……
...He looks like a skilled fighter, the covert kind. He has large palms, yet his fingers are slender and nimble. I reckon he has experience using knives, like a short sword or dagger...
你认识这么一个人吗？酒红色外套，绿眼睛，深蓝色头发……
Do you know anybody like that? A maroon jacket, emerald eyes, dark blue hair...
哟，这不是我忠实的大顾客——{NICKNAME}嘛！
Hey, well if it isn't my most loyal customer, {NICKNAME}?
真是好久不见啊，亲爱的！
It's been such a long time, old friend!
没想到能在这儿遇见你——哎呀，我真是走大运了！
What a coincidence to run into you here! Oh, my! I'm in luck today!
对，你的老朋友桑博！如假包换！
Yes, it's none other than your old friend, Sampo!
I can't be dreaming, can I...
说笑了伙计，这是匹诺康尼——你就是在做梦啊！
You're such a hoot, buddy. This is Penacony, of course you're in a dream!
见到我是不是很意外？这都是多亏了你——雅利洛-VI现在可是门户大开啊！
You're surprised to see me? You know, it's thanks to you that I can be here — you helped Jarilo-VI open up to the outside!
诶哟，三月姑娘，你这就不记得我了？亏我在贝洛伯格帮了你们那么多忙……
Oh, Miss March! Don't you remember me? After all the favors I did for you all in Belobog...
This is Firefly. She's my tour guide.
你什么眼神，三月七长这样？
You should get your eyesight checked. Are you sure March 7th looks like this?
…我叫流萤，是鸢尾花家系的艺者。
...My name is Firefly. I'm a stage performer from the Iris Family.
喔！原来是这样，我就说——也没过去多久，三月姑娘这变化也忒大了。
Oh, no wonder! I was just thinking, there's no way Miss March could change her appearance so dramatically in such a short time.
幸会，幸会！我叫桑博，是{NICKNAME}的老朋友，请多关照！
It's my pleasure to meet you! My name is Sampo — and I'm an old pal of {NICKNAME}'s.
哈哈，咱俩的电波可是越来越一致了！
Haha, seems like we're getting on the same wavelength now!
Since when did I acknowledge you as my friend?
Oh, don't be like that. You're making things awkward.
哎哎，别这样！咱俩好容易再见一面，怎么说走就走？
Come on! It's been so long since we last met each other. How can you just walk away like that?
桑博先生…在匹诺康尼做什么？
Mr. Sampo, what's the purpose of your visit to Penacony?
做什么？哈哈，姑娘这话有意思，在匹诺康尼还能做什么？无非就是到处转转，做做白日梦…度假呗。
My purpose? Haha, you're funny. What else can I do in Penacony? Well, I just hang around, daydream, and do the things that anyone on vacation would do.
哎，说到这个，正好——伙计，咱俩难得在这匹诺康尼见上一面，不如让我带你们在这附近好好逛逛吧。
Speaking of which... Old pal, since fate brings us here, I'm obliged to give you a tour of this area.
我观察你们好久了，流萤小姐固然了解匹诺康尼，但要论「大人的娱乐」…恐怕还是我桑博更胜一筹啊。
I've been watching you two for a long time. Miss Firefly does know Penacony well, but when it comes to "entertainment for grownups," I think I can do much better.
看来我说中了？来吧，二位——让我老桑博带你们好好体验一下大人的世界！
Looks like my analysis is spot-on. Follow me, you two. Let me give you a taste of the adult world!
哦！上手就命中了，状态不错呀！
Wow! You won something on your first attempt! Impressive!
天啊，头等奖…你的运气也太好了吧！
Holy moly, it's the grand prize... Today must be your lucky day!
要绕到对面，恐怕得跑好长一段路——各位，咱们坐弹球机蹦到对岸去吧！
It takes a long time to reach the other side on foot. How about we just bounce over there using the pinball machine!
弹球机？{M#他}{F#她}还没适应梦境，这恐怕会很危险……
Pinball machine? {M#He}{F#She}'s not fully acclimated to the Dreamscape yet. This could get dangerous...
危险？流萤小姐，这可是家族的美梦，怎么会有危险？在梦里不找点刺激怎么行！
Dangerous? Miss Firefly, we're in a beautiful dreamland crafted by The Family. How could it be dangerous? This is the perfect place to have some thrills!
Come on, {NICKNAME}! Show her what you're made of!
哟，保镖大哥！我们又见面了。
嗯？哦…是你，又来照顾生意了？
Eh? Oh... it's you. You here to relax?
对，我今儿想带两位朋友来贵宝地玩一玩，不知道咱这沙龙还有空位嘛？
Right. I have two friends here who want to come with me. Any seats left inside?
我说你那两位朋友的——你的我早看过了。
I'm talking about your friends. I've already seen yours.
啊，这…我朋友初来乍到，怎么可能有贵宾卡呢，哈哈。
Um, well, how can my friends have VIP cards when they've only just arrived, haha.
您通融通融，就用我的卡成么？这两位身份绝对安全可靠，我用我自己的卡做担保！
Can you make an exception and let them in? I'll provide my VIP card as guarantee that they won't cause any trouble, okay?
这可不行哪，不能坏了规矩。要是没有认证就请回吧。
No, I can't break the rules. Please go home if you don't have the card.
Seems like we can't go in.
别慌，别慌！让我老桑博想想办法…哦，有了！
Just stay cool! Let me think of something... Got it!
这样吧，保镖大哥，我们不进去了，您帮我取个东西吧，先前寄存在这儿的——
Okay, so, we aren't going in anymore. But could you help me pick up something I left inside?
