...But still, I appreciate your help. I mean it from the bottom of my heart.
向往无名客也是真的，你们去过很多世界，能见识各种各样的人和事，每一天都是全新的开始……

And my admiration for the Nameless is also genuine. You guys have been to a lot of worlds, met people from all walks of life, and experienced all sorts of things. Every day is a new beginning for you guys...
I really love that kind of life.
It's not as great as you think...
You can board the Astral Express, too.
我想再带你去个地方，可以吗？这次不是什么旅游景点，恰恰相反…大概算是我的「秘密据点」。
Can I bring you to one more place? It isn't another tourist attraction — it's my very own secret base.
在那里，我会把我所知的一切…尽可能都告诉你。
I'll do my best to tell you everything I know when we get there.
How am I supposed to believe you?
我…不知道。但我希望你能相信我……
I... don't know, but I hope you do.
算了，我不必如此苛责你。
Never mind. I have no reason to be so harsh on you.
I'm going to be vigilant to the end.
（桑博…到底是什么意思？流萤在隐瞒什么吗？）
(What did Sampo mean? Is Firefly hiding something?)
（…得让她给个说法才行，先找到她吧。应该没走太远……）
(...I must find her and demand an explanation from her. She shouldn't be too far off...)
一阵天旋地转，你发觉自己回到了石头老板的迷宫入口……
After going all around, you find yourself at the entrance to Boss Stone's maze...
我说得很清楚了——要出人命啦！救命！
Didn't I make myself clear? Someone is dying! Please help!
是啊，是啊！请你帮帮我，不然要出人命啦！
Yes, yes! Please help! Someone's life is in your hands!
What kind of thing... are you?
嘿！我可是块钟表，不是什么「东西」！
I'm not some random thing, I'm a clock!
我看到一个…有手有脚的钟表。
I can see a... clock with limbs.
我好像看到奇怪的东西了…
滴答！太好了！太好了！米沙他有救了！
Tick-tock! Wonderful! This is awesome! There's still hope for Misha!
不懂规矩的家伙，看我怎么收拾你！
You broke the rules! And now you're gonna pay the price!
How did it come to this...
How come they are all people I know!?
噢，看吧，看吧！我没有撒谎！米沙遇到危险啦！
See? I wasn't lying! Misha really is in trouble!
Eh, can you see me too?
我能感受到，有些似是而非的事物陪伴在你身旁。可惜我无法像你一样与之沟通。
I can feel the presence of something inexplicable next to you, but it's a shame that I can't communicate with him like you can.
也许我们都对「忆质」有所反应，才能察觉这些梦中的不可思议之物。而你比我更敏锐。
We can both perceive these extraordinary things in the dream, probably due to our ability to react to memoria. But you're more attuned to it than I am.
我本以为是那位优雅的忆者在你脑海中留下了什么，现在看来，这梦中和她一样特别的存在不在少数。
I thought your heightened perception was caused by something the elegant Memokeeper might have left in your mind. Now, it seems to me there are many more special beings like her in this dream.
<color=#ff3a3e>与你分别后不久，我无意步入一场舞会，一位身披黑纱的女士邀请我共舞一曲。这是我第一次跳舞…是段令人难忘的经历。</color>

<color=#ff3a3e>Shortly after we parted ways, I wandered into a ball without realizing it. A lady wearing a black veil invited me to dance. It was my first dance, and it was an unforgettable experience.</color>
<color=#ff3a3e>与你分别后不久，我在酒店邂逅了一位身披黑纱的女士。她也是受邀前来的客人，向我提起盛会的话题，我们便举起酒杯…相谈甚欢。</color>
<color=#ff3a3e>Shortly after we parted ways, I met a lady wearing a black veil who was also a guest at the hotel. We had a good time talking about the event over drinks.</color>
<color=#ff3a3e>与你分别后不久，我察觉到有人在暗中窥视。循着镜子中的视线，我最终找到了一位身披黑纱的女士，并与她做了些…深入交流。暂且不细述了。</color>

<color=#ff3a3e>Shortly after we parted ways, I felt someone's spying eyes on me. I looked in the mirror and spotted a lady wearing a black veil. We had a deep conversation, but I won't bore you with the details.</color>
可惜，忘了请教她的名字…只知道她来自「流光忆庭」。
It's a shame that I forgot to ask her for her name. I only know that she's from the Garden of Recollection.
流光忆庭…是那群奉侍「记忆」星神的人吗？
Garden of Recollection... Is it the group that serves the Aeon of Remembrance?
是啊。他们能以模因的形式穿梭于各个世界，只出现在特定的人眼中——不觉得和你口中的钟表小子很像吗？
Exactly. They traverse freely between different worlds as memetic entities and are only visible to certain people. Doesn't she sound very much like that Clockie you saw?
到底是家族的盛会，也许应邀而来的客人比我们想象中还要多上许多呢。
After all, it is a grand event held by The Family. The guestlist could be a lot longer than we imagine.
总之，再次承蒙各位关照。祝你们在梦里过得愉快，我就不打扰二位…约会了？
Once again, thank you for being kind to me. I wish you a great time in the dream, and I shall not interrupt your... date?
N—No! We're not on a date!
Hey, let me ask you something...
你吸引女孩子注意的方式，就是大摇大摆地跟踪她么？快半个系统时了哦。
Is following girls around like a lost puppy your way of getting their attention? You've been doing this for nearly half a system hour.
准确地说，是<unbreak>45</unbreak>分钟。愉快的时光总是过得飞快，不是吗？
To be more precise, it's been <unbreak>45</unbreak> minutes. Time sure flies when you're having fun, doesn't it?
呵，小孔雀…你有对漂亮的眼珠啊。老家是茨冈尼亚的？
*sigh* Spare me. Beautiful eyes though — are you from Sigonia?
想要进一步提示吗？比如，我是个{RUBY_B#蜂蜜}埃维金{RUBY_E#}人？
嗯…我的眼睛成色是不如你，但我不瞎……
My eyes might not be as pretty as yours, but there's no problem with my vision...
——全宇宙有哪个不知道你们茨冈尼亚人？天生的骗子、小偷、交际花…口蜜腹剑，名副其实。
You Sigonians are notorious throughout the entire universe! Liars, thieves, social manipulators, wolves in sheep's clothing... You're really living up to the reputation.
要我说，比起梦里，你更适合待在窨井盖下…啊，那里就有一只，快去吧～
I say you belong to the space under the manhole cover, not in a dream. There's one right over there. Off you go!
不必了，阴暗的角落和我气质不搭。还是这座美梦更适合我，轻浮、虚荣、华而不实……
I'll pass — the gloomy shade of a place like that just wouldn't go with my vibe. Dreamville is frivolous, vain, and flashy — and that suits me just fine.
…还不会下雨！我这身行头可娇贵得很哪，禁不起风吹雨淋。
...Also, it never rains here! My outfit is too expensive to be exposed to the elements.
收起你那俏皮的舌头，小孔雀。请回吧，我们是愚者，不是傻瓜，不打算和公司的哈巴狗玩朋友游戏。
Cut it out and go home, you slick talker. We are Fools, but we aren't stupid. We aren't interested in playing the friend game with the lapdogs of the IPC.
哦，这话当真？你从来没和公司的人交过朋友？
Really? You've never been friends with anyone from the IPC?
当我没读过匹诺康尼历史么？别想把我卷进你们无聊的办公室政治。
Do you think I know nothing about the history of Penacony? Don't drag me into your banal office politics.
愚者——从应邀参加这场盛会起，你就没得挑了。及时选边站，别让自己血本无归。
Fool, you've been left with no choice since the moment you accepted the invitation to be here. You better pick a side while you have the chance, or else you'll end up losing everything.
你听起来很有把握嘛～显得你已经把家族那位鸡翅膀男孩搞定了似的。
You sound very sure of yourself. Looks like you've already convinced that Chicken Wing Boy from The Family.
怎么办到的，小孔雀？脱光衣服向他下跪赔罪，承诺「呜呜呜，公司绝对不会打匹诺康尼的主意」？
How did you do it, little peacock? Did you strip yourself naked, apologize to him on your knees, and promise that IPC would never harm Penacony?
朋友…得了吧，你们只会把别人当作筹码。
Friends? Oh, please. You guys only treat others as your bargaining chips.
筹码不好吗？在赌桌上，只有筹码不会把自己赔进去。你看流光忆庭和星穹列车的朋友都明白这个道理，他们就很聪明。

What's wrong with chips? In any gamble, the only players that will never be on the losing side are the chips. My friends from the Garden of Recollection and Astral Express are all smart enough to understand that.
可聪明的人从一开始就不会入局。你瞧，我是不是更聪明一点？
But the smarter ones wouldn't have joined the game in the first place. See? I'm smarter.
听好了，小孔雀，你也是收到过「酒馆」邀请的人。想邀假面愚者入伙？可以，动动脑子，{RUBY_B#阿哈}乐子神{RUBY_E#}想要的究竟是什么。
Listen, little peacock. You've been invited by the Tavern before too. If you want the Masked Fools to get onboard, you need to figure out what it is {RUBY_B#Aha}The Laughter{RUBY_E#} wants.
给你个提示吧：既然你谁也说服不了，何不考虑去找个哑巴做朋友呢？至少他不会反驳你，哈哈。
Here's a hint for you — Since you can't convince anyone, why don't you befriend a mute? At least, a mute won't be able to refute your arguments. *laughs*
谢谢！「和哑巴交朋友」——我会铭记在心的！
Thanks! I'll keep your advice in mind!
…真是麻烦。看来，还得再去会会「家族」啊。
...What a pain in the neck. I guess I'll have to meet with The Family again.
哦，抱歉，还没有进行自我介绍呢！
我叫钟表小子，是美梦小镇匹诺康尼的大明星！我和我的朋友们一起守护着这座小镇的和平——他们分别是哈努兄弟、汽水先生、折纸小鸟、仓鼠球骑士……
My name is Clockie. I'm a famous celebrity in Penacony! My friends and I keep the peace in this small town. They are Hanu, Mr. Soda, Origami Bird, Hamster Ball Knight...
…还有米沙！米沙他遇到危险啦——滴答！救命！救命！
...And Misha! Misha is in trouble! Tick-tock! Help! Help!
钟表小子，我能帮上你的忙吗？
钟表小子？你是个动画人物？
Clockie? Are you a cartoon character?
会说话的钟表。我一定是疯了。
A talking clock? I must be losing my mind.
你是说…你看到了一个现实中不存在的动画人物？
Do you mean... you saw a cartoon character that doesn't exist in real life?
滴答，我当然存在啦！我可是美梦小镇匹诺康尼的大明星，从来不吹牛！
Tick-tock, I'm really here! As the humble face of Penacony, I never ever brag!
Um... Where's he? I can't see him...
滴答！我猜，只有直率、纯真、有童心的孩子才能看见我——比如这位灰色的朋友！
Tick-tock! I guess I'm only visible to those with the innocence, kindness, and honesty of a child, like this kid here clad in gray!
他说只有孩子能看到他。
He said only children can see him.
呃，可是你看上去比我大吧，只看外表的话……
Um, but I think you look older than me in terms of appearance...
他说你不够直率、纯真、有童心。
He said you weren't innocent, kind... or honest.
…我哪里不够直率、纯真、有童心了…！
滴答，滴答！灰色的朋友！既然你能看到我，那你一定能帮我个忙！
Tick-tock, tick-tock! My gray friend, since you can see, then you must be able to help me!
我的好朋友米沙，他遇到麻烦了！求求你，救救他吧！不然就要出人命啦！
My friend, Misha, is in trouble! I'm begging you to help him before it's too late!
He says someone's life is in danger...
Uh... Is it really that bad...
那你要先去帮帮这位…呃，只有你能看到的钟表小子吗？
Are you going to help this... um, Clockie that only you can see?
我没有怀疑你，毕竟在梦里什么都有可能发生…我说的地方，晚点再去也没问题的……
I don't think you're lying, as anything can happen in a dream... We can just head to the place I mentioned later...
滴答，滴答！快跟上，快跟上，灰色的朋友！
Tick-tock, tick-tock! Hurry up and follow me, gray friend!
米沙遇到危险啦！他就在那里，我来带你去！
Misha's in trouble! He's over there. Let me bring you to him!
（米沙这个名字好令人在意…总之先看看发生了什么吧。）
(The name of Misha rings a bell to me... Anyway, better check out what's going on.)
滴答！求你了，灰色的朋友！帮帮米沙吧！
Tick-tock! I'm begging you, my gray friend, begging you! Please help Misha!
先跟我说说发生了什么事吧。
Please fill me in on what's going on first.
你在和钟表小子说话？…嗯，我也很好奇发生了……
Are you talking to Clockie? ...Hmm, I'm really curious too...
What should I do to help him?
你在和钟表小子说话？…是啊，局面看起来要控制不住了……
Are you talking to Clockie? ..Well, it does look like things are getting out of control...
我的球棒已经等不及了！
My baseball bat can't wait to show its might!
可是球棒的效率太低…不对！我是说，我们不能用这么粗暴的方式解决问题……
I'm afraid a baseball bat isn't an efficient weapon... No! What I mean is, we can't solve the problem with violence...
滴答，滴答！场面变得这么混乱，都是石头老板的错！
Tick-tock, tick-tock! It's all {RUBY_B#Boss}Stone{RUBY_E#}'s fault that things have turned out this way!
石头老板是美梦小镇里最坏的坏蛋——他是个贪心鬼，想要把美梦小镇的镇民都赶走，独占珍贵的石料……
Of all the lowlifes in Dreamville, {RUBY_B#Boss}Stone{RUBY_E#}'s the worst. He's a greedy man who wants to drive everyone out of Dreamville so that he can have all the precious stones to himself...
于是，他指使自己的手下搅乱了梦境，把大家的好情绪全都抽走了！美梦小镇从此充满了焦虑和纷争，大家再也不是一家人！
He instructed his underlings to wreak havoc in the Dreamscape, taking away everyone's positive emotions! Since then, the town has been filled with anxiety and disputes! We're no longer a family!
但身为美梦小镇的守护者，钟表小子不能坐视不管——只要使用<color=#dbc291ff>「钟表把戏」</color>，让流淌在梦境的好情绪重新回到人们心里，大家一定能和好如初！

As the guardian of Dreamville, I can't just sit back and do nothing. By using the power of <color=#dbc291ff>Clockwork</color>, I can direct the flow of positive emotions in the Dreamscape back into people's hearts — that way, everyone can patch up their differences and get along again!
来吧，灰色的朋友！我有种预感，你一定能够学会<color=#dbc291ff>钟表把戏</color>，毕竟你特殊到能够看见我！
My gray friend, I require your assistance! I have a feeling you'll be able to master the power of <color=#dbc291ff>Clockwork</color>! After all, you're the special one who can see me!
而且你是美梦小镇的客人，石头老板没料到你的存在！如果你出手，那个大坏蛋一定被打得措手不及！
Also, you're a new visitor to this world, which means we have the element of surprise! If you take action now, we can catch him off guard!
我这就告诉你！闭上眼睛——
Here, I'll show you! First, close your eyes...
没关系，我们至少可以先试试看！闭上眼睛——
It'll be fine. I'm just demonstrating how it works! Please close your eyes...
Why don't you do it yourself?
我自己一个人是用不了<color=#dbc291ff>钟表把戏</color>的，因为他们都看不见我！所以拜托你了，闭上眼睛——
I can't pull it off on my own, because they can't see me! So, please close your eyes...
滴答！这样我们就是*一心同体*了，有没有感觉力量在体内流动！
Tick-tock! Now, our minds have merged into one. Can you feel an energy surging through your body?
来吧，现在去找那个生气的帮派老大——施展<color=#dbc291ff>钟表把戏</color>，把好情绪全都灌进去，砰，大功告成！
All we have to do is use <color=#dbc291ff>Clockwork</color> on that cranky gangster boss and inject good emotions into him — then we'll have won!
一定要记住：绝对不能用<color=#dbc291ff>钟表把戏</color>做坏事——我们可是美梦小镇的守护者，滴答！
Please bear in mind that you should never use <color=#dbc291ff>Clockwork</color> with malicious intent. We're the guardians of Dreamville, after all, tick-tock!
{M#你小子}{F#小丫头}滚一边去，别碍事！我要让那个女人明白自己惹错人了！
Mind your own business, {M#lad}{F#lass}! I have to let that lady there know she's messed with the wrong person!
咦，你看不到他的内心吗？这下我们该怎么办……
Eh, can't you see where this is going? What should we do now...
你成功了！可他怎么变成了这个样子？
You did it! But how did he end up like this?
我看到个表盘，然后拨动了它。
I saw a dial and got it moving.
对！这就说明你成功施展了钟表把戏！
我不知道啊…是我干的吗？
I have no clue what I did. You sure I pulled that off?
应该…是的吧？不然，他怎么会突然开始笑呢？
It... must have been? It's rather out of character for him to start cracking up like that all of a sudden.
只是…噢，他的样子可真让人害怕——就像是真正的、喜怒无常的石头老板一样。
It's just that... seeing that gleeful smile on his face... he's just as scary as he was before.
哦，嗨，各位！请原谅我的冒昧，欢迎来到梦想之地匹诺康尼！
Hello, everyone! Please allow me to welcome all of you to Penacony, Land of the Dreams!
小的们，给我列队！好好欢迎我们的贵客！
Come on now, line up and give our honored guests a warm welcome!
<size=36>欢迎来到梦想之地匹诺康尼！</size>
<size=36>Welcome to Penacony, Land of the Dreams!</size>
It's my honor! It's only right we give guests a proper welcome!
No need for such formalities. We're... a Family!
您说得对！在祂的眼中，我们都是一家人！
You're right! We're a family to THEM!
全听您的吩咐！您是我们最尊贵的客人——
We're at your disposal! You're our most distinguished guest!
噢，天哪！看来你在他们心里有相当的分量啦。既然这样，你是不是也能叫他们离开了？
Wow! Seems like you've established yourself as an important figure around here. In that case, can you ask them to leave now?
…但能给我们一些私人空间吗？
...But, can we have some privacy, please?
当然、当然！一切都由各位说了算——小的们，散了！别打扰我们的贵客享受休闲时光！
Sure thing! You're the boss... Gang, let's give our VIP some space!
嘿，他好像变正常了——太好了！你成功了！
Hey, he seems normal now. That's wonderful! You did it!
我看到个表盘，然后拨动了它。
I saw a dial and got it moving.
对！这就说明你成功施展了钟表把戏！
Great! It means you've mastered the art of Clockwork!
我不知道啊…是我干的吗？
I have no clue what I did. You sure I pulled that off?
应该…是的吧？不然，他怎么会突然冷静下来呢？
It... must have been? Otherwise, why would he suddenly be all calm and composed like this?
我刚才…不会是想要和那位小姐打一架吧？我疯了吗？
Was I... about to get into a fight with that lady? Was I crazy?
哎，不好意思，请教您一个问题——是您让我冷静下来的吗？我有点发昏……
Hey, may I ask you a question? Were you the one who made me simmer down earlier? I wasn't my normal self..
It's the least I can do.
好吧，谢谢您。要是对宾客动了粗，我们可要被猎犬家系重罚了。
Thanks for doing that. If we'd laid a finger on our guests just now, we would've faced severe punishment from the Bloodhound Family.
我的天啊，你变得好有礼貌。
嗐，毕竟要是对宾客动了粗，我们可要被猎犬家系重罚了。
We owe it to you — if we'd laid a finger on our guests just now, we would've faced severe punishment from the Bloodhound Family.
实在抱歉啊，给各位添麻烦了…唉，我这火气怎么就突然往上涌了呢？真是莫名其妙……
I'm so sorry for stirring up all this trouble... Alas, why did I get so worked up all of a sudden? It's baffling...
噢，灰色的朋友！你一定要告诉他，是石头老板干的好事！
Oh, my gray friend! You have to tell him that {RUBY_B#Boss}Stone{RUBY_E#} is behind this!
人总有情绪失控的时候。
Everyone loses it once in a while.
嗐，让各位来宾看笑话了…真是不好意思。
This is embarrassing... I feel bad for causing such a spectacle.
也许因为我们都在梦里吧。
Perhaps, it's because we're all in a dream.
哈哈，这也不失为一种原因。
Haha, that can be one of the reasons.
是石头老板干的，想不到吧？
It's Boss Stone's doing. Can you believe it?
石头老板？呃，我没明白您的意思……
Stone? Um, I'm not sure I get what you mean...
不管怎么样，我得给各位好好赔礼道歉才是——小的们，给我列队！好好向贵客们道歉！
Anyway, I owe everyone a proper apology. Gang, line up and say sorry to our honored guests!
<size=36>We're truly sorry for the trouble we caused!</size>
噢，天哪——他们看起来可真诚恳。既然这样，你是不是也能叫他们离开了？
Wow, they look really sincere. In that case, can you ask them to leave now?
…但能给我们一些私人空间吗？
...But, can we have some privacy, please?
当然、当然！一切都由各位说了算——小的们，散了！别打扰我们的贵客享受休闲时光！
Sure thing! You're the boss... Gang, let's give our VIP some space!
噢，我的天啊！是你把他弄哭了吗？
Oh, goodness! Did you make him cry?
我看到个表盘，然后拨动了它。
I saw a dial and got it moving.
对！这就说明你成功施展了钟表把戏！
Great! It means you've mastered the art of Clockwork!
我不知道啊…是我干的吗？
I have no clue what I did. You sure I pulled that off?
应该…是的吧？不然，他怎么会哭成这个样子呢？
It... must have been? Otherwise, why would he be in tears all of a sudden?
噢，他的样子可真让人伤心，就连美梦小镇的守护者也快要哭出来啦。
Oh, he's crying so hard. Even I, the guardian of the Dreamville, am nearly moved to tears.
你怎么了？为什么这么伤心？
What's wrong sweetie? Why are you feeling so down?
呜呜…我…突然想起了母星的老妈……
*sob*... I... thought about my mother on my home planet...
哥们，别哭了，多大个人了。
Bruh, quit the waterworks. You're a big boy now.
呜呜…我…突然想起了母星的老妈……
*sob*... I... thought about my mother on my home planet...
Oh dear me, ain't I a big bad meanie for making you sob like a crybaby?
呜呜…这不是您的错，我只是…突然想起了我母星的老妈……
*sob*... It isn't your fault. I just suddenly... thought about my mother on my home planet...
噢，天哪——他们简直要乱套了。不过，现在是不是个让他们离开的好机会？
Woah, things are turning into a mess. But then again, maybe now is a good chance to ask them to leave?
My friend, why don't you go and...
How about you get some alone time somewhere?
呜…小的们，都给我散了…让我一个人静静……
*sob*... Gang, you are dismissed... I need to be alone for a while...
我们又见面了，客人！是你帮我们化解了危机吗？
We meet again! Are you the one who helped settle everything down here?
米沙，怎么了？你认识这位灰色的朋友吗？
Misha, are you acquainted with this gray friend of mine?
{M#他}{F#她}是尊贵的客人——前不久我们成为了朋友。我跟你提起过，记得吗？
{M#He}{F#She}'s an esteemed guest whom I've befriended recently. I told you about {M#him}{F#her} before. Does it ring a bell?
总之，谢谢你！如果你没有及时赶到，这里就要乱作一团了……
Anyway, thanks a lot! If you hadn't gotten here in time, I would have been in a real mess...
谢谢你，{NICKNAME}。真没想到这么快就再会了。
Thank you, {NICKNAME}. I'm surprised we get to see each other again so soon.
No need to thank me. It's the least I can do.
方才的混乱…听说是有群假面愚者在街头闹事，扰乱了秩序。我途径此地，受到盘查，过程中发生了一些…误会。就结果而言，又给你添麻烦了。

About all the commotion just now... I heard a bunch of Masked Fools were causing a ruckus on the streets. I happened to be passing through, got stopped for questioning, and there were some... misunderstandings along the way. Anyway, I owe you another one.
这位小姐…也是你的熟人吗？
Is this lady... your friend too?
熟人说不上，有过一面之缘，{M#他}{F#她}此前在酒店帮了我，是位善良的人。
Well, we've only met each other once before. But {M#he}{F#she} is a kind soul for helping me at the hotel.
也很高兴认识你，美丽的小姐。
It's my pleasure to meet you, beautiful lady.
不过，你刚才对那位先生做了什么？他瞬间的情绪变化…有些不可思议。
By the way, what did you do to that man earlier? It was like someone took him on an emotional roller coaster.
我也想问这个…到底发生了什么？
I was wondering about that too... What happened back there, exactly?
钟表小子赋予了我钟表把戏。
That's right! It was me, Clockie!
当然，也多亏了你。如果没有你施展的钟表把戏，美梦小镇可就要陷入麻烦啦！
Of course, you played a big part too. Without you doing the Clockwork, Dreamville would've been in some real trouble!
Talk therapy. I used that on him.
你在说什么！不是话疗，是钟表把戏！
What're you talking about? It wasn't talk therapy! It was Clockwork!
I don't think it's that simple.
我猜，是不是和那个…只有你能看见的钟表小子有关？
Could it have something to do with... That Clockie that only you can see?
看到我的球棒会害怕很正常啦。
It's only natural for people to get intimidated by my baseball bat.
你在说什么！不是球棒，是钟表把戏！
What're you talking about? It wasn't the baseball bat! It was Clockwork!
I don't think it's that simple.
我猜，是不是和那个…只有你能看见的钟表小子有关？
Could it have something to do with... That Clockie that only you can see?
对，就是那个卡通人物…好像出现在了现实——我的意思是——梦境里。
Yes, that cartoon character. I think he's shown up in reality — I mean — in the Dreamscape.
虽然我也没太搞清楚状况…但{NICKNAME}说，似乎只有直率、纯真、有童心的小孩子才能看见它……
I don't really know how a cartoon character could show up around here, but according to {NICKNAME}, only honest people with childlike innocence can see him...
…看来我也已经过了这样的年纪。
...It seems like I'm too old to qualify for that.
但倘若这位钟表小子真的存在，许多事就解释得通了。
If Clockie really exists, that can explain a lot of things.
去忙吧去忙吧，谢谢你，灰色的朋友！
I'll let you get back to your beeswax. Thanks, my gray friend!
真的非常感谢！果然无名客都是很了不起的人啊…希望我们有缘再见！
I really appreciate your help! The Nameless are indeed a bunch of talented people... May our paths cross again!
May our paths cross again, tick-tock!
Here we are. This is the place.
Do you want me... to crawl in there?
This is embarrassing. People are watching us...
没关系的！梦里什么都会发生，每天都有好多人从天上掉下来——行人早都见怪不怪了。
It doesn't matter! Anything can happen in a dream, and there are lots of people falling from the sky every day. The pedestrians aren't going to be fazed by anything.
我先做个示范——刚开始会有点黑，你要跟紧哦。
Let me show you how to do it. It's going to be very dark at first, so you'll have to stay close to me.
你听过这首歌吗，《使一颗心免于哀伤》，那位知更鸟的作品。谐乐大典在即，梦境中偶尔也会奏响她的音乐。
Have you heard of the song? It's called If I Can Stop One Heart From Breaking, by Robin. Her songs are played in the dreamland from time to time as the Charmony Festival is drawing close.
这里是离梦中的天空最近的地方，远离城市的喧嚣，也没有筑梦师的争吵。可以不被任何人打扰，感受当下——当下的风景，人，还有梦……

This spot is the closest place to the sky in the Dreamscape. It's far from the hustle and bustle of the city and free from the bickering among the Dreamweavers. You can feel the moment — the scenery, the people, and the dreams — without being disturbed by anyone...
多美啊…时光永远停驻在这黄金的时刻，一场金色的梦。酒馆的愚者和忆庭的忆者，流浪的游侠和公司的使节，星穹列车的无名客…和我。

How beautiful... Time is frozen at this golden hour, this golden dream shared by the Fool from the Tavern and the Memokeeper from the Garden of Recollection, the wandering Ranger and the IPC ambassador, the Astral Express Nameless... and me.
所有人在这里平等地睡去，无论缘由，尽管我们确实各怀目的……
Everyone falls asleep here equally, regardless of our different agendas...
…对不起，{NICKNAME}，我的确是一个「偷渡犯」。
... I'm sorry, {NICKNAME}. I really am a stowaway.
I knew I couldn't hide it from you.
I think it's only right to tell you.
我的故乡在很久以前就毁灭了，也许是军团干的，也可能是虫群…我是个星际难民，就和匹诺康尼的许多「本地人」一样。
My hometown was destroyed a long time ago. It was probably the doing of the Legion or the Swarm... I'm an interstellar refugee, just like many of the Penacony locals.
「同谐」包容所有的人，也包括那些远道而来的漂泊者。家族接纳他们，但他们…终究不属于这里。
The Harmony accepts everyone, including wanderers from afar. The Family takes them in, but they... don't belong here.
在这座金碧辉煌的大都会中，有些人的梦名为匹诺康尼，而有些人的梦…却和现实无异，尽管每一个来到这里的普通人，最初都怀抱着相同的目的。

In this splendid metropolis, some have a dream called Penacony, but some have dreams... that are no different from reality, even though everyone who comes here harbors the same motive in the beginning.
我也一样。现实里的我有着求而不得的愿望——它太过强烈，因此我诉诸梦境……
And it's likewise for me. I have a wish I want to achieve so badly in the real world, but I can't. So, I want to give it a shot here...
You can't run away from reality.
Entropy Loss Syndrome. Have you heard of this term?
是一种奇怪的现象。罹患这种病症的人，物理结构会陷入不可逆的慢性解离。这意味着你正在慢慢消失，而这种「消失」在旁人眼中甚至难以察觉——

It's a strange condition. Those suffering from it will experience an irreversible chronic dissociation of their physical structure. This means they will slowly fade away, and the process is barely noticeable to others...
你依旧能跑、能跳、能和他人交流。一切看起来都那么正常，只不过你总是比别人慢一点点……
You can still run, jump, and talk as usual. Everything seems normal, but then you'll start doing everything slightly slower than others...
…然后越来越慢、越来越慢，直到自己和整个世界的轮廓都变得模糊不清。你分不清现实和梦境，因为它们变得同样破碎。
...And then even slower than that, until the lines between your body and the entire world become blurry. You won't be able to tell reality from dreams because they have all been shattered.
所以，我该如何拒绝呢…你能想象吗？在这场梦里，我竟然可以…可以不用待在冰冷的「医疗舱」里……
So, how could I possibly resist it... I mean can you imagine? I can actually free myself from this icy medical cabin in this dream...
我可以将医生的话抛在脑后，用我自己的身体，随心所欲地去听、去看、去触碰、去思考、去领会。尽管这个世界并不真实，但这感受却无比珍贵……

I can forget about all the doctor's advice. I can listen, and see, and touch, and think, and understand whatever I want with my body. So, although this world isn't real, this experience is priceless...
对不起。因为一些原因，有些事…我现在还不能向你全盘托出。但也有些事，我应该对你坦诚。
I'm sorry. For certain reasons, there are things I can't reveal to you yet. But there are also things you should know.
「钟表匠的遗产」固然是我的所求，但我们未必要分道扬镳，走向对立，至少…我不希望这种事发生。
I am, in fact, after the Watchmaker's Legacy, but that doesn't mean we have to go our separate ways and be enemies. But at least... I hope things won't turn out that way.
我不能信任一个有所隐瞒的人。
I can't put my trust in someone who hides things from me.
...I understand, and I'm okay with that.
我会告诉你的，但…不是现在。
I'll tell you, but... not now.
「我梦见一片焦土，一株破土而生的新蕊，它迎着朝阳绽放，向我低语呢喃。」
In my dream, I saw a scorched earth, and a new sapling emerging from it. It bloomed against the morning sun, and whispered to me.
还记得邀请函上的问题吗——生命因何而沉睡？
I still remember the question on the invitation letter — Why does life slumber?
你看，在这片梦想之地，一切都被允许，一切都有可能。不堪回首的过去像泡沫一样散去，不愿面对的明天永远也不会到来。
You see, everything is possible in this land of dreams. The nightmarish past will disperse and fade away like bubbles in water, and the future that you don't want to face will never come.
人们为何选择沉睡？我想……
Why do people choose to sleep? I think...
是因为害怕从「梦」中醒来。
It is because they're afraid to wake up from the dream.
Look! This place is breathtaking, isn't it?
通常，游客是不被允许到这来的，所以我们得小心一点，别被其他人发现了。
Guests aren't allowed here, so we have to be careful not to get caught.
别担心，不是什么危险地带。你可以把这里理解为黄金时刻的边境，更往外的梦境，家族还在建设改造中。
Don't worry, this place isn't dangerous. Just think of this as the border of Golden Hour. The Family is still building and remodeling the Dreamscape beyond here.
我的「秘密据点」就在这里面。
My secret stronghold is in this area.
两位，劳驾。前方是施工重地，闲人免进。
Excuse me, there's a construction site ahead. Unauthorized personnel are not allowed in.
Could you let us through just this time?
请您…通融一下吧？我们不会给大家添麻烦的。
Could you... please make an exception? We're not going to cause any trouble.
不行。上头有规矩，任何非筑梦师团队成员都禁止进入。
Not a chance. Our boss made it clear that only the Dreamweavers are allowed here.
谁？听都没听过。今天就是梦主本人来了，我也不会放你们进去。
Who? Never heard of him. I wouldn't let you in even if the Dreammaster were here.
这些信用点是一点心意…
Here are some credits for you...
行了，你收回去。这次我权当没看见，下次再这样我可要通知橡木家系了。
Get those out of my sight, and I'll pretend nothing happened this time. Try pulling something like that again, and I'll report it to the Oak Family.
每天求我的人可多了，我难道都要通融一下？
People ask for favors every day. Am I supposed to just say yes to all of them?
两位也不必再耍其他小聪明了。请回吧，这对你我都好。
None of your tricks are going to work. Please do yourself and me a favor and go home.
唔，看来我们是说服不了他了——我再想想办法吧……
Hmm, seems like he won't give in... Let me think of another way...
（也许…可以再用一次钟表把戏？这应该不算「做坏事」吧……）
(Perhaps... Clockie's Clockwork trick can come in handy? This doesn't count as malicious intent, right...)
眼前的男人十分沉着，看起来毫无破绽——也许你得使些<color=#dbc291ff>「激将法」</color>才行。
The composed man before you appears impenetrable. Perhaps you need to <color=#dbc291ff>provoke</color> him a bit.
两位也不必再耍其他小聪明了。请回吧，这对你我都好。
None of your tricks are going to work. Please do yourself and me a favor and go home.
感谢您配合「家族」的工作。
Oh my... Oh my, oh my, oh my!
Ok, buddy, what's gotten into you?
I feel like... I'm on cloud nine!
You're acting weird... This is bad.
糟了？哪里糟了？我现在非常…开心！
Bad? How so? I feel like... I'm on cloud nine!
Oh my, oh my, oh my...
哈，朋友——你看起来像我一样…开心！
Ha, buddy. You look... as delighted as me!
你能感受到吗？这种感觉…甚至可以说——有点疯狂！就像连续喝了十瓶元年苏乐达，然后在梦境贩售店狠狠泡上一整天！
Can you feel it? This is... wild! It feels like I just downed ten bottles of Epochal SoulGlad in one gulp and spent an entire day at the Dreamscape Sales Store!
如果米娅在这儿，我们就能高歌一曲，她一定懂我的感受！
If Meeya were here, we would sing a song together. I'm sure she would understand how I feel!
我简直要控制不住这种狂热的情绪了…我向你发出邀请，{M#英俊的先生}{F#美丽的小姐}——与我跳一支舞吧！现在！此时此刻！就在这里！
I can hardly contain this palpable excitement... I'd like to invite you to dance with me, {M#handsome}{F#beautiful}. Right here, right now!
和你跳舞就能放我们过去了吗？
Will you let us in after I dance with you?
噢，当然不能——规矩就是规矩！
Oh, no way! Rules are rules!
不过，就算您不愿意与我共舞——也没关系！
It's totally fine if you want to turn me down!
噢，这可真是太糟糕了。但没关系，我依旧狂热！
Oh, that's a downer... but not for me! I'm still brimming with elation!
我只需要这疯狂的感觉，与扑通乱跳的心…但愿它一直都在！
This crazy mood and this pounding heart are just what I need... I wish it would last forever!
当然，你们还是不能通过这里——这是我的职责！
Still, I won't let you guys in, because it's my duty to stop you!
He really is a man of principle.
尝试再次洞察他的内心。
Try reading his inner thoughts again.
男人变得十分开心，但依旧滴水不漏——也许你得使些「激将法」才行。
The man has become content but remains impenetrable. Perhaps you need to provoke him a bit.
啊，两位尊贵的客人…欢迎来到匹诺康尼。
Ah, honored guests... Welcome to Penacony.
我是猎犬家系的成员，负责维持梦境世界的治安——虽然在家族的保护下，梦里根本不会有危险——当然，这也意味着我是多余的，连垃圾桶都不如。

I'm a member of the Bloodhound Family. My job is maintaining order in the Dreamscape. In fact, no danger will arise under The Family's protection, which makes my job redundant. Even a trashcan is more important than me.
噢，抱歉。我只是…情难自禁。
Oh, sorry about that. I just can't help myself.
没关系，我可以创造危险！
Well, you're in luck then, for I Am The Danger!
噢，请别。因为我一定制服不了你。
Please refrain from that. I know I won't be able to overcome you.
But trashcans are important! I like them!
噢，那我会建议您找爱德华医生接受精神分析治疗。
In that case, I'd recommend that you see Dr. Edward for a psychotherapy session.
总之，请给我一点私人空间吧，尊贵的客人。
Anyway, please just give me some privacy.
两位大可去好好享受这灯红酒绿的梦境世界，而不是在这里陪我这样一个连垃圾桶都不如的家伙谈心。
You two should enjoy this fun and exciting Dreamscape, instead of talking to someone who is worse than a trashcan.
那可以请你放我们过去吗？
Well, can you let us through?
我的尊严已经所剩无几——行行好，求您别把我这仅存的一点也踩碎了。
There's little dignity left in me. Please be nice and don't trample on it.
那就请你不要挡我们的道了。
Well, please stop blocking our way.
噢，很抱歉挡了你们的路。
Oh, I'm sorry for blocking your way.
但我的尊严已经所剩无几——行行好，求您别把我这仅存的一点也踩碎了。
But there's little dignity left in me. Please be nice and don't trample on it.
当然，你们也可以选择强闯过去…但我发誓一定会跟二位拼命——我已经没什么好失去的了……
Sure enough, you guys can force your way through, but I swear I'll stop you or die trying. After all, I have nothing left to lose...
我感觉自己好有负罪感……
尝试再次洞察他的内心。
Try reading his inner thoughts again.
男人刚才提到了「拼命」…如果你良心还过得去，或许真的可以试试看。
The man mentioned "die trying"... It might just be worth a try to give him what he wanted. That is, if you can live with it.
我说了多少遍——施工重地，非请勿入！
How many times do I have to repeat myself? Unauthorized personnel are not allowed at the construction site!
你们两个，一定要在我面前现眼是吗？那别怪我不客气了！
Do you two really want to stay here and test my patience? You're going to regret it!
哈，这可是你自找的！但你可别太嚣张——像你这种人，我见过太多了！
You're asking for it! And I wouldn't be so cocky if I were you — I deal with punks like you all the time!
别想狡辩——你这种人我见过太多了！
Don't try talking back to me. I deal with punks like you all the time!
仗着自己年轻有活力，天不怕地不怕，每天游手好闲、惹是生非，自私自利，一点都不知道为社会贡献价值！
You fear for nothing just because you're young and energetic. You idle away your time every day, going around stirring up trouble! You contribute nothing to society!
像你这样无视规则的小屁孩，我要修正你——上吧，美梦剧团！给我狠狠地教训{M#他们}{F#她们}！
Let me help you spoiled brats learn the hard way. Go, Sweet Dreams Troupe! Teach them a lesson!
可恶，我竟然输了…这就是…青春的力量吗……
Darn it, I can't believe I've lost... Is this the power of youth...
如果那时我也有这种力量，米娅…我们是不是就能有个不一样的结局？
If I'd had that power back then, would we have ended up differently, Meeya?
你们走吧。胜者的权利，尽情享用吧……
Alright, you can go in. As the winner, you deserve it...
他是不是有点入戏了？但总算能过去了……
Seems like he's taking this winning and losing thing a little too seriously... Well, at least we finally get to go through...
它就在那里，永远散发着耀眼的光芒，就像这五光十色的美梦本身。
It radiates dazzling light perpetually, just like this glamorous dream.
我想，沐浴在光中的人，一定都会被那种温暖所吸引吧……
I suppose everyone who likes to bask in the light will be drawn to that kind of warmth...
Let's go. Half the journey is still ahead of us.
可恶…到底是哪里出了问题？
是我太久没喝苏乐达了吗，还是因为连加了两个月的班——怎么偏偏今天没灵感了呢？
Is it because I've gone for too long without drinking SoulGlad, or because I've been working overtime for two months? Why don't I have any inspiration today?
Can I have the puzzle piece?
哪来的游客…我不管你们怎么溜进来的，现在别烦我——要是我没法按时交付，准没你们好果子吃！

二十年前的我究竟是吃错了什么药，才会做出这么愚蠢的决定，来阿斯德纳这种偏远星系，为该死的家族搬砖卖命？

我真傻…早知如此，怎会落得现在这般下场？

连加两个月班，连一口苏乐达都喝不上，整天对着这片该死的梦境犯难，还要思考自己会不会被「优化」……

你平息了筑梦师的愤怒——但导向了错误的方向。或许你应该换个方向再试试。

罢了罢了，不想了。还是琢磨下班后吃点什么好吧，好歹让那点破苜蓿币有机会发光发热。
Fine, I'm going to stop dwelling on it. I should probably be thinking about something productive, like what to eat after work. At least that will put my lousy Alfalfa coins to some use.
苜蓿币、苜蓿币…该死的钟表小子！整天只会扮出一张傻兮兮的笑脸，逗那些不知匹诺康尼水深火热的观光客咯咯大笑，再骗他们像我一样留在这做牛做马……

Alfalfa coins, Alfalfa coins... Huh, that Clockie guy is a real piece of work! All he does is put on that goofy smile to crack up those ignorant guests and hoodwink people like me into working like a dog here...
做牛做马…这么说来，匹诺康尼有这种生物吗？感觉从没见过啊——牛也没有，马也没有…喔不对——我不就是牛马吗，这下破案了！
Dog... Are there even dogs in Penacony? I don't think I've ever seen one... Wait a minute... Aren't I a dog myself? Case solved!
他的思维真发散…这就是艺术家吗？
His thinking is very spontaneous... Is this typical of artists?
筑梦师变得十分平静。但对于艺术家来说，「平静」实在是有点索然无味——也许你得进一步刺激他才能让灵感的火花闪现。

真不愧是你，好点子真多！这里的视野真好，整个黄金的时刻都尽收眼底……

...Though, how are we going to leave? We're not climbing the ventilation ducts again, are we?
呃，这个…嗐，总会有办法的！先别想那么多了，还是先享受当下吧！
Argh. That... well, there's got to be a way! Don't think about that much stuff. Let's enjoy what we've got now first!
哈，有了！一个绝妙的点子！让我找张纸记下来……

...No, no, no. I'm sure I'll forget all the details when I wake up from sleep. There's no better time than now to put it into action!

呃，我记得这里上次还没有看守的…是我出入太多引起注意了？
Um, this area wasn't guarded the last time I was here... Have my frequent comings and goings started drawing attention?
…好像绕不开，只能把它们敲晕了……
...I don't think we can get around them. Knocking them out is the only way to go...
At long last, this baseball bat of mine has found its purpose.
那，我们上吧——把它们赶跑！
气氛突然变得好沉重，抱歉，不该这样的…让我想想，怎么活跃气氛比较好？

我有点怕镜头的，别笑话我哦。来…你拿着吧。
I can be a little bit camera-shy — just don't laugh at me. Here, you hold the camera.
我有点怕镜头的，别笑话我哦。来…你拿着吧。
I can be a little bit camera-shy — just don't laugh at me. Here, you hold the camera.
女孩将手机递给了你，眼神里满是期待。

你接过手机，呼出相机应用，切换摄像头。一气呵成。然后，你伸直胳膊，将手机拿远，确保取景框中能够容纳你们二人。

You take the phone, launch the camera app, and switch to the front-facing camera effortlessly. Then, extending your arm, you hold the phone at a distance, ensuring both of you are captured in the frame.

The Family recruited many artists, architects, and scholars from across the universe to form the team of Dreamweavers that built the dream of Penacony.

不，不对——还记得吗，在我们不省人事前，你的那位「朋友」是这么说的——「真正的{RUBY_B#匹诺康尼}『梦境』{RUBY_E#}」……
No, that's not right. Do you remember, before we were unconscious, that friend of yours said: The real {RUBY_B#Penacony}Dreamscape{RUBY_E#}...
我不敢肯定，这个发现太突然了。但无论如何，家族一定隐瞒了什么，关于梦境的真相……
I'm not sure. Everything happened so quickly. But regardless, The Family must be hiding something — something about the truth of the Dreamscape...
我不敢肯定，这个发现太突然了。但无论如何，家族一定隐瞒了什么，关于梦境的真相……
I'm not sure. Everything happened so quickly. But regardless, The Family must be hiding something — something about the truth of the Dreamscape...
我应该早点怀疑他的…对不起。无论如何，家族一定隐瞒了什么，关于梦境的真相……
I should've been wary of him sooner... Sorry. Regardless, The Family must be hiding something — something about the truth behind the Dreamscape...

If it points us towards the Watchmaker's Legacy, it will be connected to everyone who is melded to Penacony's dream...
走吧，{NICKNAME}…无论是为了找出真相还是离开这里，我们都得出发。

竟然真的可以？随意改变梦境的重力明明是严令禁止的……

…小心，墙上还有些奇怪的东西…不像是惊梦剧团……
...Careful, there are some strange things on the wall... And they don't look like they're from the Dreamjolt Troupe...
Can't find you... Can't find you anywhere...
米哈伊尔，你藏到哪里去了？
出口…在对面吗？这要怎么过去呀……

为什么梦里的世界这么奇怪…

米哈伊尔，你看起来有心事…

Take me with you at least, all right?
险象环生…但我们成功了。

可家族明明对外承诺，梦境是绝对安全的……
So strange... The Family insist that the Dreamscape is absolutely safe.
There's nothing but... a jigsaw puzzle here.
碎片好像飞到两侧的房间里了。

这是我为你折的折纸小鸟…
This is an origami bird I made for you...
It will protect you from harm.
就像它们和钟表小子一起…
Just like they did with Clockie...
I will definitely keep it safe.

这样应该就能填上拼图的空缺了。

啊！墙壁消失了…感觉应该快到终点了…吧？

…是我们被困在这儿了！一直在原地打转……

糟了…最开始的门是哪一扇？

好吵…声音…越来越刺耳了……
So loud... the voice... It's becoming more shrill...
电视机的闪光好刺眼…小心，好像有什么东西……
The TVs are so bright, it's hurting my eyes... Careful, something's up...
不可思议…真的就像梦里才能看见的风景……
Incredible... This is really a sight that can only be witnessed in a dream...
从刚才开始，这些文字就不停地浮现、消失，它们是谁的心声吗？「米哈伊尔」又是谁……
These words have been appearing and then vanishing persistently for awhile now. Whose thoughts are they? And who is this Mikhail...
There is a sadness to this...
米哈伊尔…好像在哪听过……
Mikhail... Where have I heard this name...
我好像能感受到其中蕴含的…情绪。迷茫…畏惧…悲伤…以及微弱到几乎无法感知的……

Unyielding resolve in the face of death...
呃…只有一个宝箱？好可疑，要打开看看吗……

…怎么回事？！灯怎么全都亮起来了，好吓人……
...What's going on!? The lights have all turned on. So creepy...

它和一路上遇到的那些好像…这些怪物就是家族在隐瞒的秘密？
This Monster—— all these creatures——are they the secret The Family is hiding?
唔，就没有办法摆脱它吗…？！

放轻松，小妹妹，我是站在你们这边的哦。
