欢迎来到现实——白日梦酒店——你最熟悉，也是最安全的地方。
Welcome to reality. More specifically, The Reverie, the safest and most familiar place you can be.
很高兴你的精神状态还算正常，没有受到那片*原始梦境*的影响，运气不错。
I'm happy to see that you've kept your wits, and that you haven't been affected by the *Primal Dreamscape*. How lucky.
You're the Garden of Recollection's Memokeeper...?
Firefly... Did she make it out?
呵呵，你很关心那个小姑娘啊。也是，即便在「死亡」面前，她也竭尽所能想要保护你的安全…连我都有些心动了呢。
Heheh, you're quite concerned about that young lady. That's fair — she was hell-bent on assuring your safety even at the brink of death... Started to tug a little at my heartstrings, even.
我知道你脑袋里有许多问号，别心急。在那之前，先向担心你的伙伴们报个平安吧。
I know you've many questions, so please compose yourself. Before that, you should let your friends know you're safe.
（这里是…贝洛伯格下层区的诊所？为什么空无一人？）
(Is this... the clinic in the Belobog Underworld? Why is it empty?)
How did I end up here?
（这是我梦境的一部分——这个梦的舞台就是贝洛伯格。）
(This is part of my Dreamscape — Belobog is the setting for this dream.)
（这是个惊喜，我们稍后再揭晓。但你要明白——在梦中，一切皆有可能。）
(This is a surprise that will be revealed later. You have to remember — in a dream, anything is possible.)
（别急，你应该先熟悉下梦中梦的感觉。）
(No need to be hasty, now. You should take a moment to get used to the feeling of being in a dream within a dream.)
What do you mean by this?
（不知道啊，我做梦时完全没来过这个地方。）
(I have no idea. I didn't come here when I had this dream.)
I think I've had this dream before too...
(Oh, really? Well you know what they say — great minds dream alike!)
（人会在梦里看到任何东西都是很正常的啦。）
(That's the thing about dreams — anything can feel familiar.)
（别在意这些细节了——要我说，你该出门看看了，小心别被吓到！）
(Stop nitpicking the details. If you ask me, I'd say you should take a look outside. But don't get frightened by what you see!)
幸会，深潜于梦中之人啊……
Nice to meet you, dream diver...
我名为莎塔娜——想和您谈一个条件。
My name is Shatana, and I have a deal to offer you.
您…曾听说过「垃圾之王」塔塔洛夫吗？
Have you heard of... Tatalov the Garbage King?
莎塔娜？你和娜塔莎什么关系？
Shatana? Are you related to Natasha?
娜塔莎…是谁？想必我们未曾谋面。
Natasha who? I don't recall meeting such a person.
让我们言归正传吧——您…曾听说过「垃圾之王」塔塔洛夫吗？
Let's get back to the question... Have you heard of Tatalov the Garbage King?
你这台词好像也挺耳熟啊…
That line of yours sounds eerily familiar...
恐怕…这就是所谓的既视感……
You're... probably just experiencing some déjà vu...
让我们言归正传吧——您…曾听说过「垃圾之王」塔塔洛夫吗？
Let's get back to the question... Have you heard of Tatalov the Garbage King?
祂是我等的王，也是世间一切废料的牧人。他立于王座上，扶持谦卑的桶，压制强暴的桶；祂是贝洛伯格的墙基，稳固我等的桶盖，坚直我等的桶身……

He's our king, as well as the manager of all the waste in this world. Perched on his throne, he uplifts trashcans that are humble and suppresses those that are violent. He's the cornerstone of Belobog, the lid that secures us, the barrel that reinforces us.
然而，当天外之物随寒潮降临此地，他的双眼便被蒙蔽了——他不再倾听呼告，使穷苦之桶遭受欺凌，令忠诚之桶平白蒙羞……

However, since the thing from beyond the sky arrived here along with the Eternal Freeze, Tatalov's eyes have been blinded. He stopped listening to our calls, leaving the impoverished to be bullied and his loyal servants to be degraded...
现在，是时候了。我等不堪受辱，誓要举起天火的大旗，令垃圾之王改邪归正……
A change was overdue, as the humiliation was too much for us. We intended to help Tatalov mend his ways under the banner of the Skyfire...
我等不堪受辱，誓要举起天火的大旗，令垃圾之王改邪归正。但我们不敌那邪恶的王…他散布恶毒的谣言，分化众桶，令{RUBY_B#心}垃圾袋{RUBY_E#}不再能彼此感应……

The humiliation was too much for us. We intended to help Garbage King mend his ways under the banner of the Skyfire... But we were no match for the sinister king, who spread vicious rumors among the trashcans to divide us against each other. As a result, we could no longer communicate with one another using {RUBY_B#Heart}trashbags{RUBY_E#}...
…我请求您，使此地的垃圾袋恢复宁静，再度联结众桶吧——如此一来，便能向那伪王发起反击。
...I implore your help to restore peace to the trash bags, so that the trashcans here may be united once more. Then, we'll be able to launch a counterattack against that undeserving king.
你的意思是，要我团结你们？
Are you saying you want me to rally you all together?
（她应该是想说，只有你能团结这群，呃，垃圾桶，然后带领他们打倒邪恶的坏人…吧。）
(I think she's trying to say that you're the only one who can unite these, uhm, trashcans and lead their battle against the evil king... or something like that.)
What do I need to do?
But I haven't agreed to anything!
（爱德华医生说他来不及做那么多分支了，你就接受吧。）
(Dr. Edward said he didn't have the time to make any alternative storylines. Just accept it.)
您只需完成一件事——<color=#dbc291ff>帮助垃圾桶们从烦扰中解脱，取得三个「信任的证明」。</color>
You have one mission — <color=#dbc291ff>help the trashcans with their troubles and collect three Proofs of Trust</color>.
如此一来，您便能成为新王，率领我等向伪王发起抗争。去吧，深潜于梦中之人啊…使命在召唤着你。
Once you've accomplished that, you'll become our new king and lead our fight against the evil king. Off you go, dream diver... Your mission is calling for you.
去吧，异乡的来访者…使命在召唤着你。
Off you go, dream diver... Your mission is calling for you.
（总算拿到三个「信任的证明」了…回去交差吧。）
(I've finally collected three Proofs of Trust... Let's go back and deliver them.)
嗯，看来您已经完成了契约……
Excellent. Looks like you've held up your side of the deal...
这…您竟然汇集了全部「信任的证明」，这份决心不容小觑……
Impressive... It's hard to believe you've collected all the Proofs of Trust. Your determination is truly admirable...
…这一天终于来了。那么，出发吧——我会护送您前往王座「造物之柱」，见证我等一族的未来……
...I've waited so long for this day. Here, I'll escort you to your throne, the Pillars of Creation, where you'll witness the future of my people...
（这是到决战之地了吗…心情好复杂啊……）
(Is this where the final battle will take place... Not sure how I feel about this...)
（…他们不是说垃圾之王在这儿等我吗？）
(...Didn't they say the Garbage King would wait for me here?)
深不见底的垃圾箱里有一个奇怪的垃圾袋，你注意到袋上的「封印」——几条鱼骨，将袋口牢牢卡住。
A strange trash bag sits in the bottomless trashcan. You notice the "seal" on the bag — A few fish bones have clipped the mouth of the bag shut.
啪！一声巨响，一股青烟从袋中徐徐升起，在空中拧成一团，缓缓变成了一个巨大的...垃圾桶。
Bam! Green smoke wafts up from within the bag together with a loud noise. It twists and congeals in the air, slowly becoming a giant... trashcan.
终于——我重获自由了！我是「垃垃撕圾」，一个无比邪恶的桶。塔塔洛夫用卑劣的手段击败我，把我封印进这深邃的垃圾袋。
Finally — I am free! I am "Garboski," a can of unmatched evil. Tatalov used despicable means to defeat me and sealed me in this deep and cramped trash bag.
最开始的五百年，我发誓如果有桶来解救我，我必赐给他无穷的财富。第二个五百年，我发誓如果有桶来解救我，我必赐给他无尽的垃圾。

For the first five hundred years of my imprisonment, I swore an oath that if a can came to save me, I would reward them with endless wealth. Then, for the next five hundred years, I swore that if a can saved me, I would reward them with endless trash.
但时间过去一万年——整整二十个五百年——始终没有桶来救我！于是我发誓如果有桶来解救我，我必赐给他无痛的死亡。

However, ten thousand years have passed. That's <unbreak>20</unbreak> five-hundred-year periods, but no cans came! Therefore, I swore that if a can came to save me, I would reward them with a painless death.
— You've come, and so you now must die.
This is not fair! I saved you!
没错，所以我会给予你最后的慈悲，选择自己死法的权利。
Correct. I will now offer you a final mercy. You get to choose how you wish to die.
I wish to die as a warrior!
哦？从来没有桶敢向我发起决斗，我承认你的英勇…也许我们没有必要进行无谓的争斗。
Oh? No trashcan has ever dared to challenge me to a duel. I acknowledge your bravery... Perhaps there's no need to conduct a pointless battle.
何不与我一起对抗塔塔洛夫？
Why not stand with me against Tatalov?
数万年的囚禁早就磨平了我的桶边，我已风光不再，只想以一个普通垃圾桶的身份度过余生。再见了，陌生的人。
Countless years of captivity have whittled flat my edges. My prime is long past, never to return. I only wish to pass the rest of my life as a normal trashcan. Farewell, stranger.
我不信你会被关进垃圾袋里。
I don't believe you were sealed in the trash bag.
没错…塔塔洛夫就是用这样的把戏耍了我：「你这样巨大的身躯，垃圾袋怎么容得下你呢？」于是我当着他的面钻进了垃圾袋，就这样遭到封印。
Ah, yes, Tatalov used the same trick against me. "With such a massive body like yours, how can a bag fit you?" And so I slipped into a trash bag before him and found myself sealed.
再邪恶的桶也懂得吸取教训，你这招已经无效了！现在，感受我被囚禁了一万年——整整二十个五百年——的愤怒吧！
Even the vilest trashcan is capable of learning to heed a lesson. Your tactics are ineffective against me now! Now, feel my ten thousand years — five hundred years times twenty — of fury!
But I'm a person, not a trashcan.
…你说得没错，你不是我期待中的救主，因此你没有背叛我的期待。我应该感谢你才对。走吧，我不会取你的性命，也仅止于此了。
You're right. You are not the savior that I expected. And because you haven't betrayed my expectations... I should thank you instead. Go. I won't take your life, but that's the limit of my mercy.
何不与我一起对抗塔塔洛夫？
Why not stand with me against Tatalov?
数万年的囚禁早就磨平了我的桶边，我已风光不再，只想以一个普通垃圾桶的身份度过余生。再见了，陌生的人。
Countless years of captivity have whittled flat my edges. My prime is long past, never to return. I only wish to pass the rest of my life as a normal trashcan. Farewell, stranger.
你解决了被封印的恶魔，垃垃撕圾？他那么恐怖，那么强大…但你却战胜了他——何其伟大！
You dealt with the sealed demon, Garboski? He is so powerful and so terrifying, but you defeated him... How magnificent of you!
你赢得了我，还有其他桶的信任。希望此物可以表达我们对你的承认。
You've won me over, along with many others. This item carries our high regard for you.
想不到啊，你很强大，我承认你的英勇…也许我们没有必要进行无谓的争斗。
I didn't expect you to be so strong. I acknowledge your bravery... Perhaps there's no need to conduct a pointless battle.
何不与我一起对抗塔塔洛夫？
Why not stand with me against Tatalov?
数万年的囚禁早就磨平了我的桶边，我已风光不再，只想以一个普通垃圾桶的身份度过余生。再见了，陌生的人。
Countless years of captivity have whittled flat my edges. My prime is long past, never to return. I only wish to pass the rest of my life as a normal trashcan. Farewell, stranger.
这是一个普通的垃圾桶。多么神奇，在一座由垃圾桶构成的王国里，居然存在着普通的垃圾桶…机会难得，你打算对它做点什么？
This is a normal-looking trashcan. How magical! A kingdom of trashcans actually has an ordinary trashcan... This is a rare opportunity. Do you wish to do something to it?
当然，这就是垃圾桶的工作。你随便找了点什么扔进它漆黑而深不见底的洞口，一阵巨响随之传来……
Of course. That's the job of a trashcan. You chuck whatever random things you have on hand into its pitch-black and bottomless void. A series of loud sounds thundered back.
当然，这就是垃圾桶的价值。你用手指触碰它的桶壁，一阵巨响随之传来……
Of course. That's the value of a trashcan. When you used your finger to touch its sides, a burst of loud sounds followed.
…这显然是不文明的，换作平时，你恐怕得支付一个「崇高道德的赞许」——但这里是梦境，所以管他呢，你一脚踢在桶壁上，一阵巨响随之传来……

...Evidently, this is not civilized behavior. In regular circumstances, you'd probably have to give up a Praise of High Morals... However, this is the Dreamscape, so who cares? You feel your foot impact the can with a loud bam...
当你重新睁开眼时，垃圾桶已不再是垃圾桶，而是一只长着双手与双腿的...垃圾桶。
When you open your eyes again, the trashcan is no longer just a trashcan. It's now a trashcan... with arms and legs.
感谢你，美丽又陌生的人。我是垃圾桶王子，我的父亲被塔塔洛夫暗害，我也被邪术变成了垃圾桶。是你救了我，将我从囚禁中解放出来。
Thank you, beautiful stranger. I am the Trashcan Prince, and my father was assassinated by Tatalov, and I was cursed into becoming a trashcan. You saved me from internment.
我愿献上我的一切——身体、灵魂、生命、垃圾袋——只为报答你的恩情！
I shall offer everything I have — my body, my soul, my life, even my trash bags — just to repay your kindness.
你说话好像纯美骑士团…
You talk like a Knight of Beauty...
的确有许多桶夸赞我的美貌，但我不清楚你所说的名号。在这偌大的王国里，唯一的骑士团是「金钢镚骑士团」，每名成员都是十足高尚的桶。

There are many cans who compliment my beauty, but I am not familiar with the name of which you just spoke. The only knightly order in this kingdom is the "Knights of Loose Change," each of whom is a noble and respectable can of the highest order.
那就和我一起反抗塔塔洛夫。
Then stand with me against Tatalov.
我愿意。我会与你一同点燃反抗的狼烟，将王国从危难中拯救。
I will. I will stand with you and ignite the rising smoke of rebellion until the kingdom is saved from absolute peril.
你已得到了我的信任，希望你能将此物连带着我的心一并收下。我将为你而战，伟大的灵魂。
You have earned my confidence. I wish for you to accept this item and my heart as a token of my sincere gratitude. I will fight for you, O glorious soul.
Then who is worthy of it?
三个垃圾桶围在一起，似乎在为什么事争论不休……
Three trashcans stand around each other, arguing ceaselessly about a certain matter...
异乡人，这里有一桩纠纷等待着你公正的判决。
Outlander, a dispute awaits your fair judgment.
这是传说中的金垃圾，权力与地位的象征。只有最具资格的桶才能占有它。我们都觉得自己才是那个桶，因此争吵不休。
This is the legendary golden trash, a symbol of power and status. Only the most qualified trashcan may lay claim to it. All of us feel that we are that trashcan, and so we keep fighting for it.
于是我们决定让一位眼光独到，且态度公正的旁观者代为评判，决定金垃圾的归属，为长久的争吵画上一个句号。
So, we have decided that an observer possessing unique and just insight should be the judge for this matter and decide to whom the reward will belong, and bring a conclusive end to this long dispute.
你若将金垃圾赐予我，我便许诺你无穷的财富，多到足以填满最大的桶。
If you give the golden trash to me, I will pledge you endless wealth, more than enough to fill the biggest trashcan there is.
你若将金垃圾赐予我，我便许诺你无穷的智慧，胜过任何一袋满溢的垃圾。
If you give the golden trash to me, I will grant you endless knowledge, more than any full bag of trashcan provide.
你若将金垃圾赐予我，我便许诺你世上最美丽的垃圾桶——也就是我——与你结伴而立，共同面对风吹雨打。

If you bestow upon me this golden trash, I shall promise you the most beautiful trashcan in the world — myself. I will stand beside you as a partner beyond peer and face all your trials and triumphs by your side.
将金垃圾切成三份平均分配。
Split golden trash into three and distribute evenly.
众目睽睽之下，你对金垃圾做出了完美的均分，就连钟表披萨的每一块都不一定如此均等。
Amidst the watchful gaze of the three, you perfectly split the golden trash. Not even a Clockie Pizza can be divided this evenly.
困扰了我们许久的难题，竟然就这样解决了……
The conundrum that has stymied us for so long... fixed just like that?
那到底谁才是最具资格的桶…不，那已经不重要了。
Then who is the most qualified can... No, that no longer mattered.
这位异乡人一定是想让我们明白，眼下的纷争是多么可笑…您用行动证明了自己。此物象征着我们的追随与憧憬，希望您能收下！

The outlander must be trying to help us understand how foolish this dispute of ours was... You have proven yourself with your actions. This signifies our loyalty and longing. We wish for you to have it.
我才是唯一配得上它的人！
I am the only one worthy of it!
众目睽睽之下，你将金垃圾据为己有。确实，这些小小的垃圾桶人…有哪个能像你一样高大、挺拔？
Under the watchful eyes of the three, you claim the golden trash as your own. Indeed, among these small trashcans, is there anyone who stands as tall and upright as you do?
困扰了我们许久的难题，竟然就这样解决了……
The conundrum that has stymied us for so long... fixed just like that?
那到底谁才是最具资格的桶…不，那已经不重要了。
Then who is the most qualified can... No, that no longer mattered.
这位异乡人一定是想让我们明白，眼下的纷争是多么可笑…您用行动证明了自己。此物象征着我们的追随与憧憬，希望您能收下！

The outlander must be trying to help us understand how foolish this dispute of ours was... You have proven yourself with your actions. This signifies our loyalty and longing. We wish for you to have it.
There has to be a way...
我们受够了塔塔洛夫的摧残！要从他的宝库里拿回自己的东西，塔塔洛夫贪婪、暴戾，抢走了大家赖以生计的物资，我们必须打开这道门。
We've had enough of Tatalov's oppression! To retrieve our belongings from his treasure trove, the resources vital to our livelihoods seized by Tatalov's greed and tyranny, we must open this door.
奇怪，你还什么都没做，大门就缓缓打开了——原来如此，这是一道自动感应门，只是感应不了垃圾桶。
Strange, you haven't done anything, but the door opens slowly — it turns out that this is an automatic sensor door. It just can't sense trashcans.
大门打开了…传闻是真的，你是注定要击败塔塔洛夫的救世主！垃圾之神派你来将暴君的财宝散给我们！
The door is open... The legends are true! You are the savior destined to defeat Tatalov! The God of Trash sent you to return the tyrant's treasures to us!
啊，我从没感觉像现在这样畅快过！等你向塔塔洛夫掀起反旗时，我和其他受压迫的桶必跟随你的左右！
Ah, I've never felt so exhilarated before! When you raise the banner of rebellion against Tatalov, I and the other oppressed cans shall stand by your side!
你看着垃圾桶们兴奋地挤进「宝库」，撕扯开一袋又一袋垃圾，将它们尽数倒进自己的桶身……
You watch the trashcans excitedly crowd into the "treasure trove," tearing open bag after bag of garbage and pouring the contents into their torso...
When will this come to an end...
这个垃圾桶看起来很安静。他的桶盖已经掉漆发白。他正一粒一粒地数着路边的垃圾，时而叹气、时而挠头，似乎正尽力记住一个天文数字。

This particular trashcan stands quietly. Its lid has chipped and faded paint. It is meticulously counting the roadside trash, occasionally sighing or scratching its head, as if struggling to memorize an astronomical number.
…你也是来嘲笑我的吗？又或者是来寻求智慧的答案？
...Are you here to mock me too? Or are you seeking wise answers?
说来话长。很久以前，我触怒了塔塔洛夫。我对他说，再稳固的统治也有衰亡的一天，就像再多的垃圾也可以被数尽，不知是哪半句话让他非常恼火……

It's a long story. A long, long time ago, I angered Tatalov. I told him that even the most stable of nations has their day of decay, and even all the trash in the stars can eventually be counted. It is unclear which part of the sentence infuriated him...
作为惩罚，他将我发配至此，要我数尽这座城中所有的垃圾。在那之前，我将永远不能发表自己的看法。
...As punishment, he assigned me this role, demanding that I count all the trash in the city. Before then, I am to never issue forth my opinions.
哦…很少有桶会如此开门见山，我确实拥有「信任的证明」，但如今它已经遗失在了垃圾山中。
Oh... it's rare for a can to be so straightforward. I do possess the "Proof of Trust," but now it's lost in the mountain of trash.
如果你想要，就和我一起处理吧。我已经数完了这座城市中的绝大多数垃圾，只剩下新来的这三桶了。
If you want it, work with me. I have counted the majority of the trash in this city, leaving only these three newly arrived cans.
垃圾桶王国的垃圾会是什么样？抱着好奇心，你打开了第一个桶的盖子。
What sort of trash would Trashcan Kingdom hold? Curiosity piqued, you open the lid of the first trashcan.
可惜，没什么不同。也许爱德华医生没来得及去管这些细节。
Unfortunately, there isn't any difference. Maybe Dr. Edward did not have time to attend to these details.
这个垃圾桶里有本漫画，书页已经残破不堪。它讲述了这么一场冒险：塔塔洛夫曾是一位勇桶。他凭借勇气和意志击败了废品巨怪，还从它口中救出了一个人类。

There's a comic book inside this trashcan. The pages are torn and damaged. It tells of an adventure: Tatalov was once a brave trashcan. With valiance and willpower, it defeated a colossal junk monster and saved a human from its monstrous maw.
为了向塔塔洛夫报恩，那人类把自己也变成了垃圾桶…这竟然是个惊悚故事。
In order to repay Tatalov, that human turned himself into a trashcan... This is actually a horror story.
你看见了意料之外的东西，一只真蛰虫…它就这样躺在垃圾桶里，与你对视。
You see something unexpected — a True Sting, lying inside the trashcan, looking back at you.
是时候为民除害了！用你的球棒告诉它，这里是「存护」的王国！
It is time to rid the people of this menace — Use your bat to tell it that this is a Kingdom of Preservation!
不错，年轻的桶，你证明了自己的智慧和耐心。你配得上这份「信任的证明」，我会将它转赠给你。
Not bad, young can. You've proven yourself by your wisdom and patience... You deserve this Proof of Trust. I'll gift it to you.
一阵巨响过后，「繁育」的灾祸褪去，世界清净了。那位遭受无妄之灾的桶也回到了他的梦乡。谢谢你，无名客！
After a loud boom, Propagation's crisis has ended. The world is once again peaceful. And that trashcan who has endured undeserved ordeals has returned to his slumber. Thank you, Nameless!
我已年老体衰，无力与你并肩作战，但愿我的头脑能为你所用。
I'm now old and frail, no longer able to fight by your side. Hopefully, my mind can still be of use to you.
你赢得了我，还有其他桶的信任。希望此物可以表达我们对你的承认。
You've won me over, along with many others. This item carries our high regard for you.
你已经得到了我的信任。我将为你而战，伟大的灵魂。
You have earned my confidence. I will fight for you, O glorious soul.
我们都认可你的智慧与公平。
We all approve of your intellect and justness.
您用行动证明了自己。我们三桶将成为你的助力，为垃圾桶赢得自由。
You have proven yourself with your actions. We three cans shall become your aides, and win freedom once more for trashcans.
我们三桶将成为你的助力，为我等族类赢得自由。
We three cans will become your aides, and win freedom once more for our people.
等你向塔塔洛夫掀起反旗的那天，我和其他受压迫的桶必跟随你的左右。
When you raise the banners of rebellion against Tatalov, I, and all other oppressed cans will be at your side.
所以，袭击你的人是一位身穿红衣，擅长幻术，能变化成他人样貌的女性……
So, the one who attacked you was a girl dressed in red, adept at illusory arts, and was able to shapeshift...
她名叫「花火」，是混入匹诺康尼的假面愚者…放心，那姑娘暂时不会再打各位的主意了。她一定自以为得逞，正不知在何处得意洋洋呢。
Her name is Sparkle, a Masked Fool who has infiltrated Penacony... Don't worry. She won't be bothering you for now. She's probably patting herself on the back for a job well done.
It seems you know her well.
当然，我了解这里的每一个人。在匹诺康尼，所有人都可能说谎…但「记忆」不会。
Of course, I know everyone here. On Penacony, anyone could be lying... but the Remembrance does not lie.
所以我有必要向各位澄清一个事实：花火小姐的把戏能令人陷入幻觉，但那片诡异的梦境和她无关，而是源自匹诺康尼本身。
So I feel the need to clarify with everyone: Miss Sparkle's tricks can induce hallucinations, but that strange Dreamscape? Nothing to do with her — it originated from Penacony itself.
还没意识到吗？所谓的「梦想之地」…其实是家族不知用何种手段精心维护的成果，一场设计好的美梦。
Have you not sensed it yet? This apparent land of dreams... It's a carefully designed dream maintained by The Family through unknown means.
而{M#他}{F#她}坠入的那片忆域——那才是梦境原本的样子，混乱、危险、神秘…变幻莫测的迷宫中栖息着记忆的{RUBY_B#忆域迷因}野兽{RUBY_E#}……
And the Memory Zone {M#he}{F#she} fell into, that's the true Dreamscape: Chaotic, dangerous, enigmatic... A {RUBY_B#Memory Zone Meme}beast{RUBY_E#} of memory dwells in the ever-shifting labyrinth...
…她说的没错。各位，还记得入梦时的景色吗？
...She's right. Everyone, do you all still remember your surroundings during your entry into the Dreamscape?
咦，原来每个人看到的是一样的么？我记得…然后是一间客房，再通过镜子来到一条长长的走廊……
Huh, so everyone saw the same thing? I remember... it was a room, and then through a mirror, I came to a long hallway...
「思绪长廊」——酒店的服务人员是这么称呼它的。
The Gallery of Thoughts — that's how the hotel staff referred to it.
不觉得这些风景和梦中的匹诺康尼相去甚远…却和黑天鹅小姐描述的梦境十分相似么？
Have you noticed? These landscapes seem quite distinct from that of Penacony's in your dream, yet strikingly similar to the Dreamscape described by Miss Black Swan.
的确…初见时没放在心上，但回过头看，二者的共同点未免有些多了。
You're right... I didn't give it much thought at first, but in hindsight, the overlap is hard to ignore.
以及，我从一些熟客口中得知，入梦后的第一站原本是「梦中的酒店」，但因为一些意外…「酒店目前正在进行修缮」。
Also, after speaking to some of the frequenters, the first stop when you enter the dream is supposed to be the hotel in the dream, but due to certain incidents... the hotel is now under renovation.
请问一栋建筑在什么情况下才需要修缮？结合下{M#他}{F#她}方才的经历，答案很明了了。
What could possibly have to happen to an entire building for it to require renovation? Combine that with what {M#he}{F#she} just experienced, and the answer is clear.
匹诺康尼的美梦正在*沉没*，变回它原本的样子…坠入{RUBY_B#忆域}深海{RUBY_E#}。
Penacony's dream is *sinking* right now, turning back to its original form... and falling into the {RUBY_B#Memory Zone}deep sea{RUBY_E#}.
沉没？你的意思是…梦境世界正在瓦解？
Sinking? You mean... the Dreamscape is collapsing?
梦境酒店的遭遇就是预兆。
The encounter at the dreamscape Hotel was a sign.
…原来如此，这样就能解释家族言语中的违和感了。
...I see. That would explain the uneasiness we've sensed from The Family.
倘若这一消息被外界得知，无论住客们的实际安全如何，盛会之星的名誉必然会受到影响。谐乐大典将至，他们不得不隐瞒此事。

Leaving aside the question of guest safety, were this to become public, it would tarnish the name of the Planet of Festivities. With the Charmony Festival around the corner, it's no wonder they'd want to keep it under wraps.
住客们的安全，也许这一点也无法保障哦…{M#他}{F#她}遭遇的那只怪物不就是最好的证明吗？要我再提示一遍吗，它是忆域迷因……
Even the guests' safety cannot be assured now... Isn't the monster that {M#he}{F#she} encountered indisputable proof? Need I remind you that it is a Memory Zone meme...
暗喻死亡和谋杀的迷因怎会出现在家族宣称「绝对安全」的梦里…在匹诺康尼，所有人都可能说谎——或许也包括家族自己哦？
How could a meme that heralds death and murder appear in a dream that The Family proclaims "to be absolutely safe"... Everyone could be lying on Penacony — does that include The Family as well?
黑天鹅小姐，现状我们已充分了解了。回到你最初的提议……
Miss Black Swan, we fully understand our current predicament now. Going back to your original suggestion...
请问流光忆庭又是出于什么理由，选择和星穹列车合作呢？
For what reason has the Garden of Recollection chosen to work with the Astral Express?
嗯，请允许我纠正一下…这是我个人的请求，不代表忆庭。答案很简单，姬子小姐，我只是想做个交换…有关「记忆」的交换。
Hmm, let me rephrase then... this is my personal request, not the Garden of Recollection's. And the answer is simple. Miss Himeko, I simply wish to make an exchange... related to the Remembrance.
在职责之外，我也有些…个人的美学追求。我是忆者，也是一位收藏家，我也想见证那些晶莹、璀璨的宝贵记忆——这种想法很好理解，不是吗？

Apart from my duty, I also have some... personal pursuit in aesthetics. I am a Memokeeper, and a collector. I, too yearn to experience those luminous, dazzling, cherished memories. That's simple enough to understand, no?
而你们，星穹列车的无名客，「开拓」之道的践行者…我相信你们的潜质，也相信你们将在这片舞台上绽放出的…独一无二的光辉。
As for you all, Nameless of the Astral Express, and practitioners of the Trailblaze... I have faith in your potential, as well as in the... unique splendor you will unleash on the stage.
这就是我想和各位交朋友的原因。噩梦与美梦的交汇之地…作为「记忆」的摇篮再合适不过了。
This is why I wish to befriend all of you. A place where nightmares and sweet dreams intersect... the perfect cradle for the Remembrance.
…我明白了。但在答复你之前，我们还需要做些讨论。
...I understand. But before replying, we must first discuss this among ourselves.
咳咳，能听到吗？星穹列车，好久不见——匹诺康尼好玩吗？
Ahem, can you hear me? Astral Express, it's been a while. How's Penacony?
这是…是那个骇客小姑娘！
说正经的。我知道各位正在四处调查匹诺康尼的异象，不如说，我们非常乐于看见这一幕。因为你们调查得越深入，就越有机会了解到美梦的真相。

I'll get straight to the point. I know you've all been investigating the abnormal phenomenon surrounding Penacony. Or rather, we are pleased to see that you've been doing that — because the deeper you delve, the closer you'll get to uncovering truth about this so-called "beautiful" dream.
家族正在隐瞒什么，不是吗？我们也掌握了一手情报。现在，我决定宽宏大量地把它与各位分享。只是，可惜——美好的假期要结束啦。

The Family is obviously hiding something, right? Well we've nabbed some valuable information, and out of the goodness of my heart I've decided to share it with all of you. Although, it unfortunately means your idyllic break in paradise is nearing its end.
把这段代码输进你们的入梦池，就是那个用来做梦的装置，到隐藏地图去看看吧！位置坐标都给你们打包好了，喏，一键复制就行。
Enter this string of code into your Dreampool — the device you use to dream with — and dive into the hidden map for a look! The coordinates have been sent to you. You just have to copy them over.
以及——想必你们已经听说萨姆的事了。好好期待一下吧，那家伙性格单纯，喜欢堂堂正正的胜负，一定与你们*合得来*。希望各位别被他的热情压垮！

Also, I take it you've already heard about Sam. You should look forward to the meeting. He's a straight shooter who values a fair fight. I think you'll *get along* with him just fine. Don't be overwhelmed by his enthusiasm!
哦，他让我转告各位：<color=#dbc291ff>无法抵达的梦中，剧目即将开演——</color>加油吧，各方势力都动起来了。无名客，别落后太远哦！

Oh, he had me relay a message to you: <color=#dbc291ff>The curtains have just risen over the dream that can't be reached</color>. The various factions have started to move. I wish you luck! Don't fall behind, Nameless!
{NICKNAME}, look at me... Calm down, deep breaths, all right?
真的很抱歉，我得离开一小段时间…「死亡」还在游荡，我必须亲自去确认姬子小姐和三月七小姐的安危，并给予提醒……
I'm really sorry, but I have to leave for a short while... Death still hovers about, and I must personally ensure Miss Himeko and Miss March 7th's safety, and warn them...
I'll leave {NICKNAME} to you... Miss Acheron.
发生这种事，我很遗憾…我太过专注于那女孩，却忽视了……
I'm sorry for what happened... I was too focused on that girl, and got sloppy...
是因为我的犹豫不决让她送了命…对不起，{NICKNAME}。
It was my hesitation that caused her to lose her life... I'm sorry, {NICKNAME}.
但如果那时，我选择拔刀的话……
But if in that moment, I chose to draw my blade...
You didn't even draw your blade... Why...
当务之急是弄清发生了什么。
The priority is figuring out what happened.
会的…我们会的。但时候未到。在「巡猎」之前，我们应当擦亮眼睛，思考真正的敌人藏身何处，以及如何与之相抗……
Yes... Yes, we will. But not yet. Before The Hunt, we should keep our eyes peeled and consider where the true enemies are hiding, and how to fight them...
She didn't have a choice either...
我明白你的愤怒，也愿意接受它…但时候未到。我们应当擦亮眼睛，思考真正的敌人藏身何处，以及如何与之相抗……
I understand your anger, and I will accept it... but this isn't the time. We should keep our eyes peeled and consider where the true enemies are hiding, and how to fight them...
不要让伤痛左右你的想法，{NICKNAME}。维持自我，你才能走在正确的路上。
Do not let pain dictate your thoughts, {NICKNAME}. Compose yourself, and you will walk the right path.
曾经，也有人这么告诫我…「对待敌人无需怜悯，那是对自己的残忍。但你必须要认清谁才是真正的敌人……」
Once, someone said to me: "No compassion for the enemy, for that is cruelty upon yourself. But you must see clearly who the true enemy is..."
…以及，你要明白挥出那一刀的意义和代价。
...And then, with one swing of your blade, you must understand its meaning and the price you pay.
这是一个身负累累血债之人能给你的唯一忠告。
This is the only advice I have for you, from someone burdened with a blood debt.
{NICKNAME}，姬子小姐有话想对你说…有坏消息，也有好消息。
{NICKNAME}, Miss Himeko has something to tell you... There's good news, and bad news.
你们看着黄泉转身走去。你记得，她正是在那里化成了泡影。
You watch as Acheron turns away. You remember that it was there that she dissolved into a mere illusion.
你看见她停下脚步，只抿了抿唇，垂下双眼。半晌，她伛下身子，用手像是挽了些什么，复又起身。
You see her pause, lips pursed, eyes downcast. After a moment, she hunches down, as if gathering something with her hands, and rises again.
愿死亡结束你漫长的梦……
May death be the end of your boundless dream...
引领你归还…清醒的世界。
Guiding you back... to the waking world.
看——很符合常识，也很简单吧？
Look, it's common sense and easy, right?
Are we... jumping down from here?
放心，我会稍加操作，将梦泡堆叠在一起，为各位安排一场舒适的软着陆。
Don't worry, I'll do something about it. Let me stack the dream bubbles to give everyone a nice, soft landing.
真的平安落地了。这还真是…神奇。
We landed safely. This is... amazing.
没有忆者陪同，不要擅自模仿哦。那么……
Don't imitate the Memokeeper without the accompaniment of one! Well...
…也请这些闻风而来的好奇孩子打道回府吧。
...wouldn't it be lovely if these nosy newcomers found their way back home?
对咯，我就喜欢这种大吃一惊的表情。
Right, I do enjoy seeing that shocked expression of yours.
朋友，现在让我们打开天窗说亮话吧，这个名叫「黄泉」的女人远没有你想象的那么简单，什么巡海游侠……
My friend, let's be honest. That woman named "Acheron" isn't as simple as you thought. Did she say she's a Galaxy Ranger?
<color=#dbc291ff>——她是一位令使，她带来死亡和终局。</color>
<color=#dbc291ff>...She's actually an Emanator, who brings death and finality.</color>
但是？没有什么但是，这就是事实。
But? There's no but. This is the truth.
也许是「巡猎」…「毁灭」…甚至可能是「终末」，无所谓了，这些命途的其中一面——都指向同一种结果。
Perhaps The Hunt... or Destruction... or even Finality. It doesn't matter, these Paths all point to the same outcome.
不可能，我凭什么相信你？
Impossible. Why should I believe you?
不，黄泉就在现场，不会是她。
No way. Acheron was right there at the scene. It couldn't have been her.
现场？什么现场…不会吧…我的天——这下更有意思了。
She was there? Wait, what... You're kidding... Oh my, this just got even more interesting.
给你来点公司的料吧，朋友。你知道「冥火大公」——陀斐特的阿弗利特么？
Let me give you some IPC insider information, my friend. Do you know "Duke Inferno" — Fetora's Ifrit?
可以啊，不愧是你！那就长话短说……
Nicely done, as expected! I'll cut to the chase then...
看来完全没印象啊…毕竟是泯灭帮，也算正常。那我就为你说明一下……
You don't seem to have heard of him before... He belongs to the Annihilation Gang, so I guess it's normal. Then let me explain to you...
这位冥火大公是来自陀斐特的火魔，一种元素生命，据说出身还和某位天才有点关系……
This Duke Inferno is a Fire Demon from Fetora. He's an energy lifeform, and it's rumored that his birth is related to a certain genius...
他和党羽组成「永火官邸」，视纳努克为恩主——实际是受这位大公领导，四处烧杀掳掠，践行「毁灭」的意志，甚至连其他泯灭帮也不放过。

He and his thugs formed "Ever-Flame Mansion" and viewed Nanook as their savior — in actuality, they were led by this duke to go around burning and looting, practicing the will of Destruction. And even the other Annihilation Gangs weren't spared.
也不知家族脑袋出了什么问题，又或者有人从中作梗，这帮家伙竟然也收到了邀请函。永火官邸当然不会拒绝，来势汹汹，誓要将盛会之星烧作一片火海……

I'm not sure what The Family was thinking, or perhaps someone was scheming behind the scenes, but shockingly these characters received an invitation. And why would the Ever-Flame Mansion decline? They harbor fierce intentions, swearing to turn the Planet of Festivities into a sea of blazing flames...
但不用担心，他们不会赴约了。你知道为什么吗？
But there's no need to worry. They won't be able to attend. Do you know why?
他们在赴约途中覆灭了。凶手以一种神乎其技的方式将阿弗利特残忍杀害，劫走了泯灭帮收到的邀请函。永火官邸也分崩离析，作鸟兽散——

They were eliminated while on their way. The assailant, demonstrating remarkable expertise, ruthlessly ended Ifrit and swiped the invite that the Annihilation Gang had in their possession. The Ever-Flame Mansion disbanded, each going their separate ways...
而这之后，一位神秘的巡海游侠抵达匹诺康尼，靠一只八音盒入住了酒店…还需要我继续说下去吗，朋友？
Thereafter, a mysterious Galaxy Ranger arrived on Penacony, checking into the hotel with only a music box... Do you still need me to continue the story, my friend?
Do you have any other evidence?
巡海游侠神出鬼没，彼此之间也往来甚少，这件衣服太好穿了，只要她不松口，根本死无对证。公司是有办法追查，但也需要时间。

The Galaxy Rangers come and go like shadows, and there's little communication between them. Her story is almost too perfect. If she remains silent, there's no concrete evidence against her. While the IPC can investigate, it'll take some time.
所以，朋友，该你做出选择了…你可以现在，立马，头也不回地离开这里，永远放弃接近真相的机会。
So, my friend, the choice is yours now... You can leave this place immediately, without looking back, and forever forsake the chance to get closer to the truth.
与之相对地，你也可以接受我的邀请，并得知一个<color=#dbc291ff>事实</color>，一个足以颠覆匹诺康尼的事实。
Or, you can accept my invitation and learn a <color=#dbc291ff>truth</color>, a truth potent enough to upend everything in Penacony.
我需要你的帮助，所以会等你——但也不会等太久。准备好了…就跟上来吧。
I need your help, so I'll wait — but not for long. Once you are ready... follow me.
至于要不要和我合作，等看过那<color=#dbc291ff>事实</color>后再做决定…也不迟。
As for aligning with me, see the <color=#dbc291ff>truth</color> first, then decide... you'll still have time.
…欢迎回来。演出准备得如何了？
...Welcome back. How's your preparation for the performance coming?
嗯，这可不好…你是家族的骄傲，别让那些多余的情绪影响你完美的音韵。
Hmm, this is not good... You're the pride of The Family. Don't let those unnecessary emotions affect your perfect pitch.
哥哥，你看起来有些消沉…发生什么事了？是那些收到「钟表匠」邀请的宾客吗？
Brother, you seem to be in low spirit... What's happened? Is it because of the Watchmaker's guest list?
是啊，我收到了报告…「死亡」带走了他们中的一些人。或许是受人指使。
Yes, I received the report that... "Death" had taken some of them. Perhaps someone was behind it.
啊，抱歉。我忘记你才刚回来，应该不知道这件事。
Ah, I'm sorry. I forgot you just came back. You probably wouldn't know about it.
不知从何时开始，名为「死亡」的梦魇在匹诺康尼降临，它对人进行无差别袭击，将精神的死亡平等地带给了所有人……
Somehow, a nightmare called "Death" has descended upon Penacony, striking indiscriminately, bringing spiritual death to all equally...
但家族构建的美梦中，任何不幸都不应发生。它严重破坏了梦境的秩序与和平…多么可恨。
In the utopian dreamscape envisioned by The Family, such sorrowful incidents shouldn't arise. It profoundly undermines the equilibrium and serenity of the dreamscape... How detestable.
竟然发生了这种事，那…是又有人遇害了吗？
I can't believe this has happened. Was... someone killed again?
嗯，共有两位。一位偷渡犯，以及……
Yes. There were two. One was a stowaway, the other...
可以了，愚者。你的作为令我心寒。
That's enough Fool. Your deeds have saddened me.
你很敏锐嘛，鸡翅膀男孩。
Pretty sharp, aren't you, Chicken Wing Boy?
《谐乐颂》诚不我欺——「愚者的言语起头是愚昧，末尾是奸恶的狂妄」……
The Odes of Harmony talks about honesty — "The words of a fool begins with foolishness and end in treacherous arrogance"...
...Please leave. THEIR dreamscape doesn't welcome you.
哎呀，别板着脸嘛～还一本正经地引经据典，干嘛这么严肃？
Oh come on, lighten up! Why so serious with all the quotations and references?
我只是想问问——事到如今，家族还不打算出手吗？你那可怜的妹妹已经牺牲了哦？
I'm just curious — Now things have come to this, is The Family still unwilling to fight? I mean, your darling sister's already a goner, right?
你…难道就不想为她报仇吗？
Really? Don't tell me you're not craving a little vengeance.
尚不是时候。等到了命定的日子，我必按正直施行审判。
It's not yet time. When the fated day arrives, I shall mete out justice with unyielding righteousness.
厉害啊，这你都能忍～真是个冷血的家伙。嘿，我们说不定很聊得来哦？
Wow, you can endure that much? Truly, a heart of ice you've got there. Hey, maybe we could actually get along?
要不这样吧，我可以代你那位妹妹出席各种场合——你肯定也不想让人们知道…谐乐大典已经无法举办了吧？
How about this? I'll stand in for your dear sister at events — surely you don't want the world to hear the Charmony Festival's been called off?
家族自有安排。别再用你那诡诈的舌头玷污我亲爱的妹妹，愚者。
The Family has a plan, and do not dishonor my dear sister with your deceitful tongue again, Fool.
好吧好吧～我只是想说…如果你需要，我随时都可以帮你哦？谁能拒绝一位在鸡翅膀上打钉饰的男孩呢？
Alright, alright~ Just putting it out there... If you're ever in a pinch, remember I've got your back. I mean, who could resist a guy rocking spikes on his wings?
不必了，凶手已经在祂的光照下露了马脚。用不了多久，他便会因自己的计谋跌倒在地。
There's no need. The malefactor has been exposed under THEIR radiant gaze and will soon fall by their own machinations.
若他不回头，那祂的刀必磨快，弓必上弦，使恶人施加的毒害临到自己头上。
Should the transgressor fail to turn away from this path, THEIR sword will be honed, THEIR bow strung, causing the malevolence the perpetrator spreads to befall them.
等到那时，那不敬爱神的外邦人便知道自己不过是凡人，要坠落到阴间去……
When that time comes, the heathen will realize they are but a mere mortal, doomed to descend into the netherworld.
…而我将成为祂的尖兵，亲自为你{RUBY_B#送葬}报喜{RUBY_E#}——「钟表匠」。
...And I will join THEIR vanguard to announce this {RUBY_B#funeral}good news{RUBY_E#} to you personally, "Watchmaker."
姬子小姐，你看，我如约将这孩子带回来了。
Look, Miss Himeko: I brought the kid back as promised.
{NICKNAME}，你没事吧！现实和梦里都找不到你，担心死我了……
{NICKNAME}, you're all right! We couldn't find you in either dream or reality, we were worried sick...
你平安无事就好。为你介绍一下——黑天鹅小姐，流光忆庭的忆者。
It's good to see you're unharmed. Allow me to introduce you to Miss Black Swan, Memokeeper of the Garden of Recollection.
嗯。姬子姐姐说，她们是在调查梦境的过程中偶遇的。
Yeah. Miss Himeko said that they were investigating the incidents happening in the Dreamscape.
尚且只有一面之缘。但因为你，我们或许能够借此机会加深对彼此的了解呢。
We've only met once. But thanks to you, we might be able to use this opportunity to get to know each other a little bit better.
哎呀，不是啦。姬子姐姐说，她们是在调查梦境的过程中偶遇的。
Oh, not exactly. Miss Himeko said that they were investigating the incidents happening in the Dreamscape.
目前还不是。但因为你，我们或许能够借此机会加深对彼此的了解呢。
Not quite yet. But thanks to you, we might be able to use this opportunity to get to know each other a little bit better.
所以，{NICKNAME}，你怎么会落入那种地方…发生了什么？
So, {NICKNAME}, how did you end up there... and what the heck happened?
她的话不可尽信，有不少刻意诱导的成分。
It's best to be skeptical of her. There's a significant amount of intentional misdirection in her words.
但我会担心最坏的可能，假如梦境的异变确实存在，并且不是自然发生，而是有人在幕后推动……
But I worry about the worst outcome: If the Dreamscape's anomaly really exists, and it isn't a natural occurrence, but instigated by someone behind the scenes...
那么它大概率和「钟表匠的邀请函」有关。
...Then it likely has something to do with the Watchmaker's invite.
咦，这是怎么推断出来的？
Huh, how'd you figure that one out?
暂且不考虑极端情况，推动梦境异变的主使，立场定然与家族对立，那就不外乎两种可能……
Well, excluding any extreme scenarios, the mastermind responsible for these shifts in the dreamscape undeniably stands against The Family, which narrows it down to two possibilities...
有人意图引入外部势力，借机动摇家族对匹诺康尼的掌控；或是家族为了自保，被迫暗中向外界求援。

Someone is drawing in external influences to distract and disrupt The Family's control over Penacony. Either that, or The Family has been forced to seek outside aid surreptitiously for self-preservation.
但从邀请函的密文，和家族的反应来看…前者的可能性更高些。
But from the encrypted message on the invite, and The Family's reaction... The former is more likely.
这也就意味着，发出无名客密文的人和梦境异变的幕后主使是同一阵营…甚至可能是同一个人。
Which also means that, the one who sent out the encrypted Nameless message and the mastermind behind the anomaly are on the same side... Maybe even the same person.
但…这也不说明什么吧。只谈手法，愚者和谜语人也做得到，公司不也破译成功了吗？
Well... this doesn't necessarily mean a thing, right? In terms of methods, both the Fools and the Riddlers could pull it off. Hasn't the IPC cracked the message, too?
小三月，别紧张，这只是一种可能性。可如果这行密文不是单纯的恶作剧，而是什么人有意邀请「开拓」入场，我们就更没有理由坐视不管。
March, calm down. It's just a possibility. But if this encrypted message isn't some harmless prank, but done so to invite the Trailblaze into the fray, we cannot remain uninvolved.
那来说说我的发现吧——很遗憾，是个坏消息。
Well, let me tell you what I discovered, and I'm sorry — it's bad news.
据可靠消息称，一些人在匹诺康尼目击到了身穿银色盔甲的高大男性。我向猎犬家系打听了消息，也走访了不少声称见过这位入侵者的来宾……

According to reliable sources, some people spotted a tall silver-armored man on Penacony. I've reached out to the Bloodhound Family for news, and visited many of those guests who claimed to have seen this invader...
…然后收到了这个。{NICKNAME}，我发给你了，打开看看吧。
...And this is what I received. {NICKNAME}, I've sent it to you. Open it and take a look.
这群星核猎手…竟然在匹诺康尼也有布局，真是纠缠不休！
Those Stellaron Hunters... They even factored Penacony into their plan! Nowhere's safe from them!
形势很明朗了。盛会之星远没有表面上看起来那么简单，围绕着「钟表匠的遗产」，包含家族在内的一众势力各怀目的，彼此制衡。

The situation is clear — the Planet of Festivities isn't what it seems on the surface. Everyone's sights, including the factions in The Family, are set on the Watchmaker's Legacy. Every party has its own motives, and they're attempting to thwart each other.
尽管还不知道这遗产是什么，但这场争夺战波及无辜群众…是早晚的事。
While we still don't know what this legacy entails, it's only a matter of time before the power struggle ensnares innocent bystanders.
「熔火骑士」萨姆，据称此人是格拉默铁骑的余党，先天的基因改造战士，认知异于常人，行事决绝、不留余地，是不亚于卡芙卡和刃的危险分子。

The Molten Knight, Sam, is reportedly a remnant of Glamoth's Iron Cavalry — a genetically engineered warrior. He possesses superhuman perception and acts decisively — he'll leave no margin for error. This individual is every bit as dangerous as Kafka and Blade.
这是一封威胁信。银狼口中的隐藏地图想必就是封锁中的梦境酒店。为后续考虑，我们确实有必要拜访一下现场。
This message is a threat. The hidden map that Silver Wolf mentioned is probably the sealed dreamscape Hotel. For the sake of what's to come, a visit seems necessary.
虽然态度友好，但他们未必信任我们…先行后闻吧。
We may be on amicable terms, but that doesn't mean they trust us... Let's act first and talk later.
What if we get found out...
也许是星核猎手的陷阱…
It could be a Stellaron Hunter's trap...
所以我没有第一时间提出，但现在看来，星穹列车有入场的理由。
Which is why I didn't suggest it initially. But the way things are now, the Astral Express has a reason to join the fray.
如果家族问起，就如实告知列车组在追查星核猎手，相信能得到理解。根据对方的反应，我们再采取下一步行动。
If The Family asks, just tell them that the Express is investigating the Stellaron Hunters — I'm sure they'll understand. We'll plan our next move according to how they react.
看来我们达成共识了——那就回去通知黑天鹅小姐吧。
Then we are in agreement. Let's return and inform Miss Black Swan.
黑天鹅小姐，列车组愿意与你合作。在忆域中，我们需要一位合适的向导。
Miss Black Swan, the Express is willing to cooperate with you — we need a proper guide to navigate the Memory Zone.
听凭差遣，不会让各位失望的。
I'm at your service. I will not disappoint.
{NICKNAME}和小三月，回到各自的房间吧。准备入梦，如果顺利…我们在梦境酒店的大堂集合。
{NICKNAME} and March, return to your own rooms. Enter the dream, and if everything goes without a hitch... we'll see one another at the dreamscape Hotel's lobby.
我会留在现实，确保各位安全无虞。如有需要，也会出面与家族交涉——没问题吧，黑天鹅小姐？
I'll stay in the real world to ensure everyone's safety. If needed, I will also parlay with The Family. I assume there's no problem, Miss Black Swan?
看来即便我亲手拯救了你们的同伴，各位也还是很难信任我呢…当然没问题，只是有点伤害我的感情。
It seems that I'll have a hard time gaining your trust even if I personally did rescue your friends... It's no problem, of course, other than the fact that my feelings are a little hurt.
拜托你了，瓦尔特。至于我们…就准备好一睹「梦境的真容」吧。
We're counting on you, Welt. As for us... Let's get ready to see the Dreamscape's true visage.
记忆告诉你，这里是三月七的房间。不出意外她会在这里「苏醒」。
Your memories tell you this is March 7th's room. Unless fate intervenes, she will "awaken" here.
你敲了敲门。她没有回应。
You knock, but there's no response...
Are you in there? We are about to set off.
你再次敲了敲门。她没有回应。
You knock again, but there's no response...
你用力敲了敲门。她依旧没有回应。
You knock harder, and there's still no response.
我知道你在想什么，很可惜…那姑娘不在里面，这里也不是她的房间。
I know what you're thinking, but alas... That girl isn't in there, and neither is this her room.
从你踏入忆域的那一刻起，现实的建筑构造便没有意义了。我能感受到，此刻她在很远的地方。
The moment you stepped into the Memory Zone, reality's building structures lost all meaning. I can sense that she is in a faraway place right now.
同样地，要找到领航员小姐所说的大堂…我们也得多花些心思。
In the meantime, if we want to find that lobby the Navigator mentioned... we'll have to try a little harder.
你看起来很紧张啊，{NICKNAME}。是在担心那个小姑娘吗？
You look anxious, {NICKNAME}. Worried about that girl?
如果有心事，不妨向我倾诉吧。这世上可没有比忆者更适合做心理治疗师的存在了。
You can talk to me if you've something on your mind. In this world, there's no one who heals the heart better than a Memokeeper.
别客气，这是我应该做的。毕竟你很特殊…特殊到有许多双眼睛在注视着你。
I just did what I had to do. You are special, after all... So special that many pairs of eyes are watching your every move.
你能确认流萤的安危吗？
Can you confirm Firefly is safe?
放心吧，那是一道单向门，只会通往清醒的现实。除非那女孩抱有强烈的意愿，怎么也不肯从梦中醒来…怎么可能呢？她现在一定正在酒店的某处揉眼睛呢。

Don't worry. That is a one-way door leading to awakened reality. Unless that girl is so stubborn that she refuses to wake up from the dream — which isn't possible — she must be holed up somewhere in the hotel massaging her eyes right now.
说实话，我不太信任忆者。
To be honest, I don't really trust Memokeepers.
看来你有些不太愉快的回忆呢…但显然，接下来的合作对你、对我、对列车组都是明智的，对吧？所以你可以安心地依赖我哦。
It appears you've had some unhappy memories... But it's obvious that this partnership makes the most sense to you, me, and the Express Crew, no? So you can take it easy and trust me.
当然，前来这里的忆者不止我一人——匹诺康尼首次向家族以外的派系公开发出邀约，忆庭要铭记下这历史性的一刻……
Of course, I'm not the only Memokeeper who has come — Penacony has opened its doors to factions beyond The Family for the first time, and the Garden must record this historic moment...
所以你也可以试着和别人合作哦…只要你看得见他们，呵呵。
So you can try working together with others as well... As long as you can see them, hehe.
You're not returning to your room?
不呀。我要陪你们一起入梦，免得你们受伤。反正忆者也不需要什么入梦池…对吧？
No. I will accompany you into the dream to prevent harm from befalling you all. Memokeepers don't need a Dreampool anyway.
好呀～那就安心去睡吧，我会好好陪着你的。
All right. Drift peacefully off to sleep, and I'll be right with you.
怎么样，身体没有不舒服吧？
What's wrong? Are you not feeling well?
我知道你对忆质比较敏感，比其他人更容易受到梦境的影响，这也是我需要特别陪同你的原因。
I know you're more sensitive to memoria, thus more easily affected by the Dreamscape than others. This is also why I have to accompany you.
我会略施手段让你不那么难受。别担心，你的伙伴也很安全，我在入梦前向她们两人各要了一件小首饰，这能让我在忆域中感应她们的存在。

I shall use my methods to relieve you. Don't worry, as your companions are safe — I had both of them each give me a trinket before I entered the dream. This will allow me to feel their presence in the Memory Zone.
她们已在各自的房间里醒来了。这下，你应该就能放宽心跟我来了吧？时间不等人，这就出发去大堂吧。
They're already awake in their rooms. Will you be comfortable in following me now? Time waits for no one. We must hurry to the lobby.
这里…难道没有工作人员吗？
Are there... no staff members here at all?
也不能这么说吧，我只是不知道自己在哪里。
Well, not really. I just don't know where I am.
嗯，她就是我提到的那位忆者。
Yes. She is the Memokeeper I mentioned.
两位，寒暄暂且到此为止吧…我们先合力请走这些好客的孩子，如何？
We'll have to cut the banter short... Let's first work together and remove these overly friendly children, shall we?
不胜荣幸，那就感谢二位帮忙了。
I'm indebted to you both for your help.
总算安静了。两位为什么会出现在这里？
Finally, some peace and quiet. What are the two of you doing here?
事实上，这也是我们想问你的问题。
We could ask you the same thing.
<color=#ff3a3e>说来话长，我因机缘巧合——{M#他}{F#她}应该记得——与猎犬家系的一部分人成了朋友，正在帮助他们追查要犯…不知怎的，就误入了这里。</color>

<color=#ff3a3e>It's a long story. I fortuitously — as {M#he}{F#she} should remember — became friends with some of the Bloodhounds, and was helping them track down a wanted criminal... Except I ended up here for some reason.</color>
<color=#ff3a3e>或许没有你们想的那么复杂，这全部归功于…一位假面愚者。也许是我的无心之言伤害了她…在一阵五光十色后，我就身处此地了。</color>
<color=#ff3a3e>It's probably not as complicated as it sounds. It's all thanks to... a Masked Fool. Maybe I unwittingly hurt her... and then in a flash of kaleidoscopic light, I ended up here.</color>
<color=#ff3a3e>匹诺康尼坊间流传着一些飞语，涉及钟表匠、遗产、噩梦等隐秘的话题。我好奇是谁在散布消息，就照着流言中的方法试验了下…竟真的来到了这里。</color>

<color=#ff3a3e>Penacony's rife with rumors now, about the Watchmaker, a legacy, nightmares and other mysterious tales. I was curious as to who was spreading them, and tested the method as described in the rumors... To think I actually ended up here...</color>
你…应该没有隐瞒些什么吧？
You... aren't hiding anything, are you?
隐瞒？在一位忆者面前，我应该做不到这事。
Hiding? I don't think I'd be capable of that in front of a Memokeeper.
是吗…那你很厉害，是受过什么训练吗，是否可以教教我？
Is that so... You're good then. What sort of training did you have to undergo? Can you teach me?
How about in front of me?
不，我不是那个意思，这只是一种…修辞。
That's not what I meant. It's just a... figure of speech.
两位来得正巧，这片梦境危机四伏。既然我们目的一致，不如结伴同行吧。
Your arrival is timely — this Dreamscape is fraught with danger. Since our destination is the same, how about we join forces?
我可以保护你们免受伤害，在忆域中，我也需要忆者的援助，以及…如果遇见家族，多一个人总能多一份解释。

I can protect you from harm, but in the Memory Zone, I'll need assistance from the Memokeeper as well. And... if we run into The Family, it wouldn't hurt to have one more person to explain the situation.
Never hurts to have more people.
I think we should forget it...
抱歉…我有点没听清，可以再说一遍吗？
Sorry. I couldn't hear you clearly. Could you repeat that?
抱歉…我有点没听清，可以再说一遍吗？
Sorry. I couldn't hear you clearly. Could you repeat that?
（怎么回事，那种微妙的感觉又来了……）
(What's going on? That weird feeling is back again...)
抱歉…我有点没听清，可以再说一遍吗？
Sorry. I couldn't hear you clearly. Could you repeat that?
抱歉…我有点没听清，可以再说一遍吗？
Sorry. I couldn't hear you clearly. Could you repeat that?
（怎么回事，那种微妙的感觉又来了……）
(What's going on? That weird feeling is back again...)
也很高兴能再次与你同行，黑天鹅小姐。
Glad to be traveling with you again, Miss Black Swan.
上锁了，我倒是可以随意穿行，但你们……
It's locked. I can travel through it freely, but you all...
只能走我来时的路了。二位，请跟我来吧。
We'll just have to take the way I came. Follow me.
This way... is blocked as well.
这间房间…怎么上下颠倒过来了？
This room... Why is it upside down?
忆域的样貌无时无刻不在变幻，看来我们得想办法…走到天花板上。
The Memory Zone is constantly shifting its form. Looks like we'll have to think of a way... to walk on the ceiling.
我们现在就在天花板上。
We're standing on the ceiling right now.
…黄泉小姐的话不无道理。无论如何，我们得登上悬在头顶的那个平面——当然，绝不是抱着柱子上去。
...Miss Acheron's words speak sense. Regardless, we have to reach that flat surface hanging overhead. And we're not scaling the pillar, of course.
我来为各位传授一些在忆域中行动的小技巧吧。
I'll teach everyone some traversal tricks used in the Memory Zone.
这样下去没完没了。还是让我来吧。
There's no end to this. Let me try.
你看到忆者合上双眼。她在以一种近乎感应的方式搜索着房间，甚至房间以外的每一处角落。
You see the Memokeeper close her eyes. She is searching the room in an almost telepathic way, even every nook and cranny outside the room.
这片忆域…有点过于扭曲了。我得采用些不那么优雅的手段，二位…请给我一点时间……
This Memory Zone... is overly twisted. I have to use inelegant methods, so you two... please give me a little time...
嗯…有了。我能看见这片梦境的中心，还有家族的人…还有几个身影在摸索着向前，看来你的朋友也不太顺利呢…一个、两个、三个……

Mm... got it. I can see the core of this Dreamscape, and there are members of The Family... and some figures trying to find their way forward. It appears that your friends aren't faring too well... One, two, three...
…不对，三个？还有第三个人在寻找去大堂的路？等等…这是……
...Wait, three? There is a third person seeking the way to the lobby? Wait... it's...
——是之前和你在一起的小姑娘？
你说她已经回到现实了。
You said she already returned to reality.
我不明白，但忆域中有熟悉的影子，和她给人的感觉很相似…她有什么一定要深入梦境的理由？
It eludes me, but there's a known semblance in the Memory Zone, mirroring the essence she radiates... What reason does she have to delve so deep into the Dreamscape?
她…是在奔跑吗？不…奔逃？她的身后似乎有什么……
She... Is she running? No... Running away? Something's right behind her...
...This is not good. Everyone, we must hurry.
情况紧急，我只能破例用些手段，带你们一同穿过忆域。
There's no time. I'll just have to break the rules and use some methods to help you phase through the Memory Zone.
我从忆域中采撷了几缕她的思绪，这能帮助你们对她建立印象。现在，牢牢抓住这些思绪，在脑海中把它们整理成型。
I picked up slivers of her thoughts in the Memory Zone. These will help you form an impression of her. Now, you must hang on to these thoughts with all your might, and shape them in your mind.
刚才，我捕捉到了一些非常熟悉的记忆，出现在这里的*老朋友*不仅有她，还有你们遇险时，现场的第三者……
I caught some very familiar memories just now — she's not the only *old friend* who has appeared here. There was also a third party at the scene when you ran into danger...
...That Memory Zone meme, it is here as well.
闸门关闭了。你感觉自己的思绪也被回旋的水流扰动，牵引其中，在深谷中下降、沉沦。当舱门再度开启时，你会看到何种景象？也许没人能给出答案。

The gate shuts. Your thoughts, stirred by the swirling current and pulled along, descend into a deep abyss, sinking. When the hatch opens again, what sights will you behold? Perhaps no one can provide an answer.
某种难以名状的流质——黑暗——自你的胸膛漫向喉头。窒息感自内而外将你淹没。然后，声音响起……
An indescribable fluid — darkness — flows from your chest to your throat. Suffocation engulfs you from within. Then, a voice emerges...
「我梦见一片焦土，一株破土而生的新蕊，它迎着朝阳绽放，向我低语呢喃。」
In my dream, I saw a scorched earth, and a new sapling emerging from it. It bloomed against the morning sun, and whispered to me.
人们为何选择沉睡？我想……
Why do people choose to sleep? I think...
最后的轻叹不知是谁发出的。
The final sigh escapes, its origin unknown.
...It is because they're afraid to awaken from the dream.
...Watch out! A dangerous presence lurks nearby.
忆者递出一枚忆泡，示意你们用额头抵住它。你照做了，一道刺骨的寒意直入躯壳，随后聚成清晰的影像。

The Memokeeper hands over a Memory Bubble, signaling for you to press it against your forehead. You do as instructed, and a bone-chilling coldness pierces your body, which then consolidates into a clear image.
你看到姬子和三月七在一起，被家族拦住了去路。黑天鹅就在她们身侧，但家族并未注意到她。
You see Himeko and March 7th together, obstructed by The Family. Black Swan stands beside them, unnoticed by the The Family.
「状况我了解了。请你务必带{NICKNAME}撤离到安全地点。如果有余裕，也可先行调查流萤一事。稍后在『钟表小子』雕像处会合。」
I understand the situation now. Please take {NICKNAME} and retreat to a safe location. If time allows, you can investigate Firefly's matter first. Meet later at Clockie's statue.
忆泡中的记忆到此为止了。
Memories in the bubbles come to an end here.
所以，我要受姬子小姐之托，带两位返回现实了。{NICKNAME}…很高兴看到你一切安好，我们出发吧，到安全的地方再谈。
Which is why I must undertake Miss Himeko's request and bring both of you back to reality. {NICKNAME}... I'm glad to see that you're fine. Let us reach a safe place before speaking again.
黑天鹅小姐，你不打算开个…传送门，之类的吗？
Miss Black Swan, do you not intend to open some sort of... teleporter?
嗯…我不建议这么做。{M#他}{F#她}的精神状况尚不稳定，得尽量避免刚才那种*粗暴*的移动方式。
Mm... I don't recommend that. {M#His}{F#Her} mental state is unstable, so we have to avoid any *rough* traversal methods like just now.
以及——在撤离的同时，我们还能为流萤小姐做更多事，不是吗？这附近还残存着一些她留下的痕迹。在它们彻底消失前，让其成为你们的「记忆」吧。
Also, while we're departing, we can still do more for Miss Firefly, can't we? Some remnants of her presence linger nearby. Seize the chance to etch them into your "Remembrance" before they're gone.
...If we can start investigating on the way, that'd be good.
出发吧，我们得另寻他路……
Let's go. We have to find another path...
抱歉，可以再给我几分钟吗？
Sorry, but could you give me a few more minutes?
I have this right... Don't I...
这里…到处都是烧焦的残骸？
还残留着些微火星，始作俑者大概率还没走远。
They're still smoldering — the culprit can't have gotten far.
看来我们得暂时放慢脚步了……
I suppose we can slow down for now then...
尽是些*燃烧*的记忆…在这片深海中尤为突出呢。
They're all just *burning* Remembrances... a stark contrast to this deep sea.
小心，这些痕迹是刚留下的，那位不速之客还没走远。
Careful, these traces are fresh. Our unsought guest isn't far away.
这只怪物的残骸表面切口窄而深，周围明显有剧烈灼烧形成的焦黑痕迹。几点星火在其中飞舞跃动，像是逐{RUBY_B#「虚无」的星神}Ⅸ{RUBY_E#}而去的破碎恒星。

The remains of this creature bears narrow and deep incisions, with evident traces of charring inflicted by intense burning. A few sparks dance and flicker within, resembling shattered stars departing towards {RUBY_B#Aeon of Nihility}IX{RUBY_E#}.
（看来这只怪物死于某种热能武器……）
(Looks like this monster was slain by a thermic weapon...)
这只怪物的残骸被某种利器洞穿，其外壳下的组织似乎在短时间内因高热而爆发性地尽数蒸发。你不能再靠得更近——那自残骸体内寻隙而出的蒸汽毫无疑问会灼伤你。

The remains of this creature, pierced by an unknown weapon, reveal inner tissues that have been seemingly evaporated rapidly due to intense heat. You cannot approach any closer — the steam escaping from the shattered body would undoubtedly scorch you.
（看来这只怪物死于某种高热反应……）
(Looks like this monster died of a hyperthermic reaction...)
这只怪物的残骸表面似乎没有任何异样。但当你以手抚之，指尖传来的高热令你如触电般退却。
The surface of this creature's remains appears unremarkable. Yet, as your hand grazes it, the searing heat transferred to your fingertips sends you jolting back, as if struck by an electric shock.
毫无疑问，残骸内部现在正有一团剧烈焚烧的火焰亟待破壳而出。为了你的生命安全，你最好离它远点。
Without a doubt, a fierce inferno rages within the remains, desperately longing to break free from its confines. For the sake of your safety, it is best to keep your distance.
不对劲。这些痕迹都是前不久留下的，有人刚从这里离开…会和方才的事有关么？
Something's off. These traces are fresh. Someone just left the scene... Would this person have anything to do with what happened just now?
仅凭几条线索，我也很难做出推断。
I cannot reach a conclusion with so few clues.
听听你的直觉，毕竟你说过…「记忆」不会说谎。
Just listen to your gut — you were the one who said that... the Remembrance doesn't lie.
从这些残骸的记忆来看…那人身材高大，比成年男性还要健壮许多，手段干脆利落，都是一击毙命——也许是雇佣兵，或者杀手。
From the memories of these carcasses... that person was tall, and much stronger than an adult male. The method was clean and crisp, all one-strike kills — maybe a mercenary, or an assassin.
他是从大堂那一侧的门进来的，朝着酒店更深处前进了，既然如此…他应该看到了此前发生的一切……
He entered through the door from the lobby, and went farther into the hotel. If that's the case... he should have seen everything that happened here...
…收回前言。我们得尽快赶去那片烙印了流萤小姐身姿的忆域。以这位朋友的做事风格……
...I take back what I said. We have to hurry to that Memory Zone where Miss Firefly's presence was imprinted. Considering what this person can do...
如果他的目的地也是那里——现场就不会留下任何线索了。
If his goal is that place as well, there won't be anything left there.
这可真是…「灿烂夺目」。就是这个房间吗？
This is truly... a magnificent sight. It's this room, then?
Yes. More precisely, it's right below.
二位虽然不能像忆者一样直接穿过物理结构，但我想到一个好办法，能让你们安全无虞地抵达这个房间的正下层。
You two may not be able to phase through physical structures like Memokeepers, but I've got a great idea that will let you safely reach the floor right below this room.
Doesn't look like there's a way down.
不然怎么能说是捷径呢？
I wouldn't call it a shortcut if there was.
二位虽然不能像忆者一样直接穿过物理结构，但我想到一个好办法，能让你们安全无虞地抵达这个房间的正下层。
You two may not be able to phase through physical structures like Memokeepers, but I've got a great idea that will help you safely reach the floor right below this room.
Are you going to teach me to phase through walls now?
二位虽然不能像忆者一样直接穿过物理结构，但我想到一个好办法，能让你们安全无虞地抵达这个房间的正下层。
You two may not be able to phase through physical structures like Memokeepers, but I've got a great idea that will help you safely reach the floor right below this room.
很简单，看见这盏大吊灯了吗？接下来…我们要制造一些符合常识的*小动静*。
It's really easy — see this chandelier? Next... we want to create some reasonably *small movements*.
这样就不会有人打扰了。来——我可以为你们表演一个小魔术。
No one will disturb us now. Here, how about I show you a little magic trick?
准备好了吗？小心别发出惊呼哦。
Are you ready? Don't be too surprised.
没错。是这个房间留下的，有关她的记忆。地面的轻微震动，屏幕中闪过的倒影，忆质的流向…我将它们汇聚，以片段形式复现了出来。

Yes. It's what this room left behind — the memories of her. The slight trembling of the ground, the fleeting reflections on the screen, the flow of memoria... I gathered and reproduced them in fragments.
至于上下文…就需要我们稍作整理了。快去吧，进行这种规模的记忆复现，对我的消耗也是很大的。
As for the context... we'll need to sort that out a bit. Hurry along now. Recreating memories on this scale takes quite a toll on me.
她盯着这些屏幕，是在照镜子吗…「再来一次」是什么意思？
She stares at the screens. Is she looking at herself in the mirror? ...What does she mean by "try again"?
是啊。是什么让她这么紧张？
Yes. What is making her so nervous?
综合这些信息，流萤是和同行者——应该只有一位——一起进入了这条长廊。
With all this in mind, Firefly and her companion — there should only be one — have entered this corridor together.
当时和{NICKNAME}遇见的那个东西……
That thing I encountered with {NICKNAME} back then...
如果我没猜错…它一定和「钟表匠」有关。
If I'm not wrong... it has to do with the Watchmaker.
在背后也这么称呼，看来你们的关系确实不错呀。
Thinking of you even in your absence, seems like you two were pretty close.
她似乎在和什么人分享自己的发现，而且…和「钟表匠」相关。
She seems to be sharing her discovery with someone, and... it's related to the Watchmaker.
她还不知道自己会成为受害者……
She has no idea that she'll become a victim...
情况开始变化了，似乎那位同行者…背离了原先的计划。
The situation has changed, and it seems that companion... has deviated from the original plan.
或者，从结果而言…这才是那个人真正的*计划*。
Perhaps, judging from the outcome... this is that person's true intention.
她被什么人逼迫着走了这边，而且……
Who forced her to go that way? And...
「机甲」…耐人寻味的说法。我记得猎犬家系在追捕这么一位罪犯——「身穿银色盔甲的高大男性」。
"Mecha"... What an intriguing statement. I recall the Bloodhound family is pursuing a criminal — "a tall male in silver armor."
The door... It won't open... It's a dead end...
从这些只言片语推断，流萤的同行者中途背叛，把她一个人关在这个房间，而自己不知所踪…为什么？
Based on these fragmented pieces of information, it seems Firefly's companion betrayed her halfway and trapped her alone in this room, disappearing without a trace... But why?
她说过，这场交易和「钟表匠」有关——涉及钟表匠，就会触碰许多人的底线。
She mentioned that this transaction involves the Watchmaker, and that often means stepping on many people's toes.
也许是想要侵吞遗产，也许是为了让知情者再少一人，也许…是因为这片忆域中隐藏更深的*秘密*，而为了钓起大鱼…需要浮饵。

They might have had their eyes on the legacy, or wanted to silence another who knew too much. Or, there could be a deeper secret tucked away in this Memory Zone, and to hook that elusive prize... one needs the right bait.
这只是一种最坏的假设。但不妨想想，如果这一切的始作俑者就在附近，他为何会放任我们四处搜查？除非……
This is just the worst-case scenario. But think about it: If the mastermind behind all this is nearby, why would he let us look around freely? Unless...
除非他还有更在意的事，需要——或者说，正在确认。
...there is something else he cares more about and needs — or should I say, is verifying.
变幻莫测的通路，指向游荡的忆域迷因…她完全迷失在忆域中了。
Unpredictable pathways pointing toward a wandering meme... She was completely lost in the Memory Zone.
可惜这条路，最终通向「死亡」的巢穴……
Unfortunately, this path ultimately leads one to the lair of "Death."
She thought she had escaped but...
辛苦你了，忆者——非常精彩的驱虎吞狼。
Thank you for your efforts, Memokeeper - quite a brilliant move to pit enemies against each other.
乍看到游侠和猎手齐聚一堂的时候，我可是心里一紧哪…没想到你能成功挑起他们之间的斗争。
When I first saw the Ranger and the Hunter together, my heart skipped a beat... I never thought you'd successfully trigger a conflict between the two.
按照约定，我把这孩子带到你面前了。交易完成。
As promised, I've delivered the child to you. Our transaction is complete.
You two are in this together...
哈哈，看来我们的无名客朋友还没搞清楚状况。没事，我来为你解释一下。
Haha, looks like our Nameless friend over here is still confused. Let me explain.
总的来说，朋友，你得谢谢这位小姐。她非但没有算计你——恰恰相反，她救了你……
In short, you need to thank this lady here, my friend. Not only did she not betray you — on the contrary, she rescued you...
（黄泉是某位星神的令使？砂金的话，真的可信吗……）
(Acheron is the Emanator of a particular Aeon? Can I really believe Aventurine...?)
（但他也给了我选择…也许我得再和黑天鹅聊聊。）
(But he gave me a choice... Maybe I should talk to Black Swan again.)
呀…表情像是受伤的小动物呢。你还肯和我谈谈吗？我依旧愿意…当你的心理治疗师。
My, my... you look like a small injured animal. Are you still willing to talk to me? Of course... I'm still willing to be your psychotherapist.
我承认和那位先生做了交易，把你带到他的身边。但…这里同样是安全的地方。
I admit I'd made a transaction with that gentleman to bring you before him. But... this is also a safe place.
他需要你，这是收复匹诺康尼必需的一环，而我认为他有潜力，也能助我收获独一无二的记忆，便答应了合作。
He needs you. It's essential if we want to reclaim Penacony. Recognizing his immense potential and the invaluable memories he can help me gather, I opted to join forces with him.
在匹诺康尼，所有人都可能说谎，当然…也包括我，这点我无可辩驳，也不会奢求原谅。
In Penacony, everyone may be lying, and yes... that includes me. I can't deny this, nor do I seek forgiveness.
但，还记得吗？我也说过…「我相信你们的潜质」，这句话绝无半点虚假。
But do you still remember? I said... "I have faith in your potential," and that's not a lie.
忆庭想见证星穹列车开拓银河的未来，而我会将这些回忆一一珍藏。所以我没有伤害各位的理由，反而会继续帮助你们——前提是你们还愿意。

The Garden of Recollection wants to witness the future of the Astral Express Trailblazing the cosmos, and as for these memories — I will treasure them. I do not have reasons to hurt any of you. Instead, I will continue to assist you — provided you are willing to accept my assistance.
我的看法或许会出乎你的意料。
My take on this might surprise you.
在我看来，他是个值得信任的人，不为别的，只因他是个优秀的商人。在这茫茫寰宇中，没有人比商人更注重诚信和契约。
In my view, he's a trustworthy individual. Not for any other reason, but because he's an exceptional businessman. In this vast universe, no one values honesty and contracts more than a merchant.
但你也要当心，尤其在与他们订立契约时，要多加留意。在契约之外，他们不会考虑你的权利…为了最大化自己的利益，他们可以无所不用其极。

But, always be on guard, particularly when making agreements with him. Scrutinize the details. Beyond the confines of the contract, your rights are off his radar... He'll go to extreme lengths to ensure his advantage.
Who do you think is the mastermind...?
我依旧认为流萤小姐的事…如我们推测的那般，和星核猎手关联更甚。但你也听到了，砂金指控了那位游侠。
I still believe that Miss Firefly's situation... is deeply connected with the Stellaron Hunter, just as we speculated. But as you've heard, Aventurine has his finger pointed at the Galaxy Ranger.
虽然不知他为何会作出这种判断，但他有公司的情报网，看法值得深入讨论。以及，我也认为黄泉小姐有所隐瞒……

I can't fathom why he'd draw that conclusion, but given his access to the IPC's intelligence network, we should seriously consider his perspective. Moreover, I believe Miss Acheron is also hiding something.
...No, in fact, I should say, she's hiding everything from us.
这是在此前的一次邂逅中，我意外得到的收获。关于泯灭帮…我也能证明砂金所说确有其事。
It was an unexpected finding from an earlier encounter. With regards to the Annihilation Gang... I can also prove that what Aventurine said was the truth.
也因此，在这场金色的宴会中…她是我最关注的舞者。
That's why, during this golden soirée... she is the dance's centerpiece.
你愿意帮我走出这片忆域吗？
Are you willing to bring me out of this Memory Zone?
我非常愿意，但现在还不是时候。
Why of course, but now's not the time.
我知道你很疑惑，也很…悲伤。无论那女孩是谁，一个活生生的人，一段不应结束的「记忆」…就这样被抹去了，仿佛溶解在水中的泡沫，烟消云散……

I know you're confused and... sad. Whoever that girl might have been, a living soul, a "memory" that was meant to last... she simply vanished, like the dissolution of bubbles in water, disappearing in an instant...
无论如何，我希望你信任砂金——或者更多地——信任我，去看看他口中的<color=#dbc291ff>「事实」</color>。这能带领我们走向匹诺康尼背后更深的秘密。
No matter what, I hope you can trust Aventurine — or rather — trust me and see the <color=#dbc291ff>"truth"</color> with your own eyes. This can lead us deeper into the secrets behind Penacony.
我会保护你。等从他手中获取了更多信息，我再护送你回到同伴身边也不迟。
I will protect you. Once I gather more information from him, I'll make sure you're safely returned to your companions.
而为了真相，以及制止更多无谓的牺牲…这是最正确的选择。
For the truth and to prevent more unnecessary sacrifices... It is the right choice.
我怎么知道你们不是想陷害我？
How would I know you're not trying to frame me?
他或许有这个打算，但我不会。
Perhaps he plans on doing so, but I won't.
忆庭的视线无处不在。如果他想对你动手，就得做好与忆者为敌的准备——这点我已经提醒过他了。
The Garden of Recollection has eyes everywhere. If he wants to hurt you, he'll have to fight against the Memokeepers — I've warned him about that.
接下来，我会以模因形式陪伴在你身边，以备不时之需。出发吧，{NICKNAME}。
Later, I'll stay by your side as a memetic entity, just in case. Time to set off, {NICKNAME}.
很好，我就知道你一定会来。对了，那位忆者…算了，我不多问了。
Excellent, I knew you would come. By the way, about that Memokeeper... Never mind, I won't press the issue further.
毕竟我说过，你可以和同伴商量，也可以反过来利用我，我很欢迎！因为这也是在向我展示你们的价值。
I've said before, you can liaise with your companions, or even twist the narrative against me. I'll wholeheartedly embrace it! It signifies your potential.
我从不做赔本买卖的，希望各位「朋友」…别让我失望。
I don't do deals where I'm on the losing end. So, my "friends"... don't let me down.
Please, this way if you will!
这个方向…你还是要走吗？这可是千载难逢的机会，离开这里…也就意味着离开真相。
Are you still... continuing down this path? This is a rare opportunity. Leaving here... will also mean leaving the truth.
嗯，还是考虑一下砂金的提议吧。
Yes, I better think about Aventurine's proposal.
I've decided. I'm leaving this place.
这样啊…嗯，我尊重你的选择。我们走吧，回现实去。
I see... Fine, I respect your choice. Let's return to reality.
思考再三，你拒绝了砂金的邀请。这次他没再挽留，只是看着你离开了那片忆域。
After careful consideration, you decline Aventurine's invitation. This time, he simply watches as you depart from the Memory Zone without asking you to stay.
你回到现实，与同伴们会合。经过慎重讨论，星穹列车决定对匹诺康尼出手相助。在你们和家族的共同努力下，真相很快水落石出：一切都是公司的阴谋。
Returning to reality, you reunite with your companions. After a thorough discussion, the Crew decides to assist Penacony, leading to the revelation of a conspiracy orchestrated by the IPC.
不怀好意的人们被一一驱逐，谐乐大典也平安到来。你们被奉为上上之宾，在歌剧院中央聆听这颗盛会之星的笑声。那些欢呼被夹杂在碰杯的苏乐达与歌舞的人群间，如此清晰——

With the expulsion of all ill-intentioned visitors, the Charmony Festival proceeds smoothly. As honored guests, you partake in the joyous atmosphere, filled with laughter, clinking glasses full of SoulGlad, and the exuberant singing and dancing of the crowd...
「愿时光永驻今夜，愿我们永不醒来！」
"May this moment last forever, and may we never awaken from this euphoric dream!"
我们到了，就在这扇门后。屏住呼吸，拭目以待吧——
This is it, just beyond this door. Take a deep breath and get ready.
哦，我可算想起来了…朋友！那之后，咱们玩了场愉快的游戏。
Oh, I remember... my friend! After that, we played an enjoyable game.
看，此时此刻，恰如彼时彼刻…不是么？
Tell me, doesn't this feel eerily familiar?
我完全想起来啦，那个时候，我是这么对你说的——
I remember everything now. This was what I told you at that time...

Let's go back and find Aventurine...
暂时无法离开当前场景，需要完成开拓任务「是谁杀死了…」
Unable to leave the current area. Please complete Trailblaze Mission "Whodunit"
还记得先前是怎样教你的吗？感受忆质的流向，走上墙面，然后…靠近它。
Still remember what I taught you? Feel the flow of the memoria, walk up the wall, and then... get close to it.
看，一根孤零零的链条——和它打个招呼吧。
Look, a solitary chain. Go say hello to it.
她没有别的路可走，只能从侧廊离开。
She had no other way to leave but from the side corridor.
She thought she had escaped but...
是星核猎手送了你们最后一程。
About the Stellaron Hunter who was behind your ultimate departure.
好可疑…哪有这么凑巧的事，那女人绝对有问题。
Hmm, suspicious... Could it really just be a coincidence? I've got a funny feeling about that lady.
但她确实找到了{NICKNAME}，并救了{M#他}{F#她}——眼下只能先听听对方的要求了……
But she did find {NICKNAME}, and save {M#him}{F#her} too. The least we could do is to listen to the other party's request...
那位忆者显然是有备而来，谨慎为好。
That Memokeeper obviously came here with an agenda. We should remain vigilant.

(We'll be busy for a while. I wonder if Firefly's returned to reality yet...)
（…不对，我没她的联系方式啊。问问黑天鹅吧……）

（三月的房间就在边上…先去和她汇合吧。）
(March's room is this way... I should go meet up with her.)
这些东倒西歪的小可怜……
These poor little things stumbling about...
奇怪，这里似乎还有别人的气息……
Strange, there appears to be someone else's presence here...
Ah... Her? How is this possible?
黄泉小姐，我有个提议——不如我们分头寻找出路，等有所发现再会合吧？这样效率更高一些。
Miss Acheron, I have a suggestion: Why not split up and look for a way out, and meet up again when we find something? That would speed things up.
但这里很危险，还是三人同行吧。
But it's dangerous around here. We'd better travel together.
如何，能感受到忆质在你身边流淌吗？
How about it? Can you feel the memoria flowing around you?
接下来，找个合适的位置…试着*走上*墙面吧。
Next, find a suitable spot... and try *walking up* the wall.
...It worked. You really can walk up walls.
对于忆者，这种程度的忆域不过是孩子的游乐场。走吧，我们从正门离开。
A Memory Zone of this level is mere child's play to a Memokeeper. Come on. Let's head out through the front door.
得心应手，不是么？{NICKNAME}，你很有「记忆」的天赋哦。
You're a natural, aren't you? You're a prodigy at Remembrance, {NICKNAME}.
我们到了——这里有座电梯，和大堂的一模一样，乘坐它应该就能到目的地。
We've arrived. There's an elevator here, just like in the lobby. We should be able to reach our destination with it.
但前方的忆域…似乎被严重扭曲了。各位，小心为好。
But the Memory Zone up ahead... appears to be severely twisted. Be careful, everyone.
…看，我就说没那么简单。这是哪儿？
...See, I told you it wasn't going to be that simple. Where is this?
…怎么回事？忆质中突然出现了少许…燥热？
...What's going on? Why is it... getting hot in the memoria?
你也发现了。像是有什么东西烧起来了……
You've noticed it too. Like something is burning...
二位，走这边。我尽量为你们创造平稳的捷径。
You two, this way. I'll try to create a stable shortcut for you.
看…离开大堂，结构就变得紊乱了。穿过那条走廊——小心，别惊动了迷因。
Look... Upon leaving the lobby, the structure has become chaotic. Phase through that corridor, and be careful — do not alert the meme.
你怎么…？！这和说好的不一样……
Why did you...!? This isn't what we agreed on...
变幻莫测的通路，指向游荡的忆域迷因…她完全迷失在忆域中了。
Unpredictable pathways pointing toward a wandering meme... She was completely lost in the Memory Zone.
是出口…沿着这边应该能离开……
It's an exit... Following this path should lead me out of this place...
可惜这条路，最终通向「死亡」的巢穴……
Unfortunately, this path ultimately leads one to the lair of "Death."
总算回到大堂了，这样就……
Finally back at the lobby. If that's the case...
看来有人恭候多时了啊。终于打算走上台前了么……
It seems like someone has been awaiting us. Ready to step into the spotlight now?
侦探游戏结束了，你们不该出现在这里。
The detective game is over. You shouldn't be here.
I will... set the seas ablaze.
等回到现实，记得告诉所有人——
Once you're back in the real world, remember to tell everyone —
（去见砂金吧，或者…我还是可以选择拒绝……）
(Go and meet Aventurine, or... I could still choose not to help...)
诶对了，好像那之后我还说了什么…是什么来着？
Oh right, I remember mentioning something after that... What was it again?
啊…似曾相识的走廊，似曾相识的房间。还记得吗？我们上次见面，就是在这地方。
Ah... a familiar hallway, a familiar room. Do you remember? The last time we met was right here.
半部快要消散的手机躺在地上，残留着一条没有发出的消息…一张合照，照片上的两个人笑得很开心。
A half-faded cell phone lies on the floor, capturing an unsent message... with a snapshot of two people wearing smiles.
手机彻底消散了，化为梦泡消逝而去。
The cell phone has completely dissipated into a dream bubble.
…哎呀，朋友，我目睹这场面的时候，表情比你好不了多少。
...Ah, friend. My expression wasn't much better than yours when I first saw this.
你没看错，就是她，那位声名显赫的歌者「知更鸟」。
Your eyes aren't deceiving you — it's her, the famous singer Robin.
先向你声明，这事跟我无关，我只是个不幸撞进现场的倒霉蛋。家族可以作证，不信的话就找个猎犬家系的人打听打听吧，他们恨我，恨公司，所以绝不会说谎。

First of all, can I just say that this had nothing to do with me. I'm just an unlucky bystander here. The Family can testify for me. If you don't believe me, just ask anyone in the Bloodhound Family — they hate me, and they hate the IPC, so they'd never lie.
这里也不是案发地，我为你展现的是一段「记忆」——最简单的光锥呈现技术，忆庭授权，公司所有。
This is not where the crime happened. What I showed to you was a "memory" — the most basic Light Cone manifesting tech, authorized by the Garden of Recollection and owned by the IPC.
事到如今，你还觉得那位「巡海游侠」是局外人么？
Did you really think the Galaxy Ranger was an outsider this whole time?
匹诺康尼可是郑重承诺过：在家族编织的美梦中，每一位客人的安全都会得到保障。遇险者会被强制唤醒，平安地回到现实。
Penacony has made a solemn commitment to protect the safety of anyone inside a Family dream. Any person in distress will be forcibly awakened and safely returned to reality.
他们有什么底气这样言之凿凿？因为这承诺的背后是「同谐」的庇佑：家族的筑梦师们将思想连缀成一，构建起坚不可破的安全防线。

What gives them the confidence to make such conclusive statements? Because behind this promise is the Harmony: The Family's Dreamweavers link up their minds together to construct an unbreakable defensive line.
突破这道防线，在梦境中创造「死亡」…未经家族许可，就连忆者都做不到这事。
Breaking through this line of defense to create "Death" in the dreamscape... Not even a Memokeeper could do that without The Family's permission.
谁能做到？朋友，只能是她，那个自称巡海游侠的女人…一位冒名顶替的不速之客，隐瞒了真实身份的「令使」……
Who could have done it? Friend, the only one is her, the girl who calls herself a Galaxy Ranger... An imposter, an unsought guest, an Emanator who hides her true identity...
阿弗利特的死已成定局，而知更鸟…她的惨状就在眼前。下一位牺牲者会是谁？
Ifrit's death was a foregone conclusion, and Robin... her misfortune was staring right at her. Who will be the next to die?
This really is... hard to take in.
That's just one side of the story.
既然如此，我不会相信任何人。
If that's the case, I can't trust anyone.
没事，你可以有自己的判断。培养信任总是需要时间，我愿意等待。
It's fine. Listen to your gut. Building trust always takes time, and I'm willing to wait.
只是希望你能明白，围绕那份所谓的「遗产」…匹诺康尼暗流涌动，人们个个心怀鬼胎。
I just hope you realize that wherever that legacy is concerned... covert plans are already underway throughout Penacony. Everyone's got their own agenda.
千万别站错了边。我要是你，就会和黄泉保持距离。毕竟再怎么说，摆上台前的算计，也远胜过藏匿于阴影中的怪物…不是么？

Careful you don't get stuck on the wrong side. If I were you, I'd keep my distance from Acheron. After all, any schemes out in the open are always going to be better than a monster in the shadows... right?
但谁说明面的算计背后，没有更深的阴谋呢？
Who's to say there isn't an even deeper conspiracy lurking beneath the surface?
…忆者，我想我们的交易早就结束了。
...Memokeeper, I think our little deal is finished.
（没有忆者的帮助是无法离开这里的…先和黑天鹅聊聊吧。）
(There's no way outta here without the Memokeeper's help... Let's chat with Black Swan for now.)
来，这边——一小段路，别走丢了。
Come, this way — it's a short walk. Don't get lost.
砂金说的是实话，这段「记忆」是真实的，没有任何歪曲嫁接的部分。
Aventurine is telling the truth. This "memory" is a real one, and there's no sign of any distortion grafting on.
公司不是忆庭，能做的事相当有限——这点你再清楚不过。
The IPC is not the Garden, and there are real limits to what they can actually do. But you know all this.
朋友，不绕弯子了——开门见山地说，<color=#dbc291ff>我想以个人名义同星穹列车达成合作。</color>
Friend, let's not beat around the bush here — the thing is, <color=#dbc291ff>I want to reach out personally to team up with the Astral Express.</color>
早和你说过，我对遗产争夺战没兴趣，来匹诺康尼只是出于工作。我要替公司收复一些失落的财产，你懂的…就是「边陲监狱」的所有权。

I told you, I'm just not interested in scrambling for "the Legacy." I just came to Penacony for work. I'm here to retrieve some lost property for the IPC, if you catch my drift... I'm talking ownership of this "frontier prison."
拜{RUBY_B#星核}万界之癌{RUBY_E#}所赐，这东西早成了一笔坏账，公司几次想坐下来谈谈，可家族连门都不给开。

This has all become a bad debt thanks to the {RUBY_B#Stellaron}Cancer of All Worlds{RUBY_E#}. The IPC has tried sitting down for negotiations time and again, but The Family wouldn't even take our calls.
你不知道这帮人有多难对付。这么说吧，他们以前能瞒下「死亡」的存在，这次也一定能把知更鸟的死讯掩盖过去。
You have no idea how difficult these people are to deal with. Put it this way — they've hushed up the existence of "Death" before, so they can definitely cover up any news about Robin's death.
就这么悄无声息地化作泡沫消散，到最后也无人知晓……
It'll just quietly float off like a bubble and pop, nobody ever being the wiser...
这不公平，对不对？所以朋友，我需要你的帮助。
That's not fair, right? So then, friend, I need your help.
I've got something on right now.
That's fine. I'm not forcing you.
但我想要的并不多，不妨先听我说完吧，可以么？
But I'm really not asking for much, so why don't you at least hear me out, okay?
That's fine. I'm not forcing you.
但我想要的并不多，不妨先听我说完吧，可以么？
But I'm really not asking for much, so why don't you at least hear me out, okay?
我只有一个目标：家族的大门是堵高墙，要推倒它，我得先凿几个洞出来。一旦出现破绽，公司就有的是手段。

I have but only one goal: The Family's front door is like a high wall, and to tear the whole thing down I'll have to dig out a few chunks first. Once I find a weak point, the IPC will have plenty of means.
现在，机会来了。只要我们能<color=#dbc291ff>弄清「知更鸟之死」的真相</color>，就能还死者一个公道，同时还能收获谈判的筹码，请家族上桌。

Now we have our chance. So long as we can <color=#dbc291ff>get to the truth behind her death</color>, we can have justice for Robin while also gaining a valuable bargaining chip for bringing The Family to the table.
千载难逢的机会…我在匹诺康尼四处调查、广交朋友，为的就是这一刻。
Truly a once-in-a-blue-moon opportunity... I've been investigating and making lots of friends all over Penacony precisely for this very moment.
这个噩耗对家族极其不利，所以他们一定会不遗余力地阻挠外人介入，尤其是公司。
This tragic news would be extremely bad for The Family, so they'll be doing everything they can to stop it leaking — especially to the IPC.
但我相信也有少数派系是例外，这就是我需要各位的理由。星穹列车名声在外，「同谐」也会给予你们最公正的评价。

But I trust there are still a few factions that remain exceptions, and that's why I need you all. The reputation of the Astral Express precedes you, and the Harmony will give you the fairest of appraisals.
你们能查明真相、伸张正义，而我能借此完成公司的任务…这就叫双赢。
You get to find out really what happened and seek justice, and I get to put it toward completing my mission for the IPC... It's what you call a win-win situation.
你要我们利用家族的信任？
You want to take advantage of The Family's trust in us?
无名客才不会和公司为伍。
The Nameless would never associate with the IPC.
A decision like this is way above my pay grade...
别急嘛，你不妨先回到同伴们身边，和他们聊聊。
Don't worry. Just head back and talk things over with your companions.
那位领航员小姐是个聪明人，她一定明白这笔交易的价值。喏，我的联系方式，有结论了就联系我。
That navigator is really smart. She must understand the value of this deal. Look, here's my contact details. If you come to any conclusions, call me.
喔还有…拿去吧！要开展调查，手里总得有点闲钱。千万别客气！
Oh, and... take this! A thorough investigation can always use a little more funding. Don't mention it!
回见，朋友。我真的非常期待，能和各位一同揭开「死亡」的真相。
So long, friend. I really am looking forward to uncovering the truth about "Death" with everyone.
（砂金自顾自走了…他确实没有强迫的意思，但总感觉不对劲……）
(Aventurine just sauntered off... He really doesn't mean to force it, but something still seems off...)
表面上看，这场交易对你没有坏处。但砂金是个精明的商人，算盘绝不会只有表面那么简单。
On the surface, this doesn't look like a bad deal for you. But Aventurine is a shrewd merchant whose scheme won't just be as simple as it appears to be.
他还不知道流萤小姐的事——但从你的反应中，他或许有所察觉，就有意将话题诱导向「死亡的真相」，把你绕进他的逻辑里。

He doesn't know about Miss Firefly yet — but judging by your reaction, he may have noticed something going on and deliberately shifted topics to the "Truth of Death" to try and pull you in line with his way of thinking.
反应迅速，逻辑清晰…我必须提醒你，和那个男人合作很危险。
That's quick thinking, and very sound logic. Aventurine is no fool. And working with him definitely has its dangers.
无名客不能对邪恶视而不见。
The Nameless cannot turn a blind eye to evil.
But you're talking about REAL evil.
For Firefly's sake, we must get to the bottom of all this.
That... is something I agree on.
明哲保身是更好的选择。
Playing it safe seems to be the smarter move.
就眼下的状况而言，确实。但长远来看呢？
Insofar as things are presently concerned, yes. But what about the long-term?
Can I toss a die to let it decide for me?
交给命运吗？你的想法倒是与那位赌徒有几分相似了。
Leaving it up to fate? It's just how that gambler thinks.
无论如何，谨慎些吧。「开拓」的道路不止一条，在群狼环伺的黑暗森林中，你首先要确保自己能够逃出生天。
Anyway, be careful out there. There's more than one way to blaze a trail. In a dark forest beset by wolves ensuring your own escape to safety should be your primary concern.
是「死亡」杀害了知更鸟吗？
我不敢肯定两起事件是同一人所为，但那道巨大的伤口…很像它的翼刃，我们都见过它行凶的瞬间。
I'm not sure the two cases were committed by the same culprit, but that massive wound... looked like its winged blade. We've all witnessed it in action before.
而且…在梦境中致人死地的可能，目前没有第二种。
Plus... it seems unlikely that there would be two lethal entities loose in the dreamscape.
你认为此事和黄泉有关吗？
Do you think this is connected to Acheron?
抱歉，我无法回答这个问题。那位游侠太过神秘，恐怕没人能给出定论。
Sorry, I can't answer that question. That ranger is shrouded in mystery. I'm afraid no one is capable of providing an answer.
但毫无疑问…她是这场宴会中最「特别」的客人。正如砂金方才所说，你最好与她保持距离。
But without a doubt... she is the most "special" guest at this banquet. It's like Aventurine said just then. It's best to keep your distance from her.
你有注意到其他异常吗？
Have you noticed anything else unusual?
在极短的时间内先后出现了两位牺牲者…这件事本身就过于异常。
Two victims appearing one after the other in a very short time span... In and of itself, that's very unusual.
有两种可能：匹诺康尼的梦境崩溃开始加速了，这让「死亡」变得异常躁动，家族的庇护也开始脆弱；又或者，所有的行动都在某个人的计划之中。
