Two possibilities: The collapse of Penacony's Dreamscape has started speeding up, making "Death" extremely agitated and weakening The Family's protections. Or, everything has been planned out and executed by someone.
若是有人刻意而为…先是*偷渡犯*，后是*家族的明星*，凶手的用意难免有些耐人寻味。
If someone has chosen these victims deliberately... First a stowaway, then a Family celebrity... Then this murderer's motives are worth thoroughly chewing over.
I don't have any other questions.
这一切太突然，我也只能给出猜测。离开这里后，去和你的同伴仔细聊聊吧，希望你们能厘清纷乱思绪的源头。
It's all happened so quickly I can only make conjecture. After leaving here, go have a chat with your companions. I hope you can clarify the source of this confusion.
从这边离开吧。然后我们就该告别了。这一切就像是…一场噩梦。
This way... This is where we part ways. All of this is like... a nightmare.
很不幸，记忆不会说谎…我们方才所见，都是真实发生的「现实」，不会因为醒来便消散在脑后。
Unfortunately, the Remembrance doesn't lie... What we just saw is the "reality" that happened — and it won't fade from our minds just because we wake up.
但不要害怕，听从内心的选择吧。我们都是这样行过世间，留下长短不一的影子，最后…留下珍贵的回忆。
But follow your heart and don't be afraid. We all walk through this world casting shadows of different lengths, and ultimately... all we leave behind are precious memories.
黑天鹅轻抚你的耳根，留下一阵冰凉的触感。随后，她将一张卡片交给了你。
Black Swan gently touches the root of your ear, leaving a cool sensation. Then, she hands a card over to you.
这样就行了，一件小小的临别礼物。倘若有一日，你不幸沉沦于忆域的深海，又没有忆者相伴——它会代我为你指引出路。
There you go, a small parting gift. If one day, you unfortunately fall into the deep waters of the Memory Zone and there's no Memokeeper to join you — hopefully it can guide you on my behalf.
我也是很注重人情世故的…就把它当作我对你有所隐瞒的赔礼吧。
I also pay great attention to the ways of the world... Just think of this as an apology from me for hiding something from you.
接下来…我有些私事要处理，是关于那位巡海游侠的。我们就此别过吧。
Then... I've something private to take care of regarding that Galaxy Ranger. Let's leave things there, shall we?
下次见面时，你又会带来怎样有趣的记忆呢…我很期待哦。
What fascinating memories will you bring for me next time we meet...? I sincerely look forward to them.
（发生了好多事…抓紧时间整理下思绪，等人到齐吧……）
(So much has happened... I should take a moment to gather my thoughts, and wait for everyone to arrive...)
「…日前，星际和平公司正式宣布——」
"A few days ago, the IPC made an announcement..."
「茨冈尼亚-Ⅳ在市场开拓部指导下，根据《星际和平宪章》，已建立独立自主的联合酋长国，在星际和平会议上取得合法席位——」

"Under the watchful guidance of the Marketing Development Department and in accordance with the Interstellar Peace Charter, the independent Sigonian Sovereignty has hereby been established, and shall take a legislative seat at the Interstellar Congress..."
「联合酋长国的建立对茨冈尼亚有着重要历史意义：此举为该星球漫长的血腥历史画上句号，耸人听闻的『卡提卡-埃维金灭绝案件』将成为遥远的过去——」

"The formation of the Sigonian Sovereignty is of great historical significance to the Sigonia system: This move puts an end to the planet's long and bloody history, turning the sensational Katica-Avgin Extinction Event into a distant memory..."
「茨冈尼亚-Ⅳ位于德涅斯-普鲁阡-多瑙三大星系的交界无主地带，星球表面气候以极端恶劣著称，时刻面临着来自小型天体冲击的威胁——」

"Sigonia-IV is located in an unclaimed zone at the intersection of the Dnies, Pruthian, and Dorneau star clusters. The planet's surface environment is known for being extremely harsh, constantly faced with the threat of impact from small-scale celestial objects..."
「因此，定居该星球的智慧种族如今已寥寥无几，他们分化成数个氏族，多营游牧，在干旱少雨的荒漠原野中艰难求生，并发展出完全独立于星神体系的民俗信仰……」

"This is why very few intelligent species have made this planet their home. Dividing themselves into several tribes to eke out nomad lifestyles as they struggle to survive the arid desert wilderness, they have developed their own folk beliefs that are independent of the Aeon belief system..."
…茨冈尼亚，茨冈尼亚。焦渴的暴风眼，诸神唾弃之地……
...Sigonia, Sigonia. Ravenous eye of the storm, spurned by all the gods...
有石而无水，有雷而无雨，有血而无泪。你用坠星捶打我们，用风雷淬炼我们，用裂土咀嚼我们……
Land of rock, but not water, lightning, but not rain, blood, but not tears. You beat us with your falling stars, you lash us with wind and storm, you chew us up with the cracked earth...
你赐给我们{RUBY_B#埃维金}蜂蜜{RUBY_E#}之名，却又将我们置于苦涩的{RUBY_B#卡提卡}刀{RUBY_E#}下。{RUBY_B#芬戈-比约斯}三重眼的地母神{RUBY_E#}，如果您能听见，就求您睁眼看看这个孩子……

You promised us a land of {RUBY_B#Avgin}honey{RUBY_E#}, yet yoked us beneath a {RUBY_B#Katica}sword{RUBY_E#} of bitterness. O, {RUBY_B#Fenge Biyos}Gaiathra Triclops{RUBY_E#}, if Thou can hear me, please open up thy three eyes and gaze upon this child...
当您带走他的父亲，我的孩子尚在羊水中沉睡。而今丈夫所在的地方，我也即将去往……
When you took his father, my child was still sleeping in my belly. And where my husband went, I too soon must go...
我不求自己走得安详，只愿您能告诉我，在襁褓中熟睡的孩子…他可否梦见母亲的心跳，梦见雨落在大地的声响？求您告诉我，生命是否只是一场转瞬即逝的梦……

I don't ask for a peaceful death, just for you to tell me — does the baby swaddled sweetly asleep... does he dream of his mother's heartbeat and the sound of falling rain? Please tell me whether this life is all just a fleeting dream...
…否则，为何这孩子生来便要迎向死亡…？
...Otherwise, why would this child be born to face impending death...?
下雨了！是真的！那群外乡人没有骗我们，他们真的唤来了雨…妈妈，我们能离开这里了…我们能回家了…！
It is raining! It's true! Those outworlders weren't lying to us. They really did summon the rain... Mommy, we can leave here... We can go back home!
回家…啊…三重眼的地母神，是您。您听见了么？谢谢…谢谢……
Back home... Ahh... Gaiathra Triclops, you came. Do you hear that? Thank you... Thank you...
宝宝，快听…这就是雨的声音。在你出生的那一日，天上也像这样降下{RUBY_B#雨水}母神的恩赐{RUBY_E#}。
Darling, listen... this is the sound of rain. On the day you were born, the sky also sent down {RUBY_B#Raindrops}a gift{RUBY_E#} like this from Gaiathra.
你是幸运的孩子，被祝福的孩子…就像你的名字一样，是祂赐给埃维金的礼物…我的孩子……
Such a lucky child, such a blessed child... Just like your name. A gift from THEM to Avgin... my boy...
"May the goddess Gaiathra close her eyes three times..."
…欢迎来到这个悲伤的世界，{RUBY_B#母神赐福之子}卡卡瓦夏{RUBY_E#}。
...Welcome to this sad world, {RUBY_B#Child Blessed by Gaiathra}Kakavasha{RUBY_E#}.
天，我可能是苏乐达喝多了…没想到你回来得这么快，如何…有什么发现？
Oh heavens, I must have drunk too much SoulGlad... Didn't expect you to be back so soon. How is it... find anything?
和你猜的一样：外头没人知道知更鸟遇害了，连一点捕风捉影的流言都没有。电视还在转播她的典礼彩排——大概是个替身吧——人们都在做梦呢。

Just as you guessed: Nobody outside knows about Robin's death, there aren't even baseless conspiracy theories. They're still streaming the rehearsal for her ceremony — using a stand-in, I guess — *ahem* they must be dreaming.
那是当然。谁能想到死亡会真正降临在家族构建的美梦中呢，遇害者还是「谐乐大典」的女主角……
Of course. Who could imagine that death would actually descend upon the idyllic dream created by The Family, let alone that the victim would be the female lead of the Charmony Festival...
老实说，我之前不信，甚至亲身*试验*了几次——直到我发现自己确实死不掉。一有危险，我就会被「入梦池」强制唤醒，仿佛只是做了个噩梦。

To be honest with you, I didn't believe it and even tested it a few times myself — until I discovered that I couldn't actually die. Whenever there's any danger, I'm forced awake by the Dreampool and it's all as if everything were just a nightmare.
所以我才确信，这事背后一定藏着更大的秘密。
That's why I'm convinced that there are a few big secrets lurking behind the scenes.
那你应该也听说过那只{RUBY_B#「何物朝向死亡」}忆域迷因{RUBY_E#}了——我替你去找橡木家系打点关系的时候，他们正焦头烂额着呢。

Then you must have heard about the {RUBY_B#"Something Unto Death"}Memory Zone meme{RUBY_E#} — when I graciously deigned to establish connections with the Oak Family on your behalf, they were quite in a pitiful state of disarray.
死者除了知更鸟，还有另一个。具体不清楚，只知道是个偷渡犯。
Besides Robin, there was another body. I don't know the exact details, just that it was a stowaway.
两起凶杀案？！我就说那无名客的反应不对劲，{M#他}{F#她}一定是撞见另一场了……
Two murder cases!? I told you, something seemed off about the Nameless. {M#He}{F#She} must have come across the other one...
这凶手真是个疯子…但不得不说，命案是个很好的突破口，可以指控家族渎职，让公司借这个由头介入。
This murderer is a psycho... but I have to say, the case does represent an opportunity. We can leverage The Family's malfeasance and let the IPC use this as a reason to intervene.
只是他们的手腕比我想象的还要强硬许多，连知更鸟的替身都准备好了…这两起案子一定会被压下去。
It's just that their trickery runs deeper than I thought. Robin's stand-in was all ready to go... These two murders are definitely getting hushed up.
该怎么做？让我想想…机会难得，不容有失，我得非常小心……
What should we do? Let me think... It's too rare an opportunity to miss out on, so I gotta be careful...
厉害啊，赌徒。这么快你就又没辙了？
Incredible, gambler. Have you already exhausted your limited repertoire of tricks so soon?
筹码有很多，但得精挑细选。最直截了当的…还得是知更鸟。记得么，那假面愚者让我*找个哑巴做朋友*。
There are plenty of chips, but it'd be best to choose carefully. The most straightforward... has to be Robin. Remember? That Masked Fool once told me to find a mute as a friend.
知更鸟就是她口中的「哑巴」。她失声了，一般人注意不到，但逃不过你我的耳朵，那不是器官在发音，而是「同谐」的共振。

Robin is what she calls the "mute." She has lost her voice and while most people can't pick up on it, you and I cannot mistake that sound — not produced by any voicebox, but rather by the resonance of the Harmony.
如果不是那女孩练歌练到嗓子都哑了，就只有一种可能：家族出了问题，或者是知更鸟自己出了问题。为了弄清这点，我才想尽办法要和她见上一面……

If that girl hadn't gone hoarse from singing practice, there'd only be one possibility: Something was up with The Family, or Robin herself. To get to the bottom of this, I tried every way I could to meet her...
…但她却死了，就死在我的眼皮底下。
...but she died, right before my very eyes.
满盘皆输——顺便把你送上了审讯台。
A complete and utter loss — incidentally, it seems to have resulted in your rather undignified arrival on the interrogation stand.
现场有目击证人，家族姑且相信你的不在场证明，但往后的时间…你恐怕得在猎犬的监视下度过了。

There were eyewitnesses at the scene, and The Family, in their graciousness, has tentatively accepted your alibi. However, for the foreseeable future... you shall, regrettably, find yourself under the vigilant watch of the Hounds.
现状不容乐观啊，教授，我都开始冒冷汗了。你觉得眼下这局面…还有翻盘的可能么？
Things aren't looking too optimistic, Doctor. I'm starting to break out in a cold sweat. Do you reckon... there's still any chance of a comeback given how things are?
如果你问我概率——有，但趋近于零——用更符合匹诺康尼本土的说法，做梦。
A probability? Yes, it exists, but it verges on the infinitesimal. To phrase it in a manner more befitting the vernacular of Penacony, "you're dreaming."
但如果你只是管不住手，想找个人碰碰运气，那正巧有个合适的人选……
But if you simply can't control yourself and want to try your hand, then there just so happens to be a suitable candidate...
那个男人想再见你一面。
That man wants to see you again.
...Is this a public hearing, or a private trial?
如果是前者，就不需要我来传话。
If it were the former, it would hardly befit my stature to stoop to the role of a mere messenger.
好啊…那就对了，全都对了。看吧，死人不会说话，但活人会——
Fine... That's great. It's all great. You see, the dead can't talk — but the living can...
拉帝奥，我现在可以确信，家族*内部*肯定有问题。等着瞧吧，那男人的妹妹死了…他坐不住的。
Ratio, I'm convinced now that there must be something wrong inside The Family. Just you wait and see, that man's sister has died. He can't sit on his hands.
事不宜迟，我们这就出发——带路吧！好戏…就要开场咯。
Without any further ado, let's set off — lead the way! The show... is about to begin.
...It appears the outcome has already been determined.
They're still alive, as are you.
你还有选择的余地。留下那只八音盒，然后走吧。
You still have room to make a choice. Leave the music box behind, and then go.
选择？「毁灭」的血途，向来容不下犹疑。
Choice? The bloody trail of the Destruction leaves no room for hesitation.
陀斐特的火魔…即便你为那位星神献上生命，也得不到祂的垂青。
Fetora's fire demon... Even if you sacrifice your life for that Aeon, you won't get special treatment.
游侠，你行于狭隘的「巡猎」，自然无法理解。
Ranger, you tread the narrow Path of The Hunt. You could never understand.
我们从火中来，沐火而生，蔓延、焚烧、破坏，直到薪柴燃尽，留下一地死灰。
We come from the fire, and are born bathed in fire. We spread, burn, and destroy until all the kindling has burned out, and we leave only ashes on the ground.
燃烧是火魔的一生，起点与终点。我们生而向死，只为贯彻宇宙真理的一种侧写：万物皆为「毁灭」而生。

Burning forms the entire life of a fire demon, from the beginning to the end. We are born to die, just to put into practice a profile of another universal truth: All things are created for the Destruction.
你的同伴似乎不这么想，他们为你争取了活命的机会。
Your companions don't seem to think so. They fight for your chance at survival.
他们是我的孩子，同曾经的我一样，是尚未白热的火苗。他们还年轻，我不会责备。
They are my children and, just as I was, they are flames that have yet to burn white-hot. They're still young and I don't blame them.
但我的火焰已然嘶哑，时间已经不多。看见远方的盛会之星了么？我要将炼狱带往那里——所以在那之前，我必须将你跨越。
But my flames are faint and time is running out. Can you see the Planet of Festivities in the distance? I plan to bring purgatory with me there — and before that, I must surpass you.
因为在祂们开辟的道路上，你走得比我更远……
Because on the path THEY have forged, you have traveled farther than I have...
你隐瞒不了自己的身份。拔出那把刀吧，我们诚然会留在这里，我们注定会决一死战，因为我*选择*这么做。
You cannot hide your true identity. Draw that sword, for we shall indeed remain here, bound to fight a decisive battle to the death, for I choose this.
「毁灭」是壮烈的一瞬。倘若卑劣求存…此生就太过漫长。
Destruction is intense but brief. To cravenly cling to life is to endure an endlessly prolonged existence.
即便答案…可能是你自身的毁灭？
Even if the answer... turns out to be your own destruction?
答案并不重要，重要的是它存在，正如你的存在。一切为了被毁灭而存在——令使也不外如是。
What's important is not the answer, but that it exists — just as you exist. Everything exists to be destroyed — Emanators are no different.
就连虚空之中也能诞下{RUBY_B#匹诺康尼}美梦{RUBY_E#}。所谓的不可能之事，只是尚未到来之事。
Just as even {RUBY_B#Penacony}sweet dreams{RUBY_E#} may be born of the void, the so-called impossible is merely something that has yet to happen.
你会见证这世上最为璀璨和暴烈的火。愿这燃烧照亮你深不见底的梦。
You shall witness the most brilliant and intense fire in existence. May this flame illuminate the farthest reaches of your bottomless dream.
深不见底的梦…的确，但你误会了一件事。
A bottomless dream... Yes, that's right. But you've made one small mistake.
这把刀仍在鞘中，并非出于怜悯或轻视。它是我不愿示人的秘辛，但作为回敬……
This blade remains in its scabbard not out of pity or scorn. It's a personal secret that I don't want to disclose, but perhaps out of reciprocity...
在这样说时，她的手也轻轻搭在了刀镡上。
She says this as her hand gently rests on the hilt of the sword.
The Hunt... is not the path I truly follow.
愿死亡结束你漫长的梦……
May death be the end of your boundless dream...
...guiding you back to the waking world.
我见过许多看似高明的伪装，能掩盖外表，但藏不住内心。你也不例外。
I've seen many clever disguises that can conceal appearances, but they can never cover up who a person really is. And you're no different.
{NICKNAME}，你没想杀死{M#他}{F#她}。你出手只是为了驱散我和那位忆者…为什么？
You had no desire to kill {NICKNAME}. You only did what you did to drive me and the Memokeeper away... But why?
是「命运的奴隶」让你这么做？
Did Destiny's Slave make you do it?
我以为这件事会写在你的「剧本」上。
I thought this is just the kind of thing that'd get written into your "script."
我的「剧本」向来只有几行。除此之外的，不必要，也不需要。
My "script" has always been brief. Other than that. Anything beyond that is unnecessary.
他知道我的性格：命运只有一种，谁也无法绕开——而在那之前，我有选择的权利。
He knows my nature: There is but a single destiny, from which no one can escape... And until then, I hold the privilege of choice.
但你似乎不知道，所以该我提问了：你究竟是什么人？
However, you appear to be ignorant of this, so it's time for me to inquire: Who exactly are you?
我不值得你如此好奇。独行银河的人总有些秘密，我也被公司通缉过，对星核猎手有所了解并不奇怪…也仅止于此。

I don't deserve your curiosity. Loners wandering the cosmos always have their secrets. Take me. I've also been wanted by the IPC, so it's little wonder I know something about the Stellaron Hunters... that's all.
What reason would you have for doing that?
我时常会忘记一些事，因此比起回忆，更习惯用「感受」去捕捉些什么。所以——
I tend to forget things — which is why, rather than memories, I'm accustomed to using my emotions to capture what I normally wouldn't otherwise. So...
——我知道那冰冷的铠甲里是谁。
...I know who is inside that cold armor.
怎么样，愿意脱下装甲谈谈了么？
How about it? Ready to take off that armor and sit down for a talk?
我不需要帮助，但可以给你一个建议，这样对你我都更好。
I don't need help, but I can give you a suggestion that would make things better for you and me.
如果你的目标是「钟表匠的遗产」，就去调查家族。他们不仅掩盖了「死亡」的存在，还埋藏了梦境的过去与真相。

If your goal is the Watchmaker's Legacy, then go look into The Family. Not only are they covering up the existence of "Death," but they're burying the past and the truth about what happens inside the Dreamscape.
——以及，星穹列车不是你的敌人。
...and the Astral Express is no enemy of yours.
这我也知道…只是不曾想过会从你口中听闻。
I know that... I just never expected to hear you say it.
接下来呢？{NICKNAME}被黑天鹅带走了，你要去找{M#他}{F#她}么？
What's next, then? {NICKNAME}'s been taken by Black Swan. Will you go look for {M#him}{F#her}?
没有那个必要了…告诉你也无妨，艾利欧给我的指示只有一条——「让星穹列车一同追逐『盛大的遗产』」。
No need for that... No harm in mentioning that Elio's only given me one instruction: "Get all of the Astral Express to track down the grand legacy."
我试过用更简单直接的方式了结此事，但结果如你所见，我正站在这里与你对峙——我失败了。「剧本」无可违逆。
I tried settling this in an easier and more direct way, but as you can see, here I am, confronting you: I failed. Can't ever go against "the script."
「所谓的不可能之事，只是尚未到来之事」……
"The so-called impossible is merely something that has yet to happen"...
…罢了。在分别前，我可以再问你一个问题么？
...That's it. Before we split, can I ask you one more thing?
你的「剧本」中有任何关于我的部分吗？我想知道，在命运所见的未来中，<color=#ff3a3e>「我」</color>留下了怎样的注脚？
Is there anything else in your "script" about me? I'd like to know what kind of footnote <color=#ff3a3e>"I"</color> get to leave in that future foreseen by destiny?
Unfortunately, not a thing came up.
你最初的提问——「你是否还会做梦，梦见那些因你而死的人。」
Your first question was: "Do you still have dreams about everyone who died because of you?"
我生来便没有「做梦」的机能。我为冰冷的现实而活，为一点光亮，燃烧…不断燃烧，直到化作死灰。
I was born without the ability to "dream." I live for this cold harsh reality, for a little light, and to burn... to keep on burning, until I turn to ash.
那你已经活在清醒的世界中了。
Then you're already living in the waking world.
黑天鹅引领你穿过了混乱的梦境……
Black Swan leads you through the chaotic Dreamscape...
一段时间前 忆域深处
Some time ago — Deep in Memory Zone
同一时间 现实中的酒店
At the same time — Hotel in the real world
At this moment, on the other side...
The two return on the path they came from...
The two return to the lobby...
欢迎来到「黄金的时刻」基底模型。
Welcome to the Golden Hour base model.
Hello, I am an Oak Family Soldier.
你好，我是工业化的渣滓。
你好，我是工业化的骄傲。
Hello, I need a five-star review.
Hello, you can't pass through here.
你好，我是世界上最烂的兵人。
Hello, I'm the world's lousiest soldier.
数系统时前 朝露公馆
You really didn't see anything? Think harder.
I... I've been slacking off at work these few days...
难道偷渡犯的事是真的…
Could the stowaway incident be real...
案侦工作需要，敬请谅解。
你和这位猎犬家系成员打过交道，知道他非常有原则。但你很清楚，人在<color=#dbc291ff>心情好</color>的时候原则是不太管用的。

You and this Bloodhound Family member have met before, and you know he's very upright. But you're also aware that principles sometimes don't matter when a person is in a <color=#dbc291ff>good mood</color>.
有原则的猎犬家系成员陷入了无尽的悲伤。作为补偿，你得想办法<color=#dbc291ff>安慰</color>一下他。
The principled Bloodhound Family member is mired in endless sorrow. As compensation, you have to think of a way to <color=#dbc291ff>comfort</color> him.
有原则的猎犬家系成员变得异常沉重…还是想办法让他<color=#dbc291ff>轻松</color>一点吧。
The principled Bloodhound Family member has become unusually gloomy... You have to think of a way to get him to <color=#dbc291ff>lighten up</color>.
At this moment, on the other side...
现在还不是做这个的时候——四下分发宝石，打听偷渡犯的线索，然后看看*那位女孩*会不会上钩吧。
It's not yet time to do this now — give out the gems and get some clues on the stowaway, then see if *that girl* will take the bait.
流萤小姐的事，我们从黑天鹅口中听说了…可没想到，连知更鸟小姐也……
We heard about Miss Firefly from Black Swan... But we never expected Miss Robin to...
抱歉…那时没能陪在你身旁。
I'm sorry... that I couldn't be with you then.
现实中风平浪静，梦境里却暗流涌动，真是应了那位忆者的话啊……
Reality cruises on in serenity, while undercurrents bubble up from the Dreamscape... just like that Memokeeper said...
各位，尚不是消沉的时候，我们还能为她们做些力所能及的事，比如…找出凶手。
...Stay strong, everyone. We can still do what we can for them... starting with finding the murderer.
整理下现状吧，{NICKNAME}的话让我想起一些事。小三月，还记得和我们交涉的那位家族代表是怎么说的吗？
Let's recap everything then. {NICKNAME} just reminded me of something: March, do you remember what that Family rep who negotiated with us said?
「诚然，我们相信无名客与此事无关，也恳请各位能协助家族一道，查明死者的身份。」是这么说的…指的是流萤小姐。

"Indeed, we trust that the Nameless has nothing to do with this, and we also beg each of you to help assist The Family in verifying the identity of the deceased." That's how it was put... in reference to Miss Firefly.
现在回想起来，他当时的神情有些躲闪，对理应更早发生的另一起事件也闭口不提。
Looking back, he seemed a little evasive at the time. And he also failed to mention anything about the earlier murder, too.
家族是打算隐瞒知更鸟小姐的死讯吧，这件事要是传开，匹诺康尼就真要「血流成河」了……
The Family is planning on covering up all news about Miss Robin's death. If news gets out, Penacony is going to turn into a bloodbath...
但紧随其后的第二起事件，显然超出了他们的预料，以致家族不得不顺势而为，向外来者求援。谐乐大典在即，他们一定分身乏术了。

But the murder that followed closely after was obviously beyond their anticipation. The Family had to try and turn things to their advantage by bringing in reinforcements from outside. The Charmony Festival is nearly here — they must be snowed under.
也可能是因为流萤小姐一事目击者众多，不方便掩盖，不如顺水推舟，让更多人入场控制局势。
It may also be that Miss Firefly's murder had so many witnesses that it couldn't be covered up, so they went with the flow and let more people on the scene to control the situation.
毕竟两起案件的性质有根本不同…家族首要提防的，还是那些不怀好意的来客，比如那位公司的使节。
After all, the nature of the two murders is fundamentally different... The Family's first protective measures should be against malicious actors among the guests, such as that IPC envoy.
He really is up to no good.
同时，他还指控了那位「巡海游侠」……
All the while accusing that Galaxy Ranger...
Aventurine is on guard against Acheron.
的确，他对那位「巡海游侠」尤为关注。
Indeed, he was particularly concerned about that Galaxy Ranger.
什么螳螂捕蝉黄雀在后啊…但总感觉砂金指控黄泉小姐的理由也很微妙，该相信他说的话吗？
Are we missing the forest for the trees here...? I always felt that Aventurine's reasons for accusing Miss Acheron were highly subtle. Can we believe him?
事到如今，我们能信任的恐怕只有自己了。
At this point, I'm afraid the only ones we can trust are ourselves.
总之，先试着搜集信息，罗列尽量多的可能性吧。再逐一将其中的矛盾排除，剩下的事实越少，便越有可能是真相。

Look, let's try to gather intel first and then list all the possible outcomes we can. Then we go through them, eliminating contradictions one-by-one. The fewer facts remaining, the closer we are to the truth.
但我总有种预感…即便发生了这么多事，我们依然在有关<color=#dbc291ff>「遗产」</color>的漩涡中打转……
...I've still got this sense of foreboding. It's like we're stuck in a whirlpool — spinning around <color=#dbc291ff>that Legacy</color> even after everything that's happened...
（看来砂金对这个结果很满意…和大家说一声吧。）
(Looks like Aventurine is happy with this outcome... Let's tell everyone about it.)
这次我们要实打实扮演一次大侦探了…但在调查开始前，该怎么答复家族和砂金？
This time we're playing the role of a real detective... But before we start, what are we going to say to The Family and Aventurine?
在我看来，家族对星穹列车并无恶意——若非信任列车组的品格，他们不会轻易委托外人调查一桩堪称「丑闻」的案件。

As I see things, The Family harbors no ill-will towards the Astral Express — if they didn't trust the Crew, they wouldn't have casually commissioned outsiders to investigate a case that's in all likelihood "a scandal."
况且这是家族的地界，与他们合作，应当能为后续的事行不少方便。
Plus, this is The Family's turf. Teaming up with them should make things easier for us in the future.
至于砂金那边…瓦尔特，我想听听你的看法。
As for that Aventurine... Welt, I'd like to hear your thoughts.
这人不简单，他在和{NICKNAME}交涉的过程中故意放低姿态，话里话外却一直在围追堵截……
He's complex. He deliberately slow-played his hand during negotiations while running circles round us all the while.
于情于理，他都给出了令人信服的说法。说是不勉强，但意图已经很明显了。
He appealed convincingly to both reason and emotion. It wasn't forced, but the intent was obvious.
不过在局势尚不明朗的当下，建立更多联系不是坏事。砂金三言两语便展现了自己的手腕，只要利益一致，他也能成为可靠的盟友。
Still, it's good to have contacts among all this uncertainty. Aventurine showed his skills, and as far as our interests are aligned, he can become a reliable ally.
我们也得谨慎处理和家族的距离，切不可走得太近。与公司合作不失为一种制衡的方法，一旦任何一方另有企图，我们都有机会抽身。
We also need to keep a certain distance from The Family — never let them get too close. Teaming up with the IPC helps balance that out — if either side makes a move, we have the option to pull out.
所以你建议先接受砂金的合作提议。
So you suggest accepting Aventurine's proposal to team up?
是。隐患固然存在…但也只能等各方心思明了后，再做进一步判断了。
Yes... It's risky, but we can only wait until both sides have played their cards before making any further judgments.
道理我都明白，可这里坏女人坏男人太多，真的好担心被背刺啊。{NICKNAME}都遭人欺负几回了，我实在看不下去……
I get why, but there's a whole lot of bad guys and girls around here and I'm worried about getting stabbed in the back. {NICKNAME} has been bullied a few times now, and I can't stand it anymore...
It's fine. Let's focus on the big picture for now.
哎，你这车轱辘话说了跟没说似的……
It's fine. I got a lot out of him, too...
…不行！本姑娘可不能接受这种理由！
It's cool. You can bully me whenever!
…不行！本姑娘可不能接受这种理由！
…算了，还是让本姑娘紧盯他吧！实在不行，咱们就反过来利用他呗。
...Forget about it. Just let me keep an eye on him! If that doesn't work, we can just turn the tables and use him instead!
那就麻烦{NICKNAME}给砂金一个答复吧。各位也趁这段时间，再整理下思绪。
Then {NICKNAME}, could you please reply to Aventurine? Everyone, take this time to put together your thoughts.
匹诺康尼大剧院依旧静静悬浮于梦海中央。
Penacony Grand Theater still silently floats in the heart of the sea of dreams.
《谐乐颂》周而复始，人们依旧各行其道，全然不知无人在意的角落中，已有两条生命化作梦泡消散。
Odes of Harmony plays on, as people continue their journeys, oblivious to the unnoticed corners where two lives have already dissolved into fleeting dreams.
钟表小子的笑容始终灿烂——不知他的目光是否能够遍及美梦中每一处无光的角落？
Clockie's smile forever radiant — It's not yet known if his gaze can reach every dark corner in the realm of dreams.
中央黄金车站人流如织。形如弹珠的「球笼」安稳地锁住每一颗灵魂，再将它们送往梦境各地。
The Central Golden Station teems with a flowing crowd. Like bouncing marbles, the Spheroids securely captures every soul and transports them to dreamscapes afar.
你记得，这是你和流萤初次相遇的地方。
The place where you and Firefly first met.
艾迪恩公园的空气甜如蜂蜜——这是苏乐达糖浆特有的味道。
Aideen Park's air is sweet as honey — a scent unique of the SoulGlad syrup.
如果人们能像钟表小子一样，从苏乐达瓶中的汽水里获得解决一切难题的力量，无辜的生命是否就能逃离「死亡」？
If people could, like Clockie, find the power to solve all problems in the soda from the SoulGlad bottle, would innocent lives be able to escape "Death"?
不知道是不是太突然了，我总觉得…知更鸟小姐没有死，还好好地活在什么地方。一切就只是场…恶作剧……
I hope it's not too soon to bring it up, but I feel like... Miss Robin isn't actually dead, but that she's still alive and well somewhere. That everything's just some... horrible prank...
因为…这不是在梦里吗？美梦乐园怎么会有人死掉呢，不应该只有好事发生…才对吗？
Because... aren't we supposed to be inside a dream? How could someone die in a beautiful dreamscape like this... Shouldn't only good things happen here?
唉，看到那座大剧院，就会忍不住胡思乱想……
Whenever I see the grand theater, I just can't stop all these thoughts from flooding my head...
Do you think The Family is behind all this?
不不不，没有——毕竟有了他们才有了如今为所有人带来笑容的美梦嘛。只是，我感觉自己开始有点看不透他们了……
No no, after all they've brought everyone this sleepy dreamscape which everyone loves. I just feel like I'm starting to understand them less and less...
我们会让美梦恢复正常的。
We'll restore all the dreams back to normal.
嗯！当然啦，这种时候还得看我们列车组——家族、公司，一个个都只打自己的算盘……
Yeah! Of course, at times like this we're so lucky to have our Crew. The Family and the IPC — everyone has their own plans going on...
街上的人们依旧好开心，没人知道发生了什么…好不真实，就好像流萤和知更鸟小姐，还有我们…是另一个世界的人。
Everyone's still having a great time out there on the streets. Nobody knows what's happened... It's all so unreal, as if Firefly, Miss Robin, and us... were all outsiders from another world.
啊…好烦！好想喝点冰冰凉凉的汽水冷静冷静……
Ahh... what a mess! I really want a nice cool drink of soda to help me calm down...
但这不就跟街上的人一样了吗…唔……
But then I'd be just like everyone else out on the streets...
这片美梦…越来越不真实了啊。
This dream... is becoming more and more separated from reality.
砂金的话里，还有一点让我很在意。
Aventurine said something that concerns me...
在没有任何证据的情况下，他直接指控那位巡海游侠是杀死知更鸟的嫌犯。可对于她和「忆域迷因」的联系，以及为何要潜伏在你身边，却只字未提。
He accused that Galaxy Ranger of killing Robin without any evidence whatsoever... but said nothing about her connection to that Memory Zone Meme, or why he was stalking you.
这种明显站不住脚的推论…对获取你的信任毫无帮助，只会让他显得更可疑。
It was a groundless accusation... which only serves to make him seem more suspicious.
或许，砂金的目的从一开始就不是博取信任，而是让你对黄泉心生芥蒂。这样会让局势更加混乱，是他乐见的结果。
Maybe Aventurine's goal was never to gain our trust. Maybe he wanted to foster a feeling of enmity toward Acheron and make the situation more volatile... Two birds, one stone.
不过，前来赴约的泯灭帮失去音讯一事，我向留守列车的丹恒求证了…不是砂金凭空编造。
However, I asked Dan Heng back on the Express to confirm that story about the Annihilation Gang and the lost messages... It wasn't something that Aventurine made up out of thin air.
接触过这么多次，你对黄泉小姐的印象如何？
You've met her many times, now. What's your impression of Miss Acheron?
Weird... I can't seem to remember.
…倒是很符合巡海游侠给人的刻板印象。
...That fits the stereotype of a Galaxy Ranger to a T.
这群人…千奇百怪，捉摸不透，又喜欢独来独往。哎，也难怪会被怀疑啊。
They're eccentric, unpredictable, and fond of being alone. No wonder she's a suspect.
无论如何，不要完全信任砂金。我们绝不能被他牵着鼻子走。
Whatever happens, please don't place all your trust in Aventurine. We cannot afford to be manipulated by him.
砂金的目标是为公司收复匹诺康尼。为此，他必须扳倒家族，制造出足够大的破绽。
Aventurine's goal is to try and recapture Penacony for IPC. To do this, he'll have to bring down The Family in its entirety to create a big enough chance.
「死亡」的存在会被家族掩盖，他打算从什么地方破局？切入点必须足够重要，所有人都会关注，但过程中又不能太张扬……

The existence of "Death" will be covered up by The Family, so how does he plan on taking them down? It's got to be something important enough that everyone will notice, but it also can't be anything too out-in-the-open...
Perhaps he's going for the Hotel?
对住客下手吗？不像。匹诺康尼的客人有不少寰宇皆知的大人物，即便是公司也不敢轻易动这些人。砂金是个精明的商人，不可能不明白这点。

An attack on the hotel guests? Unlikely. Penacony's guests include quite a few big wigs known throughout the whole cosmos, people who not even the IPC would dare take lightly. Aventurine is a shrewd merchant, and there's no way he doesn't know that.
Perhaps he's going for The Family?
他的目标一定是家族，但方法不得而知。「同谐」在匹诺康尼势力壮大，想正面与之抗衡非常困难。公司指派砂金前来，也说明了他们不打算依靠正常手段。

He's definitely going for The Family, and it's just a matter of how. The Harmony is strong in Penacony and almost impossible to take on head-to-head. The fact that the IPC dispatched Aventurine shows that they do not intend to simply play by the book here.
砂金对她投入了相当多的关注。但对这位巡海游侠…我们目前知之甚少，做不出什么判断。
Aventurine has devoted considerable attention to her. But this Galaxy Ranger... we know hardly anything about her and can't rush to any conclusions.
Perhaps he's going for the Astral Express?
…我也在考虑这个可能性，尤其是…他对你格外看重，屡次刻意接近。或许他也不清楚你的虚实，还在反复试探。
...I was also considering this possibility, especially... because he respects you so much, and has sought you out before a few times. Perhaps he's also unsure of your intentions, and is probing you.
现在也得不出什么结论。
No conclusions can be drawn just yet.
…现在也就是随便想想。无论如何，和砂金打交道都得保持警惕，他很擅长把握人心，懂得什么时候该出手。并且……
...I'm just speculating. In any case, we have to be careful when handling Aventurine. He's skilled at reading people and discerning the right moment to strike. Also...
他显然是个天生的赌徒，愿意为胜利押上所有。
He's clearly a born gambler if he's willing to go all in to win.
砂金想要扳倒家族，就必须制造出足够大的破绽。他至今为止的行动…目的究竟是什么……
If Aventurine wants to bring down The Family, he'll have to create a big enough chance. After everything he's done so far — what is his goal...?
看来砂金没有更多要求，我们就先处理家族的委托吧。姬子，你认为呢？
Looks like Aventurine doesn't need anything else — let's turn our attention to The Family's assignment for now. Himeko, what do you think?
目前的线索里，{NICKNAME}目击到的两起命案最为直接，我建议从这里入手。
Among our current clues, the two murders that {NICKNAME} witnessed are the most directly connected. I suggest starting here.
有件事我很好奇，如果一个人在梦中死亡，那现实中的他呢？既然有家族授意，我们不如先返回现实，向酒店核实流萤小姐的情况…也可以顺便打探下知更鸟小姐的消息。

One thing I'm curious about is, if a person dies in a dream, what happens to them in real life? Seeing as we're at The Family's behest, why not pop back out to reality and verify Miss Firefly's situation back at the hotel... Perhaps we could also make a few inquiries about Miss Robin while we're out there.
那这样如何？我们兵分两路，梦境中也有些令人在意的事，我想先去调查，稍后再与你们会合。
How about we split off into two groups? There are still some things worth focusing on inside the Dreamscape — I'll investigate those and we can link up again later.
令人在意的事？…哦，没问题，那就拜托你了。
Worth focusing on? ...Oh, no problem. I'll leave it to you then.
欸？啊…还以为终于能看见姬子和杨叔同行了呢，那杨叔多注意安全！
Huh? Ah... I thought I'd finally get to see Himeko and Mr. Yang go out on a mission together. Oh well, take care then, Mr. Yang!
尊贵的客人，可否出来一见？
Honored guest, could you come out for a second?
被这么盯着，我也是会感到为难的。
I'd be embarrassed too, getting stared at like that.
失礼了。我叫瓦尔特•杨，星穹列车的一员，相信你已见过我的同伴了。
Forgive me. My name is Welt Yang — I'm one of the Crew Members on the Astral Express. I believe you've met my colleagues.
…在那之前，你不问问我的名字么？
...First, don't you want to know my name?
恐怕不用了，黄泉小姐，你现在是匹诺康尼的知名人物。
I already do, Miss Acheron. You're a prominent figure in Penacony.
有人声称你是这起连环命案的真凶——前来赴宴的泯灭帮同样惨死在你的刀下，而今，你试图在匹诺康尼掀起又一场腥风血雨。

Some claim that you're the real culprit behind these murders... that the Annihilation Gang's tragic fate at the banquet was a result of your blade... and that you're now attempting to unleash another bloodbath on Penacony.
「惨死」…那位大公以将死之躯化为烈火，舍身殉道。他是坚定、壮烈的命途行者，即便是恶徒，也不应受到如此诋毁。
"Tragic fate"... That duke turned his dying body to flames and sacrificed his life as a martyr. He was a determined and heroic Pathstrider. Not even a villain should be disparaged like this.
更何况，应邀而至的可疑人物不在少数。他们当真觉得…一柄长刀要比你手中的「黑洞」更危险么？
And what's more, there were plenty of suspects invited. Do they really think... that a blade is more dangerous than that "black hole" you're wielding?
…很敏锐的直觉，就连家族也没能点出这把手杖的真面目。
...Keen intuition. Not even The Family managed to point out the truth behind this cane.
所以你一定也清楚，黄泉小姐，窥视黑洞不是明智之举，作为一名潜在的危险分子，你对我们的了解已经到了令人不适的地步——
So you must surely know, Miss Acheron, that peering into a black hole is not a wise move. As a potential threat, your knowledge of us has reached uncomfortable depths...
亮明真身，表明来意。否则，我得请你做好被引力撕裂的准备了。
Reveal your true identity and intentions... Otherwise, brace yourself for gravitational disintegration.
那种事应该不会发生…但如果能让各位无名客少些防备，我乐意效劳。
That shouldn't be necessary... but if it makes the Nameless feel less defensive, I'll be happy to abide.
无论你是否相信，巡海游侠，黄泉…这就是我如今的身份。而拜访匹诺康尼，只是为了一个久远的「遗愿」。
Believe it or not, Galaxy Ranger, Acheron... those are the names I go by to this very day. My trip to Penacony is solely to fulfill an old "final request."
<color=#dbc291ff>我为「钟表匠的遗产」而来…</color>就只是这样。我想自己已经足够坦诚。
<color=#dbc291ff>I'm here for the Watchmaker's Legacy...</color> and that's it. I think I've been honest enough.
你还是不愿说出自己的真实身份？
Still unwilling to reveal your true identity?
不是不愿，而是不能…我走过的路太长，对于加诸此身的种种，三言两语无法言明。
It's not that I don't want to. It's just that I can't... I've come so far, and I can't sum up all of that in just a few words.
每个人都有难以启齿的过往，不愿轻易示人的秘密…我也不会多问，星穹列车为何要带着一颗*星核*漫游银河。

Everyone has their own unspeakable past, secrets that they don't want to be revealed... and I won't be asking any more questions, such as why the Astral Express is roaming around the cosmos with a Stellaron on board.
{M#他}{F#她}还好么，那位忆者…没有做什么吧？
Is {M#he}{F#she} okay? That Memokeeper... didn't do anything, right?
{NICKNAME}没有危险。回到我们刚才的话题吧，能否得到我的信任，取决于你愿意袒露多少。
{NICKNAME}'s fine. Let's stick with the topic. Gaining my trust all depends on how much you're willing to reveal.
为了寻找那份「遗产」，入住匹诺康尼后我便走访各个梦境，进行了许多调查，期间也和不少来客产生过接触。这一过程中，我逐渐意识到……

I've run around many different Penacony dreamscapes just to try and find that "Legacy," and during this period I came into contact with quite a few guests. In the process, I gradually came to realize...
匹诺康尼的秘密…也许与曾经的「开拓」息息相关。
The secret of Penacony... may be closely related to the Trailblaze.
因此，我前来寻求各位的帮助。我没有足够的证据，但想提出一种可能：<color=#dbc291ff>一切悲剧的源头正潜伏于家族中</color>。如果你愿意信任我…我们可以一起找到用以佐证的事实。

That's why I've come to ask for your help. I don't have enough proof yet, but I'd like to speculate something: <color=#dbc291ff>the source of all tragedy lies within The Family</color>. If you could trust me... we could find the proof to support this claim, together.
瓦尔特先生，我认为你早就得出相同的结论了。
Mr. Yang, I think you've come to the same conclusion, haven't you?
…就到这里吧。我暂且相信你没有敌意。
...Let's leave it at that. For now, I'll choose to believe that you bear no hostility.
和我分享你的发现吧——就你我二人，在找到确切的证据前，我不想用模棱两可的揣测干扰其他人的判断。
Share your findings with me, and me alone. I don't want vague conjecture to interfere with other people's judgments before we find solid proof.
…对了，要喝点什么吗？出发前，来两杯*如梦初醒*如何…不，四杯吧。
...By the way, would you like something to drink? Before we go, how about two cups of Wake the Heck Up...? No, four cups.
因为接下来的对话…会持续很久。
Because the conversation coming up... will last forever.
我注视她很久了，第一次「邀约」是在酒店的宴会厅。
I've been watching her closely for a while now, and the first "invitation" was in the banquet hall of the hotel.
她坐在人群的角落，默不作声，只是喝着*如梦初醒*，一杯、两杯…我说这种饮料辛辣、苦涩，不是美梦的滋味，只适合那些厌倦了苏乐达的人。可她却说……

She just sat in one corner keeping silent, chugging down a couple cups of Wake the Heck Up... I told her it's a pungent, bitter beverage, not the taste of sweet dreams — only for people allergic to SoulGlad. And she said...
「是么？但在我尝来…它们并无区别。」
"Really? But I don't taste... any difference at all between them."
现实中的客房倒是意外朴素……
The guest rooms are charmingly minimalist...
…就像你的外在一样，黄泉小姐。
得来全不费工夫。就是这只八音盒——泯灭帮收到的「邀请函」……
It's a cinch. This music box — the "invitation" received by the Annihilation Gang... There are latent memories that linger on it yet.
有关你的记忆不只属于你——我所知甚多，亦预言更远——只要用点手段，死者也能开口说话。
You see, memories of you are not yours alone. They travel in other people... Other things. I know much, and I can predict even more. With some help, the dead can be made to speak.
泯灭帮，那群遇见你后便不知去向的亡命徒…他们究竟经历了什么？让我来揭示吧。
The Annihilation Gang, that band of desperadoes who all disappeared after meeting you... What exactly happened to them? Well, let me reveal all.
「…十二刻度██十二梦境██父亲██我把它献予你…」
"...Gradation twelve ██ Dreamscape twelve ██ Father ██ I dedicate this to you..."
「…做得好██杜布拉██无论他们逃往何处██泯灭终将造访…」
"...Well done ██ Dubra ██ wherever they go, ██ shall be met by annihilation..."
…有了，尽管很朦胧，但这是阿弗利特的声音。另一位…是他的子嗣吧。
...There it is — it's hazy, but it's Ifrit's voice. The other one... is probably his progeny.
这是「邀请函」最初被交付时残留的记忆…片刻就中断了。那么之后是……
This is the residual memory from when the 'invitation' was first delivered... they were abruptly interrupted. Then, what happened next is...
「…他们躲入睡乡██但求安眠不被风雨搅扰…」
"...They sought refuge in the land of sleep ██, merely wishing for undisturbed rest, away from the storms..."
「…火焰的子嗣们██这是你们的成人之礼…」
"Children of the flame ██ this marks your rite of passage."
「…轮不到她出场████我一人便足够…」
"She won't be necessary ████ I alone am enough."
「…嘘████行于██毁灭██的亡命徒██什么时候怕过死亡…」
Shh—████ when have those ██ on the Path of Destruction ██ feared death?
「永火官邸」启程了，可怜的人们…他们还不知道等待在前方的是什么。
The Ever-Flame Mansion has set out on a journey. Those poor people... They have no idea what lies in wait ahead of them.
但记忆的复现很顺利，她要来了…很快就要来了…这里没有别人，不那么优雅也可以…我得不遗余力……
Memory recovery is going well, but slowly. She'll be here soon, and time is short.... There's nobody else here, so there's no need to be delicate... In fact I think I'd better go all out....
之后的记忆…是一片空白？怎么可能…这只八音盒落入黄泉之手，被她带来匹诺康尼是事实，本该这样的…可中间的过程……

The memory after that... is blank? How is that possible... This music box fell into Acheron's hands, and she brought it to Penacony — that's a fact, and that's how it should have gone... but along the way...
...It's like it's been erased? Who's done this...
「哦…一位忆者，你侍从流光忆庭…还是焚化工？」
"Oh... a Memokeeper. Do you serve the Garden of Recollection... or The Cremators?"
「我的名字是康士坦丝…很高兴认识你。我们本该在匹诺康尼相遇，共度一段…*刻骨铭心*的时光。」
"My name is Constance... A pleasure to meet you. We were supposed to meet in Penacony and spend an... unforgettable time together."
「但那似乎无法实现了。宴会之星并不欢迎大丽花，我也不需要成人礼…而你，我知道你在寻找什么……」
"But that seems unrealistic. Dahlia's not welcome on the Banquet Star, and I don't need a coming-of-age ceremony... And you, I know what you're looking for..."
「想要『她』的秘密？我可以给你，然后…替我享受那场盛会吧。」
"Want 'her' secret? I can give it to you, and then... you can enjoy the banquet for me."
「…日前，星际和平公司在松波尔的市场开拓任务已接近尾声——」
"...Days ago, the Interastral Peace Corporation's market trailblaze mission in Sombor was coming to an end..."
「松波尔全民庭的代表舍特康努格宣布，松波尔全体星区在庭会议上一致通过决议，将以观察员实体身份加入星际和平会议——」

"The representative of the Citizen Court of Sombor, Schattenkornug, announced that the entire Star District of Sombor had unanimously adopted a resolution at a meeting of the Court to join the Interstellar Congress as an observer entity..."
「市场开拓部主管奥斯瓦尔多•施耐德称，此举将『为争取松波尔全体公民的基本自由打下坚实基础』，并对公司在无主星区茨冈尼亚的开疆工作作出重要示范……」

"The head of the Marketing Development Department, Oswaldo Schneider, claimed that this move would 'lay a solid foundation to fight for the fundamental freedoms of all citizens of Sombor' and serve as an important demonstration of the company's pioneering work in the unclaimed region of Sigonia..."
卡卡瓦夏，你去哪儿了…你受伤了？！
Kakavasha, where did you go... Are you injured!?
你去找他们了…？太危险了！这只是一串项链，不能吃，也不是水，没有它我们也能活下去。
You went to look for them...? That's too dangerous! It's just a necklace. It's neither food nor water. We can survive without it.
但我不能没有你，弟弟…不要再靠近那群{RUBY_B#剥皮刀}卡提卡{RUBY_E#}人了，好吗？
But I can't live without you, little brother... Promise me not to look for those {RUBY_B#Shellslasher}Katicans{RUBY_E#} again, okay?
姐姐，不要怕。卡提卡人很笨，但我很聪明，和他们玩「游戏」，赢的一定是我。
Sister, don't be afraid. The Katicans are fools, but I'm smart. I played a "game" with them, and I won.
「赢」？到底发生什么事了？告诉我。
Won? What happened exactly? Tell me.
我和他们打了赌，赌沙漠里的两只小鸟，还有我，哪个会先死掉。我赢了。
I made a bet with them — the two birds in the desert and me, who will die first? I won.
他们怀疑我出千，但我没有…我赢得光明正大。
They suspected me of cheating, but I didn't... I won fair and square.
我知道你能赢…你一直是个运气很好的孩子，你的幸运是{RUBY_B#芬戈-比约斯}地母神{RUBY_E#}的恩赐……
Of course. Of course you'd win... You've always been a lucky child. {RUBY_B#Fenge Biyos}Gaiathra Triclops{RUBY_E#} must be watching over you...
可这不是你去找卡提卡人硬碰硬的理由，他们嗜血、残忍，贪得无厌——别忘了爸爸妈妈……
But that's no reason to push your luck by going up against those... those bloodthirsty, CRUEL Katicans! Have you forgotten how Mom and Dad...!
这只是一串项链…可是卡卡瓦夏，你是我最后的家人了。
Look, this is just a necklace. But Kakavasha, you are my only family.
姐姐，对不起…我以为你会开心的。因为这是妈妈留给你的项链……
I'm sorry, Sister... I thought you'd be happy. Because mom left you this necklace...
它是很重要，但更重要的是你，我最爱的弟弟…我不会责怪你，但你要记得妈妈说过的话……
It is important, but not as important as you, my dearest brother... I don't blame you, but you must remember what mom said...
痛苦和贫穷是母神的考验，祂也赐给了我们机遇，那就是你的幸运，卡卡瓦夏。你的好运是我们…也是所有埃维金人最宝贵的财富。
Pain and poverty are the trials of Gaiathra Triclops. She has also granted us a chance, and that's your good luck, Kakavasha. Your good luck is the most precious wealth we — all Avgin have.
你是{RUBY_B#卡卡瓦夏}受母神赐福的孩子{RUBY_E#}，你能带领氏族走向幸福。所以，永远记得保护好自己，也永远不要怨恨痛苦和贫穷…好吗？

You're a child blessed by {RUBY_B#Kakavasha}Gaiathra Triclops{RUBY_E#} and can lead the clan to happiness. So, always remember to protect yourself and never resent the pain and poverty you're going through... All right?
Listen to me, and swear to Gaiathra Triclops.
…好。我向母神发誓，我会永远保护好这份「财富」……
...Okay. I will swear to Gaiathra Triclops to protect this "wealth"...
可是，姐姐…如果三重眼的地母神真的在注视我们……
But Sister... If Gaiathra Triclops was really watching over us...
那当爸爸被流沙卷走的时候，母神为什么没有保佑他…明明爸爸是为了准备给她的供品，才会去卡提卡人在的地方……
Then why did she not protect Dad when he was swept away by the quicksand...? After all, Dad went to the Katicans' land only to prepare for Gaiathra Triclops' offerings...
当妈妈在我们怀里慢慢变冷的时候，母神又在哪里…妈妈直到闭眼的那一刻，口中还在请求她的原谅……
And where was Gaiathra Triclops when Mom was shivering in our arms? Mom was still pleading for Gaiathra Triclops' forgiveness under her breath until the moment she closed her eyes...
姐姐，大家都说我聪明，可我不明白…如果每一场雨都是母神的宽恕和恩赐……
Sister, everyone praises me for being smart, but I don't get it... If every rainpour was Gaiathra Triclops' forgiveness and grace...
那我们是犯了多少错误…才要为了死亡而出生在这世上…？
Then how bad were our sins? ...So much so that we were born in this world of death...?
我们到了。朝露公馆，橡木家系的要塞，各位家主共议匹诺康尼大计的地点。
We're here. The Dewlight Pavilion is the Oak Family's fortress and a place where heads of the families meet to discuss great plans for Penacony.
要塞？这比喻不错。前不久我才和伊伊玛尼喀星系的军阀打过交道，他们的同步轨道庄园都没这么戒备森严。
Fortress? I like this metaphor. I had dealt with the warlords of the Iymanika star system not long ago, and their synchronized orbital manor wasn't this heavily guarded.
和它的主人很相称，这宅子名义上属于星期日，没有他的邀请，普通宾客一辈子都没机会踏足这里。多看两眼吧，趁你还有片刻自由。

This mansion nominally belongs to Sunday, and is very befitting of its owner. Without his express invitation, the likes of ordinary guests would never grace these grounds in their lifetimes. Look around while you still have this moment of freedom.
嘿，教授——这话说的，你到底站在哪边？
Hey, Doc — Whose side are you on anyway?
谁能保证我不会出卖你呢？
Who's to say I won't sell you out?
那就拭目以待吧。等见到那位控制欲溢出的{RUBY_B#星期日}橡木家主{RUBY_E#}，我自有办法从他嘴里撬出答案。
We'll see. When we meet the {RUBY_B#Sunday}authoritarian master{RUBY_E#} of the Oak Family, I'll pry an answer out of him.
跟我走，我带你去他的会客厅。别说多余的话，家族的人交给我来应付。
Follow me, and I'll bring you to his parlor. Hold your tongue and let me deal with the members of The Family.
嘿，你们两个！前方是议事要地，非请勿入。
Hey, you two! That's a place of business. No entry!
我应星期日先生要求将嫌疑人带来了。「拉帝奥」，他应该吩咐过这个名字。
I was requested by Mr. Sunday to bring him the suspect. My name is Ratio. He should've mentioned it to you.
哦，我记得你…维里塔斯•拉帝奥，你的「庞奇虚粒子钟」令人印象深刻。
Oh, I remember you... Veritas Ratio. Your "Punch Virtual Particle Clock" is impressive.
就你脑袋上这个！虽然比不过我——「机动骑士」的全领域歼击动力铠。
The one on your head! Of course, it's nothing compared to my... full pocket-dimensional annihilating power armor of the "Mobile Knights."
上次我就提醒过你，你那身幻想战衣根本就不存在。
Right, and as I mentioned, that fantasy raiment of yours doesn't exist.
只是你看不见罢了！我说过，只有{RUBY_B#「家族」成员}「家人」{RUBY_E#}才能目视「机动骑士」的光辉——好了，快过去吧，别让星期日先生等急了。
That's because you can't see it! Like I say, only {RUBY_B#Member of The Family}Family{RUBY_E#} can see the glory of the "Mobile Knights." Enough, get going. Don't keep Mr. Sunday waiting.
唉…这里的白痴指数比外头也好不了多少。
*sigh*... It seems like the idiocy index here is no better than it is out there.
好了，快过去吧，别让星期日先生等急了。
Enough, get going. Don't keep Mr. Sunday waiting.
大门紧闭，看来是要我们自己动手。
The door is shut tight. Looks like we're on our own.
我的意思是…这连门都没有。你之前怎么进去的？
I mean... there isn't a door. How did you get in before?
出于安全考量，家族将行政地点建在梦境深处，机关在这些隐夜鸫雕像里：<color=#dbc291ff>雕像的朝向是可以控制的</color>。

For security reasons, The Family built the administrative site deep in the Dreamscape, with the mechanisms hidden in these Nightingale statues. <color=#dbc291ff>The direction of the statues can be controlled</color>.
上一次，那位叫康娜的侍者专门去<color=#dbc291ff>侧面的房间</color>确认了什么，才把雕像布置到位。
On the previous occasion, an attendant named Conna had gone to <color=#dbc291ff>the side room</color> to verify something before setting the statues in the correct positions.
也许我们也得这么来一遍，去看看吧。当然，穷举也是个办法。
Maybe we should do the same. Let's go and take a look. Of course, we can also use brute force.
<color=#dbc291ff>六只朝向各不相同的隐夜鸫</color>，显而易见的提示。
<color=#dbc291ff>Six Nightingales facing in different directions</color> — an obvious hint.
嗯…但这真的是隐夜鸫吗？
哪有这么大的隐夜鸫？依我看，这应该是湮厄鹰。
How can Nightingales be so huge? They look more like Torment Eagles to me.
五大家系没有鹰，只有隐夜鸫——我为什么要跟你争这个？
There are no eagles in the Five Families, only Nightingales— Why am I wasting time with you on this?
果不其然，这就是正确答案。
Just as I thought, here's the correct answer.
真是伟大的发现——要不我把加入天才俱乐部的机会让给你吧。
A truly miraculous discovery — perhaps I should offer you the chance to join the Genius Society?
真的？我以为你早放下了呢。
Really? I thought you'd given up on that already.
这就是个该死的玩笑，你一点也听不出来吗？
I was being sarcastic. Can't you tell?
这里头够气派啊。看来星期日先生是完全不打算给自己树立清高的形象。
Impressive. So much for Mr Sunday's reserved, virtuous image.
要我提醒你么？这里是梦境，这座公馆的装潢再怎么豪华，也不会影响匹诺康尼一丝一毫。别在无聊的地方找家族的茬了。
Do you need me to remind you? We're in a dreamscape. No matter how grand the mansion looks, it'll not affect Penacony. Stop wasting your time nitpicking The Family here.
嗯，你说得对，家族的破绽只能是「死亡」，星期日肯定也是这么想的。咱们下楼吧。
Yeah, you're right. The only way to destroy The Family is "Death." Sunday must have thought the same. Let's head down.
What's wrong? Are we heading the wrong way?
没走错，但这扇门上锁了。
No, but this door is locked.
朋友，你真跟他约好了么？
My friend, did you really make an appointment with him?
…这是个测试。在正式谈话前，你得先向星期日证明自己的价值。
...It's a trial. You got to prove your worth to Sunday before you can speak with him.
如果我没猜错，我们得在这座大厅里找到开门的方法，否则此地就是你我的监牢。
If I'm not wrong, we need to find a way to open this door in the hall, or this place will be our prison.
Oh, an escape room — my favorite.
严肃点，没人跟你玩。先回头吧，提示多半就在那座显眼的<color=#dbc291ff>沙盘</color>里。
Get serious. I've no time for games. Let's head back. The hint is probably in that prominent <color=#dbc291ff>sandpit</color>.
看这边，模型上有个非常明显的<color=#dbc291ff>缺口</color>，我大胆猜测你是对的。
Look, there's a noticeable <color=#dbc291ff>gap</color> in the model. I believe you're right.
上次来时还没这缺口，显然是那个男人有意布置。
There wasn't a gap before. That man must have done it intentionally.
那你天才般的大脑一定还记得这里原本放着什么吧，教授？
With your brilliant mind you shouldn't have any trouble recalling what was here last time, right, Doctor?
将「格列佛拱门」置入插槽。
Insert Gulliver's Arch into the slot.
简直就像是搭积木。我从没搭过积木，不知道和垒筹码比，哪个更有意思……
This reminds me of one of those building toys. With the blocks? I've never played with them before. I wonder if it's more interesting than stacking chips.
看，严丝合缝，堪称完美——呃，接下来呢？
Look, the gap is closed, and it fits perfectly — eh, so what's next?
…天，我变小了？我这是在做梦吗？
...Good heavens. Did I shrink? Am I still in a dream?
教授，你变得好高！我竟然来到了沙盒里，还变得这么小……
Doctor... you're huge! It's me! Down here in the sandpit!
要不咱们就这样离开？你再找个机会把我塞进星期日的衣领里，就用这种方式打入家族内部……
Actually I think we could make this work for us. Just find a way to slip me into Sunday's collar, and I'll infiltrate The Family just like that.
您好，欢迎来到「黄金的时刻」基底模型。
Hello. Welcome to the Golden Hour base model.
我是「橡木兵人」，负责引导您在基底模型的游览——乐意为您效劳。
I am an Oak Soldier. I will be here to guide you through the tour of the base model. Happy to be of service.
Tell me about the guided tour.
Then tell me about the tour.
您好好好好好，欢迎来到「黄金的时刻」基基基基基基底模型——
Hel—l—l—l—l—o. Welcome to the Golden Hour ba—a—a—a—a—se model —
我是「橡橡橡橡橡橡木兵人」，负责引导您在基底模型的游览览览览览览览览——
I am an O—o—o—o—o—oak Soldier. I will be here to guide you through the to—o—o—o—ur of the base mo —
Hey, I was talking to you.
Model. Happy to be of service.
正在在在在为您生成指引，请耐心等候候候候候……
你真是世界上最烂的兵人。
You seriously are the worst soldier.
…已已已已已检索到最近的打卡点！
请看看看看看——我身后这台<color=#dbc291ff>扭蛋蛋蛋蛋蛋机</color>模型——
Please lo—o—o—o—ok behind me — a <color=#dbc291ff>capsule m—a—a—a—a—chine</color> model—
模型型型型型型型型型型型型型型——
一声惨叫后，这个兵人崩溃了——甚至还没来得及让你为他打出五星好评。
After screaming, the soldier collapses — he didn't even have time to earn a five-star rating from you.
它崩溃了，可能需要一些时间重启。
It has crashed. It may take some time to reboot.
<color=#dbc291ff>扭蛋机</color>…地上没有能操作的地方，是头顶上那个？教授，帮我个小忙——
<color=#dbc291ff>Capsule machine</color>... There's no mechanism on the floor. Could there be one at the top? Doctor, do me a favor —
果然，这边只有个<color=#dbc291ff>弹珠机</color>的底座，空空如也。
Great. There's another <color=#dbc291ff>pinball machine</color> base here, and it's empty too.
不用大喊大叫，我听得见。<color=#dbc291ff>弹珠机</color>模型肯定和拱门一样放在大厅某个地方。等着，我马上回来。
There's no need to yell, I can hear you. The <color=#dbc291ff>pinball machine</color> must be hidden somewhere in the hall, like the arch. Wait here, and I'll be back in a minute.
很奇妙的装置。如果里面那个聒噪的小人消失，我对它的评价会更高。
Quite a fascinating contraption. I would rate it more favorably if that clamorous little person inside were gone.
哈，你回来了——！把它放在这儿就行——感激不尽——！
Ha, you're back! Just place it here... Thank you...!
Place the model in the sandpit.
很遗憾看到你活着离开沙盘，星期日就在这扇门后。以我粗浅的见解，他不是什么好对付的人，你准备好了么？
It's a pity you made it out of the sandpit alive. Sunday is just beyond this door. From my limited understanding, he's not someone easily handled. Are you prepared?
嗯，我更相信要做好准备的是他。
Yeah, only I believe he's the one who should be prepared to face me.
没什么计划，随机应变。与人交涉的筹码无非两种：利益或者恐惧。
I don't have a plan. I'll just play it by ear. There are only two kinds of bargaining chips when dealing with people: Benefit or fear.
看来你的确不理解「真诚」。
Looks like "sincerity" isn't in your dictionary.
我还不够真诚么？不用特意强调。我们要好好利用死亡，那男人的妹妹死了，他肯定坐不住的，这就是「恐惧」。
Am I not sincere enough? There's no need to emphasize it. We've got to make good use of death. That man's sister is dead. He won't be able to turn a blind eye, and that's "fear."
而我会帮他把那个杀人凶手揪出来。碍于身份和立场，他自己办不到这事，但我可以，这就是「利益」。
And I'll help him find the murderer. He can't do it due to his status and position, but I can, and that's "benefit."
你凭什么觉得他做不到，非得委托一个立场对立的公司人？
On what basis do you believe he's incapable, necessitating the delegation to someone from a rival faction, the IPC?
很简单——因为那凶手很可能是潜伏在家族中的*叛徒*。
Simple — Because that murderer could very well be a traitor hiding inside The Family.
…你之前指控的可是那个巡海游侠。
...Do you mean the Galaxy Ranger whom you accused previously?
那就是个借口，教授。那女人不对劲，我需要有人牵制她，在我们行动时视野外的变数越少越好。

That was just an excuse, good doctor. There's something wrong with that woman, and we need someone to keep her in check. It's better to minimize the variables outside of our control when we execute our plans.
我也需要知道她是什么人，如果我的好运货真价实，她一定能成为重要的棋子。而在这件事上能帮我的*朋友*，越多越好。
Moreover, I need to know her identity. If I'm lucky, she could be an important pawn. And it's good to have more helpful friends when dealing with this matter.
但说真心话，命案多半和她无关，我依旧是那个观点：肯定是家族内部出了问题。不然我们的星期日先生为何要安排私下会面？这不是一场审讯，而是一次秘密谈判。

But honestly, the murder case is likely unrelated to her. I believe my standpoint: There's a rat in The Family. Otherwise, why would Mr. Sunday arrange a private meeting with us? This isn't an interrogation, but a secret negotiation.
看着吧，以知更鸟的死为筹码，我会为自己赢回<color=#dbc291ff>自由和力量</color>。最后，我会颠覆这场美梦，创造<color=#dbc291ff>最盛大的死亡</color>。

We'll see. Using Robin's death as a bargaining chip, I'll win back my <color=#dbc291ff>freedom and power</color>. In the end, I'll ruin this beautiful dream and create <color=#dbc291ff>the grandest death</color>.
如果踏进这扇门就能迎来凯旋的机会，哪怕概率无限趋近于零，我也没有犹豫的理由，不是么？
If the chance of winning is just beyond this door, even if that chance is close to zero, well... you can't win if you don't play, right?
你凭什么觉得自己能赢，该死的赌徒？
Ah, the charming audacity! To think that you, of all people, might emerge victorious, dear gambler.
看来我布置的谜题对你还是太简单了，公司的使节。
It seems my puzzles are too effortless for you, IPC Ambassador.
承蒙谬赞，也感谢您花了这么多心思来欢迎我，星期日先生。只是这实在不像诚心邀约之人会做的事。
I appreciate your words, and I see you put a lot of effort into welcoming me, Mr. Sunday. However, this is no way to greet a guest.
所以这并非邀请，而是传唤，在谈话开始前，我需要对你的品性做些考验。
Well, this isn't an invitation, but a summoning. Before we speak, I need to test your character.
我猜，你身边这位博学的朋友帮了不少忙吧？
I imagine this knowledgeable doctor friend of yours has been of great help, yes?
当然，您应该比我更清楚这点——他已经忠实地履行了自己的职责，对吧？
Certainly, you ought to know this better than I do — he has already faithfully fulfilled his duties, hasn't he?
嗯，此前教授为你高贵的人格做了保证。他说你们二人的心地一样正直，是家族可以信赖的对象。
Yes, the doctor has assured me of your noble character. He considers you, like himself, a virtuous person who can be trusted by The Family.
我现在非常了解你的为人了，砂金先生。你勤勉、慷慨、乐于合作，又成功穿越重重阻碍来到我的面前——这令我有理由相信你的智慧与果敢。

I have come to know you very well as a person, Mr. Aventurine. You're diligent, generous, and willing to cooperate. The fact that you succeeded in overcoming many obstacles just to meet me gave me the reason to believe in your wisdom and courage.
但有一件事，我是要质问你的，那就是你的才智偏偏用错了地方，令你约见不该约见的人，出现在不该出现的场合…目睹了不应发生的{RUBY_B#知更鸟案}惨剧{RUBY_E#}。

But there's one thing I must ask you — that is, you've used your wisdom at the wrong place to meet the wrong person and put yourself in a situation where you shouldn't be... witnessing a {RUBY_B#Robin's Case}tragedy{RUBY_E#} that shouldn't have happened.
您的脸色看起来不太好啊。姑且确认一下，让您感到焦躁的是我吗？
You don't look too well. Am I making you anxious?
…如果不是，那我就是站在您这边的。
...If not, then it means I'm on your side.
如果我没理解错，你这番话…可是对*家族*提出了极其严重的指控。
If I wasn't mistaken, you'd just made a serious accusation against The Family.
您确实没理解错，因为邪恶正在您的身边悄然滋生。
You weren't mistaken, for depravity is creeping in around you.
我们不必遮遮掩掩，来谈谈您的妹妹吧。令妹的才能在演艺界无出其右，可您也知道，回到匹诺康尼后，她的声音就一直不太*谐调*。

There's no need for us to be evasive. Let's talk about your sister. Your sister's talent is unrivaled in the world of show business. As you know, her voice has been out of tune since she returned to Penacony. What's more disheartening, she {RUBY_B#Death}can't sing anymore{RUBY_E#}.
更可怕的是，她现在{RUBY_B#死}再也无法歌唱了{RUBY_E#}。谁做的？人们都觉得凶手在外来者中，但我知道…您心里另有答案。
Who could be responsible for this? Many suspect the culprit is among the outsiders, but I know... you hold a different opinion.
如今，您高贵的身份反成了镣铐，让您无法出手缉拿凶手，为令妹报仇雪恨。您孤立无援，才会感到焦躁不堪。
Now, your noble status has become a shackle, preventing you from apprehending the murderer and avenging your sister's death. You're feeling anxious because you're out on a limb.
但别担心，我是站在您这边的。
But don't worry. I am on your side.
砂金先生如此为我着想，是我莫大的荣幸——那么你这样无私慷慨的人，应该不会要求回报吧？
I'm immensely honored by your concern for me, Mr. Aventurine — since you're so selfless and generous, I believe you wouldn't ask for anything in return, would you?
当然，您不会因此损失什么，我只想取回本属于自己的东西：人身自由，还有家族保管下的随身物品——那袋礼金，还有……
Naturally, you wouldn't incur any loss from this. I just want to reclaim what is mine: My liberty, and the personal items under The Family's custody — the bag of gift money, and...
The box in which the Cornerstone is stored.
「基石」——我听闻那是战略投资部的宝贵资产，封存「存护」令使大权的圣石，列位{RUBY_B#石心十人}清算专家{RUBY_E#}各自持有一枚。

Cornerstone — I've heard it's a treasured asset of the Strategic Investment Department, a sacred stone that seals the "Preservation" Emanator, granting significant power, and every {RUBY_B#Ten Stonehearts}Liquidation Specialist{RUBY_E#} holds one.
…如此贵重的物品，恐怕只比其他回报更为昂贵。
...For an object so precious, it probably comes at an even higher price than other forms of recompense.
但您也知道，若想真相水落石出，一点高昂的风险是必须的。
I'm sure you're aware of the high level of risk I'll be undertaking to bring the truth to light.
砂金先生，出门在外，你会时刻关注自己的仪容么？领带应在正中线上，衬衣不得从马甲中露出，裤线必须笔直，且始终对齐鞋头的朝向。

Mr. Aventurine, when you're out and about, do you always make adjustments to your appearance? Your tie should be on the center line, your shirt must not protrude from your vest, your trouser creases should be perfectly straight, and always aligned with the tips of your shoes.
但我不会，因为这不*得体*——你应当在出门前就确保一切井然有序，绝不偏移。
But I don't, because it's not appropriate to do so in public — you should make sure everything is presentable and in order before leaving the house.
我从不承担任何风险。基石必须由家族来保管。
I'm not the kind that takes risks. The Cornerstone must be in the custody of The Family.
Please don't let me turn you down twice.
…行吧，只拿回礼金也可以，这你总该给我了。一个商人如果没有交易的筹码，恐怕寸步难行啊。
...Sure. The gift money is good enough. I suppose you wouldn't mind that? After all, a merchant can't function without a bargaining chip.
你的妥协比我预想中还要快些。可惜，比起商人…赌徒才更需要筹码。我可以给你礼金，但在这之前，我要你亲口告诉我——
You compromised quicker than I thought. Unfortunately, it's a gambler that needs a bargaining chip... not a merchant. I can give you your gift money, but before that, I want you to tell me —
——这个被你果断放弃的匣子里，究竟存放着什么？
— The fact that you can decisively forsake the box you asked for, what exactly is stored in it?
「三重面相的灵魂啊，请你用热铁烙他的舌和手心，使他不能编造谎话，立定假誓。」
"Oh, Triple-Faced Soul, please sear his tongue and palms with a hot iron, so that he will not be able to fabricate lies and make false vows."
「同谐」的光照下，一切罪恶无所遁形，我恳请祂降下光芒，并代祂向你提问。接下来…你有<unbreak>113</unbreak>秒的时间自证清白，得到我的信任。

Under the light of the Harmony, all wickedness is revealed. I implore THEM to shed THEIR light, and I'll ask you questions on THEIR behalf. Next... you have <unbreak>113</unbreak> seconds to prove your innocence and gain my trust.
And if I refuse to answer?
那就试试看——看「同谐」会不会拒绝你。
You can try — and we'll see if the Harmony rejects you.
很简洁的回答。你也明白言多必失的道理。
What a simple answer. You, too, understand that idle chatter leads only to poverty.
「你在入境时，是否将基石交予家族？」
"Did you hand over the Cornerstone to The Family when you entered Penacony?"
「你交予家族的基石是否属于你？」
"Does the Cornerstone you handed over to The Family belong to you?"
「此刻，你的基石是否就在这个房间里？」
"Is your Cornerstone in this room right now?"
「你的记忆是否没有遭到任何形式的篡改、删除，包括但不限于流光忆庭的技术。」
"Is your memory free from any kind of tampering or deletion, encompassing but not restricted to the techniques of the Garden of Recollection?"
「你是否来自茨冈尼亚的埃维金氏族？」
Yes. You even know about that?
「埃维金人是否没有任何读取、篡改、操纵自己或他人思想的能力？」
"Do the Avgins have any ability to read, tamper with, or manipulate one's own or another's mind?"
"Do you love your family more than yourself?"
「所有埃维金人都在一场屠杀中丧命了，是吗？」
"All the Avgins were killed in a massacre. Am I right?"
「你是氏族中唯一的幸存者吗？」
「——你憎恨，并想要亲手毁灭这个世界吗？」
"...Do you hate and wish to destroy this world with your own hands?"
有趣。那么最后一个问题……
「你是否能够立誓，此刻——『砂金石』正安然无恙地躺在这个匣子里？」
"Can you swear that at this very moment, the Aventurine stone is safe and sound in this box?"
看来我们能得出答案了。
Looks like we can get an answer.
打开它吧，砂金先生…这是你维护自己名誉的最后机会。
Open it, Mr. Aventurine... It's your last chance to defend your honor.
既然您如期赴约，博学的教授…这是否意味着，您愿意在这场闹剧中站在家族这边？
Since you came as promised, learned Doctor... Does this mean that you are willing to take the side of The Family in this farce?
是什么让你觉得自己可以拉拢我？
What makes you think you can convince me?
我已有所耳闻，您与砂金先生的相处并不愉快。我也知道您是一位真正的学者，对知识的追求大过其他一切。
I've heard you haven't enjoyed Mr. Aventurine's company. I also understand that you're an avid learner who sees the pursuit of knowledge above all.
那你应该也明白，一位合格的学者能认清自己的位置，不会为无聊的尊严丢失更重要的东西。
In that case, you ought to realize that a competent scholar knows their position and wouldn't forsake more vital matters for the sake of petty pride.
若您同意协助家族，我会把我们对星核的研究成果如数奉上。您应该很清楚，除了家族，没有任何派系愿意分享这样的知识。
If you agree to assist The Family, I'll share our research findings on the Stellaron. You must be quite aware that, besides The Family, no other faction is willing to share such information.
说说看吧，需要我做什么？
Cut to the chase. What do you need from me?
我需要砂金先生的全盘计划。
I need Mr. Aventurine's comprehensive plan.
你们不都把他的「基石」扣下了？拔光了毛的孔雀可飞不起来。
Haven't you confiscated his Cornerstone? You can't expect a featherless bird to take flight.
但我也听闻战略投资部的{RUBY_B#石心十人}十位精英{RUBY_E#}极为团结，在公司利益面前共同进退。
But I've also heard the {RUBY_B#Ten Stonehearts}ten elites{RUBY_E#} in the Strategic Investment Department have united, progressing together in the interests of the IPC.
你可以把话说的更明白些。
You'll have to speak more clearly than that.
砂金先生呈交的「基石」——当真属于他本人么？
The Cornerstone which Mr. Aventurine surrendered — was it really his?
你怀疑他会把别人的基石交给你？你把石心十人想的太团结了——那玩意可比他们的命重要得多。

You question whether he would entrust you with someone else's Cornerstone? The Ten Stonehearts aren't as united as you think — Cornerstones are significantly more precious to them than their very own lives.
但您也知道他是个疯狂的赌徒。愈是声势张扬，愈要细心提防。
But you know that he's a crazed gambler. The more vocal he is about it, the more cautious I must be.
我从没想过会有人和他思路一致。说真的，你最好去看看心理医生。
I never imagined someone would share his way of thinking. Honestly, you should see a shrink.
拿来吧。存放基石的匣子是特制的，除公司高层及相关人员外，没人能打开它——但我恰好位列其中。
Bring it. The box containing Cornerstone is unique, and only IPC senior staff and related members can access it — but I happen to be among them.
呵，金黄色的石头啊。它的色泽和克里珀圣体的光芒如出一辙。
Ha, the golden stone. Its color and glow are similar to that of Qlipoth's body.
这正是他准备用来欺瞒你的说辞。他不会告诉你：石心十人需以自身意志开凿基石，令其绽放独一无二的光辉。
This is the very ruse he intends to use to fool you. He won't reveal to you that the Ten Stonehearts chisel their own will into the Cornerstones, granting them an unparalleled radiance.
而这颗金黄色的石头属于{RUBY_B#「石心十人」成员}托帕{RUBY_E#}，它的别名是「黄玉」——不是「砂金」。
And this golden stone is also known as a topaz, not aventurine, and it belongs to {RUBY_B#One of the Ten Stonehearts}Topaz{RUBY_E#}.
So? Do you wish to confront him?
暂且不必。我现在更希望知道，属于他的那枚基石在哪。
Not at the moment. I'm more interested to know the location of his Cornerstone.
最安全的场所，你绝对想不到的地方。因为他根本就没打算藏起来——从最开始，那颗基石就已经在你的手里了。
The safest place, somewhere you'd never think of. Because he never intended to hide it — in fact, that Cornerstone has been in your hands from the very beginning.
原来如此，这行李袋…将比性命更珍贵的基石混在一堆低贱的珠宝里，伪装成礼金等待被扣押，倒确实符合那位{RUBY_B#赌徒}砂金先生{RUBY_E#}的风格。

I see, this bag... Mixing a Cornerstone, more precious than life itself, with a bunch of worthless jewels, disguised as a gift of money waiting to be confiscated, is indeed in line with {RUBY_B#Gambler}Mr. Aventurine{RUBY_E#}'s style.
然后再随便编个理由，避重就轻，找你把礼金要回来。这是场赌局，他可太熟悉了，赌的就是你一着不慎，满盘皆输。
Then he makes up some trivial excuse, downplaying the matter, and requests the gift money. This is a gamble, one he's all too familiar with, betting on your single misstep leading to a total loss.
博学的教授，感谢您的帮助。家族自会答谢义人。
Learned Doctor, I'm grateful for your help. The Family will surely reward a righteous person like you.
至于恶徒…愿他退后受辱。
As for the villain... I hope he retreats in humiliation.
多亏你有一位眼光独到的朋友，我才能为你的职业生涯添上一次彻底的失败。
It was all thanks to your friend with a keen eye that I could add a blot of utter failure to your storied career.
原形毕露了啊。顺便一提，你的生命*暂时*只剩下十七个系统时了。珍惜这段时间，好好回味失败的余韵吧。

Finally shown your true colors, heh. Oh, and just to remind you: You currently only have seventeen system hours left to live. Treasure your remaining time, and savor the delectable aftertaste of defeat.
...You might as well explain yourself a little more clearly.
我方才为你施行的，是「同谐」的圣洗。你本应在祂的光照下展现忠诚，却一意孤行，满口谎言，将洗礼变作了审判。我实在没有理由为你解开它。

What I performed on you just now was the Harmony's consecration. You were to show allegiance beneath the illumination of THEIR grace, yet you acted willfully, uttering nothing but falsehoods, transforming the consecration into a trial. I genuinely see no reason to absolve you from it.
这就是所谓的「同谐」？…建立在拘禁和逼迫之上？
Is this what the Harmony represents? Is it built upon constraint and coercion?
你误会了，砂金先生。刑罚是为亵慢之人准备的，但我看到了你坚韧不拔的内心，因此要赐你新生的可能。
You misunderstand, Mr. Aventurine. Punishment is meant for the irreverent, but I have seen your resilient spirit, and thus I offer you the possibility of a new beginning.
这十七个系统时里，你无法离开梦境，也无法与任何同伴往来。你只有两条路可走，这取决于约定的时限内，你能否完成我的考验。

Throughout these seventeen system hours, you will be unable to escape the Dreamscape or contact any of your companions. You only have two paths before you, and it all depends on whether you can complete my test within the time limit.
若成功，你便能融入谐乐，与万千家人同在；若失败，则将承受{RUBY_B#「同谐」的化身}「无限夫长」{RUBY_E#}的怒火，坠入万劫不复的深渊。所以我才特意强调了*暂时*二字。

Should you succeed, you will be able to coalesce into the Harmony and be with your Family. If you fail, you will suffer the wrath of the {RUBY_B#Embodiment of Harmony}Eternal Centurion{RUBY_E#} and fall into an abyss of doom.
…该死的，听起来我的下场横竖都一样啊。
Sounds like I'm going to end up the same either way.
我确实需要一位仆人，助我从外部找出家族中潜伏的*邪恶*。而我会自内向外肃清，在十七个系统时内将真凶捉拿归案。

I indeed do need a servant to help me uncover the evil hidden in The Family from an external perspective. I will purge the evil from the inside and bring the real culprits to justice within seventeen system hours.
等时候到了，就将你的发现同我核验。如果我们二人的判断一致，或者你能带给我更多…那祂便能将慈爱和诚实真正地施给你了。
When the time comes, compare your findings with mine. If both our findings align, or if you can provide me more insights... then THEY will truly be able to grant you mercy and honesty.
…无耻的伪君子，你没收了我所有的东西，还要我给你真相？这不公平，在你们这座充满铜臭味的游乐园里，没钱办不成任何事。
Shameless hypocrites... You took everything from me and still demand the truth? That isn't fair. Your carnival reeks with the stench of cash. Nothing is achievable without it!
这应当是你个人的义举，无需家族的援助。你的行李袋在那里，请便吧，相信你能用这袋低贱的珠宝换来一切。这是赌徒最擅长的事，不是么？

This is meant to be an act of personal virtue, not requiring The Family's support. Your bag is over there, do as you please. I believe you can trade this bag of worthless jewels for everything you need. That's what gamblers excel at, isn't it?
出发吧，砂金先生，你*自由*了。我会在这里等你报喜。
Off you go, Mr. Aventurine. You are free. I will wait here for your good news.
所以，这次会面不是审讯，但也根本不是什么谈判……
This meeting isn't an interrogation, or a negotiation...
…而是一场彻头彻尾的私刑，对吗？
怎么会，砂金先生，我真的只是想知道，一位*偶然*出现在她命案现场的*过客*能有什么*发现*，仅此而已。
Why would I do that, Mr. Aventurine? I'm just wondering what a passerby who stumbled upon a scene of murder could have found out, that's all.
对了，在你临走前，我还有个比较私人的问题。
By the way, before you go, I have a personal question.
…真的想要亲手毁灭这个世界吗？
...Do you truly wish to bring about the destruction of this world?
铭牌上写着：<color=#dbc291ff>格列佛拱门</color>。这么个小玩意儿你都能记得一清二楚？这东西的外观让我想起一种通过就能使人缩小的隧……

The nameplate reads: <color=#dbc291ff>Gulliver's Arch</color>. I'm amazed you can remember something this tiny. You know, this reminds me of a tunnel I once saw that could shrink people who passed through it.
如果我是你，就会立刻闭嘴。不该说的话少说。
If I were you, I would shut my mouth. It's wise to remain silent when you should.
还真是这样。这些模型连内部构造都和真实建筑一模一样，区别只是没人居住。
So I was right. These models have interiors that look exactly like the real buildings. The only difference is that no one lives in them.
星期日把这么个微缩模型摆在每天起床就能看见的地方，他真把自己当成匹诺康尼的*巨人*了？
Funny that Sunday puts a miniature that makes him seem like a giant by comparison right where he can see it first thing in the morning. Insecure much?
没有那个<color=#dbc291ff>弹珠机</color>模型——我们都得交待在这儿——！
Without that <color=#dbc291ff>Pinball machine</color>, neither one of us is going anywhere anytime soon.
匹诺康尼也不都是坏事，对吧？我会把这段有趣经历当作牌桌上的谈资的。
Penacony isn't all bad, right? I'll use this interesting experience as a talking point at the poker table.
喏，我就说——穷举也能解决问题。
Look, like I said — brute force can also solve things.
「庸众院」真该给你留一席，全宇宙没人比你更配得上这个名字。
The Council of Mundanites should consider you as their member, for no one in this universe is more suitable to be there than you.
用穷举法解题并不能证明你有多高明。<color=#dbc291ff>侧面的房间</color>，别让我强调第二次。
Solving a problem by brute force doesn't prove your intelligence. <color=#dbc291ff>The side room</color> — don't let me repeat myself.
哟，好大的沙盘…等存够钱，我也想给自己盖栋这么高的楼。
Wow, that's an enormous sandpit... I'd love to build a tall building for myself once I have enough savings.
四下搜查一遍，只要看见，我就能认出来。
Let's look around. When I see it, I will know it.
好，好，我怎么感觉咱们这是在攻读入室盗窃学的学位呢？
Fine, fine. Why do I feel that we're pursuing a degree in burglary now?
咱们还是找找开门的办法吧。
Let's find a way to open the door.
什么情况，家族的玩具都会碰瓷？我可什么都没做啊，教授，你要为我作证。
What's up with that? Now The Family's toys are trying to frame me? I didn't do a thing to it, Doc. You've gotta be my witness.
还有一枚碎片飞到楼上去了，得通过<color=#dbc291ff>弹珠机</color>蹦到那里。但多半没这么容易。
One of the fragments flew upstairs. I'll need to use the <color=#dbc291ff>pinball machine</color> to flick myself up there, but it's tough.
就是它了…愉快的独处时光总是转瞬即逝。
That's it... Pleasant moments of solitude are always fleeting.
拉帝奥，你真该进来看看，太壮观了，我敢说你轻轻一捏就能把我弄死。
Ratio, you should come in and take a look. The view here is breathtaking. Honestly, you could easily squash me with just a pinch.
只要本人同意，我立即执行。
If that is your wish, I will do so without a moment's hesitation.
愉快的玩具城之旅结束了，还有点舍不得呢。
And the joyous tour of Toy City has come to an end. It makes me feel sad.
鸢尾花家系的档案中…似乎找不到这位艺者的信息，您提供的照片也无法匹配……
I can't seem to find any information on this artist in the Iris Family archives. The photo you provided also doesn't show any matches...
…这也在意料中。我想再请教下，人们入梦时通常会留下什么痕迹么？
...Just as I thought. I'd like to ask, what kind of traces do people leave when they enter a dream?
您是指入梦池的记录么？设备会实时监测心率、血氧含量、体温这些生理指标，并列入统计，交由家族筛查其中的异常数据，一旦发现非法行为，就要立即采取措施。

Are you referring to the records when you enter the Dreampool? The equipment will monitor physiological indicators such as heart rate, blood oxygen levels, and body temperature in real time. This data will be included in statistics and handed over to The Family for the screening of any data anomalies. Immediate action will be taken once any illegal behavior is detected.
Is it possible to access these records?
感觉一举一动都在被监视…
Feels like our every move is being watched...
请放心。监控各位的生命体征是为了在紧急情况下进行强制唤醒，一切出发点都是客人们的安全。
Please rest assured. Your vitals are monitored in case of emergencies, allowing us to wake you if necessary. This is all for the safety of our guests.
能麻烦您调取这些记录吗？
Can I trouble you to access the records?
抱歉…酒店没有这个权限。这些信息由猎犬家系统一管理，只有出现具体问题时，才会转到这边。
I apologize... The hotel does not have access. This information is managed by the Bloodhound Family. We can only gain access if there's a problem.
看来这里是查不出什么了。
Looks like nothing can be found here.
至少我们知道了下一步该找谁，顺便可以向猎犬家系打听下案情。
At least we know who to look for next. We can ask the Bloodhound Family for information.
感谢您的协助，艾丽小姐。对了…知更鸟小姐还好吧？我们都很期待她的表演。
Thank you for your assistance, Miss Alley. By the way... is Miss Robin doing fine? We are looking forward to her performance.
「还好」…是什么意思？知更鸟小姐怎么了吗，谐乐大典的筹备工作一直在有序进行，应该挺好的吧，相信她能为各位带来最精彩的演出。

"Fine"... What does that mean? Is there something wrong with Miss Robin? The preparations for the Charmony Festival have been proceeding smoothly, so I guess things are pretty good. I believe she will be able to put on a spectacular show for all of you.
果然没人知道知更鸟的事，倒不意外。
Sure enough, no one knows about Miss Robin. I'm not surprised.
但那位流萤小姐也真是神秘，酒店系统中竟然找不到任何有关她的信息。就算是偷渡犯…入境后也该有个伪装的身份吧。
But that Miss Firefly is truly mysterious. There's no information on her in the hotel system. Even if she's a stowaway... she should have a disguised identity after entering the planet.
再加上她同为遗产争夺战的参与者…要如何在神不知鬼不觉的情况下潜入梦境？
She's also in the running for the Legacy... How is she going to sneak into the Dreamscape unnoticed?
除了酒店客房的入梦池，还有其他入梦方法么？
Is there any other way to enter a dream besides the hotel room's Dreampool?
忆者拥有常人难以理解的能力，在匹诺康尼的忆域中可谓如鱼得水，黑天鹅已经向我们证明了这点。
The Memokeepers have abilities that are difficult for normal people to comprehend. In the Memory Zone of Penacony, they thrive effortlessly, a fact proven to us by Black Swan.
而星核猎手的骇客小姑娘用非常手段解开了梦境酒店的封锁，且根据{NICKNAME}看到的现场，流萤小姐一案背后是他们在推动。

The hacker girl from the Stellaron Hunters used extraordinary means to unlock the dreamscape Hotel's seal. According to the scene witnessed by {NICKNAME}, it is likely that they are behind Miss Firefly's case.
流光忆庭…还有星核猎手，确实都有可能呢…那公司呢？他们想得到匹诺康尼，肯定也会有所准备吧。
The Garden of Recollection... and the Stellaron Hunters, both are possible. But what about the IPC? Since they want Penacony all for themselves, they're bound to have a plan.
布拉沃工作小组已抵达指定位置，准备执行武装疏散作业——小的们，都给我动起来！
The Bravo team has arrived at their designated position. Ready to execute armed evacuation operation — boys, get moving!
武、武装疏散？老大，你是不是喝醉了……
Ar—armed evacuation? Boss, are you drunk?
你懂个屁，这样效率才高，别让总监发现就行了！先斩后奏，懂不懂？
What do you know!? It's more efficient this way. Just don't let the director find out! Act first, report later, understood?
救、救命…我的年终奖金都在那颗雪球上交代完了…我可不想自己的名字上部门的重大违纪通告啊！
Help... Help me... I spent all my year-end bonus on the snowball... I don't want my name on the department's major disciplinary notice!
喂，{NICKNAME}，你看！这声音…是贝洛伯格那帮公司员工？
Hey, {NICKNAME}, check it out! That voice... Could it be the IPC Workers from Belobog?
敬告各位住客：星际和平公司将在酒店开展特殊工作，请跟随负责疏散的员工前往指定安全区域，否则将被采取强制措施！
To all guests: The IPC will be conducting special operations within the hotel. Please follow the staff in charge of evacuation to the designated safe zones, or compulsory measures will be enforced!
——请你个大头鬼！这群记吃不记打的家伙，都说了工作时间不要乱喝东西！
I'll request a beating for you lot! You've been told not to drink during work hours!
你们几个，赶紧把他拖下去，送回客房——
Take him back to the hotel room!
——晚点我拉个会议，好好复盘下事故报告该怎么写！
...I'll organize a meeting later to properly go over how this incident report should be written!
(Those two people look a little familiar...)
真是戒备森严…想必他们也在为案件发愁吧。
Such tight security... I bet they're stumped by the case as well.
加拉赫…加拉赫…他会在哪儿呢？
Gallagher... Gallagher... Where could he be?
…托帕小姐！没想到会在匹诺康尼遇见你。
...Miss Topaz! I never thought I'd run into you on Penacony.
好久不见，星穹列车的各位，你们的事我从砂金那里都听说啦…嗯？
Long time no see, Astral Express crew. Aventurine has told me a lot about your happenings... Hmm?
…没关系，就按他们要求的做，尽量避免和家族起冲突…采取任何行动前先和我汇报。嗯。嗯，好。
...It's fine. Do as they ask, and try to avoid any conflicts with The Family... Report to me before taking any action. Mhm. Yes, alright.
唉…如你们所见，公司在匹诺康尼可是不太受欢迎。家族的地主之谊也只是表面客气，曾经的边陲监狱，如今要反过来给公司职员戴上镣铐啦。
...As you see — the IPC isn't very popular here on Penacony. Cordiality from The Family is a mere facade. The former frontier prison has turned around and cuffed its shackles on the IPC staff now.
也只有带着「邀请函」的砂金被允许参加盛会，我们这些随行人员…连入梦资格都没有，只能在现实酒店停留。
Only Aventurine, who carries an invitation is allowed to attend the banquet. An entourage like us... We can only sit around in the reality Hotel, unauthorized to even enter dreams.
难怪砂金到处找人合作，原来他在梦境里得不到公司的援助。
No wonder Aventurine's scrambling to partner up with someone — the IPC can't back him up in the Dreamscape.
听说他处境不太乐观，你们在帮忙调查一些…对家族不利的事，对吧？在梦境外边，有什么需要随时和我说，公司向来不会亏待合作伙伴。

His situation isn't optimistic, I hear. You're all helping to investigate some... dirt on The Family, are you not? Let me know if you need anything outside the Dreamscape. The IPC always treats its partners well.
谢谢你，托帕小姐。我们正要找猎犬们打听案情，也许你已经和他们打过交道了？
Thank you, Miss Topaz. We're on our way to the Hounds to verify some intel. Perhaps you've had dealings with them?
喏，就在后边跟着呢，找他们就行——正好，帮我转移下视线，一直被人盯着太难受啦。
Yep, they're tailing us right now. Why not go and talk to them... it'll take the spotlight off me, being constantly stared at is really uncomfortable.
和砂金做生意的感觉怎么样，一定不太习惯吧？
How does it feel to be in business with Aventurine? I bet you're not used to it.
那人的风格就这样，「所有，或者一无所有」是他的老口头禅了。他总是一边套近乎，一边推着客户陪他铤而走险…人各有志，我不多评价。

That's just his style. "All or nothing" is his mantra. He's always cozying up to his clients while egging them on to undertake some dangerous assignment with him... But everyone has their merits, so I won't comment further.
不过砂金的运气确实很好，经手的案子大多圆满落幕，基本没赌输过。所以在收复匹诺康尼这件事上…我也拭目以待。

But Aventurine's luck has always been good. He's always closed all his cases without a hitch, and basically never lost a gamble. Which is why on the issue of retaking Penacony I'm watching with keen interest.
It works only when all parties' interests are aligned.
当然。交易嘛，重要的是你坐在桌子哪边。
Of course. It's business, after all. What's important is where you're seated at the table.
至于两起案件…抱歉，我手上的信息也不多。详情只能拜托各位继续调查了。
As for the two cases... Apologies, but I don't have much info on them either. All I can do is ask you to keep digging for more details.
拜托各位继续调查案情了，我在现实中等待你们的好消息。
Please continue to investigate the case. All I can do is sit tight in the real world. I look forward to hearing your progress.
我们在执行长官的命令！你、你有什么事！
We're carrying out our Captain's orders! Wh—What do you want!
我们之前犯了错，正在努力将功补过，没空管别的！监视公司高管托帕，确保她在匹诺康尼期间始终待在白日梦酒店——这次没找错人！

We made a mistake last time, and we're working hard to rectify it now. We don't have time for anything else! Surveilling the IPC Executive Topaz, ensuring that she stays put at The Reverie hotel during her time on Penacony... We've got the right one this time!
（…原来如此，是当时追捕流萤的那两个人啊。）
(...So that's it, they were the pair who were after Firefly at the time.)
怎、怎么又是你…又想来找茬？这次我们可不怕你！
I—It's you again... Back for more trouble? We're not afraid of you this time!
有话快说，没事就别来妨碍我们！
Well? Spit it out! Stop bothering us if you've nothing important!
原来你们认识…{NICKNAME}，你怎么到哪都能遇见揍过的人啊？
So you know each other... {NICKNAME}, why do you keep running into people you've beaten up before?
我找你们长官有事，他在哪里？
I've got business with your Captain. Where is he?
没错，我们正在为家族调查凶案呢。可以找你们的长官聊聊案情吗？
That's right. We're investigating a murder for The Family. Can we speak to your Captain about the case?
我想请你们调些记录，办案用。
I need you to pull some records for me. It's for official business.
没错，我们正在为家族调查凶案呢。可以请你们调取酒店入梦池的记录看看吗？
That's right. We're investigating a murder for The Family. May we access the hotel's Dreampool entry records?
When's our lunch break? Mmm... Hungwy.
哎呀…你怎么老喜欢问这个？我们正在为家族调查凶案呢。可以找你们的长官聊聊案情吗？
Sheesh, why do you keep asking me that? We're in the middle of investigating a murder case for The Family. May we speak to your Captain about it?
…喂！治安官交代过，他从筑梦边境回来前，不准透露任何消息！
...Hey! The Security Officer instructed everyone to shut their traps before he returned from Dream's Edge!
什、什么凶案？你们可别乱说。
Wh—What murder? You'd better stop spouting nonsense.
对、对！我们无可奉告，请回吧！
Th—That's right! We have nothing to report. Please leave!
看来是不愿配合啊。不过，他们直接把长官在筑梦边境的事交代了……
Looks like they're not going to cooperate. But, they did at least tell us that the Captain is at Dream's Edge...
那我们直接去找那位治安官不就好了…应该就是{NICKNAME}提到的加拉赫吧？
Why don't we just look for the Security Officer then... It's probably Gallagher, the one {NICKNAME} mentioned, right?
我、我们无可奉告，请回吧。
W—We have nothing to report. Please leave.
有原则的猎犬家系成员
两位，劳驾。猎犬家系正在前方调查，闲人免进。
Apologies. The Bloodhound Family is running an investigation up ahead. No unauthorized personnel allowed.
有原则的猎犬家系成员
…等等，我好像见过你，灰头发的。
...Hold on a minute. I think I've seen you before, the gray-haired one.
…你在匹诺康尼到底惹了多少麻烦？
...How much trouble have you stirred up exactly on Penacony?
This ain't it, chief. You've got the wrong {F#gal}{M#guy}.
有原则的猎犬家系成员
我没认错！上次就是你，一边喊着友情努力钟表把戏，一边和那个银发小姑娘一起把我胖揍了一顿！
