"As per Strategic Investment Department head Diamond's sentiments, the IPC has appropriately relocated the suspect in the spirit of the Charter, and will continue to conduct further investigations as to the motive of the suspect..."
真是双漂亮的眼睛。告诉我，它们会在夜里发光吗？
What pretty eyes. Tell me, do they shine in the dark?
如果可以，我一定会把它们卖掉的。
Well if they did, I'd sell them in a heartbeat.
你不知道有多少人盼着你永远闭上眼睛。身为奴隶，你不该反抗主人的…可你却把那个男人干掉了。
You don't know how many people long for your eyes to be closed forever. As a servant, you should not resist your master... Yet you went and killed that man anyway.
没有律师敢为你辩护，或许你该试着替自己争取一下无罪声明？
No lawyer has the audacity to defend you, perhaps you ought to represent yourself?
对口才很自信嘛。在欺骗博识学会时，你也是这么想的？
You're pretty confident on your eloquence. Did you also think that when you lied to the Intelligentsia Guild?
求仁得仁罢了。你们想要完美的筑材，我只是给了一种可能性，一场小小的赌局。
Ask and you shall receive. You wanted the perfect construction material — all I did was offer a possibility. It was just a small wager.
如果运气好，公司能从艾吉哈佐的黄沙里淘出任何东西，甚至{RUBY_B#塔伊兹育罗斯}「沙王」{RUBY_E#}的残骸。可惜，你们运气不行。
If your luck holds out, the IPC will dig something up from the golden sands of Egyhazo, maybe even the {RUBY_B#Tayzzyronth}Sand King's{RUBY_E#} remains. Pity, your luck has run out.
这点我不否认。但我好奇的是，为何一场如此兴师动众的骗局，到头来却没有一个人从中获利——包括犯人自己？
I'll admit that. What I'm more curious about though, is why such a grand scheme failed to benefit anyone in the end, including the perpetrator himself?
女士，我已得到了想要的——被带到你的面前，开启下一场豪赌。
Madam, I already have what I want — to be brought before you, for the next high-stakes gamble.
那就来谈谈这第二场豪赌吧。说说看，这回你打算押什么？
Then let's talk about the second gamble. Tell me, what are you prepared to wager this time?
押我的命。我赌你不会把我送上刑场。
My life. I bet you won't send me to the gallows.
Hmm... What do you want then?
我要你们的{RUBY_B#酋长}拉拿{RUBY_E#}来见我。我有话要说。
I want your {RUBY_B#Chief}Lanor{RUBY_E#} to meet with me. I have something to say.
It can't be that simple, can it?
就这么简单，三十枚{RUBY_B#赤铜币}塔安巴{RUBY_E#}，我半条命的价格，不多不少。
It is that simple. Thirty {RUBY_B#Red Copper Coins}Tanbas{RUBY_E#} — the remainder of my... market value. Thirty Tanbas, no more, no less.
只要有了这些钱，我就能爬到比你更高的位置，手握比你更多的财富…我赌你不敢给我，所以，叫他过来吧。
With this money, I'll climb to even greater heights than you, grasp even more riches than you... I wager you won't give me this chance... which is why you should call him here.
可惜「钻石」不会见你，谁也见不到他。所以此刻，我就是「钻石」的代理人，替他做出决定。
A pity Diamond won't see you. No one gets to see him. From here on out, I am Diamond's representative, and I will decide on his behalf.
你错了。三十枚塔安巴，我会给你，并且远比这更多。财富、地位、权力…公司会给你想要和不想要的一切。
You're wrong. Thirty Tanbas... I'll give you that, and much more than that. Wealth, status, power... the IPC will give you whatever you want, even what you don't want.
「卡卡瓦夏」…是个好名字，可惜注定要被埋进土里。但「你」值得活下来，为我们创造更多财富。
Kakavasha... A good name, but unfortunately destined to be buried in the dirt. You though, you deserve to live, to create even more wealth for us.
去吧，给自己挑身喜欢的衣服，再选个中意的身份…然后活用它们，孩子。
Go, pick the clothes you like, then choose your desired identity... and then use them well, child.
May your schemes be forever concealed.
生命就像一场漫长的投资，选择正确的人，做出正确的事，抵达正确的结果，向世界展示自己的价值。
Life is like a long-term investment. Those who choose correctly, do the correct things, reach the correct outcomes, show the world their value.
人不可能一辈子只做正确的决定，但好运总是站在我这边。我从未输过。
People can't always make the right choices in their lives, but luck has always been on my side. I've never lost.
是因为母神在保佑我吗？既然如此，此刻她也一定注视着我吧。我定然能获得成功。
Is it because Gaiathra blesses me? If that's the case, she must also be looking upon me right now. My success is inevitable.
倘若我成功度过这道难关，接下来又是什么？在一场盛大的赌局后等待着我的…是另一场更盛大的赌局吗？
Even if I overcome this difficult trial, what would come next? What awaits me after this glorious gamble... an even more glorious one?
是在一次又一次成功后，带着不可胜数的筹码满载而归，还是在一次失败后……
Will I return triumphant with unending riches after countless successes, or will I encounter failure...
I'm pretty sure you already have some ideas...
我是在做梦，还是彻底疯了？
Am I dreaming, or have I gone completely insane?
这就把我忘了？你被伊伊玛尼喀的军阀绑在电刑椅上的时候，是谁给你出的主意？
Forgotten me already? When you were strapped to that electric chair by Iymanikan warlords, who was it that gave you the idea?
行了…我可能疯，但不傻。从我脑袋里滚出去，「同谐」的新生儿。
Fine... I may be crazy, but I'm not stupid. Get out of my head, newborn of the Harmony.
呵，「同谐」？别傻了，我们又不是第一次见面，不用这么见外吧？
Heh, the Harmony? Don't play the fool — it's not the first time we've met. No need to be so polite.
我就是你，甚至比你更了解「自己」，更知道你到底想要什么。你快死了，死到临头还想拉几个倒霉蛋一起上路…所以你才会来这儿，不是么？

I'm you, and perhaps even more aware of yourself than you, of what exactly you want. You're dying, and you still want to drag a bunch of unfortunate fools with you through death's door... That's why you're here, isn't it?
…伟大的揭幕表演，你真觉得自己能做到吗？
...A grand unveiling. You really think you can pull it off?
也许你骗得了所有人，但唯独骗不了你自己。
Well you may have fooled everyone, but you can't fool yourself.
我可以证明给你看——在你彻底消失前，我会陪你最后走一段路……
I can show you — before you're entirely gone, I'll be with you for the last stretch of your road...
咱们就在路上好好说道说道。
Let's have a heart-to-heart while we walk.
…该死的，你到底是什么鬼东西？
这世上的大部分人，终其一生只为抵达一种结果…而我就是那个结果。
Most people in this world spend their entire lives just to reach one outcome... and I am that outcome.
记得「黄金的时刻」是不允许未成年人进入的…喂，你怎么一个人在这？
I thought minors weren't allowed in Golden Hour... Hey kid, are you okay? Are you lost—
怎么了，先生…你看起来不太舒服？
What's wrong, Mister... You don't look well.
它们很漂亮，对吧？姐姐说，那是{RUBY_B#地母神}「芬戈妈妈」{RUBY_E#}的礼物。彩色的眸子能给人带来好运。
They're pretty, aren't they? Sis said they're a gift from {RUBY_B#Gaiathra}Mama Fenge{RUBY_E#}. Colorful eyes are said to bring good luck.
啊，先生…你也有双漂亮的眼睛。真好看！
Ah, Mister... You have pretty eyes too. Beautiful!
你…就一个人吗？你的父母呢？
Are... you alone? Where are your parents?
他们都在这座游乐园里，爸爸妈妈先进去了。我正要去找他们。
They're in that amusement park. Papa and Mama went in first. I'm just about to go look for them.
所以我得走啦，再见，先生。祝你也能玩得开心！
I have to go, goodbye Mister. Hope you have a good time too!
深不见底，就和匹诺康尼一样，对吧？
Only on Penacony, am I right?
What are you still doing here?
你早就清楚，如果家族真对每一位前来求援的家人都投以宽容，又何必这样高垒深堑？
You've known all along, if The Family truly showed leniency to everyone who came seeking help, why would there be a need for such high walls and deep moats?
但人们不这么想，毕竟美梦糖浆的味道实在诱人。你在匹诺康尼孤立无援，只能凭一己之力扳倒高墙…怎么可能？

However, people don't see it like that, especially since the flavor of the dream syrup is so alluring. You will receive no charity on Penacony, and relying on your own strength alone to topple high walls...? Not a likely feat.
所以一踏进酒店，你就摘下高高的帽子，开始四处求人，像极了一条在沙漠里捡食的鬣狗。因为你知道，机会稍纵即逝。

Which is why once you step into the hotel, you remove your high hat and beg everyone you come across for help, like a hyena scavenging for scraps in the desert. Because you know that opportunities are fleeting.
跟你的说法相比，拉帝奥的「阿蒂尼孔雀」都显得动听极了。
When you put it like that, even Ratio's "Attini Peacock" analogy sounds pleasant.
你知道我很少说真心话，劝你把它听进去。
You know how rare it is for me to give you the straight dope, so listen while you can.
正好，你提到了那位教授——我特别喜欢你和他的共同点，阴谋和算计…尤其是结局的那部分，一场华丽的背叛！

It's good timing that you mentioned the doctor. I'm especially fond of what you and he have in common, the conspiracies... calculations... especially the part about the finale, a magnificent act of betrayal!
…当所有人都这么以为的时候，谁又会去怀疑，那是你精心设下的又一场圈套呢？
...When everyone thinks this way, who would even suspect that it was another trap you've meticulously devised?
我说对了么？你就是这样的人，谨小慎微又妄自菲薄，赢了这么多，却还是比谁都怕输。
Go on. Tell me I'm right. You know who you really are, Mr. Cavalier Gambler: Uptight, overcautious, massive inferiority complex. You've won so much, and you're still SO afraid of losing.
人们只看见你在牌局上一掷千金，却不知道在牌桌下还有另一只手，握紧筹码，颤抖不已……
They only see your big bets, your bravado, the full house, the straight flush. They don't know the other hand is below the table, clutching your chips for dear life.
厉害啊，难怪酒馆会给你发邀请。你天生就是个好演员…不光擅长骗别人，更擅长骗自己。
It's a heck of an act. No wonder the tavern sent you an invite. You're a natural, kid. You don't stop at fooling the audience — you fool yourself too.
要想让自己不在人面前露馅，最高明的办法就是先骗过自己。
The best way to prevent others from seeing your true colors, is first being able to fool yourself.
哈哈，当然，我太了解你了…不过，真奇怪，为什么你拒绝了那份邀请？明明你有过拥抱「欢愉」的机会，那不是你最想要的吗？可你还是选择了公司的牌桌……

Haha, of course, I know you all too well... But, it's strange — why did you decline that invitation? You had the chance to embrace Elation. Was that not what you most wanted? But you chose the IPC instead...
为了「存护」？哼，我看不像。你和「存护」有半点关系吗？
For the Preservation? Hmph, I doubt it. Do you even have anything in common with the Preservation?
我以为你知道呢…你不是很懂我么？
I thought you knew... Didn't you say you had me pegged?
行了，要么现在闭上嘴，要么赶紧从我眼前消失。
We're done. Either stop talking, or disappear from my sight.
没问题。不过，即将在这里消失的——到底是谁呢？
That's fine. But, who exactly is about to disappear here?
啊——要玩捉迷藏吗？我最擅长这个了——
Ahh, playing hide-and-seek? I'm really good at this!
捉迷藏…真是甜美的童年回忆。
和妈妈告别的那天，有多少卡提卡人在屁股后边像豺狼一样追着你们？
When Mama said goodbye that day, how many Katicans were like jackals hot on your heels?
我打赌你肯定忘不了他们尖利的笑声。为了让自己从那帮野蛮人的鼻子底下消失，你和姐姐只能在血水里打滚，毁了爸爸留下的唯一一件衣服……

I know you won't forget that sound anytime soon, those shrill cackles? You had to hide right under the noses of those savages, you and Big Sis, playing dead, drifting in all that bloody water. Completely ruined that shirt. Shame. Wasn't that the last one Dad left behind?
它没有被毁掉，我一直保存着。
It wasn't ruined. I've always kept it.
那只是块破布，你再也穿不上了。
Come on. It's a rag. It's not like you can ever wear it.
现在你也不用躲躲藏藏了，甚至还有心情嫌弃自己娇贵的行头被雨水打湿…到底是身份变了啊。
Now you don't have to hide. You probably won't even deign to get your pretty outfit wet in the rain... Your social capital has changed, after all.
不，你变了…你现在变成追人的那个了。最后一次捉迷藏…好好享受吧。
On the contrary, now you're the one who does the hunting. The last round of hide and seek, and you get to be it. You should enjoy it.
A <color=#dbc291ff>topaz</color>? What is this doing here...
怎么，她的基石就这么让你撕心裂肺？
What, does her cornerstone wrench at your heart so?
…我只是好奇它为什么在这里罢了。
...I was merely curious why it was here.
兴许是那个翅膀头为了嘲讽你才故意放这的。好让你明白，你费劲布置的魔术大秀不过是垂死挣扎。
Maybe that winged guy put it here to taunt you. Just to make you realize that your painstakingly arranged magic show is nothing but a death rattle.
「基石的色泽和克里珀圣体的光芒如出一辙」…亏你能编出这种荒唐的借口。但凡他多长个心眼，你的谎言便一触即溃。

"The cornerstone's hue is the same as the radiance of Qlipoth's body"... I've got to give it to you, I've heard a lot of baloney, but that lie deserves a prize for sheer nerve. If he were just a little bit smarter, the jig would've been up right there.
当然！所以你才会把拉帝奥的「背叛」也列为计划中关键的一环。不得不说，那位教授的演技十分逼真。
Of course! That's why Ratio's betrayal was one of the keys to your plan. I have to say, that doctor's acting was superb.
也许他根本没有在演呢？
Or maybe he wasn't acting at all?
哈，那岂不是更正中你的下怀？
那位一丝不苟的{RUBY_B#星期日}橡木家主{RUBY_E#}有着近乎偏执的控制欲，你必须让他掌握足够多的信息，又不能让他察觉到破绽……
Sunday didn't become head of the Oak Family by acting sloppy. He's obsessed with control. You have to give him enough detail to satisfy his meticulous nature, but not so much that he gets suspicious.
…所以你让拉帝奥找到他，故意把计划泄露出去。为了不让对方起疑，你向拉帝奥交代的内容全都是真实的，他也如实转告了星期日。

...Which is why you had Ratio seek him out and leak the plan on purpose — to prevent the other party from suspecting anything. The intel you gave to Ratio was all true, and he spoke the same to Sunday.
最后，这位家主通过你布下的{RUBY_B#托帕石}「诱饵」{RUBY_E#}，如愿以偿找到了另一块基石，如此一来——
Finally, Sunday took {RUBY_B#topaz}the bait{RUBY_E#}, found the other cornerstone, and before you know it...
——你才能将{RUBY_B#砂金石}第三块石头{RUBY_E#}瞒天过海。
...Everyone's distracted enough for you to steal {RUBY_B#aventurine}the third stone{RUBY_E#}, right out from under them.
...Why don't you stop rummaging through my mind.
你的脑子？是我们的脑子。你就是我，我就是你，不分彼此。
Your mind? It's our mind. You're me, and I'm you. We're the same.
「要想让自己不在人前露馅，最高明的办法就是先骗过自己」…要我说，你根本骗不了自己。这次能得手算你走运。
"The best way to prevent others from seeing your true colors, is to first be able to fool yourself"... Really? You can't even fool yourself. You just got lucky this time.
这是星期日手里的另一块基石。相当漂亮的绿色，就像你一样，圆滑、狡诈……
This is the other cornerstone in Sunday's hands. A rather beautiful green, just like you, smooth and cunning...
Why are you even asking me?
哼…那我就亲自让你回忆一下。「砂金」是幸运与诡计之石…你拿到这块石头的时候，她是这么说的，对吧？
Ugh, must I do all the work? Aventurine is the stone of luck and trickery... That's what she said when you received the stone, wasn't it?
这种石头并不珍稀，但色泽却与某种宝石十分接近，因而常被用作后者的{RUBY_B#伪装}替代{RUBY_E#}。而那种更昂贵的宝石……
This type of stone isn't rare, but its hue is very similar to a certain gem. In fact, it's often used as {RUBY_B#counterfeit}a substitute{RUBY_E#}. And that more precious gem is...
就连那位星期日也没能分辨出来，看来翡翠也并非不能替代砂金。
Even Sunday can't tell the difference. It looks like jade can be substituted for aventurine, too. Sauce for the goose...
砂金、托帕、翡翠…三位{RUBY_B#石心十人}精英{RUBY_E#}，三块基石，为了小小的匹诺康尼，不惜押上自己的全部。你们比家族还团结一心啊。
Aventurine, Topaz, Jade... Three {RUBY_B#Ten Stonehearts}elites{RUBY_E#}, three cornerstones who, for a measly Penacony, offered their everything. You're even more united than The Family.
我早说过，三枚「筹码」足矣——所有，或者一无所有。
As I said before, three chips are sufficient — all, or nothing.
究竟是前者还是后者？哈，我们很快就能见真章了。
But will it be the former, or the latter? Hah, we'll find out soon enough.
所以，真正的「砂金石」呢？拿出来看看吧。
So, where's the real aventurine stone? Take it out. Let's have a look.
呵，你又不知道它在哪儿了？
Heh, suddenly you don't know where it is?
我只是要你亲口说出来…毕竟它如今的样子真的和主人很相称。
I just want to hear you say it... After all, it really does resemble its owner.
…那我就如你所愿。*它们*一直待在最适合的地方，从未离开……
...As you wish then. They never went anywhere. They're right where they belong...
Piled up with these cheap baubles.
你在出发前，就把「砂金石」砸碎了……
You smashed the aventurine stone before you left...?
…看它的样子，啧啧，多像你支离破碎的人生啊。再怎么披着光鲜亮丽的外表，里头依旧是颗卑微的小石子…这玩意可比你的命重要得多。
...Just look at it, tsk. Shattered, just like your life. Poor thing. A humble pebble coated in the most lustrous sheen. I take it back, this thing is far more precious than your life.
这么做的下场你再清楚不过，亵渎{RUBY_B#基石}克里珀圣体{RUBY_E#}之人，你觉得公司会放过你？
You're absolutely clear about the consequences of doing this? Blasphemy against {RUBY_B#Cornerstone}Qlipoth's body{RUBY_E#}. You think the IPC will let you get off scot-free?
「钻石」向来看重结果。只要我能创造的价值远高于成本…过程和手段就不是问题。
Diamond has always been all about results. As long as I can create value far beyond the cost, the ends justify the means.
不付出一点代价，怎么能骗过家族？没关系，「存护」的基石就算裂成碎片也能发挥作用，尽管效用会大打折扣，但对我来说…足够了。

How else would The Family be fooled if there was no price to pay? It doesn't matter — even smashed to smithereens, the Preservation's cornerstone can still be used. Its effect may be greatly diminished, but... it's enough for me.
我真的有点好奇了。为什么你迈出的每一步都在铤而走险，为自己准备的选项永远伴随强烈的自毁冲动？
Now I'm really curious. Why does every step you take involve reckless risks, and the choices you prepare for yourself always come with a strong impulse for self-destruction?
难道你真的相信「风险越大，回报越高」？看不出你对公司如此忠诚啊。
Do you truly believe that the greater the risk, the greater the rewards? I wouldn't have guessed you'd be so loyal to the IPC.
哼，你看不出的事情多了去了…所以你也看不出我要如何赢得一切。
Hmph, there is so much you don't see... Which is also why you'll never see how I'll win it all.
That is, if you can do what it takes.
...We'll just have to wait and see then.
你好，我们又见面了，眼睛很漂亮的先生。
Hello, we meet again, Mr. Pretty-eyes.
…是啊，又见面了。你找到爸爸妈妈了么？
...Yes, we meet again. Did you find your mother and father?
当然，姐姐也在，我们四个人刚玩过捉迷藏。
Of course, Big Sis is there too. The four of us were just playing hide-and-seek.
真开心呀，来这儿的路上，爸爸还带我见识了*蕉皮电影*。
I'm so happy! On our way here, Papa even brought me to see a flim.
对，就是这个。把很多很多纸版画放在一起，就变成了会动的壁画。
Yes, that's it. Putting many drawings together and turning them into a moving wall painting.
把我和爸爸，妈妈，还有姐姐放在一起，就变成了一家人。
They put me, Papa, Mama and Big Sis together, turning us into one big family.
你也来试试吧，先生！看你一直愁眉苦脸的，在游乐园要开心点呀。
You should give it a try too, Mister! You look sad. The amusement park will cheer you up.
Go give it a try, Mister!
How's that? Not a bad score, eh?
你确实勾起了我的兴趣…我承认你身上还有些我不完全了解的地方。
You've piqued my interest... I'll admit that there are still aspects of you that I don't completely understand.
You sound sincere this time, at least.
真诚是我为数不多的宝贵品质，不用特意强调。看见那片迷宫了么？在你走出那里前，我就能彻底了解你了。
Sincerity is one of my traits that everybody likes. And I have precious few of those. Moving on! See that maze over there? I'll know everything about you before you reach the exit.
我们的影城之旅尚未结束，你的走马灯也在继续…而我不介意将这一过程拉得很长很长。
Our quaint journey through this amusement park still isn't over... and I wouldn't mind stretching this out at all.
It's got nothing to do with you.
需要一点提示么？这是一副镣铐，套在你身上的。那男人给你的第一份「工作」，你挣到的第一桶金…我可记得清清楚楚。
Do you need a hint? These are manacles on you. That man gave you your first job, and you made your first pot of gold... I remember it all too well.
你就是把这捆铁链缠在拳头上，那是你能找到的唯一一件{RUBY_B#武器}工具{RUBY_E#}。然后，在那座迷宫里，你……
You wrapped that iron chain around your fist, for that is the only {RUBY_B#weapon}tool{RUBY_E#} you could find. Then, in that maze, you...
哦…你不愿面对那段过往？不想承认你这条命只值六十个{RUBY_B#赤铜币}塔安巴{RUBY_E#}？
Oh... You don't wish to face your past? Unwilling to admit that your life is worth only sixty {RUBY_B#Red Copper Coins}Tanbas{RUBY_E#}?
依我看，两者都不是正确答案…你拒绝面对它，只因为它证明了你的软弱。
From what I see, you refuse to confront it, because it only proves your weakness.
软弱的人怎么会铤而走险？
How could a weak person take such daring risks?
不错，你是喜欢铤而走险…却偏偏不肯放下某些多余的东西。就算在这片美梦中，你也只敢在自己身上尝试*死亡*。
That's right. You love the thrill of danger... but you refuse to let go of meaningless sentiments. Even in this beautiful dream, the only thing you "dare" allow yourself is death.
那些随行人员本可以成为你手上的鬼牌，发挥更大的用处。家族的污点要多少有多少，只需做出一些小小的牺牲…换成「欧泊」，早迎刃而解了。

In your hands, those who follow you could've become joker cards. They're far more useful that way. It's not like this is the only place The Family ever cut corners. You could've had tons of action if you weren't so all-or-nothing. All it takes is a meager sacrifice... I bet "Opal" would have resolved this without a fuss.
可惜，你不如他。但凡你做了，也不会沦落至此…为什么不这么做呢？应该不是出于什么职业道德吧？
A pity you're not him. You wouldn't be in this state if you could just get with the program.... And why couldn't you? Out of professional integrity?
你说的那些{RUBY_B#千术}技巧{RUBY_E#}效率是很高，但我不是不会，而是不屑用，懂么？
Those {RUBY_B#cheats}techniques{RUBY_E#} you mentioned are highly efficient, but it's not that I don't know about them — it's more like I couldn't care less. Get it?
如果对局不公平，还有什么乐趣可言？
What fun is it if the fight isn't fair?
「公平」…呵，好像你的对手对你多公平似的。局势明明对你不利，你为什么还能这么游刃有余？那假面愚者的话究竟点醒了你什么？

Fair... Heh, you assume your opponents would fight fair in the first place. The odds are obviously not in your favor, so how are you just breezing by? Did that Masked Fool's words awaken something in you?
她给了我一个足以颠覆一切的答案。
She gave me an answer that could turn everything upside down.
你是说——让牌桌上的一切都消失吗？
You mean, it could make all the cards on the table just... disappear?
你现在的表情真的很难形容。妈妈给你留下的这枚护身符是纯金打造的，为什么从没考虑过卖了它？
Your expression right now is hard to put into words. The lucky charm Mama left you is made from gold. Why did you never consider selling it?
明明那样你就能和姐姐过上一阵子正常人的生活了。回过头看，那才是更好的选择。
You obviously could've lived a normal life like Big Sis that way. Looking back, that was the better choice.
妈妈只留给我们两件首饰：一条项链，一枚护身符。不会再有第三件了。
Mama only left us with two pieces of jewelry: A necklace and a lucky charm. There won't ever be a third piece.
你一直是这么说的——但其实你很后悔吧？没有卖掉它们？
That's what you always say, but you actually regret it, don't you? That you didn't sell them?
You can zip it if there's nothing to talk about.
哈…我知道了。你一定记得姐姐当时说过的话：「你是受母神赐福的孩子，你能带领氏族走向幸福。所以永远记得保护好自己，也永远不要怨恨痛苦和贫穷。」

Ha... I know. You must remember what Big Sis told you: You're a child blessed by Gaiathra Triclops and can lead the clan to happiness. So, always remember to protect yourself and never resent the pain and poverty you're going through...
言犹在耳，对吧？你是个乖孩子，绝不会忘记。
The words still ring in your ears, don't they? You're a good kid, so you definitely won't have forgotten.
所以你也一定不会忘记，她生命最后一刻是如何凄惨，你身后的声声尖笑又是如何钻心…你就那样头也不回地逃走了，照她说的做了。

So you surely won't forget how tragic her last moments of life were, how the piercing laughter behind you felt like it was drilling into your heart... You ran away without looking back, just as she told you to.
Tsk tsk... A lifelong regret, indeed.
真是够了…你就没有别的话题可聊吗？
Enough... Do you not have anything better to talk about?
这是你第二次打断我了。你真的很好懂。
Oh! Shut me down like a champ. Well I guess when it comes to mind games this isn't exactly your first rodeo.
我终于能明白你的想法了…哼，真是疯狂啊。
I think I finally get you. And *whew* you are nuts.
「最后，我会颠覆这场美梦，创造<color=#dbc291ff>最盛大的死亡</color>」——这的确是你的主张，贯彻始终，从未改变。
"In the end, I'll ruin this beautiful dream and create <color=#dbc291ff>the grandest death</color>." — You've stuck to that, start to finish.
从那颗星核，到知更鸟的失声、两起命案、与星期日的交涉，再到那假面愚者的提示，只有这不变的两个字能勾起你的兴趣。而现在，你确实将它握在了手中……

Think about it. There's a Stellaron in play, the fabulous Robin loses her voice, two unsolved murders, cryptic messages from a Masked Fool, and a chance to go head-to-head with Sunday himself... and the only thing to pique your interest is one word — the last word, a word that's right there at your fingertips...
等骰子落定我们就知道了。
We'll know when the dice falls.
好啊，那观众席给我留个位置，我倒要看看你有多大本事。不过，我还是很好奇……
*laugh* Alright then, reserve a seat for me in the audience. I'm curious to see just how capable you are. Still, you never answered my question:
如果一切从头来过…你还想当被母神赐福的孩子么？
If you could start over... would you still want to be the child who received Gaiathra's blessing?
不知道为什么，先生，你总给我一种特别的感觉…让我很好奇，跃跃欲试。
I don't know why, Mister, but you always give me a special feeling... that makes me more curious about you.
可惜没能再多认识你一些。我们该告别了，你玩得还开心吗？
It's sad that I can't get to know you more. We have to say goodbye. Did you have fun?
嗯，我该回家了。天色开始阴沉，要下雨了，我不能让大家担心。
Yes, I should go home. The day's getting dark, and it's going to rain. I don't want to worry the others.
真是个怪问题。家就是有爸爸、妈妈、姐姐在的地方……
What a strange question. It's where Papa, Mama and Big Sis are...
这座游乐园，这片美梦，真的很安详。所有人都喜欢它。
This amusement park, this beautiful dream, they really are peaceful. Everyone loves it.
可是先生，为什么你不喜欢？
But Mister, why don't you like it?
你明明知道。只是答案没有意义。
You DO know. But there's no point pressing the issue.
我们都累了，所以打算留在这里，我…还有他。
We all are, which is why we chose to stay here. Me... and him.
永远。我们会和你一起，永远留在这片梦中。
Forever. We'll be with you, forever in this dream.
…这是我们为决意赴死之人献上的最大敬意。
...This is the greatest honor that we can offer to those who hurtle towards death.
剑走偏锋，那是一种极为荒诞的做法，但在你身上并不罕见。因为「自己的生命」向来是最先被你扔出的那枚筹码，一直如此。
The road less traveled is less traveled for a reason. But you've never gone in any other direction. Your own life is the chip you're most eager to lay down. Always has been.
你并不关心真凶是谁，对所谓的遗产也不感兴趣。你只想当好一个秉公办事的公司职员，在家族的地盘处处受难，被戴上滚烫的镣铐，推向舞台中央……

You don't care who the real murderer is. And the Watchmaker's so-called "legacy" couldn't be more boring. What you want, what you need, is to be the smooth operator — the solid gold deal-maker who doesn't waste a drop of sweat even when he's up to his neck in danger, deep inside Family territory. You want to be polished up, cuffed with red-hot chains and spotlit center stage...
然后，成为这场盛会的「第三个牺牲品」。
You'll be the closing act! The final sacrifice.
...I can do it, and it will be flawless.
你当然能。你的好运一定会在恰到好处的时候帮你，一枚<color=#dbc291ff>星核</color>和一位<color=#dbc291ff>令使</color>…就这么简单，对吗？
Of course you can. Your luck will help you at the right time — a <color=#dbc291ff>Stellaron</color> and an <color=#dbc291ff>Emanator</color>... It's that simple, no?
如此一来，公司便能获得上桌的资格。而你也能从无尽的漩涡中抽身，得到梦寐以求的解脱。

That way, the IPC will earn a place at the table. And as for you, you'll just happen to slip the leash, leave the rat race, extract yourself from this endless debacle. You'll have the freedom you've always dreamed of.
已经不是第一次了…这是你最擅长，也最渴望的方式。这场闹剧以一场「死亡」开始，也将在一场「死亡」中落幕。
This isn't the first time... you've been an escape artist from day one. This fiasco started with a "Death," and its curtains will fall on another "Death."
他要的只有匹诺康尼，无论手段，不计代价…也和具体的人无关。
He's just after Penacony, no matter the means, no matter the price... It's not personal.
你忽然变得很体贴啊，良心发现了？
Don't get soft on me now. What, did you suddenly grow a conscience?
我终究是从你的自我中诞生的，所以我很清楚，想取回掷出的筹码难如登天。
Hey, I was born from your self. I'm well aware that climbing out of the hole you've dug is basically impossible.
你要做的事我阻止不了，你要去往的地方…我们也改变不了。
I can't stop you from doing what you want, and... we can't change where you want to go.
覆水难收。我们能做的只有抓住每个机会，让自己尽可能多赢一秒。
What's done can't be undone. All we can do is play the cards we're dealt, and rake in as much time as possible.
是啊。可惜人不可能一辈子只做正确的决定…虽然好运总是站在你这边。
Yes. Alas, people won't make all the right choices in their lifetime... Though luck always seems like it's on your side.
你总会赢下去，你从未输过——但为什么是你？为什么…非得是你？
You will keep winning, having never lost before. But why you? Why... must it be you?
如果一个幸运儿的奇迹，全部建立在所有他所爱之人、甚至更多人的不幸之上…如果你带来的每一场雨从不象征母神的宽恕和恩赐，而是一次又一次无意义的死亡……

If all your luck is built on the pain of someone you love, on the loss of dozens more — if these windfalls, these jackpots aren't a gift from Gaiathra — if all they are is a long string of meaningless deaths...
…那你我究竟是犯了多少错误，才要出生在这世上？
...Then what did we do to deserve living in a world like that?
…也许等我抵达了那个终点，我们的困惑就能得到解答了。
Maybe... maybe when I get to where I'm going and look back, I'll know what the trip was all about.
哼…好吧。先走一步，朋友，我在{RUBY_B#「未来」}前面{RUBY_E#}等你。
Hmph... Fine. Time to make a move, my friend. I'll be waiting up {RUBY_B#Future}ahead{RUBY_E#}.
最后的时光，同{RUBY_B#「过去」}这孩子{RUBY_E#}好好道个别吧。尽量让自己……
Say goodbye to {RUBY_B#Past}the kid{RUBY_E#} before you shuffle off. It's...
It's best to die without regrets.
And now... only we are left.
可以为我拍张照吗？就当是留个纪念。
Can you take a photo for me? I want a memento.
可以为我拍张照吗？就当是留个纪念。
Can you take a photo for me? I want a memento.
真好，这样我也能看见自己的样子了。
How nice! Now I can see what I look like too.
下次拍照时，记得看镜头，表情会更自然些。
Look at the lens when you're taking a photo the next time — your expression will look more natural.
嗯，我会的。那…先生，你也要回去了吗？
Sure, I will. Then... Mister, are you going back too?
我在这里还有一场…表演。
I still have... a show to do.
哦…那你马上要登台演出了，是吗？
Oh... You're about to go on stage, aren't you?
那走吧，我送你去大舞台那里。
Let's go then. I'll take you to the stage.
这道幕布后就是大舞台了……
Behind this curtain is the grand stage...
马上就是登台的时间了，你做好准备了吗？祝你的演出圆满成功。
It's almost time to go on stage. Are you ready? Good luck with your show.
那我们来「对掌」吧。如果有母神保佑，你就可以轻松点了。
Let's put our palms together. If you receive Gaiathra's blessing, you'll feel more relaxed.
「对掌」是一种小小的仪式，我们把手掌贴在一起，把祷文念给芬戈妈妈听，她就会祝福我们。
Putting our palms together is a simple ritual. By putting our palms together and reciting the prayer to Mama Fenge, she will bless us.
如果你不会，我可以教你。
If you are not familiar, I can guide you.
It's alright. I know how to do it.
我们得在这里分别了，卡卡瓦夏。卡提卡人就要来了。
This is where we go our own way, Kakavasha. The Katicans are coming.
为什么？卡提卡人已经抢走了我们所有的钱、吃的，还杀死了爸爸妈妈…他们还想要什么？
Why? The Katicans have already taken all our money, food, and they killed our parents... What more do they want?
卡提卡人嗜血、残忍，贪得无厌。他们想要一切，所以他们什么也得不到。
Katicans are bloodthirsty, cruel, and insatiably greedy. They want everything, only to end up with nothing.
这是个诡计，一场复仇。记得吗？今天是「卡卡瓦」之日，也是你的生日。
This is a trick, an act of revenge. Remember? Today is the day of the Kakava, and also your birthday.
他们知道埃维金人一定会在这天举办祭典。借着这场雨，他们会来摧毁我们的大篷车，抢走想要的一切。
They know the Avgin will surely hold a festival today. With the aid of this rain, they will come to destroy our wagons and take everything they want.
但卡提卡人不知道，这次我们会反抗，天上来的黑衣人也站在我们这边。卡提卡人在他们面前毫无胜算，一定会为自己的傲慢付出代价。

Little do the Katicans know, this time we will fight back! The men in black that descend from the skies are on our side. The Katicans stand no chance against them and will surely pay for their arrogance.
如果没有这场雨，卡提卡人就不会行动，我们也没有机会周旋。这都是母神的恩赐，而你是{RUBY_B#受母神赐福的孩子}「卡卡瓦夏」{RUBY_E#}，你的好运会保佑姐姐成功。

Without this rain, the Katicans would never take action, and we would not have the chance to turn the tide. This is a gift from Gaiathra, and you are {RUBY_B#Child Blessed by Gaiathra}Kakavasha{RUBY_E#}, whose good fortune will bless your sister with success.
可…可有人会死掉的，你也会有危险…这哪里是好运了！你们为什么要这么做……
But... but people will die, and you will be in danger... How is that good fortune? Why are you all doing this...
埃维金人有仇必报。母神在呼唤我，爸爸妈妈在等我，我必须回应。但她将好运赐给你，要你活下去。
The Avgin always return their blood debts. Gaiathra calls for me, while Papa and Mama are waiting for me. I must answer the call. But she will bless you with good fortune and help you survive.
只要你还活着，埃维金人的血就永远不会流干。所以跑吧，卡卡瓦夏，不要害怕，不要回头。到山的那一边去。雨会长伴你，雨会保佑你。

As long as you are alive, the blood of the Avgin will never run dry. So run, Kakavasha, do not be afraid, and do not look back. Go to the other side of the mountain. The rain will accompany you, and the rain will bless you.
而我们，将在下一次{RUBY_B#母神轮回之始}「卡卡瓦」{RUBY_E#}的极光下重逢……
As for us, we will reunite in {RUBY_B#Start of Gaiathra Reincarnation}Kakava{RUBY_E#}'s next aurora.
"May the goddess Gaiathra close her eyes three times..."
「星际和平播报快讯：公司市场开拓部发言人证实无主星区茨冈尼亚爆发小规模叛乱，目前局势已得到有效控制——」

"Newsflash from the Interastral Peace Broadcast: The IPC Marketing Development Department's spokesperson confirms that a small-scale rebellion has broken out in the unclaimed region of Sigonia. The situation is now under control..."
「叛乱分子来自当地一支名为『卡提卡』的氏族，该氏族长期对公司心怀不满，对市场开拓部在当地的工作产生了严重的负面影响——」

"The insurgents are from a local clan known as Katica, which has a long history of disdain towards the IPC. This has caused a serious negative impact to the work of the IPC's Marketing Development Department..."
「该氏族向处于公司保护下的『埃维金』氏族发起大规模袭击，造成<unbreak>6728</unbreak>人死亡，<unbreak>3452</unbreak>人失踪，伤者目前已被医疗救援组织『创伤战线』接收——」

"The clan launched a massive attack on the Avgin, who were under the protection of the IPC, resulting in <unbreak>6,728</unbreak> deaths and <unbreak>3,452</unbreak> missing. The casualties are currently under the care of the Frontline Trauma Team..."
「发言人对这一『深重的人道主义灾难』表达了深切哀悼，同时就此事向全体星际公民发表重要讲话——」
"The spokesperson expresses his deepest condolences for this devastating humanitarian disaster, at the same time delivering an important message on this matter to all interplanetary citizens..."
「最后，他表示：『存护的巨锤必将为所有生命落下，无论生死，无论种族，无论思想，以捍卫我等与生具有之基本权利』……」

"Finally, he proclaims: 'The hammer of Preservation will fall for all beings, regardless of life or death, regardless of race, regardless of ideology, to uphold the basic rights we inherently possess.'"
好咯——演员已经就位，好戏该开场了。
Okay, all the actors are in place. It's time for the show to begin.
这场演出献给你，希望它能为你留下难忘的回忆……
This act is dedicated to you. I hope it'll be an unforgettable memory for you...
对了，在你临走前，我还有个比较私人的问题。
By the way, before you go, I have a personal question.
你…真的想要亲手毁灭这个世界吗？
You... do you truly want to destroy the world with your own hands?
假设——只是个假设——假设我每次掷骰子都有概率掷出这个结果……
Let's assume — just assuming, now — that every time I roll the dice, there is a possibility of achieving this particular outcome...
那我一定会非常乐意赌一把的。
Then, I would be quite happy to make that wager.
先是幻听，现在是幻觉——真棒，下一步我是不是该荣升「同谐」令使了？
First I'm hearing things, and now I'm seeing them. Great! Am I going to be elevated into the Harmony's Emanator next?
…这里怎么一个游客都没有，那翅膀头在搞什么？
...Why are there no guests here? What's that feather-head doing?
只有一个皮皮西…不对，小孩子？
Just a Pepeshi... No, a child?
那对眼睛，还有「芬戈妈妈」…不，这不可能……
Those eyes... and Mama Fenge... No! It can't...
宇宙中不会再有埃维金人了……
...It's not going to be me anyway.
现在换我来躲啦——我赌你们肯定找不到我——
It's my turn to hide now! I bet you guys can't find meeee!
That child... Could he be in here?
基石消失了…又是「同谐」的幻觉啊。
The cornerstone is gone... Another illusion of the Harmony.
哇，这里好高——比沙漠里最高的石头还要高——
Woah, this place... it's so tall. Even taller than the tallest rocks in the desert...
还有好多花——姐姐，这朵紫色的送给你——
And there are so many flowers here. Big Sis, this one's for you!
A dead end... Is this the wrong way?
如果把这些叶子带回去——会开出新的小花吗——
If these leaves could be brought back... Would they bloom into new flowers?
这次真安静啊，是他终于消失了…还是我快要消失了？
It's so quiet this time. Is he finally gone...? Or am I the one about to disappear?
Finally... made it out of this place.
要回家了吗——可我还不想回去——
We're going home? But I don't want to go back yet...
这里好开心——我想一直待在这里——
It's so fun here... I want to stay here forever...
Brother Hanu! Where... are you going?
他只会去往一个地方——无论是过去、现在，还是将来！
There's only one place he can be going, whether it's in the past, present or future!
美梦要结束了！美梦永远不会结束！
Beautiful dream's about to end! The beautiful dream will never end!
先生…是你吗？我听到了皮鞋的声音。
Mister... Is that you? I hear the sound of leather shoes.
原来你是演员…怪不得衣服那么漂亮。
So you're an actor... No wonder your clothes are so stylish.
其实我是一名…商人。但我确实有场表演。
I'm actually a... merchant. But I do have a show to do.
你和天上的黑衣人一样？可你没有穿黑色的衣服。
Are you the same as those men in black in the sky? But you're not wearing black.
普通员工才要穿那种衣服，我的位置…比他们高得多。
Only ordinary employees have to wear that. My position... is much higher than theirs.
好厉害，希望我也能成为和你一样漂亮的大人。
Awesome, I hope I can become as good-looking as you when I grow up.
你一定会比我更好、更厉害。
You'll be better, and stronger than me.
这位就是黄泉小姐吧？你好，我是姬子，星穹列车的领航员。
Is this Miss Acheron? Hello, I'm Himeko, the Astral Express' navigator.
你好，我叫三月七！{NICKNAME}就不介绍了，你肯定认识。
Hello, I'm March 7th! I'm sure {NICKNAME} needs no introduction, as you definitely know {F#her}{M#him}.
Hey, I still deserve a proper intro!
Pleasure to meet ya, Miss Acheron.
你们好。对于我的出现，各位似乎并不意外。
Hello. None of you seem surprised by my arrival.
既然瓦尔特决定与你同行，说明他信任你，而我们同样相信他的判断。
Since Welt has decided to travel with you, it means that he trusts you, and we trust his judgment.
你们的关系真是令人羡慕。
黄泉小姐并非危险分子，对星穹列车也没有敌意，砂金先前的指控只是一面之词。
Miss Acheron here doesn't present a danger, and she's of no threat to the Astral Express. Aventurine's prior accusation was based on nothing more than his own subjectivity.
因此，在继续我们的合作前，他有义务给出一个合理的解释。
Which is why, before we continue working together, he has a duty to explain himself.
你是想…制造一个三方共同在场的局面么？
You want to... create a situation where all three parties are present?
砂金的行为背后一定有着更深层的逻辑。我猜他从最初就对匹诺康尼的秘密有所察觉，并不断在为揭开它而布局。
There must be some deeper meaning behind Aventurine's actions. I suspect he's been aware of Penacony's secret from the beginning... and has been continuously strategizing to unveil it.
如此一来，星穹列车在他的计划中处于什么位置就至关重要了。最坏的情况下…他可能会利用我们做些出格的事。
In that sense, the Astral Express' role in his plans would be imperative. In the worst case scenario... he may use us to do something unexpected.
假设事态真的发展到那一步，多一位盟友，也是多一份保险。匹诺康尼山头林立，局势远比贝洛伯格和仙舟复杂啊。

Assuming things do escalate to that stage, having an extra ally is a good insurance policy. Penacony has numerous factions, and the state of affairs is significantly more intricate than that of Belobog and the Xianzhou.
但我们必须给死者一个交代。
But we must mete out justice for the dead.
{NICKNAME}说得没错，无论如何，我们都不能对匹诺康尼的安危置之不理。
{NICKNAME} is right. No matter what, we cannot ignore the safety of Penacony.
也许我们该就此抽身了。
Maybe we should now get outta here while we still can?
{NICKNAME}说得也有道理，毕竟完全猜不透接下来会发生什么……
{NICKNAME} also makes a good point. We're completely in the dark on what's going to happen next...
但是，我还是觉得不能对匹诺康尼的安危置之不理。
But, I think we can't just ignore the safety of Penacony.
主角就是为此刻而存在的！
I Am the Bone of My Bat. Stellaron Is My Body and Trailblaze Is My Blood.
你又在说怪话了…但气势不错，无论如何，我们都不能对匹诺康尼的安危置之不理。
You're talking weird again... But it's a good vibe. No matter what, we can't ignore the safety of Penacony.
为了解开「钟表匠」的谜团，我们势必需要公司手中的信息。纵使前方危机四伏…但迎难而上才是「开拓」，对吧？
To solve the mystery of the Watchmaker, it is crucial to get the IPC's intel. The path ahead is fraught with danger... but what's Trailblazing without a little danger?
看来没有异议了。那…黄泉小姐？
Sounds like we've reached a consensus. Now... Miss Acheron?
I will accompany you, of course.
那我们就出发咯！不过…得上哪去找他？
Let's move out then! But... where do we start looking for him?
别着急。如果真的有人布下了局…他一定会想方设法邀我们入场的。
No need to rush. If he truly has laid a trap... he will definitely use every means to lure us in.
<size=36>匹诺康尼有史以来最惊奇、最盛大的表演即将开幕——</size>
<size=36>The most wondrous, most magnificent show in Penacony's history is about to begin...</size>
<size=36>星际和平公司诚邀各位光临现场——克劳克影视乐园！</size>
<size=36>The IPC cordially invites everyone to — Clock Studios Theme Park!</size>
如果演员和观众都到不了场，砂金那么多布置不就白费了吗？
Should both the performers and spectators fail to arrive, won't all of Aventurine's plans be for nothing?
出发吧，各位——到我们贯彻「开拓」之道的时候了。
Let's get going, everyone. The hour of trailblazing is upon us.
唔…总有种大事不妙的预感。{NICKNAME}，你准备好了吗？
Mm... I have a bad feeling that something big's gonna go down. {NICKNAME}, are you ready?
那就事不宜迟，出发去影视乐园吧！
Let's waste no time and head to the theme park then!
你不会是有心理阴影了吧…放轻松，没事的。
Your trauma isn't getting to you, is it... Take it easy. It'll be fine.
你为什么没有告诉同伴，我的*真实身份*？
Why did you not tell your companions about my true identity?
就像你说的一样，不是不愿，而是不能。那段漫长的故事…我也难以用三言两语向他人转述。
It's just like you said: An inability rather than an unwillingness. Plus it's a long story... not something that can be summed up in a few words.
但我愿意相信你，我对你的信任更多来自…个人的主观判断。
But I chose to believe you, and my trust in you stems more from... my own personal judgment.
我也相信——即便换作{M#他们}{F#她们}，也会做出同样的决定。
I also believe that, if it were their choice to make, they would make the same one.
作为回敬，在接下来的对峙中，倘若出现了对星穹列车不利的形势…我会站在你们这边。
To reciprocate, in the upcoming confrontation, if the odds aren't in the Astral Express' favor... I will stand with you.
又回到这里了。砂金居然选了这么个引人瞩目的地方……
We're back here again. Aventurine actually chose a really conspicuous location...
这家伙搞得也太夸张了吧，真把自己当大明星了？
That guy's really taking it to a whole new level. Does he really think he's a superstar or something?
空无一人？之前猎犬们驱散了游客，现在他们也不知去向……
Not a soul in sight? The Hounds drove out the visitors, and now their whereabouts are unknown too...
各位，擦亮眼睛。对方显然是有备而来。
Everyone, pay attention. The other party has obviously come prepared.
真是姗姗来迟啊，星穹列车的各位，还有这边的…「不速之客」。
Astral Express, you're late, and this... "unsought guest."
我们来赴约了，砂金先生。按照礼仪，您也应该现身才是。
We've kept your appointment, Mr. Aventurine. It is customary to show yourself as well.
我当然会。但在那之前，我希望能再好好介绍下今晚的主角……
I will, naturally. But before that, I've got to introduce our guest of honor.
掌声有请——「星核」{M#先生}{F#小姐}！
Everyone give it up for... {M#Mr.}{F#Miss} Stellaron!
We're not here for any pageantry.
Does this have anything to do with the wanted murderer?
容我提醒，这片舞台和{NICKNAME}的身份，应该都和缉拿真凶无关。
Let me remind you that in all likelihood, this stage and {F#her}{M#his} identity have nothing to do with the wanted murderer.
不，有关，当然有关。不然我为什么要努力取得你们的信任，再把各位邀请到这里？
Oh no, they do, of course they do. Otherwise, why would I work so hard to gain your trust and then invite you all here?
因为{M#他}{F#她}是唯一一名见证了三起命案的目击证人，能够证明「梦境中不存在伤亡」是一纸空谈的最佳人选！
Because {F#she}{M#he} is the only one who saw all three homicides. {F#She}{M#He} is the key to proving that The Family's "death does not exist in dreams" promise is nothing but a sham!
对，女士，第三桩命案马上就要发生了。就在这里，克劳克影视乐园……
That's right, madam — the third one is about to happen right now, right here in Clock Studios Theme Park...
你、你、你，还有你…所有人都将死去——而这一切都因为你，「星核」{M#先生}{F#小姐}……
You, you, you, and you... All of you are going to die! And it's all because of you, {M#Mr.}{F#Miss} Stellaron...
我以为自己的意图已经足够明显了……
I thought my intent was crystal clear...
你怎么保证自己能活下来？
You sure you're gonna survive this?
当然，不要小看「存护」。琥珀王的基石自会为我指明出路……
Don't underestimate the Preservation. The cornerstone of the Amber Lord will surely guide me...
千万不要小看自己。我说过，你拥有足以掀翻整张牌桌的力量……
Never underestimate yourself. Like I said, you have the power to turn the tide on the entire game...
让我说得更明白些吧：我会引爆你体内的星核，在匹诺康尼制造一场小小的*意外*……
Let me be a little clearer: I will detonate the Stellaron in you, and cause a teeny-tiny accident on Penacony...
砰！整个乐园都将化作一场碎梦。然后，我将在家族做出反应前，成为公司舰队的领航人。
Bam! The entire theme park will be reduced to a shattered dream. Then, before The Family can even react, I'll become the IPC fleet's navigator.
虚张声势对我们没用。如果真能做到，你先前有的是机会。
Your bluff isn't fooling anyone. If you could really do that, you would have done so earlier.
你在跟我打赌？好啊，那我也和你赌。我赌自己能大获全胜，用一场史无前例的大爆炸证明「同谐」的誓言就是个彻头彻尾的笑话。
You wanna bet? Sure, I'll bet with you. I'm betting that it'll be a sweeping victory for me, by detonating an unprecedented explosion to prove that the vow of Harmony is a complete and utter joke.
我当然能做到，不过是又一场赌博而已。
Of course I can. It's just another gamble.
我从茨冈尼亚的荒漠走来，为了六十枚赤铜币，人们在我身上烙下印记，为我戴上枷锁，将我送上刑架，埋入黄沙……
I came from the wastelands of Sigonia. For just sixty red copper coins, people paid to brand me, put me in chains, place me in the gallows, and bury me in the golden sands...
可太阳杀不死我，流沙反将我送向学会和公司的怀抱。记住，我不是偶然赢了一次，我从来没有输过。
But the sun could not kill me, and the quicksand sent me back to the embrace of the Guild and the IPC. Bear in mind, my victory wasn't just a stroke of luck — I've never been defeated.
给各位分享一则谚语吧：「睡眠是死亡的预演」。生命因何而沉睡？因为我们尚未准备好迎接死亡。
Have you ever heard the saying "Sleep is the rehearsal of death"? Why does life slumber? All because we are not ready for the final rest.
每一夜的入梦与赴死无异，正如此时此刻的你我，心怀死志，躲入睡乡。而「死亡」…也将应我们的梦呓前来。
Every night is practice for the end. You and I are escaping into our dreams for fear of death at this very moment. And "Death"... will surface in our dreams.
朋友们，游戏已经开始了。你们无法拒绝——
Friends, the game has commenced, and you cannot choose to decline...
...Nor do you have any reason or grounds to.
也许…会途经你所说的地方。
Perhaps... I might pass through the place you mentioned.
What do you hope to find within a dream?
恐怕家族并不会为你开门。
I'm afraid The Family will not open the doors for you.
因为你行走的道路…不为「同谐」所容。
Because the path you walk... is not accepted by the Harmony.
Even if... that's not what I want?
即便这非你所愿。因为祂与其他星神不同。
Precisely because it's not what you want. Because THEY are not like other Aeons.
祂从不瞥视任何人，祂也无需瞥视任何人。
THEY have never glanced at anyone, and THEY never need to.
祂留下命途的织缕，任由人们行走，共同罗织一道巨大的影子…而这影子亦默默地笼罩他们本身。
THEY leave woven strands of fate for humans to walk, and together, THEY weave a great shadow... And this shadow silently envelops them.
总有从阴影中归来的人。
There are always those who rise from the shadows.
他们大多成了那影子的一部分。
They mostly become a part of the shadow.
In your eyes, am I the same?
You still have a strand of color...
我会抵达{RUBY_B#第IX机关}「虚无」的尽头{RUBY_E#}。
I will reach {RUBY_B#Device IX}the Nihility's end{RUBY_E#}.
女士们，先生们，各位逐梦客，富豪，「钟表匠」和家族的贵宾——
Ladies, gentlemen, dream seekers, tycoons, esteemed guests of the Watchmaker and The Family...
——还有大名鼎鼎的，星穹列车的无名客！欢迎来到星际和平公司的秀场！
...Also not forgetting the Nameless of the renowned Astral Express! Welcome to the Interastral Peace Corporation's live show!
来吧，看看谁能笑到最后——游戏开始！
Alright, let's see who has the last laugh — let the game begin!
即便身处逆境，人只要还有希望，就一定会跟注……
Even on a losing streak, as long as people still have hope, they'll keep throwing money on the table...
你们蕴含的可能性，值得让我放手一搏…！
The chance, no matter how small, the potential is what you hang onto. That's what justifies the gamble!
Everybody's like that, down to the last player.
为什么——不能活得更痛快一点？
So why can't I be happy too? Why can't I feel that free?
A gigantic black hole, and... sea...
也许在你看来，我是一位隐藏身份的「令使」，但是……
Perhaps to you, I am just an Emanator who's hiding her identity, but...
{RUBY_B#「虚无」IX}沉眠无相者{RUBY_E#}从不瞥视任何人，祂无貌无形，更无意志可言…「虚无」平等地笼罩着每个人。
{RUBY_B#Nihility IX}The sleeping and shapeless{RUBY_E#} never glance at anyone. THEY have no face, no form, and even less of a will to speak... The Nihility envelops everyone equally.
只是有些人在祂的阴影下走得更远，沾染了更多的「无」…仅此而已。
Only some who have gone under THEIR shadow can go farther, tainting themselves with more Nihility... That's all.
仅此而已…朋友，你真的让我不知该怎么接话了。
That's all... My friend, you really leave me at a loss for words.
所以…这就是我的终点，死后之地？
So... Is this my final destination, the land of the dead?
这只是一场转瞬即逝的梦，「IX」的万千表征之一…在「虚无」的见证下，我们在此短暂停留，然后行向各自的方向。
This is all but a fleeting dream, one of the thousands of manifestations of IX... Under the watchful eye of Nihility, we momentarily linger here, before moving on to our own paths.
看来我的死亡已经注定。
It seems that my death has already been determined.
即便你希望如此…我也无法给出承诺。
Even if you wish for it... I can't promise you anything.
既然目的已经达成，我想你可以更坦诚些。
Now that you've accomplished your goal, I think you can be a little more forthcoming.
你在乐园的表演十分精彩，虚张声势…单纯但实用的技巧，骗过了几乎所有人。
Your performance at the theme park was wonderful and grandiose... A simple yet practical technique that fooled almost everyone.
不会有人想到，你如此大费周章，甚至不惜押注自己的生命，只是为了再度确认一个看似早已被否定的事实……
No one would have ever thought that you would have gone to such lengths, even staking your life, just to prove a fact that had seemingly been disproved long ago...
「匹诺康尼的梦境中并不存在『真正的死亡』」。
"'Real death' does not exist in Penacony's Dreamscape."
因为只有这样，你才能触及那个比连环凶案更不可告人的秘密……
Because this is the only way you can uncover a secret that is even more unspeakable than the serial murders...
你才能借「梦中的死亡」去往那里，在这场盛会中，人们时刻寻求的那片应许之地……
To use this "dream death" to get there, to that promised land people constantly seek in this grand gathering...
…钟表匠的遗产，真正的{RUBY_B#流放之地}「匹诺康尼」{RUBY_E#}。
Penacony — the Legacy of the Watchmaker, the true land of exile.
我也未曾料想，自己意外得知的某件事，会成为串联一切的关键。
I never imagined that something I learned about unexpectedly would become the key to connecting everything.
I see you're in the know.
我不能确定，但我愿意赌那个可能性。
Let's just say I'd put money on the possibility.
…「命案」是个好借口，但还远远不够。即便匹诺康尼真的存在那么一两起谋杀，影响的也只是极少数人，掀不起波澜。
...The murder isn't nearly enough to disrupt business as usual. Even if there were one or two murders on Penacony, most people wouldn't be personally affected — and that won't create any waves.
这片{RUBY_B#忆域}美梦{RUBY_E#}并非汪洋大海，而是一座孤岛。家族用「同谐」修筑堤岸高墙，隔绝外界，守护人们不会在大海中溺亡……

This {RUBY_B#Memory Zone}dream{RUBY_E#} of theirs isn't a boundless sea, it's a lonely island. The Family used the Harmony to build a high wall and isolate them from the vast and treacherous ocean of the outside world.
…同时也借助这道「隔绝死亡」的壁垒，将不为人知的秘密埋葬于深海中。在没有痛苦和伤亡的美梦里，那些秘密也会永远不见天日。除非……

That barrier they built "keeps death out," but it also keeps the secrets that are lost in that watery abyss from floating to the surface. In a beautiful dream, free of suffering, who would want to go fishing for those secrets. No one. Unless...
除非有人去往壁垒的另一边……
Unless someone goes to the other side of the barrier...
我很早就获得了提示：如果哑巴指向的并非「不能发声之人」，那就只可能是「不能说话之人」……
I got the idea early on, chewing on that Masked Fool's little hint. If a mute isn't "someone who cannot make a sound," then it has to be "someone who cannot speak."
那个已然从深海中生还，却无法再走到台前开口说话的人——我很高兴得知她依旧在匹诺康尼，并且平安无事。
Someone who survived the treacherous depths, but is unable to take the stage and speak the truth. I'm happy to know she's safe and sound, and still on Penacony.
很遗憾，我没有证据。唯一能佐证这些猜想的，也只有家族面对「死亡」时的坦诚。他们对外来者太过慷慨，反而显得欲盖弥彰。

Proof is the one thing I don't have. The only thing that can prove these... conjectures... is for The Family to come clean. And with the way they buttered up these outsiders, it seems pretty clear they're intent on covering their tracks.
但怀疑一件事不需要证据，解开真相才要——对我而言，前者便已足够。我也无需找到那只忆域迷因，只要有人能像它一样「杀死」我即可。
But you don't need proof to have a suspicion, and for me suspicion is enough. I didn't need to find the memory zone meme. I just needed for someone to kill me like it killed the silver-haired girl.
在我看来，你其实没有十足的把握。特地进行全城广播，试图拉更多人入局…也是因为你在赌一个「有人能打破壁垒」的可能性。

You don't sound very confident to me. Going out of your way to make citywide broadcasts in an attempt to involve more people... You are simply betting on the possibility of someone being able to "break down the barrier."
你确实很幸运，命运使我们的道路交汇，而我恰好配有一柄利刃——锋利到足以斩落美梦的帷幕，同时将你身上「同谐」的烙印一刀两断……

You're very lucky that fate has decided to let us cross paths. I happen to be equipped with a very sharp blade — sharp enough to slice through the veil of dreams. I can also carve the Harmony's brand off of you...
你也很狡猾，故意设计让我们站在彼此的对立面，不断在他人面前重复「令使」的说辞，令我退无可退，唯有拔刀相向。

You possess great cunning. Deliberately setting us up to be on opposing sides, constantly repeating the words of the Emanator in front of others, leaving me no choice but to draw my blade against you.
所以你才能赢。时运和谋略，缺一不可。
And that's how you win. Opportunity and strategy, both are essential.
而在你的布局里，公司永远是赢家，即便最后你赌输了…对于家族而言，一位使节的性命也足够昂贵。
And in your plans, the IPC always wins. Even if you lose the bet... To The Family, the life of an ambassador is still invaluable.
一场豪赌，不是么？但容我指出一个错误：公司并非稳操胜券，在一件至关重要的事上，我的确没有后手。
It's a huge gamble, isn't it? But, allow me to point out a mistake: The IPC's success is not guaranteed — I unfortunately have no contingencies for such an important matter.
引爆一颗星核…我做不到。「砂金石」已经太过破碎，甚至无法保护我从舞台上全身而退。
Detonating a Stellaron... I can't do it. The aventurine stone is too broken to even safeguard my escape from the stage.
如果你到最后都没有拔出那把刀…就是我满盘皆输了。
If at the end of the day you did not unsheathe your blade... I would have lost the bet.
讨论「如果」没有意义。是你赢了，你为自己赢得了通往那片深海的入场券。
It is pointless to discuss "what-ifs." You have won. Your prize is an entry ticket into that deep sea.
而这之后，能否从深渊中归来…就是你的另一场豪赌了。
And after this, whether you can return from the abyss... is another gamble of yours.
犹豫…当然。但我只能相信我的好运。
Wavered? Of course I have. But I can only bank on my own good fortune.
因为除此之外，我一无所有。
Because other than that, I have nothing.
…从这场<color=#ff3a3e>梦</color>中醒来，去你应去的地方吧。你的赌局…尚未结束。
...Wake up from this <color=#ff3a3e>dream</color> and go to where you should be. Your gamble... is not over yet.
…在分别前，能再回答我一个问题么？身为走在那条路上的人，你能否告诉我……
...Before we part, can you answer one more question? As someone who has traveled on that road, can you tell me...
为什么我们要为了死亡而出生在这世上？
Why are we born into this world if it's just to die?
我从不这么认为。你也一样。
I don't think this, and never have. Nor do you.
可「虚无」的确笼罩着你我…还有每一个人。
But the Nihility envelops you and I... and everyone.
也正因如此，它没有意义。
And because of that, it's pointless.
倘若命运的骰子从来都被灌铅，那就是我们命定的归宿，我们…又为何要与之相抗？
If the dice of fate are always weighted, then that is our destiny. Why then... do we struggle against it?
…我的回答未必能消解你的困惑，因为它伴你一路走来，早已是你生命的一部分。
...My answer might not be able to resolve your confusion, because it has been with you throughout your journey, and is already a part of your life.
但你说过，「睡眠是死亡的预演」，生命因何而沉睡？因为我们尚未准备好迎接死亡。
But you said, "Sleep is the rehearsal of death," so why does life slumber? Because we are not ready for the final rest.
所以你也一定能明白，我们为何*想要*做好准备。
So you can definitely understand, why we want to be prepared.
就算结局早已注定，那也无妨，人改变不了的事太多。
Even if the ending has been predetermined, that's fine. There are countless things that humans cannot change.
但在此之前，在走向结局的路上，人能做的事同样很多。
But before the end, there are many things that humans can do while on their journey.
<color=#ff3a3e>而「结局」…也会因此展现截然不同的意义。</color>
<color=#ff3a3e>And because of this, the "end" will thus reveal a completely different meaning.</color>
看看你的口袋吧，你的朋友早就把答案交给你了。
Take a good look at your pocket. Your friend has already given you the answer.
你要走了吗，你最后还是选择…离开这座梦境？
You're leaving? You ultimately chose to... leave this Dreamscape?
…对。因为他们不在这里…爸爸、妈妈、姐姐……
...Yes. Because they are not here... My papa, mama, and big sis...
他们在每个人都会去往的地方，一个很远、很远的地方。
They are in a place where everyone will go. A very, very distant place.
我总有一天也会走到那里。
会有那么一天，当天上再度洒落下雨，我会听见母神的呼唤，知道命定的时刻已至，我应去和我的家人重逢。
There will come a day when the sky will drizzle, and I will hear the call of Gaiathra Triclops and know that it is time for me to go and be reunited with my family.
所以在那一刻到来前…我应当做好「准备」。
So until the time comes... I should be preparing.
准备好面对他们，卡卡瓦夏，成为{RUBY_B#母神赐福之子}他们的骄傲{RUBY_E#}。
Preparing to face them, Kakavasha, and to make them proud.
I know you'll be able to do it. Good luck!
当然。因为我是受母神赐福的孩子。
Of course. For I am a child who received the blessing of Gaiathra Triclops.
但你看起来还是很紧张……
我也这么觉得，也许只有你能帮我个忙了……
I seem that way because I am nervous. You know what? Maybe you can help...
What do you say? One last time? Put our palms together?
「我心怀对明天的期许，沉入今晚的睡乡；直到一个又一个明天的尽头，我迎来安详的死亡。」
"With hope for the morrow nestled in my heart, I descend into the slumber of tonight. Until the denouement of all coming morrows kisses me, I have then embraced the quiet death."
可这个男人不一样，他活在当下。每个沉沦的夜晚，每次孤注一掷，他的梦中从未出现明日的模样。
But this man is different. He lives and breathes in the present. In every sinking night, by every daring gamble, no vision of morrow ever graced his dreams.
他的人生从来与安详无缘，而命运又要教他赢下所有，淌过一片又一片暴雨，直到泥浆覆过他的鼻腔。
His life knows not quietude. His fate yet demands him to win them all, to weather tempests, one after another... til mire enshrouds his very breath.
而现在，在深不见底的梦中，那颗下落的骰子…终于坠地了。
And now, in the unfathomable depths of dream, the once falling die... has at last landed on its earthly rest.
Quietly, peacefully, it at last landed.
The light of the aventurine stone... has disappeared.
按照计划，你的「基石」已被顺利送入家族的领地中。那么——
As planned, your cornerstone has been successfully sent to The Family's territory. Then—
——履行我们的职责，开始「收获」吧。
而后，在安眠者的摇篮中，在「盛会之星」的美梦深处——
Thereafter, in the cradle of slumberers, deep within the sweet dream of the Planet of Festivities —
Another stone begins to radiate light.
「我来觐见、我来添酒、我来占有。」
"Here I greet. Here I wine. Here I claim."
「我为甘露赐下鸩毒，春种秋收，静待枯果满枝头。」
"I grant poison for nectar. Sow in spring to reap in fall. Await wizened fruit to fill livened boughs."
「…欢迎来到这个悲伤的世界，卡卡瓦夏。」
「你的好运是我们，也是所有埃维金人最宝贵的财富……」
"Your good luck is the most precious wealth we — all Avgin have."
「——两天时间，活着出来，证明你的本事货真价实。」
"If you come out alive after two days, it proves that you're the real deal."
「财富、地位、权力…公司会给你想要和不想要的一切。」
"Wealth, status, power... the IPC will give you whatever you want, even what you don't want."
「而我们，将在下一次『卡卡瓦』的极光下重逢。」
As for us, we will reunite in Kakava's next aurora.
很遗憾，这里不是你期待的地方。
It's a pity this is not the place you were expecting.
I've been waiting on you for quite a while.
你已见过我了，星核猎手萨姆。
You've met me before — I'm Sam — the Stellaron Hunter.
梦与梦之间的狭缝。你已见过我了，星核猎手萨姆。
A crevice between dreams. You've met me before — I'm Sam — a Stellaron Hunter.
It's you... what have you done?
我什么都没有做，只是等你醒来。你已见过我了，星核猎手萨姆。
I didn't do anything but wait for you to wake up. You've met me before, I'm Sam — a Stellaron Hunter.
我本想更早出现在你面前，向你道出一些事实。
I originally planned on showing up earlier to reveal some truths to you.
但我受到的阻拦比预想更甚。<unbreak>11</unbreak>次，我做出尝试，却以失败告结，不知不觉中，我与这世界的联系变得太过紧密，难以逃离「剧本」的约束。

But I encountered more roadblocks than expected. Eleven times, I've tried, but ended in failure. Before I knew it, this world and I became too intertwined and it became too difficult to escape the constraints of the "script."
…艾利欧说的没错，在这片梦想之地，你我都会得到难忘的收获。
...Elio is right. In this Land of the Dreams, you and I will reap unforgettable gains.
我不如他和卡芙卡那样通晓人心，也没有银狼和刃的一技之长。我所擅长的种种，大多也只适用于无需怜悯的恶徒。
I don't know people's hearts as well as he and Kafka do, nor do I have a specialty like Silver Wolf and Blade. Most of the things that I'm good at only apply to villains who need no mercy.
所以——我所能使用的「手段」也只有一种。
So, there is only one method that I use.
同一时间 忆域深处
你试图睁开眼，可看见的只有一片漆黑。
You try to open your eyes, but find only blackness before you.
回忆逐渐浮现，时间倒流至几分钟前：砂金发动最后的攻势，闪闪发光的筹码雨倾盆而下，黄泉紧接着拔刀，然后，*砰*——

Memories gradually resurface as time rewinds to a few minutes ago: Aventurine unleashes the final assault, pouring down a dazzling shower of chips, followed closely by Acheron drawing her blade, and then, *crash*—
——那难以言明的力量将「存护」斩断，周遭的时空顷刻陷入停滞，你的思绪也在那一瞬间被拧成了一团。你的感官失灵了，只有重力撕扯你的大脑，在无边的黑暗中下坠……

The indescribable force severs the power of Preservation, while time and space froze instantly. Your thoughts twist into a knot as your senses fail, with only gravity tearing at your mind as you plummet into boundless darkness...
…直到一簇火光将你拥入怀中。
...until a fire engulfs you in its embrace.
Doesn't matter. I need to get out of here.
迷宫一样的走廊和厅房，无处不在的陷阱机关…这大宅子的主人疑心病有点重啊。
Labyrinth-like corridors and halls, traps everywhere... The owner of this mansion must be a bit paranoid.
你很幽默，治安官先生。希望这份幽默感已经帮助你找到了连环杀人案的凶手。
You're so funny, Mr. Security Officer. I hope that sense of humor of yours has helped you find the serial killer.
只是发表一下个人看法。怎么，戳到你痛处了？
Just expressing a personal opinion. Why, did I hit a nerve?
加拉赫先生，我的耐心不多。消极怠工——
Mr. Gallagher, my patience is wearing thin. Neglecting duties...
——只会让我更加怀疑你与真凶有所牵连。
...will only make me more suspicious that you and the real serial killer are connected.
无赖、混混、酒鬼、流氓…这些垃圾话我可听过太多，但我真没想到，自己有朝一日还能被当作杀人魔的共犯。
Scoundrel, punk, drunk, hooligan... I've heard this trash talk all too often. But I have never once thought that I'd be treated as an accomplice to a murderer!
我收回前言：你的问题不是疑心太重。你是个疯子，懂吗？疯子。
I take back what I said: Your problem isn't paranoia. You're just crazy, you know? Lunatic.
你们——家族——把我这条老狗的脊梁骨打断，拔了獠牙，现在又开始指控我杀人？混账，只有苏乐达喝多了的白痴才会对街边的流浪狗发神经。
You — The Family — you broke my spine and pulled out my fangs, and now you want to accuse me of murder? Ridiculous, only idiots who've drunk too much SoulGlad will berate a stray dog on the streets.
究竟是什么东西让你在这不停地说疯话？比起我，你更应该去关心那群正在影视乐园闹得热火朝天的外宾。
What exactly is making you say all this nonsense? You should be more concerned about the outworld visitors who are making a scene in the theme park than me!
用不着你提醒。那位使节一出公馆的门，我就明白他想干什么，我的*仆人*全都看在眼里。他的小魔术确实骗过了我，但无妨，我非常乐意看见现在的局面。

I don't need you to remind me. The moment that ambassador walked out the doors of the mansion, I knew what he was trying to do. My servants see everything. His little magic tricks may have fooled me, but no matter, I'm happy to see how things have turned out.
你以为我为什么会放他走，又是为了什么才把那座影视乐园的舞台专门空出来？
Why do you think that I just let him go? And why do you think I emptied the theme park stage?
因为我的目标从始至终就是你，猎狗。他闹出的动静越大，我就越有机会让你和你{RUBY_B#「钟表匠」}真正的主人{RUBY_E#}血债血偿。
Because my target from the beginning has always been you, Hound. The more noise he makes, the more opportunities I have to make you and your {RUBY_B#The Watchmaker}true master{RUBY_E#} pay in blood!
如果我真是凶手，你又何必这么遮遮掩掩？哈，我忘了，你也有个{RUBY_B#匹诺康尼的「梦主」}不好伺候的主子{RUBY_E#}呢——他们叫你别管什么狗屁凶杀案，专心搞那「谐乐大典」……

If I were really the murderer, why would you need to be so secretive? Ha, I forgot, you also have {RUBY_B#Penacony's Dreammaster}a difficult master{RUBY_E#} to serve — telling you to ignore the murder case and focus solely on that Charmony Festival...
…看来你的伪装已经帮你充分了解到家族的每一处细节了。
...Looks like your disguise has helped you successfully understand every facet of The Family.
伪装？你哪只眼睛看出来我是假人了？睁大眼睛仔细瞧瞧吧，带光环的——
Disguise? You must be blind to be accusing me of being a fake. Open your eyes and take a good look...
诚然，你身上的每一处都是真实的。棕色的头发，像{RUBY_B#梦境制作人}班尼{RUBY_E#}一样柔软、卷曲；橙色的眼珠，令我怀念{RUBY_B#隐夜鸫家主}惠特克爵士{RUBY_E#}的视线；古怪的伤疤，它是{RUBY_B#猎犬护卫长}伍尔西{RUBY_E#}的勋章……

Indeed, every part of you is real. The brown hair, soft and curly like {RUBY_B#Dreamscape Producer}Benny's{RUBY_E#}; the orange eyes, which make me miss the gaze of {RUBY_B#Head of the Nightingale Family}Sir Whittaker{RUBY_E#}; that odd scar, the mark of {RUBY_B#Head Bloodhound Guard}Woolsey{RUBY_E#}...
还有灰马甲、领带、猎犬勋章、水壶、调饮技术、治安官的身份…它们全都是真实的——
And the gray vest, tie, Hound Emblem, bottle, the bartending and your role as a security officer... These are all true traits...
——来自五十二位忠诚的*家族成员*。
当它们汇聚于一处时，无数细小的真实便编织成谎言——你从每个人身上采撷一缕认知，将它们据为己有，在梦境中*虚构*出了一个完整的「加拉赫」……

When they are gathered, countless tiny truths are woven together into a lie — you collected a small piece of each of them and claimed them for yourself. Then you invented this facade, a complete Gallagher...
...Tell me I'm wrong, minion of the Enigmata.
哈哈哈哈哈哈！你有种，厉害！可以啊，是我太低估你了……
Hahahaha! You have guts. I'll give you that! Not bad. I severely underestimated you...
我欣赏你。但所以呢？这就能证明是我杀了你的妹妹和那位偷渡犯吗？
Admirable. But so what? Can this prove that I murdered your sister and that stowaway?
这能证明你和忆域迷因「死亡」是一丘之貉——已经足够了。
This proves that you and the Memory Zone Meme "Death" are linked — and that's enough.
听好了，我根本不在乎你是如何做到的…我现在只在乎一件事，一个问题的答案——
Listen up. I don't care how you did it... I only care about one thing, the answer to a question...
——你这个混账，该死的丧家犬，为什么要杀了她？！
...You devil! You wretched, despicable dog, why did you kill her!?
本台快讯：匹诺康尼「谐乐大典」已进入倒计时阶段。伴随着钟表小子的嘀嗒声，<unbreak>12</unbreak>个系统时后，这场庆典即将迎来盛大的开幕……

Newsflash: Penacony's Charmony Festival has entered its countdown phase. Accompanied by Clockie's tick-tocks, after <unbreak>12</unbreak> system hours, this grand celebration will commence with much fanfare...
都跟你说了！有什么事情可以好好商量！
I already told you! We can talk things out!
不好意思了，毛茸茸的小家伙，我实在有些要紧事要办，不得不用这种方式请你们帮个小忙。
I'm sorry, fluffy. I really have something urgent to attend to, so I had no choice but to resort to asking this favor of you all.
既然你知道自己在做什么，那我也必须提醒你这么做的风险。
Since you already know what you're doing, I'll also have to remind you of its risks.
兄弟，搞这么剑拔弩张做什么，掏这玩意儿不就是为了打个招呼？
Hey pardner, what's with the hostility? I thought pulling this thing out was just a way of saying hello?
最后一次，表明你的身份和来意。
For the last time, state your identity and purpose.
我叫波提欧，是个「巡海游侠」。
My name's Boothill, and I'm a Galaxy Ranger.
至于吗？表情跟活见了鬼似的，以为我们已经死绝了是吧？哈哈！确实，销声匿迹太久了就这坏处。
You look like you've seen a ghost. Did you think we all went extinct? Haha! Well, that's the price you pay for being off-grid for too long.
「巡猎」的义侠团体可不会劫持星穹列车。
The righteous heroes of The Hunt would never hijack the Astral Express.
我这不还没劫持呢么，拿着枪和人聊聊天就算「劫持」？
I ain't hijacked anything! What, chatting with someone while holding a gun is considered a hijacking?
恕我直言，银河中有许多关于巡海游侠现状的传闻，都不是什么美好的故事。我很难相信你。
Pardon my frankness, but there are plenty of rumors in the cosmos regarding the Galaxy Rangers' current status, and none of them are pretty stories. I have a hard time believing you.
笑死了，这帮傻宝编的故事越来越离谱，还说巡海游侠全都被原始博士变成长臂猿了，正在哪个山沟里荡秋千呢。

This is hilarious. The tale that this bunch of fools spin is getting out of hand — there's even a bit about the Galaxy Rangers being turned into gibbons by Dr. Primitive, and they're in some valley screwing around on swings.
当然，我知道你们不会信。所以同样地，我也不能轻信你们就是真的无名客。
Of course, I know you won't believe me. Which is also why, similarly, I have a hard time believing that you're the real Nameless.
瞧见这枪里的子弹了么？九毫米，永远的经典。眼下我需要星穹列车的帮助，但如果你们和那家伙一样是群冒牌货…啧，这子弹怕是要躺我脑门里了。

See the bullets in this gun? 9-millimeter, an eternal classic. I may need the Astral Express' help right now, but if you're an imposter just like that one... Tsk, then this bullet might just end up in my head.
我可不能让自己身陷危险，是这个道理吧。所以你们得先证明自己…哎，往哪走呢？
I can't allow myself to be exposed to danger. That's just the way it goes. So, you all have to first prove yourselves... Huh, where are you going?
哈？这是——他宝贝的，结盟玉兆？！仙舟真把这东西给你们了？！
Hah? It's a... muddle-fudger... the Jade Abacus of Allying Oath!? The Xianzhou really gave this to you guys!?
这是仙舟「罗浮」景元将军赠予列车的玉兆。这物件在车上，便是仙舟联盟对星穹列车身份的认证。
This is the jade abacus gifted to the Express by the Xianzhou Luofu's General Jing Yuan. Its presence onboard serves as the Xianzhou Alliance's official recognition of the Express.
知道么？第一次来到梦想之地的人，会下意识地停下脚步，确认自己仍站在坚实的土地上。然后，他们会不约而同地抬头望向天空。

Did you know? People who come to the land of dreams for the first time, they'll subconsciously stop to reaffirm that they're still walking on solid ground. And then, they will unanimously raise their heads to gaze at the sky.
无论现实或梦境，仰望天空是人类的本能。自「黄金的时刻」落成的那天起，它就一直在那里，守望每一个声色犬马的夜晚。
Be it reality or dream, staring at the sky is instinctual for humanity. Since the day that the Golden Hour was completed, it's always been there, watching over every single night of decadence.
可如今这片夜空却被无情斩断，染上「虚无」的阴霾。而这个过程…仅仅只在一刀之间。
But now this night sky has been mercilessly severed, dyed with the mist of Nihility. And this whole event... happened within the course of a single slash of a blade.
「一刀」…并不准确。其实是两刀，只是第二斩比较迅速。
A single slash of a blade... isn't really accurate. It was actually two blades, just that the second one was faster.
这场盛会聚集了太多不应被邀请的客人。纵使「同谐」包容万象，为了匹诺康尼的和平，我也不得不对其中的一些人下达逐客令……

Many guests who weren't supposed to be invited have gathered at this banquet. Even if the Harmony is all-embracing, I have no choice but to show some of them the door... for the sake of Penacony, and the peace.
盛会之星容不下你，虚无的偃偶。活在阴影中的人，不应走上光亮的台前。
The Planet of Festivities has no place for you, a puppet of Nihility. Those who live in the shadows do not bear the right to tread the illuminated stage.
就生活在阴影中这点，我们应该没有区别。至少在和别人对话时，你应该现出本貌……
Speaking of living in the shadows, there's probably not much difference between us. It's only polite to reveal your true self, at least when speaking to others...
不能让你留下的理由，又多了一个。
That's just another reason that you can't stay.
但无论你是否相信，这就是真实的「我」。
Whether you believe it or not, this is the real "me."
这就是家族口中的「万众一心」？
Is this the "United as One" that The Family espouses?
我的凡胎早已消散，橡木家系的十万七千三百三十六名孩子是我如今的眼、耳、口，在需要时代我将谐乐在这美梦中传扬，在必要时…替我将罪恶从这乐园里流放。

My mortal shell has long since dissipated. The Oak Family's one hundred and seven thousand, three hundred and thirty-six offspring are now my eyes, ears and mouths, spreading joy across dreams when required, and in times of essential need... exiling evil from this haven in my stead.
听起来，你要请我离开匹诺康尼了。
From the sound of it, it seems like you're asking me to leave Penacony.
很高兴你尚有自知之明，可惜，没有「请」。
I am glad that you're an understanding one. Alas, I'm not "asking."
嗯…我用的是句号。这是一种…陈述。
Hmm... I ended it with a period. It was a statement, not a threat.
在知晓我身份后仍能流露出如此恶意的人，你不是第一个，也不会是最后一个。此情此景发生过太多次，面对我的问询，人们大多会反问「有何不可」。

Knowing who I am and still showing such malice, you're not the first, nor will you be the last. This scene played out many times before — and usually, when faced with my questions, most people retort "Why can't I?"
The result has invariably been that they "can't."
你很自信，但请记得——家族谦逊，可从不软弱。「同谐」的弦音遍及寰宇，若你不从，只要那把长刀出鞘分毫，你终其一生都无法逃离「无限夫长」的怒火。

You are confident, but be reminded: The Family is forgiving, but not weak. The chords of the Harmony extend across worlds — if you do not comply, when the blade is unsheathed for even a hair's breadth, you will never be able to escape the Eternal Centurion's wrath in all of your lifetime.
而在那之前…一百三十七人，这是自成为梦主以来，我亲手流放的外邦人。他们中曾有人折断我的双翼，曾有人将我的身躯焚毁……
One hundred and thirty-seven individuals: That is how many heathens I have exiled since I became Dreammaster. Among them, were those who once severed my wings, and those who immolated my body...
但今天，我仍站在这里，不介意为这数字再添一笔。
And here I stand again, about to add another mark to the tally.
然后你会死。我的意思是…「你们」都会。
And you will die. I mean... all of you will.
…但那种事不会发生。就照你说的，我会离开。
...But that won't come to pass. I'll do as you ask. I'll leave.
I wasn't aware there was a choice.
于你而言，这的确是唯一的道路。请时刻记得，你和匹诺康尼不属于一个世界，生于彼岸者，无法在此岸寻得归处。
To you, that surely is the only option. Please bear in mind, you and Penacony are of different worlds — those born on the far bank cannot seek solace across the river.
离开，永远别再回来。盛会之星的光芒太过耀眼，吸引了太多骗子、恶徒、罪犯，但即便是「同谐」…也绝对不会欢迎「虚无」的自灭者。

Leave, and never return. The radiance of the Planet of Festivities is overwhelmingly bright, luring in tricksters, wrongdoers, and criminals. But even the Harmony itself... will never welcome the Self-Annihilator of Nihility.
更何况这位自灭者还要带着周遭的一切入灭。你的力量分明是沉眠无相者的馈赠，深不见底，就像是深渊中淌出的一条支流，为众生带去死亡与罪恶。

And even more so, when this Self-Annihilator heralds the destruction of everything. Your strength is obviously a gift of the sleeping and shapeless, immeasurable and fathomless, like a tributary spawned from the abyss that brings death and sin to all.
把这当作来自彼岸之人的忠告吧：你比我更清楚，匹诺康尼已然背离了「同谐」。无论你们的目的是什么…我只能看见一种结局。

Take it from someone on the other side of your so-called river: You know better than I do that Penacony has already deviated from the Harmony. Whatever your intentions may be... I foresee only one outcome.
它的未来是一片「虚无」，就和所有溺亡在{RUBY_B#「虚无」IX}祂{RUBY_E#}阴影中的世界一样。
Its future holds nothing but Nihility, just like all the worlds that have drowned in {RUBY_B#IX, the Nihility}THEIR{RUBY_E#} shadow.
无论银河浩瀚，只需轻轻一握便能召唤成千上万的云骑军…宝了个贝的，得有多壮观啊。
And across these sprawlin' stars, a gentle squeeze is all it takes to rustle up a whole legion of Cloud Knights. Now I reckon that'd be one fudgin' sight to behold.
巡海游侠离开聚光灯太久了，没这种道上公认的好东西。但这种场合我见得多了，解决方式也很简单……

Been ages since the Galaxy Rangers had the spotlight shone on 'em, and we ain't equipped with such fancy gadgets. But I've been around the block enough to know the way to handle these types of situations is easy as pie...
来吧，你可以随便向我发问，看看我的回答能不能赢得你的信任。要是真觉得可疑，再让我离开也不迟。
Alright then, feel free to toss any question my way, and let's see if my answers can't earn your trust. If your gut tells you otherwise, it still ain't too late to show me the door.
And why would I play along?
如果我真是巡海游侠，这么做你绝对不会吃亏。
If I truly am a real Galaxy Ranger, you stand to lose nothing.
说说看，巡海游侠是个怎样的组织？
Alright then. Tell me, what kind of organization are the Galaxy Rangers?
哈，兄弟，这问题够难回答的。我甚至很难说我们是个组织。
Ha, my friend, this question is a hard one. Don't think I can even consider us an "organization" to begin with.
无非是大家都走在「巡猎」的命途上，都有自己坚信的正义，都不是那么…受所谓「普世价值」的欢迎呗。
Everyone's on their own fated path along The Hunt, with their own resolute sense of righteousness, and not so... welcome among such so-called universal values.
这种回答得不到信任，只会让你的处境更加危险。
This reply does not instill trust, and only makes your predicament more precarious.
我猜你是想问什么共同的「信念」吧？但巡海游侠用不着那种东西，我们聚在一起，靠的是共同的「底线」。
I'm guessing you're gonna ask about some form of shared faith, right? But us Galaxy Rangers don't need that sort of thing. What brings us together is a shared bottom line.
不可欺凌弱小、不可滥杀无辜…这些个誓言可不是什么高高在上的信念，而是做人绝不应该触犯的底线。
Never bully the weak, never kill the innocent... These oaths aren't some lofty beliefs, but the fundamental bottom line that one must never cross as a person.
身为巡海游侠，我们只看底线，每当有人要践踏它时，「巡猎」的复仇就会找上门去。
As Galaxy Rangers, we strictly adhere to the bottom line — when someone crosses them, The Hunt's vengeance will surely come knockin'.
而这时，「底线」的另一重意义就来了——只要不触碰它，你做什么都行，明白么？
And in this moment, the other crucial meaning of "bottom line" comes into play — as long as you don't cross it, you're free to do whatever you please. You catch my drift?
第二个问题，为什么要找星穹列车的麻烦。
Second question: Why do you seek trouble with the Astral Express?
都说了，没想找你们麻烦。我有事必须去趟匹诺康尼，但没有邀请函，家族连酒店门都不让进。这不…只能借用下无名客的身份。全银河都知道你们是家族的贵客。

I already said that I seek no trouble. I must go to Penacony for a matter, but I don't have an invite, and I can't even enter The Family's hotel doors. If only... I could borrow the Nameless' identity. The entire cosmos knows you're guests of The Family.
Aren't the Galaxy Rangers also esteemed guests?
哦！你说到点子上了…我就是为此而来的！告诉你们也无妨，游侠们在追杀一个「冒牌货」，一个穿我们衣服冒名顶替的小可爱，她现在就在匹诺康尼。
Oh! You've hit the nail on the head... This is why I'm here! It's fine if I tell you — the Rangers are pursuing an imposter, a son of a nice lady posing as one of us. She's on Penacony right now.
我的线人是个忆者。她就和所有的模因生物一样，突然出现，又突然消失。真他宝贝的吓人。但她提供了重要线索。
My informant is a Memokeeper. She's the same as all memetic organisms — appearing one moment, and gone the next. She scares the fudge outta me. Still, she gave me some vital info.
那个冒充巡海游侠的人…是谁？
That Galaxy Ranger imposter... Who is it?
不难，只是说出来怕你不信。那家伙自称「黄泉」，根据我们的眼线，她很可能是一个…「虚无」的令使。
It isn't, just that you might not believe me. That person calls herself Acheron, and according to our informant, she could be... an Emanator of Nihility.
看我怎么说的，放心，我刚得到这消息的时候，反应和你一模一样。
That's what I said. Don't worry. When I first received the news, I had the exact same reaction as you.
IX从不瞥视任何人，这才符合常理。祂有什么理由授予凡人力量？
IX never gives anyone so much as a first glance, and that's perfectly normal. What reason would THEY have to bequeath strength unto mortals?
那你一定知道令使也可以隐瞒自己的身份，甚至对不少人而言，这么做更好，不然就意味着走上银河厮杀大舞台，甚至…背叛所行的命途。

Then you must know that Emanators can also conceal their own identities, which, for many people, is better that way. Otherwise, there'd be wanton bloodshed across the cosmos, or even... perhaps... turning their back on the Path they're supposed to follow.
我就有幸见识过一位「欢愉」令使，只看外表和那帮小丑根本没区别。要不是老子运气好把它灌醉了，还真不知道对面的身份这么「显赫」！

I had the good fortune of running into an Elation Emanator — its appearance was no different than that of those clowns. If it weren't through sheer luck that I got it drunk, I would have never known of its eminent status!
即便是最纯粹的「巡猎」也有灯光下的仙舟联盟和阴影中的巡海游侠。命途终究是由人创造的概念，一定存在超出你我认知的外界。

Even in the purest Hunt, you'll find the Xianzhou Alliance under the spotlight and Galaxy Rangers lurking in the shadows. Paths are inevitably concepts created by people, and exist in planes beyond our understanding.
认为「虚无」不存在令使…没准只是因为我们还不够「虚无」呢。
To reckon that Nihility Emanators don't exist...? Maybe we just ain't nihilistic enough.
所以明白了么，你的伙伴现在很危险，可以说是相当危险。如果还不相信，你大可给他们发个消息看看。但我会劝你动作快点……
So do you understand now? Your companions are in danger, and it's pretty harrowing. If you don't want to believe me, you'd best send a message to 'em. But I'd advise you to move fast...
毕竟咱俩谁都不知道梦境里发生了什么，也同样不知道那忆者的话有几分是真……
We don't know what's happening in the Dreamscape, or how much of what the Memokeeper said is true...
以及那位「黄泉」…究竟打算做什么。
And that Acheron... Who knows what she intends to do.
…方才的奇异景象是由克劳克影视乐园的设备故障引发，家族已第一时间封锁现场，并无人员受伤。各位宾客敬请放心。

...Attention, please: The unusual event that occurred moments ago was due to a technical malfunction at Clock Studios Theme Park. The Family has promptly responded to secure the area, and we're happy to report that there have been no injuries.
我敢发誓，那绝对不是拍电影！那么多筹码从空中掉下来，我还抓到了一枚，可转眼间它就消失得无影无踪了！
I swear that was no movie shoot! So many chips fell from the sky, and I even caught one of them, but it vanished in an instant before my very eyes!
请问，你说的是克劳克影视乐园的事故吗？
Excuse me, are you talking about the Clock Studios Theme Park incident?
嗯？对啊，怎么了…知、知更鸟小姐？！我没看错吧？
Hmm? Yeah, what about it... M—Miss Robin!? Am I seeing things right?
呵呵，别紧张。很抱歉给你的美梦之旅带来了不好的体验。你刚才提到的筹码令我很在意，能麻烦再详细说说吗？

Heh, no need to worry. I apologize for any inconvenience caused to your delightful dream journey. What you just mentioned about the chips really piqued my interest. Would you mind providing more details about the incident?
噢。就是…那种常见的筹码，花花绿绿的，哗哗掉下来，像下雨一样。
Oh. It was just... those chips you normally see everywhere — the green ones — they fell from the sky, as if it were raining!
然后那些筹码就直接消失了对吧？嗯，看来…是鸢尾花家系筹备已久的「拟梦技术」呢。
And then those chips simply disappeared? Ah, it appears... to be the DreamSim Tech the Iris Family has been developing.
诶？知更鸟小姐的意思是…那些筹码都是演出效果？可我明明——
Huh? Miss Robin, you mean... those chips were all part of a performance? But I really...
嘘——这项技术尚未公开，原本是要在谐乐大典上首次亮相的，没想到意外泄露了。
Shh — this technology hasn't been made public yet. It was originally planned to debut at the Charmony Festival, but it seems it's been leaked.
可否帮我保守这个秘密呢？因为这片如梦似幻的筹码雨…原定是要在我的演出上使用的。
Can you help me keep this secret? The raining chips... were supposed to be part of my act.
原、原来是这样啊！那就说得通了，只要能让谐乐大典顺利举办，我一定全力配合！
I—I see! Then it all makes sense now. I'll do anything to help make the Charmony Festival a success!
谢谢！作为交换，我也赠送你一份小礼品吧。
Thank you! As appreciation, I'd like to give you a token gift.
在大典的某个时刻按下它，说不定会有惊喜哦。
Press it at just the right moment in the celebration, and there could be an unexpected treat in store for you.
好啦，似乎别的客人也在烦恼呢，我先失陪了，祝你继续享受这片梦境。
All right. It looks like there are other guests who are also confused. I'll have to excuse myself — please enjoy the Dreamscape.
家族承诺过，会保障客人在梦境中的安全。但我亲眼看见一群有机生命走向影视乐园，不久之后，天空就被划破，黑色的雨从虚空中渗出。

The Family promised they would protect the guests within the Dreamscape, but I witnessed a group of organic lifeforms making their way to the theme park, and soon after, a rip tore through the sky, and black rain started leaking out of the void.
家族需要给出一个合理的解释，否则我会立即带上爱人返回现实。如果梦境不再是乐园，继续留在这里也没有意义。

The Family needs to provide a reasonable explanation, or I'll take my loved ones and return to reality. I thought the Dreamscape was supposed to be a paradise. If it's not, then there's no point staying here.
看来这位先生是见识过许多场面的大人物，有不速之客混入了梦境，此事不假。
It appears the good sir has seen many great events, and it's true that an uninvited guest has unexpectedly entered the Dreamscape.
但他们的目标并非普通宾客，而是公司的使节。家族也一定会将客人们的安危列为优先级首位。
However, their target is not the ordinary guests, but the ambassadors of the IPC. The Family will certainly ensure that the safety of the guests is of the highest importance.
知更鸟小姐。我知道猎犬家系已经封锁了影视乐园，也相信家族能妥善控制局势，但这于事无补。
Miss Robin. I know the Bloodhound Family has already sealed off the theme park and has control over the situation, but it won't resolve the problem.
家族尽可以想方设法来维护声誉，而作为宾客，我同样不想以自己的生命作为赌注。
The Family can try their best to protect their reputation, but as a guest, I don't wish to gamble with my life.
可如您所见，先生，本次事故中没有任何无辜群众受到影响。
But as you can see, sir, no innocent bystanders were affected in this incident.
梦境或许不像承诺中那般完美，但没有什么地方比家族治理下的美梦更安全，相信您比我更清楚这点。试问如果这种事故发生在现实，又有多少人能全身而退呢？

Perhaps the Dreamscape is not as perfect as promised. But there's no place safer than dreams under The Family's rule. I believe you know this better than I do. If this incident happened in real life, how many people would be able to walk away from it?
我可以留在这里。但请记住，宾客来到匹诺康尼是为了享受梦境，不希望被牵扯进家族和公司的纠葛，别再让多余的事发生了。

I could stay here. But keep in mind, guests come to Penacony to enjoy the Dreamscapes. They do not wish to be entangled in a conflict between The Family and the IPC so, let's not have any more unnecessary incidents.
当然。谐乐大典开幕在即，我们也会尽全力做好准备，请放心。以示歉意，家族为宾客们准备了这份礼物。感谢各位的理解。

Of course. With the Charmony Festival about to commence, we will spare no effort in our preparations, rest assured. To express our apologies, The Family has arranged this gift for the guests. Thank you for understanding.
你好。请问这里发生什么事了吗？
Hello. May I ask what happened here?
啊，没什么大事，只是克劳克影视乐园出现了排演事故，请各位宾客稍安勿躁……
Nothing to be worried about. There's been a small rehearsal mishap at Clock Studios Theme Park. Please stay calm...
喂！你是傻的吗，知更鸟小姐都认不出来，以为在跟谁说话呢！
Hey! Are you a fool? You don't even recognize Miss Robin? Who do you think you're talking to?
啊？对对对对不起！我才转到猎犬家系没几天，还不习惯在街头工作，没注意到是您…非常抱歉！
Ah? I—I—I—I'm sorry! I've just been transferred to the Bloodhound Family, and I'm still not too used to working on the streets. I didn't realize it was you... I'm so sorry!
不用紧张，你们执勤辛苦了。现在情况还好吗？
Hey, don't sweat it. You guys have a tough job, I know how it is. How's the situation looking?
报告！我们封锁了影视乐园，大部分客人都对梦中的奇异景象习以为常，暂未发现隐患，预计很快就能恢复秩序。
We've sealed off the theme park. Most guests are used to bizarre phenomena in the Dreamscape, and so far, no threats have been detected. We can expect order to be restored soon.
知更鸟小姐放心，我们会加强巡逻，保证不出任何意外。
Rest assured, Miss Robin, we'll intensify our patrols to ensure that no incidents occur.
我相信你们。不过关于影视乐园发生的事，各位猎犬又是怎么想的呢？没关系，说出心底真实的想法就好。
I trust you guys. But... regarding what happened in the theme park, what do you Hounds think about it? It's okay. Feel free to speak your mind.
其实事发前不久我就在现场…公司的使节来者不善，这件事是真的吧？还有那位巡海游侠，轻而易举就斩断了天空……
Actually, I was there shortly after it happened... Is it true that the IPC's ambassadors came with ill intent? And that Galaxy Ranger who easily cut through the sky...
唉，知更鸟小姐，我实话跟您说，大家心里头都在犯嘀咕呢。本来这么多派系齐聚匹诺康尼就够让人不安的了……
Miss Robin, to tell you the truth, everyone has been talking about it. The myriad factions on Penacony have already been causing unease for everyone...
感谢你们对家族的忠诚，盛会之星确实遇到了些麻烦，那位公司的代表…试图收回匹诺康尼的所有权，甚至做好了采取强硬手段的准备。

Thank you all for your loyalty towards The Family. The Planet of Festivities has indeed run into some trouble. The representative from the IPC... He's trying to regain ownership of Penacony, and is prepared for a hostile takeover.
当然，家族没有同意。交涉破裂的结果…就如你们所见。
Of course, The Family did not agree. The result of the failed negotiations... is as you see it now.
怪不得。我听说公司员工被禁止进入梦境，原来这才是主因。那个闹事的混蛋呢，有被抓住吗？
No wonder. So this is the main reason why the IPC staff are banned from entering the Dreamscape. Did they apprehend the troublemaker in the end?
放心，星期日先生正在追踪他的去向，预计很快会有结果。但事已至此，公司一定不会轻易罢休，所以梦境的秩序和稳定就要拜托你们了。

Don't worry. Mr. Sunday is currently tracking his whereabouts and he'll have something to show for it soon. However, given the situation, the IPC surely won't let this go easily. Therefore, we are relying on you Hounds to maintain the order and stability of the Dreamscape.
知更鸟小姐放心。我们肯定会认真执行命令，绝不让公司的家伙得逞！
Please be assured, Miss Robin, we take our orders seriously. We won't let those IPC cronies get away with this!
辛苦了。如果还有其他成员感到不安，可以代我转述。守护梦境需要大家共同的努力。
