Thank you for your hard work. If there are any other members who still feel uneasy, please tell them on my behalf that protecting the Dreamscape requires everyone's help.
这是鸢尾花家系为客人们准备的小礼物，也给你们一份。在谐乐大典上打开，会有意想不到的惊喜哦。
This is a small gift prepared by the Iris Family for the guests — there's one for you too. Please open it at the Charmony Festival for an unexpected surprise!
居然收到了知更鸟小姐的礼物…简直像是做梦一样！不对，我这不是已经在梦里了吗？
I can't believe I received a gift from Miss Robin... It feels like I'm dreaming! Wait — I AM in a dream!
要真有人来找事，我们不怕上战场。请放心，梦境的和平稳定就由猎犬们来守护！
If trouble comes knocking on our door, we're not afraid to go to war. Rest assured. The Dreamscape's peace will be protected by the Bloodhound Family!
知更鸟…小姐？是那位闻名宇宙的超级明星——知更鸟小姐！
Miss Robin...? That's the renowned cosmic superstar — Miss Robin!
没想到会在这遇见粉丝呢，我很荣幸。欢迎来到匹诺康尼，一个满盈着美梦的世界。
I didn't expect to meet a fan here. I'm honored. Welcome to Penacony, a world filled with wonderful dreams.
没想到能遇见真人…您、您这时候不是应该在为谐乐大典的召开做准备吗？
I can't believe I'm actually meeting the real Robin... Sh—Shouldn't you be preparing for the Charmony Festival?
舞台筹备固然重要，但举办仪典本就是为了向各位传达神主的谐乐，如有机会能与大家共唱，我自然不应拒绝。
Preparation is important, but the ceremony is fundamentally about sharing the Great One's harmony with everyone. If there's a chance to sing with everyone, I will not refuse.
方才那场事故，给部分宾客带来了不好的体验。作为家族的一员，我理应前来向各位致歉。
Regarding the recent mishap... I understand it negatively impacted some of our guests. As a member of The Family, it's only right for me to come forward and offer my apologies to everyone.
可…那真的是事故吗？我们都看见了如雨滴般坠落的筹码，还有划破天空的红光。说是特效未免也太逼真了吧？
But... are you sure it was actually a mishap? Everyone saw those chips descending like rain and the red light tearing through the sky. Claiming it was merely special effects seems a bit farfetched.
我还遇到了那位慷慨的先生，他的样子很不对劲，始终在自言自语，难道这也是剧本的布景？
Plus, I met that generous gentleman. He looked really out of it and kept talking to himself. Is this also part of the performance?
请大家不要惊慌。相信家族能给各位一个满意的答复。
Everyone, please do not panic. I believe that The Family will give everyone a satisfactory answer in due time.
可就算知更鸟小姐这么说…也很难相信啊……
Even if you say so, Miss Robin... It's hard to believe...
唉，也有这种怎么都不听劝的人啊。没完没了…我也是会累的。
Ugh, some people just never listen, do they? It's never-ending. It just goes on and on... I'm getting really tired of this.
但还是帮人帮到底吧，没办法，谁叫我是出了名的乐•善•好•施呢？
Still, I suppose I should keep on helping everyone, I am the epitome of "joy, kindness, and goodness," after all.
咦，我刚刚是在做什么来着？小姐你又是……
Huh, what was I just doing? And who might you be, miss...?
收下这份礼物吧，小宾客。这可是家族特意为你准备的礼物。
Here, take this, little guest. This gift has been specially prepared for you by The Family.
一定要好好拿着它，等到谐乐大典开幕，然后——在剧目的最高潮，和身边的人一同摁下这个按钮……
Make sure to take good care of it until the opening of the Charmony Festival. Then, when the show reaches its climax — press the button together with the others around you...
说不定…会发生非常有趣的事哦？
You never know... something VERY exciting might happen!
放心吧，我不会告诉别人的。期待知更鸟小姐的演出！
Don't worry. I won't tell anyone. I can't wait for your performance, Miss Robin!
我可以留在这里。但请记住，宾客来到匹诺康尼是为了享受梦境，不希望被牵扯进家族和公司的纠葛，别再让多余的事发生了。

I could stay here. But keep in mind, guests come to Penacony to enjoy the Dreamscapes. They do not wish to be entangled in a conflict between The Family and the IPC so, let's not have any more unnecessary incidents.
居然收到了知更鸟小姐的礼物…简直像是做梦一样！不对，我这不是已经在梦里了吗？
I can't believe I received a gift from Miss Robin... It feels like I'm dreaming! Wait — I AM in a dream!
要真有人来找事，我们不怕上战场。请放心，梦境的和平稳定就由猎犬们来守护！
If trouble comes knocking on our door, we're not afraid to go to war. Rest assured. The Dreamscape's peace will be protected by the Bloodhound Family!
这么多人都在议论，影视乐园闹出的动静可真大呀……
So many people talking about it, this commotion at the theme park definitely made waves...
我从来不知道，你还会做这种事。
I never knew you could do this.
为什么，因为这里是罪恶都市耶佩拉？
Why? Because this is Jepella, the city of sins?
我只是觉得，你已经二十个系统时没睡了…没问题吗？
I'm just thinking, you haven't slept in twenty system hours... Are you sure you're okay?
没问题。死不了，我和你都一样。
I'm fine. I'll survive. Same goes for you.
我可未必，还是开慢点吧。
I'm not so sure about that. Slow down a bit.
潜入已经结束了，你随时可以启动「萨姆」。
Infiltration is over. Feel free to activate Sam anytime you like.
离「剧本」下一幕还有些时间，让我再多待会儿吧，用这副身体。
There's still some time before the next part of the script unfolds. Let me stay a little longer in this body.
而后便是良久的沉默。两人不再提起任何话题，似乎对这种沉默习以为常。
A long silence ensued. Neither of them brought up any topic, seemingly accustomed to this silence.
直到很久以后，车里再度响起一声轻叹。
It wasn't until much later that a soft sigh once again broke the quiet in the car.
好长的隧道啊。出发的时候，没觉得它有这么长。
Such a long tunnel. Didn't feel this long when I set off.
半个系统时后，它会带我们找到卡芙卡，接着就是耶佩拉兄弟会的覆灭。
In half a system hour, it will lead us to Kafka, and then comes the downfall of the Jepella Brotherhood.
Is that also part of the script?
就算你选择性忽视，他们的命运也不会改变。
Their destiny won't change just because of your selective ignorance.
I told you before, it's a bad habit.
那你呢？这一次，你能得到想要的「死亡」么？
What about you, then? Is this the moment you finally find the "Death" you've been looking for?
一如既往，一片空白。它不在这颗星球。为什么突然问这个？
As always, it's a blank slate. It's not on this planet. Why the sudden inquiry?
因为我正在一辆疲劳驾驶的车上…我希望它能安全抵达。
Because I'm currently in a car with a sleep-deprived driver... I just want to get there in one piece.
这车有自动驾驶，我只是把手搭在方向盘上，行了吧？
This car has full self-driving capabilities. I'll just put my hand on the steering wheel. Will that do?
Hey, don't take everything so seriously.
…艾利欧总说命运只有一种，谁也无法绕开。他能看见未来，而我们…同样知晓自己「既定的结局」。
...Elio would always say there's only one type of destiny: The inescapable type. He can see the future, and we... likewise are aware of our "predetermined end."
但在那一刻到来前，人依旧能为自己选择去做些什么…我们都有这个权利，对吧？
But before that moment arrives, we can still choose what we do... We all have this right, don't we?
今天过后，耶佩拉的名字就会从银河历史中消失，而永火官邸将取而代之，在不远的未来收到一封邀请函……
After today, Jepella's name will disappear from cosmic history, and the Ever-Flame Mansion will take its place. In the not-too-distant future, you'll receive an invitation...
祝你在那里找到想要的答案…或者，解脱。
I hope you find whatever you seek there, be it answers... or salvation.
一切回到了原点，你曾经从这里踏入「黄金的时刻」，也将从这里踏入真正的{RUBY_B#流放之地}「匹诺康尼」{RUBY_E#}。
We're back to where it all began. You entered the Golden Hour from this place, and it is also from here where you will enter the true {RUBY_B#Land of the Exiles}Penacony{RUBY_E#}.
很高兴能再次与你同行。事到如今，我也终于能向你袒露全部的事实。如你所见…我的另一个名字是「星核猎手」萨姆。
It's a pleasure to journey alongside you once more, but it's time I laid bare the entire truth before you. As you might have heard... I also go by another name: Stellaron Hunter, Sam.
我没事…抱歉，希望先前没有吓到你。
I'm fine... Sorry, I hope I haven't scared you.
I'm sorry. I had no other choice...
我知道你有很多疑问…还记得我们在陌生的梦境里遭遇了「死亡」吗？那时我被迷因攥在手中……
I know you have many questions... Do you remember when we encountered "Death" in that strange Dreamscape? When I was caught by that meme...
在它即将行凶的瞬间，我从那只骇人的瞳孔里看见了「另一片梦境」的倒影。
In that instant before it killed me, I saw the reflection of another Dreamscape in its ghastly pupils.
根据「剧本」的提示，我对那只迷因有了些猜想。于是我让银狼寄出邀请，将各位引导至梦中的酒店……
So, following the clues in the script, I came up with some theories about the meme. That's why I instructed Silver Wolf to issue invitations, drawing everyone to the dream's hotel...
我本打算在你们面前唤来「死亡」，用更直接的手段揭示谜底，邀请你们入局。但事与愿违，我无法违背「剧本」，甚至来不及开口向你说明。

I intended to call upon "Death" before you arrived, to solve the riddle using more direct means, and then invite you to join. However, contrary to my wishes, I couldn't defy the script, and I didn't get a chance to explain it to you.
就像你看到的，我被「死亡」的翼刃贯穿。浓稠忆质的重压…它们在脑海中炸开，恍若现实。
It is how you see now — I was impaled by the bladed wings of "Death." The heavy pressure of concentrated memoria miasma... exploded in my mind, as if it was actually reality.
但一瞬的麻痹散去后，我发现自己的身体完好无损。
But after the momentary numbness subsided, I found that my body was absolutely unscathed.
我果然还活着，且如我所想——抵达了与「美梦」截然不同的地方。匹诺康尼的梦境下埋藏着另一片更原始，也更混沌的忆域，它的名字是…「流放之地」。

I was still alive, and it was just as I thought — I had arrived at a place starkly different from this beautiful dream. Beneath the Dreamscape of Penacony lies another more chaotic, more primal Memory Zone. Its name... Land of the Exiles.
于是我返回梦境中的酒店，想告诉你它的存在。但我还不能公开自己的身份，只能想办法转移与你同行之人的注意，将你带离战场。

And so then I returned to the hotel in the Dreamscape, hoping to tell you of its existence. Yet I could not reveal my own identity, so I could only divert your party's attention and lure you away from the battlefield.
而后，我的种种尝试皆以失败告终。直到不久前，一道血红的刀光劈碎了梦中的高墙，令你们跌落到这深层的梦境中，我才得以将你和同伴们一个个唤醒……

And after, all my attempts proved futile. It wasn't until not long ago, when a crimson blade of light shattered the high wall of the dream, causing you all to fall far into the abyssal depths of the Dreamscape, that I was able to awaken you and your companions one by one...
这就是此前发生的一切。
And that's it, that is all that's happened so far.
我知道，要无条件地相信这些很难。我只是想说，你离最后的答案很近了。只需做一件事，我就能为你证明……
I know it's tough to believe all this without reservations. I just want to say you're very close to the final answer — just one more thing needs to be done, and then I can prove it to you...
接下来，让我们离开这里吧…请闭上眼。
Now, let's leave this place... Please close your eyes.
然后深呼吸，在心里描绘梦境的轮廓，记得…绝对不要睁眼。
Take a deep breath, and visualize the Dreamscape's outline in your heart. And remember... you must not open your eyes at all times.
不用害怕，迎接我们的人…来了。
Don't be afraid. The one who has come to greet us... has arrived.
{NICKNAME}, glad to see you're safe and sound.
「闭上眼睛」…这就是答案。很不可思议吧，一直被我们视作「死亡」的怪物，其实是流放之地的守卫。它遵循某种特定的规律，将美梦中的人掳走，带往这里。

"Close your eyes"... This is the answer. Isn't it incredible? The monster that we have always known as "Death," is actually the guardian of the land of the exiles. It abides by a certain rule, abducting people from their dreams and bringing them here.
我们此前一直在困惑的「梦境中是否存在真正的死亡」，现在看来完全是幕后主使设下的思维陷阱，为了掩盖人们失踪的真相，以及…这座名为「流梦礁」的城寨。

The question that has been perplexing us — "Does death really exist in the Dreamscape?" — appears to be a cognitive trap. It was laid by those orchestrating events from the shadows to cover up the truth behind the disappearances, and the existence of this fortress known as Dreamflux Reef.
那只迷因的每一次出现都与「钟表匠」有关，既然流梦礁是它将众人掳走的目的地，想必不少困扰我们许久的问题，都能在此地得到启发。
Every emergence of that meme is related to the Watchmaker. Since Dreamflux Reef is where it brings its captives, it's likely that many of our longstanding questions will be answered in this place.
这里的氛围和美梦截然不同，人们生活得极其松散，不存在家族那样的管理者，精神状态也有些微妙的恍惚。
The atmosphere here is starkly different from the beautiful dream. There are no regulators here like The Family, and they all look like they're mildly dazed.
但从居民们的只言片语中，我得到了一个熟悉的名字…「加拉赫」。
But from the whispers of the residents, I've heard a familiar name... Gallagher.
又是这个男人，总是恰到好处地出现在每一个关键的地方…倒也为我们省去了寻人的麻烦。
It's that man again, always in the right place at the right time... though that does save us the trouble of looking for him.
姬子和三月已先一步动身了。{NICKNAME}，调整下状态，我们这就出发。
Himeko and March have already made a move. {NICKNAME}, get ready. We're about to set off.
有什么担忧，不妨说出来一起讨论讨论。
Something on your mind? Let's talk about it.
难怪黄泉小姐始终不愿拔刀…难以想象那朴素的刀鞘里竟蕴含着如此恐怖的力量。若非砂金的力量源自「存护」，恐怕整片梦境都会受到波及。

No wonder Miss Acheron is so averse to drawing her blade... it's hard to imagine such terrifying power could reside in an ordinary sheath. If it weren't for the fact that Aventurine's power originated from the Preservation, the entire Dreamscape would have been affected.
不必为此感到负担。即便没有你体内的那颗星核，砂金也会找到其他方法达成目的。眼下就相信黄泉小姐吧。考虑到她的实力，我们应该也无需担心。

Don't feel burdened by this. Even without that Stellaron inside you, Aventurine would still have found other methods to accomplish his goal. Let's just believe in Miss Acheron. And given her prowess, I don't think we've got anything to worry about.
What are your thoughts on Gallagher?
在你们开展调查时，他提供了关键信息：米哈伊尔——曾经的「钟表匠」——与家族一同建立起如今的匹诺康尼，又因为某些原因与家族决裂。

During your investigation, he shared a vital piece of information. Mikhail, the former Watchmaker who collaborated with The Family to construct the Penacony we're familiar with today, had a falling out with The Family for specific reasons.
但问题正在于此，你们明明是在侦办凶案，身为治安官的他为何顾左右而言他，开始讲述自己和「钟表匠」的过去？
But this is precisely where the problem lies — you were clearly investigating a murder. So then why, as a security officer, is he changing the subject to talk about his past with the Watchmaker?
现在这个名字又出现在流萤小姐口中…很难不令人心生怀疑。
And now with Firefly mentioning his name again... it's hard not to be suspicious.
在找到你之前，她已向我们表明了星核猎手的身份，并分享了许多信息。
Before we found you, she'd already revealed her Stellaron Hunter identity, and shared a lot of information.
那位「熔火骑士」的真身竟是一位少女…于她而言，这断然是个不可轻易告人的秘密。从这点来看，可以相信她有合作的意愿。

Who would've thought that the Molten Knight's true identity was actually a young girl... For her, this is a secret that she cannot allow others to know. That being the case, I think we can believe she's willing to cooperate.
不过，她也有些秘密没有完全袒露。我总有种感觉，那女孩的状态与一般的入梦者不同…但愿不会造成危险吧。
But, she didn't reveal all her secrets. I just can't shake the feeling that her situation is different from that of the typical dreamer... And I hope that doesn't lead to any dangerous predicaments.
希望你已平复了心情。等你做好准备，我们就出发。
I hope you've regained a little composure. We'll move out when you're ready.
很抱歉，直到现在才能把所知的一切都告诉你。
I'm really sorry for waiting until now to tell you everything.
为什么不说出真实身份？
Why couldn't you reveal your true identity?
有两个原因，其一是「剧本」——在艾利欧看见的未来中，萨姆和星穹列车的对立无可避免。我试着打破预言的桎梏，也只能做到现在这样。

Two reasons: Firstly, the script — in the future that Elio saw, Sam and the Astral Express' confrontation was inevitable. I tried to break the shackles of the prophecy, but this is as far as I could go.
除此以外…是我的私心。我想以「流萤」…而非「萨姆」的身份和你们同行。
That aside... there were also my personal motives. I wished to travel with you as Firefly... and not Sam.
It's all right. I didn't take it personally.
This is still hard for me to accept.
我…理解。保持对星核猎手的警惕，不是一件坏事。
I... I get it. Being cautious around a Stellaron Hunter isn't a bad thing.
星核猎手也想要遗产吗？
Do the Stellaron Hunters also want a piece of the legacy?
艾利欧给我的指示只有一条——「让星穹列车一同追逐『盛大的遗产』」。这意味着钟表匠的遗产对「开拓」的旅途、对你都意义非凡。
Elio only gave me one instruction: Allow the Astral Express to pursue the Grand Legacy. It means that the Watchmaker's Legacy holds great significance to Trailblazing, and to you.
以前，艾利欧的剧本都是围绕着某颗具体的星核展开。但在你出现后，这条规则似乎就不适用了。也许，他也在未来中看到了「不可能之事」吧。

Elio's scripts used to revolve and expand around certain specific Stellarons. But with your appearance, this condition has apparently ceased to be appropriate. Perhaps, he also saw the "impossible" in the future.
还记得我和你说过的「医疗舱」么？那就是「萨姆」——苍穹战线的格拉默铁骑，火萤IV型{RUBY_B#S.A.M.}战略强袭装甲{RUBY_E#}。

Do you still remember the medical cabin I told you about? Well, that's Sam — It belongs to the Iron Cavalry of Glamoth's Firmament Frontline, a Fyrefly Type-IV {RUBY_B#S.A.M.}Strategic Assault Mech{RUBY_E#}.
它是我生命的摇篮，是我诞生于世的意义，以及在很长一段时间里，它是世界眼中…我应当呈现的样子。
It is the cradle of my vitality, and the meaning of my birth. And for the longest time, it was... how I should have looked to the rest of the world.
流梦礁的时间尺度与现实不同，千万不能放松警惕。你对忆质很敏感，稍有不慎…可能会迷失在这片忆域中。
The timescale of Dreamflux Reef differs from reality, so we mustn't lower our guard. You're sensitive to memoria — A slight misstep, and you could get lost in this Memory Zone.
这座城寨的气氛…和美梦大不相同啊。
The atmosphere in this fortress is... pretty different from that in the beautiful dream.
第一次看见时，我也很惊讶。这里的天空，就像是…十二梦境的倒影。
When I first saw it, I was in awe too. The sky here, it's like... a reflection of the twelve Dreamscapes.
更奇怪的是，这里也分成了贸易区和居住区，尽管朴素，却十分完备。看来有相当数量的人在此生活。

What's even more bizarre, is that this place is also separated into trade and residential areas. The layout may be simple, but the facilities are very comprehensive. It seems that there are quite a number of people living here.
两处梦境虽风格各异，建筑的样式却相差不大，很像是同一位设计师的作品。这种相似背后的联系也引人遐想……
Though both Dreamscapes have distinct styles, the architectural designs are quite similar — works of the same hand, perhaps. Hard not to speculate on the connection...
嗯…多想无益，先去和姬子她们会合吧。
But there's no point in overthinking things. Let's meet up with Himeko and the others first.
走过这条路右转就是贸易区，那里人多一些，也许有人知道她们在哪。
Take a right turn at the end of this road and you'll reach the trade district. There are more people there, and perhaps someone knows where she is.
星穹列车应该需要一些内部讨论的空间。趁这段时间，我会先试着寻找加拉赫。
The Astral Express likely needs room for some internal deliberation. In the meantime, I'll try and locate Gallagher.
让她去吧。在判断她是否值得信任前，我们也需要观察。在此之前，我还想找一个人聊聊。
Letting her go was the right decision — further observations are needed before we decide whether to trust her. But first, there's someone I need to talk to.
一起吧，{NICKNAME}。我想你应该注意到了。
Let's go, {NICKNAME}. I'm sure you've already noticed him.
Yep, I saw him right away...
呵呵，不是熟人，只是有过一面之缘。看，就在那边……
Hehe, not exactly — I've only met him once. Look, over there...
「白日梦」酒店的门童，他怎么会出现在这里，又恰好在黄泉小姐斩断美梦后不久？
The Reverie Hotel's bellboy... How did he end up here? And right after Miss Acheron severed the beautiful dream...
保险起见，还是确认一番为好。
We'd better check, just to be sure.
咦，是先前的客人，我们又见面了！还有位新朋友…忘、忘记自我介绍了，我是酒店门童米沙。
Ah? You're the guest from before. We meet again! And a new friend... F—Forgot to introduce myself, I'm the hotel's bellboy, Misha.
你好，米沙，我叫瓦尔特，我们在入梦时见过……
Hello, Misha. I'm Welt, we met in a dream...
滴答！老朋友和新朋友，来击个掌吧！
Tick-tock! Old friend and new friend, let's high-five!
Mr. Yang, you can see him?
瓦尔特先生童心未泯啊！
Mr. Yang, you're still young at heart!
不是的。钟表小子是我的好伙伴，我们的家都在这里。
Nope. Clockie is a good friend of mine. We all live here.
两位客人又是怎么来的？按理说，这片梦境应该没有对外开放…难道是「眠眠」？
How did you two get here? This Dreamscape isn't supposed to be open to the public... I wonder if it has something to do with Sleepie?
是呀。美梦的工作结束后我就会回家。以前交通还算方便，但自从没办法自由通行后，就一直是眠眠带着人们在两座梦境之间往返。

Yep. After my work in the beautiful dream ends, I'll go back home. Commuting used to be more convenient, but ever since travel became cumbersome, Sleepie started ferrying people back and forth between the two Dreamscapes.
那位「眠眠」又是…你能形容下它的长相吗？
This Sleepie... Can you describe what it looks like?
眠眠是只忆域迷因，长得凶凶的，有许多只大眼睛。但它其实很听话，一直是加拉赫在照顾眠眠。
Sleepie is a Memory Zone Meme, looks fierce and has many eyes. But it's actually really well-behaved. Gallagher's been taking care of it.
从描述来看，那只迷因毫无疑问就是「死亡」。虽然被家族视作梦魇，但在这边的居民眼中…事实似乎截然不同。
Based on the description, that meme is indisputably "Death." A nightmare for The Family, but for the people who live here... that couldn't be further from the truth.
死、死亡？梦里怎么会有死亡呢，眠眠是比较凶，偶尔也会错把无辜的旅客带回来，但它绝对不会害人！
D—Death? Not in a dream, surely. Sleepie's just a little aggressive, and sometimes messes up by fetching the wrong guests, but it would never hurt anyone!
既然如此，请问这一两天它是否有带什么客人回来呢？事实上，我们正在调查一起美梦中的失踪案。
I see... Has it brought back any guests recently, say in the last day or two? We're currently investigating a missing person case that occurred within the beautiful dream.
这样啊…那你们应该和加拉赫谈谈，不过他正在接待橡木家系的访客，特意嘱咐大家不要打扰。
I see... Then you'll have to speak with Gallagher. But he's currently busy hosting a visitor from the Oak Family, and specifically asked not to be disturbed.
唔，瓦尔特先生，你们正在寻找的人……
Um, Mr. Yang, the person you're looking for...
…果然。有流萤小姐作先例，倒也在意料之中。
...Just as I thought. Considering what happened with Miss Firefly, this doesn't come as a surprise.
如果两位是来找知更鸟小姐的，我可以带路。她吩咐过，可以接见外面来的客人。
If you're looking for Miss Robin, I can lead the way. She told me that she'd be willing to meet with outside guests.
那就拜托你了。另外，我们也在寻找失散的同伴，红色头发的女性，身边还有一位粉色头发的女孩，不知道你是否有印象？
If it's not too much trouble. Also, we're looking for our missing companions: A woman with red hair, accompanied by a girl with pink hair. Have you seen them?
唔，这就没有了…但请放心，流梦礁不大，也不像美梦那样繁华，但安全保障可是一等一的。
Oh, I haven't... But please rest assured — Dreamflux Reef is a small place, and it's not as bustling as the beautiful dream, but its safety is unmatched.
不如这样吧！既然各位客人是初次拜访流梦礁，我来担任向导，先带你们找到同伴，再一起去拜访知更鸟小姐。
How about this! Since it's your first time here in Dreamflux Reef, I'll be your guide and help you find your companions, and then we can all go visit Miss Robin together.
小姐去格莉莎太太那里看望小孩子们了，一时半会儿不会离开，时间上应该来得及。
She's gone to Mrs. Grace's to visit the children. She won't be leaving anytime soon, so there should be enough time.
Alright, then. We'll follow your plan.
如此一来，困扰匹诺康尼的两桩命案便有了解答。只是幕后主使的用意…变得更扑朔迷离了。
Well, we now know the answer to both murder cases that have caused such commotion in Penacony. As for the intentions of the mastermind behind it all... we're still none the wiser.
加拉赫应该就是幕后黑手。
It has to be Gallagher who's behind it all.
嗯，我也是这么想的。虽然还没有十足把握，但无论如何我们都得找到他。
Yes, that's my thinking as well. I'm not entirely certain, but we still have to find him one way or another.
橡木家系的访客值得注意。
That visitor from the Oak Family is worth learning more about.
确实，而且此人恐怕与加拉赫关系匪浅，否则会谈也不必避人耳目了。无论如何，我们都得找到加拉赫。
Yes, and I believe their relationship with Gallagher may run deep — why else would they be so clandestine about their discussion? Regardless, we have to find Gallagher.
咳…不知道。不过它和加拉赫的关系倒是值得深究。无论如何，我们都得找到他。
Uhh, no idea. But its connection to Gallagher is worth digging into. Regardless, we have to find him.
话说回来，你先前提到过，你见过一个*只有*自己才能看到的钟表小子，是么？
Say, you mentioned before that you saw a Clockie that only you could see, right?
当时他也和米沙在一起。
He was with Misha at that time.
You also saw him, Mr. Yang.
总有种奇怪的感觉，难道我的童心也……
I can't shake off this strange feeling. Am I really still so young at heart...?
算了，这不重要。还是先跟着米沙吧。
Forget it. It's not important. We'd better just follow Misha.
各位，请看！这里能够见到流梦礁最壮观的景色——
Everyone, look! From here, you can see the most spectacular view of Dreamflux Reef—
黑洞？不，是忆质凝聚形成的吸积盘么，流梦礁竟然建立在如此不稳定的忆质上。
A black hole? No... an accretion disk formed from consolidated memoria? Was Dreamflux Reef built on such unstable memoria?
咦？原来瓦尔特先生也了解忆质动力学，我正发愁怎么向各位介绍这座大空洞呢。既然如此，各位一定和科玫小姐很有共同语言！
Oh? So Mr. Yang is also versed in memoria dynamics. I was just trying to figure out how to explain this huge hole to everyone. I bet you guys have a lot in common with Miss Kaimee!
我终于算出来了，再过十个系统时，上面的美梦就会吞掉下面的美梦！我的猜测是对的，这里将不复存在，美梦会吞噬一切……

My calculations are finally done. In another ten system hours, the above dream will swallow the dream below! My hypothesis was correct — this place will cease to exist, as the dream devours everything...
嗯？你们是谁，这里要消失了，你们还不走吗？
Hmm? Who are you all, and why haven't you left yet? This place is about to disappear!
What are you doing out here?
我是梦境测绘员科玫，专业是忆质动力学，正在钻研自己的毕生课题。
I'm Kaimee, a dreamscape surveyor specializing in memoria dynamics, and this is my life's work that I'm researching.
看见这大空洞了么？很多年前它还只是一道缝隙，现在已经长成了一个大洞。这附近的忆质一直以某个恒定的速度缓慢流向空洞的另一端。

See that huge gaping hole? It was just a narrow rift many years ago, but now it's grown into a giant hole. The surrounding memoria has been flowing towards the other end of the hole at a constant velocity, slowly but surely.
但可怕的是…根据我的测算，最近忆质涌流的速度开始变化了，并且前所未有地快——简直…简直就像是有什么东西在从大口那边吮吸一样！

But the scary part is... according to my calculations, the flow rate of memoria has recently changed, and it's faster than ever before — it's almost... almost as if something is sucking it in from the other side!
通过不断改进拉扎莉娜女士的忆质测量法，我终于得到了准确结果——
By constantly improving upon Madam Razalina's memoria measurement method, I've finally obtained accurate results—
十个系统时后，流梦礁将不复存在！犹如冰山消融，一切都将土崩瓦解，和空洞那边的美梦碎块融为一体！
After ten system hours, the Dreamflux Reef will cease to exist! It will disintegrate like a melting glacier and then fuse with the sweet dream fragments on that side of the void!
呃，请不要担心，这种事发生过很多次了…科玫小姐人不坏，就是有些…沉浸在另一个世界里。她应该很快就会发现自己算错了。

Uhh, please don't worry, this sort of thing has happened many times before... Miss Kaimee isn't a bad person, she's just a bit... lost in her own world. She'll probably realize she's wrong soon enough.
比起这个，有另一件令我在意的事。请问你口中的「拉扎莉娜女士」是？
You don't say... There was something else that piqued my interest. Who is Madam Razalina?
哦，你也认识她？还是你也喜欢忆质动力学？
Oh, do you know her, too? Or are you also a fan of memoria dynamics?
我们对拉扎莉娜女士的成就很感兴趣，可否展开讲讲？
We're very interested in Madam Razalina's achievements. Could you tell us a little more about them?
当然！她可是忆质动力学的杰出学者，是第一个将忆质速率测量法应用于星际旅行的人。
Why, Of course! She's an excellent scholar of memoria dynamics, and the first person to apply memoria rate measurement methodology on interstellar travelers.
可惜，由于流光忆庭的存在，普通人不怎么关心忆质的性质。最后她籍籍无名地离世，只留下几本薄薄的笔记……

Regrettably, due to the presence of the Garden of Recollection, ordinary people don't pay much attention to the nature of memoria. She departed this world without much fame, leaving only a few thin journals behind...
我慕名前来匹诺康尼，费尽千辛万苦找到流梦礁，只因为这里是她的逝世之地。天妒英才啊…如果拉扎莉娜女士还有时间，她一定能找出逆转忆质流动的方法！

I came to Penacony to learn more about my idol, and went to great lengths to seek out Dreamflux Reef, all because this is her final resting place. Prodigies always meet their demise prematurely... If only Madam Razalina had more time, she would've discovered a way to reverse the flow of memoria!
我感觉到了，源头就在…「黄金的时刻」！那里有某种异常的存在在搅动忆域的海流。我必须给出更加直观的证明…我一定能说服大家……
I felt it, the source is in... the Golden Hour! There is a certain anomalous presence stirring the currents of the Memory Zone. I must uncover more concrete proof... I must convince everyone...
…{NICKNAME}，还记得「拉扎莉娜」这个名字吗？
...{NICKNAME}, does the name Madam Razalina sound familiar to you?
是列车长提到的无名客之一。
It was one of the Nameless mentioned by the conductor.
没错。看来她在流梦礁进行了大量的研究与测算，而后匆匆离世。
That's right. It seems like she did a great deal of research and calculations in Dreamflux Reef... before abruptly passing away.
在启程来到匹诺康尼前，列车长拜托我们打听的几位无名客里就有她的名字。看来她在流梦礁进行了大量的研究与测算，而后匆匆离世。

Before we came to Penacony, the conductor had given us a list of Nameless to look into — her name was mentioned. It seems like she did a great deal of research and calculations in Dreamflux Reef... before abruptly passing away.
科玫小姐经常提起她。听说拉扎莉娜女士在监狱战争时期便去世了…要是她能见到如今的匹诺康尼，看着大家在忆域里建设家园…一定会非常开心吧。

Miss Kaimee regularly mentions her. I hear Madam Razalina passed away during the Prison War... If she could see the Penacony of today, its people building homes in the Memory Zone... I bet she'd be really happy.
Ghost, there's a ghost! D—Don't come near me...
哎呀，都说了我是活人，你也是活人，正常点好不好……
Oh my, I'm human and so are you. Can you get a grip...
啊！杨叔，还有{NICKNAME}，等你们好久啦！
Ah! There you are! I've been waiting for you two!
快帮帮忙，我在路上遇见一个家族的人！他吓得不轻，我就想让他冷静点。结果……
Quickly, come help! I bumped into a member of The Family on the way here. He was so scared and I just wanted to calm him down. But...
放过我吧，放过我吧…我一生积德行善，怎么死了还不得安息……
Let me go. Let me go... I've only done good in my life. Why can't I rest in peace after death...
...Well, this is how it turned out.
你把他吓成这个样子的？
Ha. Ha. You're a regular comedian...
拜见流梦礁之鬼三月七！
Now you shall pay respect to March 7th, Ghost of Dreamflux Reef!
Me!? A ghost? Don't make me hit you!
他非觉得自己是死了…虽然刚掉进来时，我也有这种想法。
He thinks he's dead... Although when I first fell in, I also thought the same.
这位客人，这里不是死后的世界，是流梦礁。
Dear guest, this is not the afterlife. This is Dreamflux Reef.
就是就是。听见了么？跟我念：流、梦、礁。
That's right. Did you hear that? Repeat after me: Dream— Flux— Reef.
你、你还和看不见的东西聊得有来有回，我不是死了是什么？呜，呜呜…我就不该作死挑战禁忌，尝试在梦里入睡…好奇心害死皮皮西啊！
You... You're talking to someone invisible. If I'm not dead, what am I? *sob*... I shouldn't have pushed my luck and tried sleeping in my dream... Curiosity kills the Pepeshi!
What's wrong with sleeping in dreams?
别、别再问了！会把怪物引来的，死去的人全部都在这里，全部…！
S—Stop asking! You'll alert the monsters! All the dead are right here, all of them...!
呃，你说的不会是忆域迷因吧……
Uh... You're not talking about the Memory Zone Meme, are you...
别说出那名字！都怪你，它、它们来了！
Don't say that name! It's all your fault! Th—They're coming!
他昏倒了。想必是负面情绪太过强烈，引来了附近的忆域迷因。
He passed out. His intense negative emotions attracted the nearby Memory Zone Memes.
喔…不过，怎么路上的行人都不害怕呢？
I see... but why aren't the other people around here scared?
和美梦不一样，在这里大家不把忆域迷因当作危险的怪物…就算真的有危险，也可以通过强制唤醒脱离梦境。
Unlike in the sweet dream, people here don't see Memory Zone Memes as dangerous monsters... and even if they pose a threat, people can easily escape by forcing a wake-up call.
不过这位先生…不能晾在街上不管，能带他去个安全的地方吗？
But we can't just leave this man here... Can we take him somewhere safe?
翠丝阿姨，晚上好！呃…现在算晚上吗？
Evening, Jessie! Uhm... is it evening?
是三月七小姐啊，欢迎。这几位是……
Welcome, Miss March! Who might these be?
这两人是我的同伴！至于躺地上这位…是个吓晕过去的胆小鬼……
These two are my friends! As for the man lying on the ground... he's a scaredy-cat who fainted from fright.
哈哈，懂了懂了，又一个不当心闯入这里的人，把他留在这吧。
Haha, I see, another poor guy who accidentally ended up here. I'll take care of him.
最近生面孔是越来越多了，美梦中肯定发生了不少事吧。阿斯德纳仅剩的几片自由之地，也要不得安宁了啊……
There have been a lot of new faces lately. Things must be tough in the beautiful dream. *sigh* The few remaining havens of freedom in Asdana will soon face trouble...
Do such things often happen here?
说常见也算不上，但频率是越来越高了。这也是*美梦崩溃*的征兆之一吧。
Not really, but they're becoming more frequent now. Guess it's one of the signs of the sweet dream's collapse.
这先生受了不小的冲击，三月七小姐，能帮我去找一位天环族少女么？她的歌声可以治愈精神创伤。
This man has had quite the shock. Could you help me find a Halovian lady, March? Her songs can heal mental wounds.
想必说的是知更鸟。此刻，她也在流梦礁。
That must be Robin. She's also here, in Dreamflux Reef.
诶？！知更鸟小姐？她不是——对哦，如果流萤姑娘平安无事，知更鸟小姐一定也经历了同样的遭遇。
Huh!? Robin? But I thought she... Oh, right! If Firefly is here safe and sound, then it means Robin must be okay, too.
这位米沙正要带我们去见她，弄清个中原委。不过在此之前，我们先和姬子会合吧。你之前应该和她在一起？
Misha is about to take us to her to find out what happened, but before that, let's meet up with Himeko. You were with her earlier, right?
我们之前在居住地，遇见了好些偷渡客。他们大多是从邻近星系来的。
We met some stowaways in the residential area. Most of them came from neighboring star systems.
据说像流梦礁这样的地方，在阿斯德纳的忆域中不止一处，就像大海里的小岛，在家族到来前，它们就已经存在了。
I heard that places like Dreamflux Reef are scattered throughout the Memory Zone of Asdana, like islands in the ocean. They existed before The Family arrived.
我还打听到一种说法：据说流梦礁初具规模的时候，这里才是匹诺康尼梦境的中心呢！
I also heard that when Dreamflux Reef took shape, it was the center of all Dreamscapes in Penacony.
如果这说法属实，美梦与此地的诸多相似之处就说得通了。
If that's true, it's no wonder there are so many similarities between this place and the sweet dream.
姬子应该还在向那人打听消息，那我们就赶紧出发咯？
Himeko must be gathering information. Let's hurry up and get going.
是这样啊…真没想到会在这里补全剩下的信息。
So that's how it is... I never imagined we'd gather the remaining details here.
呵呵…用加拉赫先生的口头禅来说，就是「天意弄人」吧。
Hehe... to borrow Gallagher's catchphrase, "what an unpredictable twist of fate."
看来人都到齐了啊。正好，见见米凯先生吧，流放之地的负责人之一。米凯先生，他们就是我的同伴。
Perfect timing. Now that everyone's here, I'd like to introduce everyone to Micah, who's partly in charge of the land of the exiles. Micah, these are my companions.
瓦尔特先生，三月七小姐，{NICKNAME}{M#先生}{F#小姐}…各位无名客，幸会。
It's a pleasure to meet the Nameless.
从你们踏入匹诺康尼的那天起，我就一直在关注各位的动向。可惜，若非流梦礁与十二梦境早已隔绝，我们本该以更体面的方式相见。
I've been keeping an eye on you since the day you arrived in Penacony. We would have met under more appropriate circumstances if Dreamflux Reef hadn't been isolated from the Twelve Dreamscapes.
正式认识一下吧，我是流梦礁的「守墓人」，米凯。
Please allow me to formally introduce myself. I'm Micah, the Gravekeeper of Dreamflux Reef.
流梦礁的生活十分自由，也没什么组织可言。大家各过各的，井水不犯河水，我能做的…也只是每天定时打扫几座墓碑罢了。
Life in Dreamflux Reef is pretty liberating. Everyone here mostly keeps to themselves, without meddling in others' affairs. My daily task involves... cleaning a few tombstones.
米凯先生太谦虚了。每当有迷途的逐梦客被带入这里，一直是米凯先生担起守护者的责任，或是将他们送回美梦，或是教会他们如何在混沌的梦境中生存。

You're too modest, Micah. When lost Dreamchasers stumble upon this place, you're the one who takes care of them, guiding them back to the sweet dream or showing them how to survive the wild dream chaos.
嗯？瓦尔特先生，您是在和我说话么？
Hmm? Were you talking to me, Mr. Yang?
…话说回来，米凯先生，您所说的墓碑是指？我们来时似乎没有看见墓园。
...On that note, Mr. Micah, which tombstones are you referring to? We didn't come across any graveyard when we arrived.
呵呵，说是坟墓，也只是几座象征意义的衣冠冢罢了。既然瓦尔特先生问起，我们不妨去实地看看。如果我没猜错，各位应该能在那里得到不小的收获。
Heh, they're actually just symbolic stones. But since you're curious, Mr. Yang, I'll take you there. I have a feeling you might find something of interest there.
不过在此之前，还有位重要的客人要与你们一同前往。
But before that, you'll have an important guest joining you.
大家唱得真棒，我很少尝试这种曲风，也学到了很多！
Everyone sang so wonderfully! It's not often that I try this music style, but I've gained some valuable insights from it!
真不知道该如何感谢你，知更鸟小姐，才短短几天，孩子们的进步就这么大了。
I can't thank you enough, Robin. These kids have made incredible progress in only a few days.
格莉莎女士，我只是教会了他们如何发声，但教会他们对生活怀抱希望的人，是您。
It was nothing, Grace. I merely taught them how to sing. It was you who brought hope into their lives.
…现实里的日子一定很辛苦吧？
...Life must be quite difficult for them in reality, I imagine.
每次告别时，孩子们都对这片流梦之地依依不舍。可我走遍了流梦礁的每一处角落，探访了每一个人，他们都告诉我这场破碎的梦…不值得留恋。

Whenever it's time to say goodbye to these kids, they're reluctant to leave. But, I've explored every corner of Dreamflux Reef, talked to everyone I met, and they all told me the same thing... This shattered dream is not worth clinging to.
呵呵，不愧是众望所归的谐乐之子。
Hehe, it seems you truly are a child of the Harmony.
爱玛和安迪都是我收养的孤儿，双目失明的卡萝在匹诺康尼外环的营养房做工，加里从小便患有孤独症。他们尚未成年，也无法去往家族的美梦中。

Emma and Andy are orphans I took under my wing. Carol, there, with her blind eyes, used to work at a nutrition center in the outer ring of Penacony. And as for Gary, he's been living with autism since he was a child. They're not old enough to enter the sweet dream managed by The Family.
如果把人比作鸟儿，这些孩子都是生来羽翼残缺的雏鸟。但在这片梦里，他们能获得完整的翅膀。尽管飞得跌跌撞撞，但也是在凭借自己的力量翱翔。

If we compare people to birds, these kids are like fledglings with impaired wings. But in this dream, they can fly freely. Even if they stumble along the way, they're still relying on their own strength.
至于我，一个失去了双腿的老人…要是没有这片梦境，我甚至都无法走到他们面前。
And me? An old lady with no legs... Without this dream, I couldn't even walk toward them.
很高兴你们在匹诺康尼的梦中开始了新的生活。只是……
I'm glad that you found a new life here in Penacony, it's just...
不用担心，知更鸟小姐。梦有意义，但它不是一切，我和孩子们都明白这点，无论在梦里飞翔多久，最后总要飞回现实。

Don't worry, Robin. Dreams have their significance, but they aren't everything. Both the children and I understand this. No matter how long we fly through this dream, we will one day return to reality.
但是你看，现在爱玛和加里不再自卑，卡萝逐渐懂得如何面对失明的困扰，安迪比从前活泼了许多，甚至连我都变得更加乐观了。

But you know what? Emma and Gary aren't plagued by their insecurities anymore. No — and Carol is learning how to cope with her blindness. And Andy is livelier than ever. Well, even I've become more optimistic.
我们在梦里学会生活，然后回到现实…学会生存。
You see, in dreams, we learn how to live. Once we return to reality... we learn how to survive.
…如果羽翼不幸残缺，那就把翅膀借给彼此。
...And should our feathers be damaged, then we share our wings with one another.
不必贪恋梦中虚幻的天空，因为我们有权利，也有能力…飞向更广阔的天地。
There's no need to covet an illusory sky in dreams, because we have the right and the ability... to fly towards a broader horizon.
很高兴看见你平安无事，知更鸟小姐。
It's a relief to see you safe and sound, Miss Robin.
星穹列车的各位，又见面了。听说我的失踪在外界引发了不小的骚乱…非常抱歉。
It's nice to see you all again, Astral Express crew. I heard my disappearance caused quite the commotion out there... I'm really sorry about that.
既然你身在此处…我们可否认为，知更鸟小姐已经充分知晓了匹诺康尼的现状？
Since you're here... can we assume that you're fully aware of the situation in Penacony?
自回到匹诺康尼起，我的嗓音就变得异常，逐步演变为失声的折磨。我本以为只是场意外，也许是在外旅居久了，不习惯阿斯德纳高浓度的忆质环境。

Ever since I returned to Penacony, my voice started to change, until it gradually faded away. At first, I thought it was a temporary ailment, perhaps due to having been away too long. I thought maybe it'd just take some time for my body to acclimate to the high concentration of memoria in Asdana.
但现在看来…源头并不在我。我的身边存在着与「同谐」不合的事物…失声也是美梦正在崩溃的信号之一。

But now it seems... the root of the problem goes way beyond me. There are elements around me that don't align with the Harmony... and losing my voice is just one of the signs of the sweet dream's collapse.
美梦崩溃…那个忆者也说过同样的话，原来是真的啊。
The sweet dream's collapse... that Memokeeper mentioned the same thing. So, it's real.
在我离开匹诺康尼的这段时间，十二梦境的边界不断向外扩张。可每当我谈及梦中的异象，却总能感受到家主们三缄其口，只有兄长愿意解答……

While I was away from Penacony, the boundaries of the Twelve Dreamscapes kept expanding outward. But whenever I mentioned the anomalies in the dream... all the family heads refused to talk about it. Only my brother was willing to respond...
之后公司的使节暗中投来密信，更让我确信匹诺康尼的光芒下潜伏着某种不可告人的秘密。最后，我通过橡木家系卷宗中的几条线索，找到了这里……

Later, I discovered the secret letters from the IPC ambassador, which further convinced me that there are hidden secrets beneath the surface of Penacony. So, following the clues in the Oak Family's dossiers, I found my way here...
…被家族用「死亡」名义掩盖的流放之地，埋藏了匹诺康尼过往的梦中之梦。
...The land of the exiles, concealed by The Family under the guise of "Death," a dream within a dream where Penacony's past is buried.
现在听来，知更鸟小姐的嗓音似乎有所恢复？
Hearing you speak, it sounds as if your voice has made somewhat of a recovery.
虽然残酷，但这是无可争辩的事实，这里的「同谐」反而比美梦中传扬更广……
I hate to admit it, but the "Harmony" in this place resonates more broadly than within the sweet dream...
我很遗憾，是家族出现了背叛者，他…或者他们，舍弃了最初的信念，以「同谐」之名利用人性的弱点，将匹诺康尼变成了沉沦于虚幻美梦的「盛会之星」……

It's regrettable, but The Family has experienced betrayal. The traitor, or traitors abandoned their original principles and, using the name of Harmony, exploited people's weaknesses to turn Penacony into the Planet of Festivities, trapping everyone in the illusion of the sweet dream...
这根本不是「以强援弱」，而是「以强制弱」。一个失去了平等的世界注定不会再受「同谐」眷顾，受祂赐福的声音…自然也无法歌唱了。

This is not "the strong defending the weak," but rather "the strong exploiting the weak." A world without equality won't ever be favored by the Harmony, and naturally, those voices blessed by THEM... have lost the ability to sing.
知更鸟小姐，是否存在另一种可能——家族理念的变化，是有另一股势力参与其中？
Could there be another force influencing The Family's shift in philosophy, Miss Robin?
毕竟从黄泉小姐的例子来看，除非有令使以上的力量介入…否则很难想象在「同谐」的属地，会存在另一种能够影响所有人的意志。

Considering what happened with Acheron, it's difficult to conceive of another entity within the realm of the Harmony capable of influencing everyone, unless a power surpassing that of an Emanator is involved...
仙舟联盟的遭遇我也有所耳闻。但就我所知，不存在外部势力干预家族的情况。也可能是我离乡太久，有太多看不见的地方。

I'd heard about what happened to the Xianzhou Alliance. But as far as I'm aware, The Family hasn't faced any such external interventions. Who knows, perhaps I've just been away too long and missed something.
无论如何，我不能接受自己的故乡以「同谐」的名义走向「同谐」的反面。
Regardless, I cannot accept my home is moving towards the very opposite of what the Harmony represents, while still claiming to uphold it.
为了弄清「钟表匠」米哈伊尔为何会与家族决裂，又究竟是谁做出了背叛的决定…米凯先生，还记得我们的交易吗？现在是我作出答复的时候了——
I must uncover the reason why Mikhail cut ties with The Family, and who exactly it was who betrayed us all. Do you remember our arrangement, Mr. Micah? Well, here's my answer...
——我愿意放弃，不再登上「谐乐大典」的舞台。
— I've decided to forego my role, and never step foot on the Charmony Festival's stage again.
欢迎来到天堂…真梦假梦…都是浮生一梦……
Welcome to heaven... dreams, true or false... all are ephemeral...
Might as well drink more SoulGlad instead...
美梦…也把你们赶出来了吗？我想回去…但又不想回去……
Did you also get kicked out of the beautiful dream? I want to go back... but then, I don't want to go back.
谁能告诉我应该怎么做啊，我不想做决定……
Tell me what I should do. Oh... I don't know what to do...
Hi there, friend from a distant land!
听说钟表匠的遗产就在这里！你们愿意一起寻宝吗？
I hear the Watchmaker's Legacy is right here! Let's say we go treasure hunting?
我感觉到了，源头就在…「黄金的时刻」！那里有某种异常的存在在搅动忆域的海流。我必须给出更加直观的证明…我一定能说服大家……
I felt it, the source is in... the Golden Hour! There is a certain anomalous presence stirring the currents of the Memory Zone. I must uncover more concrete proof... I must convince everyone...
最近生面孔是越来越多了，美梦中肯定发生了不少事吧。唉，阿斯德纳仅剩的几片自由之地，也要不得安宁了啊……
There have been a lot of new faces lately. Things must be tough in the beautiful dream. The few remaining havens of freedom in Asdana will soon face trouble...
（真正的梦境，流放之地…出发前，要再和大家聊聊么？）
(The real Dreamscape, the land of the exiles... Before we go, should we speak to everyone first?)
沿着这条巷道走，能看见一座升降梯。它会带我们去流放之地的中心。
Keep going straight down this alley and it'll lead to an elevator. It'll take us to the center of the land of the exiles.
如此巨大的钟表小子…看来那位「钟表匠」也在流梦礁留下了浓墨重彩的一笔。
What a huge Clockie... Looks like the Watchmaker also left his mark on Dreamflux Reef.
难以置信，在家族的视线外…梦境中还坐落着如此规模的聚居地。
Unbelievable... to think there's a settlement of this size within the Dreamscape... and all beyond The Family's reach.
我们的目的地是贸易区。那是流梦礁人最多的地方，说不定能找到各位的伙伴。
Our destination is the commercial district. That's where the largest crowds gather in Dreamflux Reef. We might be able to find the others there.
Please, come to your senses! I'm begging you...
那就拜托翠丝阿姨吧！等你们的时候，我已经认识了好多当地人。
We can ask Jessie for help! I've gotten to know many locals while waiting for you guys.
人们过着自给自足的生活，不知该怎么形容，但总觉得这里才像真正的梦中世界……
Everyone here is living a self-sufficient life... I don't know how to describe it, but this place feels like the real Dreamscape...
我们刚刚就是在这儿分开的…嗯，不远了！
This is where we split up... She can't be too far away!
An important guest? Who could it be...?
这边走，各位。流梦礁的道路年久失修，注意脚下。
This way, please. The roads here in Dreamflux Reef are a bit run-down, so watch your step.
It really is her... Miss Robin!
哥哥，你看！这里有一只小鸟。
Look here, brother! A little bird!
Looks like a fledgling Charmony Dove.
可附近不是谐乐鸽的栖息地，为什么它会孤零零地在这里？是被父母遗弃了吗？
But Charmony Doves don't live here. So how did this little bird get here? Maybe its parents abandoned it?
它看起来一点力气都没有…我们去找个软垫，给它做个鸟巢吧？
It looks weak and frail... Why don't we find something soft and make a nest for it?
这里太危险了。我们还是先带它回去吧，就放在你窗前的木架上。
This place is too dangerous for a fledgling. Let's take it with us — we can put it on the wooden shelf in front of your window.
好呀，它歌唱的声音肯定很动听。不过，它要住在哪里呢？
Okay! A bird like that must have a beautiful singing voice. But where will it live?
我会去拜托家主，给它造个鸟笼。
I'll ask the family head to build a cage for it.
笼子…那它不就没办法自由飞翔了吗？
A cage... but then it won't have the freedom to fly, right?
让我瞧瞧…是什么让神主最优秀的两位诠释者如此好奇，竟然连餐后甜点都忘了品尝？
Let's see... what is it that has captured the attention of the two best interpreters of the Great One, to the point that they've forgotten how to enjoy their dessert?
哦…可怜的小东西，情况恐怕不乐观。你们想救它吗？
Oh... poor little thing. Doesn't look like it's doing well. Do you want to rescue it?
想…但我觉得不能把它关起来。
I do... but I don't want to lock it up in a cage.
虽然它还小，连羽毛都没长齐，也不会唱歌…可它不是为了在笼子里生活才破壳而出的。
Even if it's small and not fully feathered, and can't sing... it didn't come into this world just to be locked up in a cage.
很浪漫的想法。那你呢，小博士，你认可妹妹的观点吗？
That's quite the romantic idea. And what about you, our young scholar? Do you agree with your sister?
我觉得妹妹说得对…但如果我们把它留在野外，它过不了几天就会死的。
I think she's right... but if we leave it out in the wild, it won't survive for more than a few days at best.
呵呵，看来我们的小博士还有些迷茫。这样吧，孩子们，我来为你们讲一个故事。
Ah, I see. It seems our little scholar is still a bit unsure. Well, let me tell you youngsters a story.
你们应该知道，谐乐鸽是一种能够飞越大气层的鸟类。在高空飞行时，它们的羽毛会因为摩擦产生的高温发出壮丽的光芒，就像是一道道流星。

As you probably know, Charmony Doves can fly through the air. When they fly really high, the friction caused by the flapping of their feathers against the atmosphere creates amazing lights, so that they look like shooting stars.
我们对这种美丽的风景屡见不鲜，以为那是它们与生俱来的本领…可惜，那流星般的光彩，是它们同大自然斗争了数百个琥珀纪的结果。

We've seen this spectacle so many times that we think it's just something they can naturally do... but that's not the truth. Their radiant display is the result of countless struggles against nature over generations.
谐乐鸽的祖先太过弱小，无法在地面的生存斗争中胜出。为了免于被捕猎的命运，它们开始仰望天空，振翅跃起……
Their ancestors were too weak to survive on the ground. So, to escape predators, they started seeking new opportunities in the air...
就这样，经过数千代、数万代的尝试，族群中的一只鸟儿终于学会了如何正确地挥动翅膀。它成功飞起，从此告别了大地。
After countless attempts by many generations, one of them finally figured out how to fly. It soared into the sky and never looked back at the ground again.
所以，其实鸟儿天性是不会飞的，但它们靠自身的意志做到了，对吗？
So, you mean, birds aren't born to fly, but they find a way to do it through their determination, right?
呵呵，这确实是一种理想主义的解读。那么，星期日，你又是怎么想的？
Well, that's an idealistic way of putting it. So, what are your thoughts, Sunday?
我觉得，人们之所以会认为飞翔是鸟类的天性…是因为他们从没见过坠亡的鸟儿。
I think people believe birds are meant to fly because... they've never seen those birds crashing to their death.
这个思路也很有趣。那你现在应该想明白如何对待这只小鸟了吧？
That's an interesting perspective. So, have you decided what to do with the bird now?
我会…嗯，先将它放在笼子里，至少在它能独自活下去前先这样。因为……
For now... I'll keep it in a cage until it can take care of itself because...
<color=#dbc291ff>我…无论如何都希望它能活着。</color>
<color=#dbc291ff>I... I want it to live, no matter what.</color>
很好，孩子们，看来你们心里已经各有答案了。你们的愿景无比美满，我衷心企盼它们能以各自的方式实现。
Well said, kids. It seems each of you has found your own answer. Your insights are truly remarkable, and I hope they come true in their own way.
我们会好好照料它的。对吧，哥哥？
We will take good care of it, won't we, brother?
嗯。不过，歌斐木先生，我还有一件事没想明白……
Yeah, but Mr. Gopher Wood, there's one thing I don't quite understand...
And what might that be, my son?
如果这只小谐乐鸽到最后都学不会飞，该怎么办？
What if this little Charmony Dove never learns to fly in the end?
我是说，如果这世上确实有些雏鸟，终其一生都无法飞翔……
I mean, if there are fledglings in this world that can never fly throughout their lives...
那我们还应该让它们回到天空…再眼睁睁看着它们坠亡在地吗？
Should we let them go back to the sky... only to see them crash to the ground and die?
梦话说得不错，小鸟，该醒了。
Talking in your sleep, birdie? Time to wake up.
怎么，站不稳，要我搀你一把？
You look a little unsteady. Need a hand?
呵，我就知道你第一反应肯定是她。
Heh, I knew that was going to be the first thing you'd ask.
她就在这地方，不用担心，你妹妹很安全，现在…估计还在街巷里走访吧。
Don't worry. Your sister is here, safe and sound. She's... probably walking around the streets now.
如果我是你，在这个节骨眼上会更关心自己…毕竟面前可站着个刚给你胸口来了一刀的混蛋。
If I were you, I'd be more worried about myself... After all, right in front of you is the guy who just stabbed you in the chest with a dagger.
如果你真打算下死手，倒也不必给我寒暄的机会…说出你的来意，「钟表匠」的走狗。
If you wanted to kill me, you wouldn't give me the chance to speak... Just tell me your demands, lackey of the Watchmaker.
哼，这都被你看出来了？难怪你敢跟梦主和四大家系对着干，看来我的选择是正确的。
So, you've figured out who I am, huh? No wonder you had the guts to go against the Dreammaster and the four Families. Looks like I made the right choice.
你知道我要做什么。我的「虚构」也已被你看穿，不剩多少时日了，没必要再虚与委蛇……
You are aware of my plan and see through my Fictionology. Time is running out, so let's drop the charades...
你凭什么觉得能和我合作？
Cooperate? What makes you think I'd cooperate with you?
就凭那位大名鼎鼎的知更鸟也选择站在这边。再加上一位叛徒的线索，和匹诺康尼的光明未来——这样的特饮能满足你的胃口么？
The fact that the famous Robin has chosen my side. Plus, some clues about a traitor, and a bright future for Penacony... Any of that catch your interest?
我难以相信一个全身上下满是谎言的人，嘴里能有几句真话。
I find it hard to believe a man who's full of deception.
没事，你不用相信我，你该相信的……
Fine, you don't have to trust me. What you should trust is...
是你心底里的{RUBY_B#野心}公义{RUBY_E#}。
The sense of {RUBY_B#ambition}justice{RUBY_E#} inside of you.
Alright, as you wish. Here she is...
哈哈，开个玩笑。我是说，这位小姐会带我们去见知更鸟的，对吧？
Haha, just kidding. I mean, this lady will lead us to Robin, right?
当然，还有星穹列车和我。需要你给出解释的人…太多了。
And the Crew too. There are too many people who you owe... an explanation.
哈哈，那可真是太好了。这边请，尊贵的橡木家主。这下所有的演员…就都到齐了。
Haha, that'd be great. Please follow me, honorable Oak Family Head. Now all the actors... are on the stage.
这就是我之前所说的纪念碑，上面的名字…各位应该不陌生。
This is the monument I mentioned earlier. The names inscribed on it... should be familiar to all of you.
在匹诺康尼还被叫做「边陲监狱」的年代，是「开拓」将它和群星相连。他们都是拯救了阿斯德纳的英雄，名字理应被刻在岁月的丰碑，而不是这小小的石头上。

When Penacony was known as a frontier prison, it was the Trailblazers who connected it with the stars. They were the heroes who saved Asdana, and their names deserve to be immortalized — not just on this small stone tablet, but in the annals of history for all of time.
然而现在，盛会之星只剩下了美梦，沉重的历史和那座监牢一样…早已无迹可寻了。
However, today the Planet of Festivities is nothing but sweet dreams. That heavy piece of history is all a distant memory... just like that prison.
他们的名字被刻在碑面上，这也就意味着……
If their names are inscribed here, then that means...
据米凯先生所说，他们在很久以前就去世了。
According to Micah, they died long ago.
拉扎莉娜是在独立战争中牺牲的。她为了弄清楚忆质的流向，独自驾驶穿梭机深入星系中心，再也没有回来……
Razalina was killed during the War of Independence. She ventured alone into the heart of the star system to investigate the flow of memoria, but she never returned...
铁尔南则是一位善用枪械的牛仔，强大可靠，他带领人们挺过了惨烈的对外战争，却没能坚持到和平真正来临的那天。
Tiernan was a skilled gunslinger, strong and reliable. He led the people through countless battles, but he didn't live long enough to witness the arrival of true peace.
战后的十年，匹诺康尼深陷内忧外患。为了阿斯德纳，铁尔南重拾「开拓」之道，带领灯蛾家系向星系外探索，却惨遭虫群包围…全军覆没。

In the decade following the War, Penacony faced challenges internal and external. To protect Asdana, Tiernan picked up the way of the Trailblaze again, and led the Lampmoth Family to explore beyond the system, only to be surrounded... and wiped out by the Swarm.
虽然心里早有预期，但前辈们的故事…还是很令人遗憾啊。
Though I had expected as much, the tales of these heroes... truly are sorrowful.
他们的一生都走在迈向未知的进行时上，无愧于「开拓」之名。但…这块没有字的纪念碑又是…？
True to the title of Trailblazer, they spent their lives venturing into the unknown. But... what about this tablet? There are no names carved on it.
在流梦礁诞生时，它的主人还没过世。但那人说着「总得有这么一天」，硬是给自己立了块无字碑。
When Dreamflux Reef was created, its owner was still alive. However, he insisted on erecting a monument for himself, saying that "it will happen someday."
星穹列车的各位，又见面了。
Here we meet again, everyone from the Astral Express.
我答应了给那对兄妹一点私人空间，先聊咱们的事吧，各位意下如何？
I promised to give the siblings some privacy, so let's talk about our business first. What do you say?
无妨。不过加拉赫先生费尽心思将家族话事人、星穹列车，和星核猎手汇聚一处，想来是有重要的事要交代吧？
That sounds sensible enough. Since you went through the trouble of gathering The Family head, the Crew, and the Stellaron Hunters, I'm guessing you have something important to say, Mr. Gallagher?
你都快把幕后黑手四个字写在脸上啦……
The look on your face is practically screaming "I'm the one behind all this..."
哈哈哈，瓦尔特先生说的不错，确实到了该开诚布公的时候。
Hahaha, you're right, Mr. Yang. It is indeed time to come clean on everything.
那对兄妹该知道的都知道了，怎么选他们心里有数。各位无名客到得比较晚，我理应花些时间为各位答疑解惑。
The siblings already know what they need to, and they've made their choice. But you Nameless arrived a bit late, so it's only fair that I answer your questions.
在开始前，重新做个自我介绍吧——流梦礁的建立者、「钟表匠」的副手，同时也是寄出那份邀请函的人……
Before we begin, let me reintroduce myself. I'm the founder of Dreamflux Reef, the deputy of the Watchmaker, and... the one who sent out that invitation...
「虚构史学家」加拉赫，向各位致意。
As Gallagher the History Fictionologist, I humbly extend my greetings to you all.
好你个虚构史学家，合着之前跟咱们说了那么多，都是编的呗？
History Fictionologist? So, what? everything you told us was made up?
这点我可以打包票，先前告诉各位的故事全都是真的…呃，大部分吧，除了「家族重新接纳了我」那段。
Well, don't worry. Almost everything I shared was true... well, except for the part about "The Family accepting me back."
我向米凯先生确认过，有关家族、「钟表匠」和那位米哈伊尔的事迹，都核验无误。
I double-checked with Micah, and everything he said about The Family, the Watchmaker, and Mikhail is true.
理解万岁，那咱们就能敞开聊了。想必各位一定很想知道，我为何要大费周章地布置一场遗产争夺战，向这么多派系发出邀请，把匹诺康尼搅得鸡犬不宁……

Thank you for your understanding! Now, let's get down to business. I'm sure you're all wondering why I went through the trouble of setting up this battle for the legacy, inviting different factions, and stirring up a ruckus all over Penacony...
答案其实很简单，各位也非常熟悉，一切的根源…都是「星核」。
Well, it all boils down to something very familiar to all of you... the Stellaron.
星核？匹诺康尼畅通无阻，是四通八达的星际枢纽，看起来也不存在任何遭受污染的迹象，怎会和星核有关？
The Stellaron? But how is that possible? Penacony is a free-flowing interstellar hub. There are no signs of contamination whatsoever.
你说的完全正确，所以不妨猜猜看，这意味着什么吧？
You're totally correct. So, care to take a guess at what that means?
The Stellaron has been completely sealed?
我就当这是个美好的愿景吧。若果真如此，我也不必向各位发出邀请了。
I wish that were the truth! But, if that were the case, I wouldn't have invited all of you.
很敏锐啊。该怎么说，不愧是在场对星核最熟悉的人？
How keen! Well, what should I say? I expected nothing less from the person here who is the most familiar with Stellarons.
美梦可不是凭空变出来的。如果把忆域比作大海，建立一片梦想之地就是在汹涌的汪洋中填土造陆。
The sweet dream doesn't come out of thin air. If you think of the Memory Zone as the sea, creating the land of the dreams is like filling that wild ocean with earth to make an island.
要实现这一壮举，若非「记忆」或「神秘」的令使出手，就只有使用星核一条路。
To achieve this feat, without the help of an Emanator of Remembrance or Enigmata, the only way is to use a Stellaron.
而且，这可不是简单许个愿就能搞定的事，必须具备相当程度的知识，加上大量时间和人力，才能做得这么滴水不漏。话说到这份上，你们该明白了吧……
And that's not something you can achieve with a simple wish. It requires vast quantities of knowledge, time, and manpower. I'm sure you get what I'm hinting at...
<color=#dbc291ff>如今的「盛会之星」，就是阿斯德纳的星核之灾啊。</color>
<color=#dbc291ff>In Asdana, the Planet of Festivities itself is a Stellaron disaster.</color>
盛会之星…就是星核之灾？
The Planet of Festivities itself... is a Stellaron disaster?
故事要从很久以前说起，「钟表匠」一行解放了边陲监狱后，对如何从无到有建设匹诺康尼一筹莫展，内忧外患也没完没了。这时便有人打起了星核的主意。

It all started a long time ago. Back when the Watchmaker and his crew liberated the frontier prison, they faced countless challenges as they began building Penacony from the ground up. That's when the idea of using the Stellaron came into play.
这颗星核本是战争年代落在阿斯德纳的，当时在无名客的呼吁下，人们打消了沾染这种力量的念头。但一直有别有用心之人在暗中蠢蠢欲动。

The Stellaron first entered the Asdana system during the war. The Nameless warned everyone against the folly of attempting to tamper with such a power, and most heeded their words. But, there are always people in the shadows with ulterior motives.
一切的转折点发生在铁尔南牺牲后。两位无名客同伴先后离世，令「钟表匠」不得不奔赴拓荒一线。而这次远行，让他的对手抓住了机会。
The turning point came after Tiernan's death. With two of the Nameless gone, the Watchmaker had to go to the front lines. It was at that moment his rivals saw an opportunity.
等到蒙托尔星系的家族代表响应「钟表匠」的号召前来时，星核早已被人激活，渗入了原始的联觉梦境中。
By the time a representative from the Montour system's Family arrived at the Watchmaker's call, the Stellaron had already been activated and was seeping into the primordial Synesthesia Dreamscape.
我猜，家族恰好掌握着封印星核的知识？
And I suppose The Family happened to possess the knowledge to seal the Stellaron?
何止！他们对星核的了解比常人更甚，迅速帮米哈伊尔平息了内乱，又以「同谐」的名义加入到匹诺康尼的建设中。

Not just that! They knew far more about the Stellaron than the average person. They helped Mikhail swiftly quell the civil unrest and played a part in building Penacony, under the disguise of the Harmony.
那是被称作「逐梦时代」的三纪，被蒙在鼓里的「钟表匠」向全宇宙发出邀请，掀起了名为梦想之地的热潮。
Those three eras were known as the Age of Dreaming. The Watchmaker, who had been left in the dark, sent out invitations across the universe, spreading the hype around the land of the dreams.
那后来…他们又是怎么反目成仇的？
Then... how did they turn against each other?
还记得那个「填海造陆」的比喻吧？真相是星核从来没有被封印，只是换了种形式存在于梦中。好好想想，要构筑并维持如此庞大的「美梦」，代价是什么？

Remember the island-in-the-ocean metaphor? The truth is, the Stellaron was never truly sealed. It existed in a different form within the Dreamscape. Think about this — what would it cost to create and maintain such a lavish dreamland?
是生命，小姑娘。富丽堂皇的美梦建立于精神的死亡之上，名为「快乐」的毒酒淌过梦境，令人们沉溺其中，心智缓缓流向同一个终点，最终变成美梦的胎盘。

It's people's lives. The opulent dream is built upon the decay of spirits, with a toxic elixir called "pleasure" flowing through the Dreamscape. It tempts people to indulge in the Dreamscape, and gradually their minds succumb, becoming nourishment for the sweet dream.
迷茫、怠惰、懦弱…这些人性中随处可见的弱点，被家族放大、滋养，将匹诺康尼变成了另一种监狱，并且远比过去那座更坚不可摧。
Confusion, laziness, and cowardice... weaknesses that plague humanity were magnified and nourished by The Family. Penacony became a new kind of prison, even more impenetrable than the previous one.
我们发现得太晚了。那时家族已经手眼通天，反对者很快遭到了控制和驱逐。
Sadly, we realized this far too late. By then, The Family had a firm grip on Penacony, swiftly quelling any opposition that arose.
走投无路，我只得借助「神秘」的力量躲入这片混沌的忆域，又耗费数年时间在梦中「虚构」出一只迷因，为我们所用——

At my wit's end, I had to use the power of the Enigmata and sought refuge in this chaotic Memory Zone. Over the years, I {RUBY_B#Fictionologize}fabricated{RUBY_E#} a meme within this dream for our use...
<color=#dbc291ff>「沉眠」</color>，这就是它真正的名字。常人无法在梦境中再度沉睡，我们才有机会钻这个空子。
<color=#dbc291ff>"Dormancy,"</color> that's its real name. We exploited a loophole — you see, regular people can't fall asleep again while they are inside the Dreamscape.
原来这就是「不可能之事」的真正含义。所以，你以「钟表匠」的名义发出邀请函，是为了找到能够解决星核危机的派系，吸引他们前来匹诺康尼发现真相？

So, this is the true meaning of "the impossible." You sent out invitations in the Watchmaker's name to find forces capable of resolving the Stellaron disaster and draw them in to Penacony to uncover the truth?
不仅如此，我更想看到的是各大派系为遗产争斗不断的样子，再加上「钟表匠」销声匿迹十余年来的首次发声，家族中的*叛徒*一定会露出马脚。

It's not just that. Above all, I wanted to see what happens when the major factions engage in a struggle for the legacy. Since this is the Watchmaker's first announcement in decades, the traitor within The Family is bound to reveal themselves.
所以，「遗产」真的只是个幌子……
So, the legacy is just a facade...
如果你要把星核当做遗产，我也没意见。
If you want to consider the Stellaron as the legacy, I'm totally fine with that.
如此说来，那颗星核现在在哪儿？
If that's the case, where is the Stellaron now?
这就该问那个翅膀头小子了。星核一直处于家族的控制下，他又是橡木家系的牌面，心里肯定一清二楚。
That's a question for Mr. Wings. The Stellaron is still under The Family's control, and as the head of the Oak Family, I'm sure he holds all the answers.
你们聊得差不多了吧？怎样，愿意告诉我们那颗「星核」在哪儿了么？
Are you done talking? So, will you tell us where the Stellaron is?
它…就是匹诺康尼大剧院本身。
It... is the Penacony Grand Theater itself.
果然是这样，家族的化身，最早出现在美梦中的建筑…它就是匹诺康尼变成这幅样子的罪魁祸首。
As I suspected. It's the embodiment of The Family, the edifice that first materialized within the sweet dream... That's what turned Penacony into its current state.
而利用星核完成这一切的人…恐怕是歌斐木先生，也就是如今的「梦主」。
As for the person who employed its power... It is in fact Mr. Gopher Wood, the current Dreammaster.
哦，比我想得更顺利嘛，这么快就锁定嫌犯了。还是说，你事先调查做得挺充分？
Well, that was easier than I thought. Did you conduct your own investigation already?
你说得没错。在追查杀害妹妹的「凶手」时，除了你…我其次怀疑的就是他。
Correct. When I was trying to track down the person who murdered my sister, apart from you... Gopher Wood was my second suspect.
看来你先找我对质是个相当正确的决定。
Confronting me first turned out to be a smart move on your part.
我没有其他选择。梦主从来都是神龙见首不见尾，就连各位家主都很难见到他。
I didn't have other options. The Dreammaster has been elusive, and even the heads of the Families can hardly get an audience with him.
而且…歌斐木先生对我和妹妹有恩，我实在不愿面对这样的结果。
Moreover... Mr. Gopher Wood has been kind to my sister and me, and I didn't want it all to end like this.
What do you mean by that?
实不相瞒，我和哥哥也是万界之癌的受害者。我们从小便是孤儿，被前来救济的家族收养长大。歌斐木先生见我们有资质，就把我和哥哥带来了匹诺康尼。

To be honest, my brother and I are also victims of the Cancer of All Worlds. We grew up as orphans and were adopted by The Family when they came to help. Mr. Gopher Wood recognized our potential and brought us to Penacony.
但是我们不能眼睁睁看着歌斐木先生走向「同谐」的对立面，我更不可能用自己的歌声去赞美罪恶的事业——
But I can't just stand by and watch Mr. Gopher Wood become an enemy of the Harmony. I won't use my voice to support an evil cause...
无论家族的叛徒是谁，无论他向我下达怎样的指令，我都不会登台献唱。我们绝对不能把谐乐大典变成毁灭「同谐」的仪式……
I won't step on that stage and sing, no matter who the traitor is or what orders they give me. I won't let the Charmony Festival become an event that destroys Harmony itself...
为了我们理想中的乐园。
For the paradise in our dreams.
嗯…为了我们理想中的乐园。
Indeed... for the paradise in our dreams.
身为橡木家系的家主，为了匹诺康尼的光明未来，我义不容辞。我和知更鸟会即刻前往美梦，想办法找到梦主对质。如果家族真的偏离了「同谐」……

As the head of the Oak Family, I'm responsible for ensuring Penacony's promising future. Robin and I will head into the sweet dream and confront the Dreammaster, and if it turns out that The Family has truly strayed from the Harmony...
我将与各位站在同一战线，中止谐乐大典，并亲自偿还歌斐木先生欠下的血债。
I'll fight alongside you. We'll put the Charmony Festival on hold and make sure Mr. Gopher Wood pays for his blood debt.
你们即将面对的敌人，或者说，敌人们，可不像我这条老狗这么好欺负，动一动就会自己散架……
The enemies you are about to face aren't like this old dog here, who can barely even bark...
既然各位有共同的目标，不如同心协力，或许还有一线成功的机会。
Since our interests are aligned, why don't we team up? Maybe, just maybe, we'll have a shot at success.
我们追寻前辈无名客的脚步来到此地，没有理由不继续跟随他的足迹。
We have always been following in the footsteps of our Nameless predecessors, and there's no reason to stop now.
嗯，无名客可不是碰见困难就会退缩的人！{NICKNAME}，你说是吧？
Yeah, we Nameless won't back down from a challenge! Isn't that right, {NICKNAME}?
Ain't nothing to fear no more!
噫，你说这种台词，我反而有点慌了……
Ah... that line actually makes me a bit nervous...
英雄可不能临阵脱逃啊。
说得对，又到咱们星穹列车拯救世界的时候了！
Exactly! It's time for the Crew to save the world once more!
要对付梦主啊？我先投降。
Going up against the Dreammaster? Nah, I'd surrender.
哎呀，这么有仪式感的场合，就不要开玩笑啦！
Come on. Don't crack jokes at such a serious moment.
列车组不会对这种事袖手旁观，星期日先生，知更鸟小姐，我愿意代表星穹列车与你们同行。有第三方在场，谈判应当会更顺利些。如有危险…多一个人也总是好事。

Rest assured — sitting on the sidelines isn't in our nature. Mr. Sunday, Miss Robin, I'm willing to accompany you on behalf of the Astral Express. Having a third party present should help with negotiations... and could make all the difference if things get ugly.
那就有劳瓦尔特先生了。
谐乐大典开幕在即，时间已经十分紧张，各位——我们必须出发了。
The Charmony Festival is about to start, and time is against us. We must hasten.
虽然是我主动提出随行，但此行面对梦主…恐怕凶多吉少。
I may have been quick to step up to the plate, but confronting the Dreammaster could be a very dangerous affair.
啊？连杨叔都这么说，这梦主得有多厉害啊？
Huh? Even you're saying that, Mr. Yang? How powerful is that Dreammaster?
身为匹诺康尼的分家领袖，梦主背后恐怕是整个「同谐」势力…何况星核也在他手中，必须做好最坏的打算。
He's the leader of the Families of Penacony, and he has the entire power of the Harmony behind him... not to mention the Stellaron in his possession. We must proceed with great caution.
噫，要不杨叔还是别去了吧……
Maybe you can just stay behind this time, Mr. Yang...?
这也不行。先不谈知更鸟小姐，我总觉得方才星期日先生的态度有些不对劲，但说不上来是为什么…至少得确保他不会临阵倒戈。

No, that won't do. Even if we count Robin as an ally, something felt off about Mr. Sunday just now, although I can't quite put my finger on it... I have to make sure he won't turn against us when things start to get dicey.
{NICKNAME}，你身上应该带着公司使节给你的那件信物吧，可否借我一用？
You're still carrying the keepsake the IPC envoy gave you, right, {NICKNAME}? May I borrow it for a moment?
What do you need it for?
这玩意应该不能当护身符…
I don't think this'll bring us any luck...
如我所想，砂金给你的这枚筹码…是个小型发信器。
As I suspected, this chip Aventurine gave to you... is actually a miniature transmitter.
他恐怕是打算用这个装置来追踪你的动向，或是在需要的时候与你联络。没想到竟在这种场合帮上了大忙。
If I'm right, he intends to use it to track your location or contact you when needed. As it so happens, this may actually be of some use in the current situation.
砂金？他真的还活着么…找梦主谈判又和他有什么关系？
Aventurine? Is he still alive...? And what does he have to do with our mission to confront the Dreammaster?
还记得我说过的话么？与公司合作不失为一种制衡家族的方法。
Remember what I said earlier? Working with the IPC is a way to keep The Family in check.
一旦谈判出现变故，相当于坐实了家族染指星核的意图，这可是那位使节梦寐以求的「突破口」。届时，我会利用这枚发信器将消息传给公司。

If negotiations go south and The Family show their true colors by going after the Stellaron, I'll use this transmitter to send a message to the IPC. It'll be just the opportunity the IPC Ambassador was hoping for.
唯一要赌一把的，就是砂金是否还平安无事了。不过公司线路向来有专人密切监听，更不用说他是战略投资部的重要干部，单是传递消息应该足够了。

The only question mark in all this is Aventurine's current status... but the IPC is always listening, especially senior Strategic Investment Department heads like him. Getting the message across shouldn't be a problem.
嗯，你们也多保重。如果有任何闪失…不用管我，一定要封印星核。
Well, you take care too. If anything goes wrong... don't worry about me. Just make sure to seal the Stellaron.
视死如归啊，那男人是个真英雄。
就算梦主是清白的，家族的腐败也已根深蒂固。米哈伊尔犯过一次的错误，我不会再犯第二次。祝他好运吧……
Even if the Dreammaster is innocent, The Family's corruption runs deep. I won't make the same mistake Mikhail did. Let's wish him the best of luck...
加拉赫先生，你应该还有话要对我们说吧？
Don't you have something else to tell us, Gallagher?
临行前，列车长曾拜托我们在匹诺康尼打听三位无名客的消息。现在我们已经知晓了拉扎莉娜女士和铁尔南先生的事迹，只差最后一位「拉格沃克」了。
Before we departed, the conductor asked us to inquire about the three Nameless in Penacony. We've already collected intel about Razalina and Tiernan, so the only one left is Legwork.
如果我没猜错…我们早就见过他了，对么？
If I'm not mistaken... we've already met him somewhere, haven't we?
哼…说「见过」还谈不上，但答案确实很好猜。我之前的提示，够明显了。
Hm... it's not enough to say "meet," but the answer is pretty obvious. After all, I've hinted at it in quite an evident way.
自从收到星穹列车的回复，我就一直在关注你们的消息，包括各位为联结诸界付出的巨大努力。而现在，你们又安然无恙地走到了这里，已然证明了自己的实力。

I've been watching over you ever since I received the reply from the Astral Express, and I've seen the great effort you all put into linking different realms together across the cosmos. And now, after getting this far all in one piece, you have truly proven yourselves.
姬子小姐，是你修复了列车，令其重新驶于银河？
Miss Himeko, were you the one who repaired the Express and got it sailing through the cosmos again?
而这两位年轻的无名客…身世离奇，身怀绝技。
And you two young Nameless... you have very interesting life stories and extraordinary skills.
Awww, you're making me blush with these flatteries... Keep them comin'!
身世…我还不知道啦，但本姑娘确实身怀绝技！
I don't know much about my life story... but I do have extraordinary skills!
那你知道本球棒侠的其他称号么？
Ha, of course, my reputation precedes me. Believe in the Galactic Baseballer supremacy!
你这家伙…哪有什么乱七八糟的称号啦！
What...? Hey, you can't just make up "titles" like that!
呵呵，真有活力啊。至于那位名叫帕姆的列车长…请代我向它问好，它的朋友总是会在喝醉以后，念叨起列车上的时光。

Heh, you're full of energy. Please send my regards to... the conductor, Pom-Pom. Please let them know that their friend has fond memories from his time aboard the Express, which he reminisces on every time he has a good drink.
那最后一位无名客，他启程，停下，又启程…绕了一大圈，最后还是回到了起点。
As for the last Nameless... he embarked, disembarked, and embarked again... traveling in a great circle and ending up back where he started.
在弥留之际，他嘱咐我一定要找到星穹列车，将那份邀请函寄到未来的无名客手中。为此他准备了一份礼物，一份真正的「遗产」…只属于「开拓」的后人。

On his deathbed, he told me to find the Astral Express and deliver an invitation to the future Nameless. He left behind a special gift, a true "legacy"... something that belongs only to the successors of the Trailblaze.
跟我来吧。现在…该是它重现天日的时候了。
Come with me. Now... is the time to reveal it.
老朋友，有时候我会忘记你已经死了，好像你还有很多话想说，还有很多路没走完。
Sometimes I feel like you're still alive, old friend, like you've still got so much to say and do.
现在，我信守承诺，把你挂念一辈子的后人带来了。我不知道为什么你永远忘不了那辆列车，但我还记得你离开人世前，说过的最后一句话……
I've kept my promise... brought the future Trailblazers you've waited so long for. I don't know why you were so obsessed with that train, but I remember your last words...
Don't let us down, old man.
上前去吧，他的终点…就在前面的花园里。
Go ahead. His resting place... lies in the garden up ahead.
匹诺康尼第一位、也是最后一位无名客——
The first and last Nameless of Penacony...
「钟表匠，拉格沃克•夏尔•米哈伊尔。」
果然…「钟表匠」就是第三位无名客，连我都猜到了。
Sure enough... the Watchmaker is the third Nameless. Even I could guess that one.
他留下的遗产是一枚梦泡，我猜那里边，存放着某种只对无名客有意义的东西。
The legacy he left behind was a dream bubble. I believe inside that bubble, there's something that holds meaning only for the Nameless.
毕竟我检查内容的时候，发现里面什么都没有…多半又是什么「开拓」密文的吧，比我还神秘。
After all, when I checked its contents, I found nothing inside ... Maybe some Trailblaze runes? Even more enigmatic than me.
触摸米哈伊尔手中的梦泡。
Touch the dream bubble in Mikhail's hand.
这梦泡里…真的什么都没有？！
Seriously... there's nothing inside this dream bubble?
How could a dream bubble be empty?
他总是对无名客抱有莫名其妙的信心。在他的布置里，「开拓」永远占有一席之地，我不知道这自信从何而来…他还活着的时候，从来没有成功联系上列车。

That old man always had this strange belief in the Nameless and the Trailblaze, and I never understood where he got that confidence from... especially since he never managed to get in touch with the Express while he was alive.
我一直都搞不懂这老头在想什么，但这空无一物的梦泡还真有他的风格。充斥着无厘头的幻想…和难以理解的浪漫主义。
I could never figure out what was going on in that old man's head, but this empty dream bubble is so typical of him. He was always full of weird fantasies... and incomprehensible romanticism.
老顽童…我也没期待过他能留下什么后手就是了。
That mischievous old man... Well, I didn't expect him to leave anything concrete behind anyway.
不是的，加拉赫先生。我想，米哈伊尔一定会把最珍贵的事物留给我们。
Don't think that's the case, Gallagher. I'm sure Mikhail has left us the most precious thing of all.
呵，你不会也要开始讲什么大道理了吧？
Heh, don't start getting all philosophical on me, alright?
正如米哈伊尔相信未来的无名客，我们也会无条件地相信过去的无名客。他们愿意为自己热爱的土地献出一生，又怎会带着对未来的遗憾匆匆离去？

Just as Mikhail believes in the Nameless of the future, we unconditionally believe in the Nameless of the past. How could they leave with regrets for the future when they were ready to dedicate their lives to the land they loved?
这枚梦泡一定有内容，只是我们还没参透。加拉赫先生，在相信「钟表匠」这件事上，你也是一样的，不是吗？
There must be something contained in this dream bubble. It's just we haven't figured it out yet. You also have faith in the Watchmaker, don't you, Gallagher?
我可是信奉「神秘」命途的家伙，人生哲学就是不相信任何东西。
Well, I'm a follower of the Enigmata. My philosophy forbids me to have faith in anything.
…所以我同样理解，「相信」对于「开拓」意味着什么。我也想知道他到底留下了什么。呵，看你们了。
...That's why I understand what "faith" means in the Path of Trailblaze, and I also want to know what he left behind. Heh, I'll leave it to you guys then.
麻烦借你的{RUBY_B#「沉眠」}宠物{RUBY_E#}一用。我需要回一趟「黄金的时刻」，前往梦境贩售店确认一些事情……
Can I borrow your {RUBY_B#"Dormancy"}pet{RUBY_E#}? I need to make a trip back to Golden Hour and check something at the Dreamscape Sales Store...
为了米哈伊尔，也为了匹诺康尼的未来。
It's for Mikhail, and for the future of Penacony.
人我带来了，剩下的部分，就由加拉赫亲自向你们诉说吧…各位，保重。
Well I did my job — I gathered everyone here. Gallagher will explain the rest to you... Take care.
...There's no need for words. You're safe, and that's all that matters.
咦？突然变得热闹起来了，有好多人……
Huh? The atmosphere sure has livened up with all these people in here...
我把加拉赫带来了，是时候…面对「真相」了。
I brought Gallagher here. It's time... to face the "truth."
大家的表情都好严肃…有什么我能帮忙的吗？
You all look quite serious... Is there anything I can do to help?
不出所料，事件的核心依然是…「星核」。
As I suspected, the core of this issue lies within... the Stellaron.
去吧，那翅膀头小子肯定知道答案。
Go ahead. I'm sure Mr. Wings holds all the answers.
大家，请到这边来。临行前我们还有些准备要做。
Everyone, let's gather over here — we still need to make some preparations.
「我作孩子时，话语像孩子，心思像孩子，意念像孩子。」
"When I appeared as a child, my speech, mindset, and soul reflected immaturity and innocence."
「既成了人，就把孩子的事丢弃了。」
"As I grew into adulthood, I left behind my childlike side."
求您降福，希佩尊贵的代言人。
I humbly request your blessings, esteemed advocate of Xipe.
上前来吧，家人。我已恳请祂与我等同在。
Come to me, my Kinship. I have sought THEIR presence with us.
我侍奉苜蓿草家系近十余年，始终勤勉认真，从不惫懒，以同享谐乐为至善。然而就在昨日，我犯了错。为家主准备晚宴时，我不慎将餐点碰落地面。

I have faithfully served the Alfalfa Family for nearly a decade, promoting the Path of the Harmony to the best of my ability. However, I made a mistake yesterday. While I was preparing dinner for The Family Head, I accidentally dropped a prepared dish on the floor.
出于懈怠，我谎称全部安排妥当。虽然家主已将我辞退以示惩罚，但我依旧寝食难安，担忧恶的种子在我心间生根。我特此向您告解，以求赔补我的罪过。

Out of laziness, I lied and claimed that everything was ready. Although the Head has dismissed me as punishment, it has been tough to sleep with the guilt still gnawing at me, as I worried that the seeds of evilness may have taken root in my soul. So, I confess to you now to seek atonement for my sins.
你的内心是否对此痛悔，定心改过？
Do you sincerely repent and vow to change your ways?
你是否已用心省察，将所有罪过告说明白？
Have you examined your soul and confessed all your sins?
你是否愿意身体力行，领受罚赎？
Are you willing to accept the process of atonement?
很好。向其他家人展现热心、勤行善工，如此便能与家族重修旧好。平安回去吧。
Very well. Show your dedication and goodwill to The Family, and you shall be reinstated among them. Now, please leave in peace.
赞美希佩。也感谢您，尊贵的代言人。
Praise Xipe. And thank you, esteemed advocate.
我、我全心全意地向您忏悔…请务必原谅我！
I... I wholeheartedly confess to you... Please, pardon my sins!
请你安心，我已恳请祂与我等同在。只要您心地诚实善良，就一定能得到宽恕。
Rest assured. I have implored THEIR presence to be with us. As long as you are sincere, absolution will be granted.
哦！哦，好…其实，我是偷渡来匹诺康尼的。为了买到船票，我把家里能卖的全都卖了，房子，土地…还有，两个孩子……
Oh! Oh, great... you know, I... I arrived in Penacony as a stowaway. I sold everything to get a ticket... my house, my land... and... my two children...
继续跟在我身边，他们肯定会饿死，至少做奴隶还能混口饱饭吃。要是、要是我在这发达了，我立刻就去把他们赎回来，好好抚养长大……

My children were starving, and I hoped they'd have a chance at survival if they became slaves here. If... if I can strike it rich here, I'll lift them out of that situation... and give them the life they deserve...
结、结果我被猎犬家系的发现了，他们在到处抓我…我还想把孩子们都给接过来呢！都是我不好，都是我不好……
But, but, the Bloodhound Family got wind of it. They're on my tail... hunting me down... I thought I could bring my kids here! It was all my fault... all my fault...
家族愿意包容所有人。我会转达猎犬家系停止搜查。从此往后，你无需再过担惊受怕的日子。
The Family is ready to forgive all sinners. I'll ask the Bloodhound Family to cease their pursuit. You don't need to live in fear anymore.
谢谢，谢谢！我会努力工作，争取早日把孩子们赎回来，加入家族…赞、赞美谐乐！
Thank you, thank you! I'll work my hardest to redeem my children and make them part of The Family... P—Praise the Harmony!
好久不见啊，匹诺康尼最受瞩目的男人，橡木家系的次任家主…星期日先生？
Hey, long time no see, Mr. Sunday! The most esteemed individual in Penacony and... the next leader of the Oak Family, right?
…我已恳请祂与我等同在，可以开始了。
...I have sought THEIR presence with us. Let us proceed.
行吧。就按规定的流程来——咳咳！我犯了过错，请宽恕我的罪行：我在早饭时候浪费了半块披萨…还有一瓶苏乐达。
Sure, let's just get this over with. Ahem! I have sinned. Please forgive me! I wasted half a pizza at breakfast... and a bottle of SoulGlad.
就这些，没别的了。你是不是还有词要念？搞快点，我赶着去看机动球比赛呢。
That's it. Nothing more. Can we wrap this up? I've got a Roboball game to catch, you know?
你…是否愿意补赎善工，以偿清你本应受到的罪罚？
Do you... seek to atone for your sins through good deeds?
「罪罚」？开始装圣人了，哈？告诉你，家族没资格审判我，你更不行。
My "sins"!? Starting to sound like a saint, eh? Let me tell you something — Neither The Family nor you have the right to judge me.
你们家族的那点事谁不知道？忘记「钟表匠」了？去你的吧，鸡翅膀脑袋，我可不吃你们这套。骗骗那帮逐梦客得了，别把自己也给骗了。
You think nobody knows what your precious Family has done? About the Watchmaker, huh? Don't kid yourself, feather-brain. Those Dreamchasers might be fooled by your act, but don't fool yourself.
以后啊，念那些经文前，先好好想想…橡木家系能有今天的地位，你能坐在这，衣食无忧，高高在上，俯瞰所有人，靠的究竟是什么。

Before you start spouting off your holy verses, answer me this... Where does the power of the Oak Family come from? And your power? What makes you think you can sit there, all high and mighty, looking down on everyone else?
今天告解的时间够我进「同谐」乐园了吧？那我走了。希望你成功当选，哼…别让我赔本啊。
Well, I've spent enough time in confession today to enter the Harmony's paradise, right? Then I'll take my leave. Good luck with your election, and... don't make me regret my investments in you.
三重面相的灵魂啊，敬请聆听我的发问……
O, revered Triple-Faced Soul, hear my doubts...
如果强者的权势财富能掩盖罪行，谁能对他们予以裁决？
Who can judge the strong when their power hides their crimes?
如果弱者为延续生存需不惜代价，谁能为他们予以担保？
Who can vouch for the weak when they will pay any price to survive?
如果至纯善的灵魂都会犯下过错，谁能给他们予以宽慰？
Who can comfort the purest souls when even they get led astray?
若「以强援弱」果真是乐园的根基……
If "the strong defending the weak" is truly the foundation of paradise...
又是谁徒留他们在苦难的人间哀号？
...then who— who is responsible for the suffering and anguish in this wretched world?
…没事。可能是工作太久，又从流梦礁返回，有些不适应。过会儿应该就好了。
...I'm fine. I've been working long hours, and I just made a trip to Dreamflux Reef and back... So I'm a bit out of sorts. But it'll all be over before we know it.
星期日先生为谐乐大典日夜操劳，如今却遇上这种意外，即便星核问题非同小可，到底也有些教人过意不去啊。

You've been working non-stop on the Charmony Festival, Mr. Sunday, and no one could have predicted this incident. Even if the Stellaron does pose a grave threat, I still feel sorry for all the trouble we've caused you.
呵呵，无妨。谐乐大典本意是为增进银河的幸福和谐，但既然我们已知晓真相，那及时叫停便是。
Hehe, no need to worry about troubling anyone. The Charmony Festival was meant to spread joy and harmony across the Cosmos. But now that we know the truth, I'm afraid we'll have to cancel it.
让所有人幸福一直是我们兄妹二人的愿望…因此，我们会向梦主尽力争取。只要讲明个中原委，梦主应该能表示理解。
It has always been our wish to make everyone happy, so... we'll do our best to explain everything to the Dreammaster. I'm sure he'll understand.
即便最终交涉结果不尽人意…我也会拒绝登台。如果没有「调弦师」，{RUBY_B#「同谐」的化身}「齐响诗班」{RUBY_E#}便不会降世，大典也就不过是场普通的演出。

Even if the negotiation does not go smoothly... I'll refuse to go on stage. Without the Chordmaster, the {RUBY_B#Embodiment of Harmony}Harmonious Choir{RUBY_E#} would not arrive, and the Charmony Festival would be just a grand performance, and nothing more.
看到二位有如此决心，我也安心了。
I'm relieved to see your determination.
话说回来，我们此行来到匹诺康尼，还从未与梦主有过接触。五大家系的家主我都略有耳闻，却极少听到有关这位「梦主」的消息。
Y'know, since arriving in Penacony, we haven't had any contact with this Dreammaster himself. I'd heard of the heads of the five major lineages, but the Dreammaster is a mystery to me.
梦主极少现身人前，我们也很难得见。但此次事关重大，他承诺会亲自前来与我等一道磋商。
The Dreammaster rarely grants an audience — even for us. But given the urgency of the situation, he's agreed to meet us in person.
瓦尔特先生恐怕会成为近些年首位与梦主会晤的宾客呢。
Perhaps you'll be the first guest to meet the Dreammaster in years, Mr. Yang.
希望我们能得出令所有人都满意的结论。
Let's hope we can reach a consensus that satisfies everyone.
时间差不多了，我和哥哥得先去做接见的准备…情势紧急，招待不周还请见谅。
It's about time. We'll have to get ready for the meeting... I apologize for any inconvenience caused by the urgency.
没事。我就在这等会便是。
Don't worry. I'll be waiting here.
天哪…是星期日先生！快来，这里！哈哈哈……
Oh, dear... it's Mr. Sunday! Hey, come over here! Hahaha...
看来有人需要帮助…我们去看看吧。
Looks like someone needs help... let's go check it out.
看看——这位可爱的小姐是谁呀？
Look who we have here? A lovely young lady.
远方有渡鸦的叫声…看来梦主马上就要到了。
I heard a raven cawing in the distance... It seems the Dreammaster will arrive soon.
星期日先生…你好呀！瞧见了吗？那天上的月亮，就和我手中的苏乐达瓶盖相同大小！
Oh, Mr. Sunday... Hey there! Okay, see the moon in the sky? It's about the size of the cap on my SoulGlad bottle!
是不是…只要我伸出手，就能把月亮抓在怀里了？嗯？对吧？
If I just reached out my hand... I could grab the moon, couldn't I?
月亮…呵呵，你想说的是大剧院吧？
The moon... You mean the Grand Theater?
哦，哦！哈哈，你瞧我，一定是离家太久，太想念那轮月亮了…嗝。
Oh, yeah! Haha, look at me! I've been away from home for too long... I must be missing that moon... *hiccup*
不过…无所谓！咱们匹诺康尼的大剧院可比月亮亮堂多了…好看！养眼！
But... it's no big deal! The Grand Theater here looks much better than the moon back home... It's just... magnificent!
他们当年还劝我不要把家当全都卖掉，一门心思向着匹诺康尼…呸，真是目光短浅！
They told me not to sell everything I had just to come to Penacony... Tsk, how short-sighted!
「把家当全都卖掉」…为什么要做到这份上？
Selling everything you had? Why would you go to such lengths?
为什么？还能为什么…老家日子太苦，活得连个人样都没了。
Why? Can't you see...? Life back home is miserable... It's not really living at all.
还是匹诺康尼好啊，只有美梦，没有苦头，不用为明天烦恼，想做什么就做什么，这才叫活着呢…嗝，舒坦！
It's better to be here in Penacony! No pain, no worries about tomorrow, just sweet dreams! You can do whatever you want! That's what I call living... *hiccup* Yeah, now this is the life!
嗝…嗯？小姑娘，你刚才问了什么？我没听清……
*hiccup* Huh...? What did you just say, young lady...? I didn't quite catch that...
没什么，先生。你看，格拉克斯大道上车流湍急，容易发生危险。艾迪恩公园就在附近，我让猎犬家系成员带您到那边继续享用美梦，如何？

Oh, it's nothing, sir. You see, the traffic on Glaux Avenue can be dangerous. How about I ask a Bloodhound Family member to escort you to Aideen Park over there so you can continue enjoying your sweet dream?
哦…好啊，你说得对。不愧是美梦的领导人，我的大救星！
Oh... yeah, that's a great idea! Wow, no wonder you're the leader of this sweet dream! You're totally a lifesaver!
那回见了，星期日先生。谢谢你陪我聊天…嗝。
See you around, Mr. Sunday! And... It was nice chatting with you... *hiccup*
知更鸟小姐！我们又见面了。谐乐大典的准备还顺利吧？我们都很期待呢。
Glad to meet you again, Robin! How are the preparations for the Charmony Festival coming along? We're all so excited about it!
很顺利，谢谢你，也辛苦你不远万里前来参加谐乐大典。
It's going smoothly. Thanks for making the trip to join the Festival.
哈哈，知更鸟小姐真是太客气了。能和宇宙各地的客人们一起没日没夜地狂欢，哪里辛苦！
You're too kind, Robin. It's a pleasure to have guests from all over the universe celebrating day and night!
我讨厌孤独，忍受不了无聊的生活，而这片充满乐子的梦境正适合我。
I can't stand being lonely or bored, so this jubilant Dreamscape is perfect for me.
要是这样的日子持续到永远…你会觉得厌倦吗？
But if this went on forever... would it get boring too?
当然不觉得！谁会嫌快乐太多呢？
Nah, not at all! Who would get tired of having so much fun?
每天都能穿漂亮衣服，随心所欲地体验各式各样的梦泡，怎么吃都不会胖，不会生病，不会变老…只要付得起房费，这里就是最棒的乐园！

Every day, you get to wear fancy clothes, explore all sorts of dream bubbles, indulge in delicious food without gaining weight, and you never get old or sick... As long as you can afford a room, this place is the ultimate paradise!
但…你应该也知道，能从梦境里带回现实的东西非常有限。
But... you know that only a few things can be brought back from the Dreamscape to reality, right?
所以我就不带回去嘛！在梦里过过瘾足够了。我不是长生种，一辈子也就六七十年，要顾及的东西又太多…能开开心心过好日子不容易了。
