噢，多么令人温暖的结局啊！
Oh, such a warm and fuzzy ending!
我怎么也没有想到，一个如此悲伤的场景，竟会被你们演绎得这么愉快和温馨。两人依然如同往时般友好，仿佛时间和地位对他们不值一提！

I never imagined that such a sad scene could be portrayed by you two in such a joyful and heartwarming way — two people sharing a long-cherished friendship, as if time and status meant nothing to them!
咦？我们还什么都没做…她也太能脑补了吧？
Huh? But we haven't even done anything... Is her imagination running wild again?
你们的表演甚至超过了原作！简直…简直…简直就——
Brilliant! Your portrayal outdoes the original! It's simply... simply... simply —
两人依然如同往时般友好，仿佛时间和地位对他们不值一提！看到这样的结局，我心里也充满了希望。
Two people sharing a long-cherished friendship, as if time and status meant nothing to them! My heart brims with hope at the sight of such an ending.
别走太远，评委在盯着我们呢……
Don't wander off, the judge is still watching us...
被迫扮演怪物的气泡锂犬
Bubble Hound who's been forced to play a monster
还算轻松…希望这样的考验不会持续太久。
Pretty simple... I just hope these tests don't take too long.
被迫扮演怪物的甜猿泰山
Sweet Gorilla who's been forced to play a monster
世界以痛吻我，我报之以苏乐达™…呜喳喳喳……
The world kisses me with pain, and I provide with SoulGlad™ in return... Whoosh...
被迫扮演怪物的十七分熟弟弟
Lil' Beyond Overcooked Forced to Play Monster
嘎呜…身可死，苏乐达™之名不可弃……
Grawwrr... The body withers, but the SoulGlad™ name shall not...
被迫扮演怪物的十七分熟哥哥
Big Beyond Overcooked Forced to Play Monster
Grawwrr... You truly are a beast, more than I can ever be...
这样应该就都搞定了…走吧，瓦尔特先生还在等我们。

Hurry now, Hanu! Touch that TV set and transform back into your old self. Then, head upstairs — your weapon awaits you there!
这么随便的引导真的没问题吗……

哦？刚才是不是有人提到了「高难度动作」？没错，朋友！接下来的剧情正好充满了各种高难度动作！

上回书说到，哈努兄弟做好了战斗准备。就在这时，他听见走廊外传来了沉重的脚步声。果然，恶棍军团的喽啰们已经闯入了哈努兄弟的宅邸！

勇敢的哈努兄弟绝不会束手就擒！他立刻奔向储藏室，准备与坏蛋们决一死战……
But brave Hanu won't go down without a fight! He instantly sprints for the storage room, ready for a do-or-die showdown against the baddies...
可是…我们现在还是没有趁手的武器……
But... we still don't have any weapons in hand...
你知道吗？哈努兄弟心爱的火箭筒恰好就在那间储藏室里，快去吧！
Guess what? Hanu's favorite bazooka just so happens to be in that storage room! So get a move on!
还真是方便的流程啊…要是主办方允许穿装甲参赛就更好了。
What a coincidentally convenient plot twist... It'd be even more awesome if the organizers allowed me to wear armor.

这里也有筑梦师们留下的「筑梦遥眼」…时间紧迫，有需要就直接用吧。

有人吗啾？我要坚持不住了啾！

天哪，是一只折纸小鸟！它怎么钻进十七分熟的尾巴里了？
Oh dear, it's an origami bird! What's it doing in Beyond Overcooked's tail?
是钟表小子啾？快救救我啾，要变成烤全鸟了啾！

烤全鸟！这可真是太糟糕了——我们赶紧救它出来吧！
A roasted bird! This is horrible — let's save it, quickly!
呼…谢谢你们啾，我感觉自己差不多已经七分熟了啾。
Phew... thank you guys, tweet. I feel I'm about seventy percent cooked, tweet!
还好你没事！可你怎么会钻进那家伙的尾巴里？
Thank goodness you're ok! But why did you burrow yourself into that fella's tail?
这是因为那家伙偷走了迷钟先生的零件啾！我想帮它拿回来，结果不小心把自己送进烤炉了啾…你们拿去吧，小心烫手啾！

Because that fella stole one of Mr. Big Ticker's parts, tweet! I wanted to help retrieve it, but I accidentally got myself stuck in the oven, tweet... Go ahead and get it, but be careful, it's hot, tweet!
天哪…这是怎么回事？你的内心十分混乱！
Oh dear... What's going on in here? Your inner self is a mess!
我…没有资格成为真正的你。还是放弃吧，钟表小子！
I'm not qualified to be the real Clockie. Just give up, Clockie!
噢，不！这可不行，你必须直面自己内心的恐惧！
Hmph, no! This is unacceptable. You have to face your fears!
事已至此，只好使用「钟表把戏」了——
Since it's come down to this, I'll have to use Clockwork...
前进吧，朋友们——等那个时刻到来，我和所有迷钟都会为你们加油的！
Go forth, my friends — when the moment comes, all the Dream Tickers and I will cheer for you!
去吧！冠军的舞台属于二位…享用你们赢得的荣光！
Go forth! The champion's stage belongs to the both of you... Bask in the glory you deserve!
Am I... just a failed experiment?
我们回来了！只要有这些，你一定能够打开心结，滴答！
We're back! As long as you have these, you'll be able to find closure, tick-tock!
且慢！{M#英俊的先生，俏美的小姐}{F#两位俏美的小姐}——

By the glorious light of Beauty! I never thought I would see you again. In such turbulent times, your kind faces are as spring's gentle breeze, bringing solace to my scorched heart!
Are you... a Knight of Beauty?
听哪！玫瑰色的「纯美」已让各位哑口无言——多么荣幸！
Hear ye! The rosy glow of the Beauty has rendered you speechless — what an honor!
原来那位红发选手是你？！
So the red-haired contestant was you all along!
您竟然已在别处探听到了我卑微的称号…不胜荣幸！
You've already heard of my humble title elsewhere? I am deeply honored!
你也来参加谐乐大典吗？
Will you be participating in the Charmony Festival as well?
我获悉庆典召开在即，便让「希世难得号」开足马力，将我引领至匹诺康尼。然而没有「纯美」看顾的银河举世混浊，我在前来途中为救死扶伤耽搁许久……

Upon hearing of the impending festivities, I commanded the One and Only to bring me to Penacony with full haste. Alas, in a cosmos unguarded by the Beauty, disorder prevails, thus my passage was delayed by tending to the sick and injured...
好在侏儒兔机甲驾驶员、流浪的猫咪决斗家、银河忍者、四驱智械等三十二位落难者全都渡过难关，安然无恙…我便将大家一齐带领至此，与万千美丽的生灵同享谐乐。

Fortunately, the Mini Rabbit Mech Pilot, Stray Cat Duelist, Galactic Ninja, and Quad-drive Intellitron, along with thirty-two other souls in distress, all emerged from their predicaments safe and sound... I then led them all here to revel in the harmony with the countless other splendid beings.
这就是「纯美」吗？太耀眼了…
Is this the Beauty? It's dazzling...
不敢当！只可惜那位如孔雀般华美耀眼的公司使节状况依旧欠佳…多希望他也能一道共襄盛举啊。

…不，不行。海选规则亦神圣不可侵犯，一如「纯美」本身。
...No, that won't do. The rules of the contest are sacred and inviolable, just like the Beauty.

告知「钟表匠」和星核的真相。

如果我没猜错，纯美骑士团应该也收到了「钟表匠」的邀请函，对吧？

You revealed to Argenti all the truths about the Watchmaker and the Penacony Stellaron...
我明白了，看来各位果真在为「纯美」之道四处奔走。

去吧，我的挚友，俏美的小姐，海选的桂冠属于你们！我将在此地遥望各位沐浴在聚光灯下，与观众们一道献上最诚挚的欢呼与喝彩。

抱歉了，我的挚友。如果你们不能拿出令人心悦诚服的证据，我便绝不能退让，以免辱没纯美骑士之名。
Forgive me, my dear friends. If you cannot present irrefutable evidence, I must not yield, lest I dishonor the name of the Knights of Beauty.
但倘若你所言确实非虚…「纯美」在上，我们就借这场命中注定的对决检验你的能力吧！
But if what you say is true... In the name of Beauty, let us use this fated duel to test your mettle!
虽然抵达后我一度因不善言辞而被当作身材高大、身着银铠、如烈焰般火红而炽热的通缉犯…但无妨，这一切都是来自梦想之地的「纯美」历练。

Though upon arrival, I was once mistaken for a towering, silver-armored fugitive with fiery red flames, due to my lack of eloquence... it matters not, for all these trials stem from the Land of Dream's Beauty.
重要的是，此身如今已立于此处——狭路相逢，我，「纯美骑士团」的银枝，恳求与二位展开一场骑士道的较量！
What matters is that I now stand before you — our paths have crossed. I, Argenti of the Knights of Beauty, am humbly requesting for a battle with you both in the name of the Code of Chivalry!
如果我有幸得胜，就请各位为我让出通向桂冠的阶梯，还要承认——
If I am fortunate enough to emerge victorious, kindly grant me passage to the crown of victory and recognize that...
——纯美女神伊德莉拉美貌盖世无双！
...Idrila, the Beauty, is the most peerless beauty of them all!
漂亮！漂亮！真是一场精彩的对决！是各位让我明白，为了捍卫伊德莉拉的美名，我还需多加砥砺精进…多么美丽的教训！
Beautiful! Beautiful! Truly a captivating contest! It is through you that I realize, to uphold the honor of Idrila, I must further hone my skills... What a beautiful lesson indeed!
去吧，我的挚友，俏美的小姐，海选的桂冠属于你们……
Go forth, my dear friend, beautiful miss, the audition's crown is yours to claim...
我将在此地遥望各位沐浴在聚光灯下，与观众们一道献上最诚挚的欢呼与喝彩。
I shall remain here, gazing from afar as you bask in the limelight, joining the audience in offering you the most heartfelt cheers and applause.
我们的时间已经不多了…有缘再见，纯美的骑士。
We don't have much time... May fate allow us to meet again, Knight of Beauty.
噢！这突如其来的畅快感……
Wow! This sudden surge of joy...
起作用了，滴答！接下来，只要进入它的心境空间，帮它连通通路，就大功告成了！
It's working, tick-tock! Next, we just need to enter its Emoscape, help connect its pathways, and we're done!
难以置信，匹诺康尼竟然存在着…「秩序」的残党。
Unbelievable, to think that there would be... remnants of the Order on Penacony.
你们把杨叔和知更鸟小姐怎么了？！
What have you done with Mr. Yang and Miss Robin!?
请放心，只是给了他们一点独自沉思命运的时间。
Don't worry. I just gave them some time alone to ponder their fates.
你应该明白，这么做意味着与星穹列车为敌。
You should know that these actions make you an enemy of the Astral Express.
即便一定要与各位无名客为敌，也只有我和橡木家系而已。但我们还没走到那一步，不是么？
Should we need to stand against the Nameless, it would only be myself and the Oak family involved. But we haven't reached that point yet, have we?
各位为匹诺康尼的公义四处奔走，这一点是所有人都看在眼里的。
Your efforts for the justice of Penacony are evident to everyone and have been widely observed.
You want to talk terms with us?
聪明，孩子。你的思想和那位先生一样灵敏。
Smart kid. You're just as sharp as the other one.
Stop beating around the bush and get to the point.
耐心是一种美德。不过我不会责备你。相反，我正要表明来意。
Patience is a virtue. However, I won't hold it against you. On the contrary, I'm here to make my intentions clear.
Give Mr. Yang back to us, now!
我会的，但这要取决于此次谈判的结果。
Oh I intend to, but that hinges on the outcome of this negotiation.
如果是「秩序」驱使你囚禁瓦尔特和知更鸟，还要借此胁迫我们乖乖就范，那我想，我们根本没有坐下谈判的必要。
If it is the Order that drove you to imprison Welt and Robin, and you're using them to coerce our compliance, then there'll be no point in entertaining any type of discussion.
您误会了，姬子小姐。他们很安全，正如家族一如既往的承诺，没有人会在梦境里受到伤害，更遑论属于「秩序」的美丽新世界。

You're mistaken, Miss Himeko. They are in very safe hands, and just as The Family has always proclaimed — no one can be harmed in the Dreamscape, least of all in the beautiful new world belonging to the Order.
匹诺康尼和这片宇宙都见证过太多无辜的鲜血。强者向弱者挥刀，胜者将败者的生命推向尽头……
Penacony and the entire universe have witnessed far too much innocent bloodshed. The strong wield their blades against the weak, and the victors push the vanquished to the brink of life...
自然选择——世界遵循这一法则，将全人类的福祉建立在弱者的遗骸上。只有{RUBY_B#「秩序」的命途行者}我们{RUBY_E#}，或者说我，有能力终结这出荒唐的闹剧。

Natural selection — the world abides by this principle, establishing the well-being of humanity atop the corpses of the downtrodden. Only {RUBY_B#Pathstriders of Order}we{RUBY_E#}, or rather I, possess the power to put an end to this farce.
你们打算复活一位已死的星神？从来没有人做到过这件事。
So you've decided to resurrect a dead Aeon? No one's ever done such a thing.
既然姬子小姐有兴趣，我们就打开天窗说亮话吧。我始终认为，人们可以通过和平的方式理解彼此。
If Miss Himeko is interested, let's draw back the veil and speak candidly. I've always firmly believed that people can understand one another through peaceful means.
我愿意将「秩序」行者的志向如实告知各位，以便你们做出对星穹列车，匹诺康尼，和这片宇宙更好的判断。语言苍白无力，难以描绘出那理想的面貌……

I'm willing to divulge the unembellished truth as to the intentions of the Order's Pathstriders, so that you will make better judgment for the Astral Express, for Penacony, and for this stretch of the universe. Words can hardly do justice to the beauty of that ideal...
所以随我来吧，各位。让我们一起重走来时的路，再看看这路将要通向何方。
So come with me, everyone. Let us retrace our steps and see once again where this road leads.
欢迎，这里不是匹诺康尼梦境的任何一角。而是我的内心世界。面前的景象之所以没有变化，是因为各位的意识提取了相似的概念予以补全。

Welcome. This isn't any location in Penacony's Dreamscape. It's my inner world. The reason the scenery before you remains unchanged is because your consciousness has drawn on similar concepts to fill in the gaps.
什么人会展示自己的内心啊…
Who in their right mind would expose their inner-self like this?
你…也对瓦尔特做了同样的事吗？
Did you do the same to Welt?
这是一种「调律」，效果更强，也更费神。{NICKNAME}此前经历过，{M#他}{F#她}应该能明白。
It's a "tuning" process, stronger in effect and more draining on the mind. {NICKNAME} has experienced it before, so {M#he}{F#she} should understand what it entails.
透过调律，各位可以更直观地理解我的情绪，这也意味着我将对你们毫无隐瞒。
Tuning allows you to intuitively grasp my feelings, which also means that I cannot hide anything from you.
接下来，我想请各位观看大屏幕，我们来时的路，就从这里开始。
Now, everyone, please look at the huge screen. The road we once took begins here.
从这里开始，各位将看到我经历过的诸多抉择。我选取了其中一部分与你们分享。
From this point on, you will witness the numerous decisions I've faced. I've selected a portion of these to share with you.
我想，在经历了共同的困境后，各位一定能够理解我的想法。
I believe after going through similar predicaments, you'll be able to better understand my thoughts.
开始吧。第一个抉择，与一只雏鸟的故事有关。
Let's begin. The first decision: A story about a baby bird.
这则故事发生在我和知更鸟很小的时候。我们是星核之灾的受害者，家族的歌斐木先生——也就是日后的匹诺康尼梦主——见我们兄妹两人无依无靠，便收养了我们。

This story happened when Robin and I were very young. We were victims of the Stellaron Disaster, and The Family's Mr. Gopher Wood — who would later become the Dreammaster of Penacony — saw that we siblings had no one to turn to and took us in.
那之后，我和知更鸟度过了一段相对无忧无虑的时光。某一天的晚餐后，我和妹妹在歌斐木先生的庭院里意外发现了一只孤单的小谐乐鸽。

Later on, Robin and I lived a time with nary a care in the world. One day, after dinner, while my younger sister and I were lounging about in Mr. Gopher Wood's yard, we spotted a fledgling Charmony Dove all on its own.
那只雏鸟还小，连羽毛都没长齐，也不会唱歌。我们发现时，它落在草丛中奄奄一息，似乎是被父母遗弃了。

That baby bird was tiny, it didn't even have all of its feathers, and it couldn't sing. When we found it, it was already on its last breath, having fallen into a shrub — probably abandoned by its parents.
我们当即决定为它搭建一座鸟巢。可思来想去，那年的冬天很冷，庭院夜间的风很大，还有许多毒虫和野兽出没……

We decided to build a nest for it right there and then. However, thinking back, that winter was unusually cold, with fierce winds at night in the yard, not to mention the many poisonous bugs and wild beasts in the vicinity...
毫无疑问，如果将雏鸟留在庭院，它绝无可能坚持到春天。于是我提议带它回去，放在窗前的木架上，并拜托大人造个鸟笼。

It was clear that if we left the fledgling in the yard, it stood no chance of surviving until spring. So, I suggested we take it inside, place it on the shelf by the window, and asked the adults to fashion a cage for it.
我们约定，等到它能依靠自己的力量展翅翱翔时，再将它放回天空。可遗憾的是，我们万万没有想到，这只鸟儿的命运早在那之前就已经注定——

We decided that when it regained its strength enough to spread its wings, we would release it back into the wild. The tragic part — something that we'd never considered — was that this bird's fate had already been determined long before this moment...
它落得何种下场，只在我们的一念之间。
Its destiny was determined by our momentary whim.
现在，我将把选择的权利交给各位。面对此情此景，你们会如何抉择？
Now, I pass the power of choice to you all. Faced with this situation, what choice would you make?
<color=#dbc291ff>是采取我们最初的方案，用软垫在原地为小谐乐鸽打造鸟巢？</color>
<color=#dbc291ff>Stick to the original plan, and build a nest with soft net where the Charmony Dove fell?</color>
<color=#dbc291ff>还是选择为它打造鸟笼，在温暖的屋宇中精心饲养鸟儿？</color>
<color=#dbc291ff>Or build a cage for it, and feed it, giving it the utmost care from within the warmth of a home?</color>
那家伙没脑地抛给我们这么个问题，到底是几个意思？不过答一答也不是不行……
That guy just casually throws this kind of question at us? What exactly is his deal? But fine, I'll answer I guess...
如果是我的话…应该会选择<color=#dbc291ff>给小谐乐鸽打造鸟笼</color>吧？
If it were me... I guess I'd choose to <color=#dbc291ff>build a cage for the little Charmony Dove</color>.
毕竟如果把它留在原地，肯定会被野兽伤到的…那样的话，小鸟也太可怜了。
After all, leaving it there, it's bound to get hurt by wild animals or something... And that'd just be too sad.
暂时还看不透他的用意…如果只看题面，我应该会选择<color=#dbc291ff>给小谐乐鸽打造鸟笼</color>……
I can't decipher his intentions right now... but based solely on the question, I would probably choose to <color=#dbc291ff>build that dove a cage</color>...
就算要放回天空，也得它能够展翅翱翔才行。如果把它留在原地…恐怕它再也不会拥有飞上天空的机会了。
Even if I was gonna release it back into the sky, it'd have to be strong enough to fly first. If I left it where I found it... I fear it'd never get the chance to fly ever again.
看起来他确实不打算囚禁我们。如果只是问答游戏，陪他过过招也无妨。
It looks like he really has no intention of imprisoning us. If it's just a quiz, I suppose it's fine to humor him.
回到问题本身，我个人会选择<color=#dbc291ff>给小谐乐鸽打造鸟笼</color>。
Back to the question: I would personally choose to <color=#dbc291ff>build the little Charmony Dove a cage</color>.
没什么特别的理由。我只是觉得每一只雏鸟都有飞上天空的权利…但如果它活不到那个时候，就无从谈起了。
No special reason. I do think that a fledgling should have the right to fly in the sky... But if it can't even live to that point, then there's nothing to talk about to begin with.
<color=#dbc291ff>要采取最初的方案，用软垫在原地为小谐乐鸽打造鸟巢吗？</color>
<color=#dbc291ff>Stick to the original plan, and build a nest with soft net where the Charmony Dove fell?</color>
有趣。既然你心意已决，就让我来揭晓这一选择会为那只雏鸟带来何种命运吧。
Interesting. Since you've made up your mind, allow me to reveal what fate this choice will bring to the fledgling.
就我观察到的结果，至少有三种以小型鸟类为食的野兽在那片庭院中出没：伏氏镰尾蝎、阿斯德纳狼獾，还有亨廷顿翼颈蛇……
From what I've observed, there are at least three predators in that yard that prey on small birds: The Vossickle Scorpion, Asdana Wolverine, and the Huntington Winged-Snake...
尽管无法伤及人类，但这些生物在小小的一方庭院里仍是上位掠夺者。在这种地方，等待那只小谐乐鸽的命运只有一种——痛苦的死亡。
Even if they shy away from humans, these animals are still near-apex predators in a fenced location like a yard. In such a location, only one fate awaits that little Charmony Dove: A painful death.
对于你做出的选择…我深表遗憾。接下来，让我们进入第二个抉择吧。这次…是一位逐梦客的故事。
As for the choice you made... I am deeply sorry. Now, let us advance to the second decision. This time... it's the story of a Dreamchaser.
<color=#dbc291ff>要选择为小谐乐鸽打造鸟笼，在温暖的屋宇中精心饲养鸟儿吗？</color>
<color=#dbc291ff>Or build a cage for it, and feed it, giving it the utmost care from within the warmth of a home?</color>
很高兴看见你和当年的我们做出了同样的选择。既然你心意已决，就让我来揭晓这一选择的结果吧。
I'm happy to see that you made a choice similar to ours. If your mind is made up, let me reveal the outcome of this choice.
我们认真将它抚养大，每天都备好精致的食料，还为它梳理羽毛。后来，在知更鸟离开匹诺康尼的那天，我们打开笼子的门，让它回到天空。

We passionately nursed it back to health, preparing only the best food for it every day. We even preened its feathers. Later, on the day that Robin left Penacony, we opened the cage door and let it fly back into the sky.
我在窗前看了它很久，大概三天左右吧。在那漫长的三天里，小谐乐鸽一次又一次地试图展开翅膀，飞向天空，又落向地面…周而复始。

I watched it for a long while by the window, probably about three or so days. In those three long days, the little Charmony Dove tried again and again to spread its wings to fly into the sky, but fell to the ground... only to keep trying.
最后，在第一百三十七次尝试时，它终于成功了。但这一次尝试并不圆满…在摇摇晃晃地飞行了一段时间后，它因无法准确掌握空气的流向而坠落在地。

Finally, on the hundred and thirty-seventh attempt, it succeeded. But its attempt did not go perfectly... After flying unsteadily for a while, it fell to the ground, unable to grasp the direction of the air currents.
这一坠彻底摔断了它的翅膀。它在我的怀中苦苦挣扎，却无济于事，最终迎来痛苦的死亡。而我们的悉心照料、寄予的关爱和厚望，在这一瞬间都成了葬送它的推手。

The fall shattered its wings. It writhed helplessly in my embrace, but it was all for naught, finally succumbing to a painful demise. And in that instant, our tender care, our given love and hopes... they all became the inevitable push that sent it to its death.
对于我们做出的选择…我深表遗憾。接下来，让我们进入第二个抉择吧。这次…是一位逐梦客的故事。
I deeply regret the choices we made... Next, let us head to the second decision. This time... it's the story of a Dreamchaser.
这则故事发生在我任职「铎音」期间。铎音是橡木家系特有的职位，负责聆听梦境居民的困惑和迷茫，给予他们相应的指导。

This story happened when I was appointed as Bronze Melodia — a position exclusive to the Oak Family, charged with listening to the problems and vexations of Dreamscape residents, and providing them with the relevant guidance.
也正是在那段时间，我得以听取来自梦境各方的声音：有欢喜、有忧愁、有傲慢、有悔恨…复杂的人性编织起世界，而我有幸窥见其中一斑。

It was during that period that I had the opportunity to hear voices from all corners of the Dreamscape: Joy, sorrow, arrogance, regret... The complex tapestry of human nature that formed the world, and I was fortunate to catch a glimpse of it.
那是一位逐梦客，也是一名偷渡犯。和其他所有人一样，他怀着对美好生活的向往来到匹诺康尼，只是他付出的代价对于凡人而言…也足以称作「倾尽一切」。

He was a Dreamchaser, and an illegal stowaway. Just like the rest of them, he came to Penacony in search of a better life, except that, to most people, the price he paid... I suppose you could say it was "everything."
他这么对我说，「把家里能卖的全都卖了」——房子，土地，还有两个孩子…他说自己无力抚养他们，做奴隶至少还能混口饭吃。
He told me "I sold everything I could at home." — the house, the land, even his two children... He said he could not afford to raise them, and that at least they could eat if they lived as slaves.
他也做好了计划，准备发家致富后就把孩子赎回，共享匹诺康尼的美梦。只可惜他的偷渡计划有些笨拙，被那群冥顽不灵的猎犬们嗅出了气息。

He had a plan in place: He would buy back his children once he had made his fortune, and enjoy Penacony's beautiful dream with them. Alas, his plan to smuggle himself was somewhat clumsy — and he was sniffed out by those pigheaded Hounds.
听过这位逐梦客的故事，我当即请求猎犬家系停止追捕，这样他便能安心生活。可惜我的眼界太浅，不曾想这自以为是的善举竟在日后酿成了苦果……

After hearing the Dreamchaser's story, I immediately appealed to the Bloodhound Family to cease their pursuit. That way, at least he could live peacefully. But I was still too naive to the ways of the world — I did not anticipate that what I thought was a kind gesture would later lead to dire consequences...
答案稍后公布。现在，我希望各位做出选择——
I'll tell you the outcome soon. For now, I'd like you all to make a choice—
<color=#dbc291ff>是做出和我一样的决定，说服猎犬家系停止搜查，以便那位逐梦客能够生存下去，实现他的愿望？</color>
<color=#dbc291ff>Will you do as I did, and try to convince the Bloodhound Family to stop their pursuit, so that the Dreamchaser may live peacefully and realize his wishes?</color>
<color=#dbc291ff>还是保持沉默，任凭他在猎犬的追踪下苟延残喘，直到注定的裁决来临？</color>
<color=#dbc291ff>Or will you remain silent, leaving him to languish while the Hounds are hot on his heels, until his inevitable judgment arrives?</color>
期待各位的选择，也许能够扭转那桩悲剧也说不定。
I look forward to everyone's decisions. Who knows, perhaps they might even alter the outcome of this tragedy.
看来偷渡客在匹诺康尼真的很常见啊…但故事里的这家伙，我觉得一点都不值得同情。
It seems illegal stowaways are really quite common on Penacony... But that guy in the story, I don't think he deserves any sympathy at all.
他为了追梦，竟然连孩子都卖了欸…就算有赎回的打算，也太不负责任了吧。
He sold his kids to chase a dream... Even if he intended to go back for them, it's still insanely irresponsible.
这么一想，就只有一种选择了：<color=#dbc291ff>让猎犬家系的人送他回去</color>！这人一定得受到惩罚！
With that thought, there is only one choice: <color=#dbc291ff>Let the Bloodhounds send him back home!</color> This person deserves to be punished!
这个问题…和雏鸟的故事有些内在联系，而这联系就是星期日想要说服我们的突破口……
This question... surely it has some connection to the baby bird story — and this connection is precisely the breakthrough Sunday aims to use to persuade us...
…我应该会选择<color=#dbc291ff>请求猎犬家系停止追捕</color>。
...I'd probably choose to <color=#dbc291ff>ask the Bloodhounds to cease their pursuit</color>.
逐梦客的故事啊…本着善意，我应该会<color=#dbc291ff>请求猎犬家系停止追捕</color>，拉他一把。
A Dreamchaser story... If I acted out of kindness, I would probably <color=#dbc291ff>ask the Bloodhounds to stop their pursuit</color> and lend him a hand.
不过，这个选择究竟会酿成什么样的「苦果」？我想，星期日一定是通过这件事深刻认识到了「以强援弱」的局限性吧。
But, what cruel repercussion would this choice result in? I think, Sunday must have been deeply impressed by the limitations of "the strong defending the weak" through this incident.
<color=#dbc291ff>要保持沉默，任凭他在猎犬的追踪下苟延残喘，直到注定的裁决来临吗？</color>
<color=#dbc291ff>Or will you remain silent, leaving him to languish while the Hounds are hot on his heels, until his inevitable judgment arrives?</color>
看来你和我一样，也在思考另一种选择能否带来更好的结局。但很可惜，他的下场恐怕只会更加凄惨。
It seems you, like me, are pondering whether a different choice could have led to a better outcome. Sadly, his fate would only be more tragic.
假设他自始至终都没被抓到，那一定会因精神错乱而死。偷渡客的入梦手段大多非比寻常，不像酒店那样完善。想在梦境中生活根本是天方夜谭。

Say he never gets caught, he would only die from delirium. The methods with which illegal stowaways enter dreams are unorthodox, not flawless like the hotel's. Living in the Dreamscape would be a mere pipe dream.
如果他被抓到了，猎犬们会网开一面吗？答案是不可能。他们无法承担相应的后果，也自然不会冒险给予援助。
Should he be apprehended, could the Hounds afford to turn a blind eye? The answer is a definitive no. They couldn't bear the resulting consequences, and thus, wouldn't dare extend a helping hand.
对于这一抉择，我再次深表遗憾。接下来就是第三次，也是最后一次抉择了——
As to your choice, I once again offer my heartfelt apologies. Next comes the third and final decision—
而这次的故事…属于我本人。
And the story this time... is my own.
<color=#dbc291ff>要说服猎犬家系停止搜查，以便那位逐梦客能够生存下去，实现他的愿望吗？</color>
<color=#dbc291ff>Will you try to convince the Bloodhound Family to stop their pursuit, so that the Dreamchaser may live peacefully and realize his wishes?</color>
看到你做出相同的决定，我深表荣幸。出于尊重，就告诉你我当年的决定招来了怎样的恶果吧。
I'm honored to witness you arriving at the same decision. Out of respect, I'll share with you the dire consequences that my choice back then brought about.
先说结果：他取得了巨大的成功。摆脱追捕后，他做了几年生意，很快跻身名流，平步青云。尽管不及老奥帝那样的大富翁，但也算是出类拔萃的风流人物。

First, the outcome: He attained major success. After avoiding capture, he ran a business for a few years, very quickly making a name for himself, elevating his status. He might not have become a tycoon like Old Oti, but he was considered a character of excellent repute.
那么他实现最初的愿望了吗？没有。我最后一次见他是在现实中，猎犬们正要将他永久驱逐，而我则是随行的铎音。使命很简单——聆听罪犯的忏悔。

Now then, did he realize the wish he set out to achieve? No. The last time I saw him was in the real world, where the Hounds were going to permanently exile him, and I was the accompanying Bronze Melodia. The mission was simple: Listen to the criminal's repentance.
他告诉我，自己是为了篡夺苜蓿草家主的地位，意图谋反才沦落至此。当我问及他的两个孩子，他却反问我：「什么孩子？」

He told me the reason he was in this predicament was because he conspired to usurp the head of the Alfalfa Family. When I asked him about his two children, he instead responded with a question: "What children?"
到头来，我心向「同谐」，冒险而为的善举没有任何意义，反成了恶行，造就了一位可悲的压迫者，还有千千万万被压迫的人……

In the end, my heart aligned with the Harmony, and the good deed I dared to undertake held no value, turning instead into a wrongdoing. It created a lamentable oppressor and countless oppressed individuals...
对于这一抉择，我再次深表遗憾。接下来就是第三次，也是最后一次抉择了——
As to your choice, I once again offer my heartfelt apologies. Next comes the third and final decision—
而这次的故事…属于我本人。
And the story this time... is my own.
这则故事发生在我就任橡木家主当天。那时歌斐木先生已成了如今的梦主，应他要求，我们进行了一场私人对谈。
This story happened the day I was appointed the Oak Family Head. At that time, Mr. Gopher Wood was the current Dreammaster, and as per his wish, we had a private conversation.
令我诧异的是，梦主只为我捎来了一封信。他让我读读信中的内容，而那信件…来自我的妹妹。
What surprised me was that the Dreammaster had only come to deliver a letter to me. He let me read its contents. It was a letter... from my sister.
信中无非是日常的寒暄，捎带她游历诸界的种种见闻。正当我心生疑惑，这封信与会谈有什么关系时，梦主开口了。

The letter contained the usual pleasantries, anecdotes from her travels — nothing out of the ordinary. Just as I started wondering how this letter related to our discussion, the Dreammaster began to speak.
「你知道么，这封信出自何人之手？」
"Do you know who wrote this letter?"
「当然是家妹的手笔。梦主为何要为我兄妹的日常琐事登门拜访？」
"My sister, of course. But why would you personally visit me to hand me a letter from my sister containing mere trivialities?"
「为了让你深入了解此事。你知道知更鸟如今正身在何方么？」
"To help you grasp the full scope of this issue. Do you know where Robin is at this moment?"
「依信中内容来看…应该是卡斯别林亚特-Ⅷ吧？她正在那里巡游……」
"From what the letter indicates... She must be in Kasbelina-VIII, correct? She's touring there right now..."
「不错。她可提到身中流弹一事？」
"Correct. Has she mentioned anything about a stray bullet?"
「那颗星球爆发了战争。正因如此，知更鸟才会将那里选作目的地…为了传扬『同谐』，挽救星球上的生命，她亲自奔赴前线了。」

"A war has broken out on that planet. It is because of this very reason that Robin chose this destination... To spread the word of the Harmony, and to save the lives of that planet, she personally made for the frontlines."
「她希望用歌声平复人们的痛苦，也愿意用自己的血肉之躯，为公司的救援物资输送提供援护…可惜，流弹无情。」
"She hoped to ease the people's suffering with song, and was willing to brave mortal danger to deliver the IPC's medical supplies... Unfortunately, stray bullets show no such compassion."
「若手术成功，现在应该在野战医院里休养吧。」
"If the operation was successful, she should probably be recovering in the field hospital."
「星神在上，那枚子弹直接打进了她的脖子…不过，或许是平日践行『同谐』善举的回报，子弹没有伤及命脉。等你处理完琐事，尽快给她回信为好。」

"By the Aeon above, the bullet struck her neck directly... Yet, possibly as a reward for her consistent deeds of Harmony, it didn't hit any vital arteries. Once you've attended to your outstanding tasks, it'd be advisable to write her back as soon as possible."
「那群…该死的野蛮人！我现在就收拾行李…感谢您告诉我这些，歌斐木先生！」
"Those... damned savages! I'll pack my bags right away... My gratitude for bringing this to my attention, Mr. Gopher Wood!"
现在，你们知道她为何要时常佩戴那样繁琐的颈饰了吧？
Now, you understand why she always wears such elaborate neck ornaments, don't you?
怎么会这样…知更鸟小姐……
How could this happen... Miss Robin...
已经是过去的事了，各位不必在意。我分享此事，也只是希望你们理解「同谐」的局限和困境。「以强援弱」的愿景再伟大，多数时候也只是一厢情愿。

It's all in the past, so please don't worry. I share this in the meager hope that you will understand the Harmony's limitations and predicament. As grandiose as "the strong defending the weak" sounds, many times, it is nothing more than wishful thinking.
同样地，我为各位准备了最后一道课题，最后一次选择。但请放心，这次选择不会带来任何沉重的结果。
Likewise, I've prepared one last question, one last choice. But rest assured, this choice will not have any grave consequences.
事实上，什么事都不会发生。因为这只是一个空想，一道纠缠了我无数个夜晚的梦魇——如果各位有机会像我一样做出选择……
Because this is merely a figment of imagination, a nightmare that has haunted me through countless nights. If you ever had the opportunity to make a choice like I did...
<color=#dbc291ff>你们还会支持知更鸟踏上「同谐」的旅途么？</color>
<color=#dbc291ff>Would you still support Robin's journey on the Path of Harmony?</color>
知更鸟小姐竟然遭遇过这种事…「以强援弱」固然伟大，但如果要付出这种代价…我、我有点不知道了……
I can't believe that happened to Miss Robin... "The strong defending the weak" is a great mantra, but if I had to pay such a price... I, I don't know what I'd do...
知更鸟小姐的勇气令人敬佩，我本以为她只是在舞台上绽放光芒的明星……
Miss Robin's courage is admirable. And here I was, thinking she was just another superstar celebrity...
但她也是星期日先生的妹妹…即便拥有再伟大的理想，他一定也不希望至亲为此献身吧。
But the fact that she's also Mr. Sunday's younger sister... No, I doubt he'd wish harm on his own flesh and blood, no matter how grand the ambition.
总觉得，我在某些夜晚梦见过类似的场面。在梦中，我看见一群模糊的面孔，虽然不知道她们是谁，但我们情同家人。一直在与某种超然的存在抗争……

I often feel like I've dreamt of similar scenes on certain nights. In the dream, I see blurry faces. I don't know who they are, but I sympathize with all of them, fighting for survival against some unfathomable force...
我清楚地记得她们的迷茫、恐惧…但也记得，在那梦里她们从未选择放弃——就像知更鸟小姐一样。
Their confusion and fear are lucid to me... But I also remember they chose never to give up — just like Miss Robin.
{NICKNAME}，如果你对星期日先生的问题感到迷茫，就从自己的经历中寻找答案吧。
{NICKNAME}, if Mr. Sunday's question leaves you puzzled, you should find the answer from your own experiences.
每一次的「开拓」之旅都伴随着艰难险阻，但你真的会打退堂鼓吗？会阻止三月和丹恒前往下一站吗？我想你心中一定有属于自己的回答。

With each Trailblaze, dangers and tribulations will surely follow, but would you ever back away? Would you stop March and Dan Heng from reaching their next destination? I believe you have an answer of your own in your heart.
I am now aware of everyone's stances.
提出这些问题，只是为了阐明一件事：匹诺康尼的困境无法由「同谐」拯救，真正能建立起美梦乐园的——唯有以强制弱的「秩序」。

Raising these questions merely serves to illustrate one point: The plight of Penacony cannot be salvaged by the Harmony. The true foundation for a Sweetdream Paradise can only be established through the Order where the strong govern the weak.
我晓得人遭受折磨时如何痛苦，迷失道路时如何茫然，事与愿违时又如何沮丧…甚至绝望。这一切都令我痛苦，因为这样根本不能算是「幸福」。

I know the suffering of being tormented, the turmoil of losing your way, how sorrow... and even despair, set in when matters don't work out. All of this causes me unending pain, because this is not what "happiness" is at all.
我们必须教导弱者如何幸福地生活。而这「生活」并非名流贵族挂在嘴边的讲究，而是绝对意义上的，属于人的生存之道。
We must teach the weak how to live a happy life. And this life isn't some noble propriety that the upper crust preaches, but in definitive terms, a way of survival that belongs to everyone.
在你看来…怎样才算是幸福地活着？
So, what is your definition of living a happy life?
好问题。人类的意识本质上是种幻觉，是一座座名为「自我价值」的监牢。人被这幻觉诱导，犯下错误，后果却要由外物承担。
Good question. Human consciousness is fundamentally an illusion, a cage known as "self-worth." People lured in by this illusion, make mistakes, yet still ask that external influences bear the burden.
当一重又一重的错误充满人群，变得无从追溯…这一座座监牢便共同组成了一幢监狱，一条名为「适者生存」的自然法则。

When one mistake after the next permeates the masses, they become impossible to trace... Thus, the amassing of these individual cages culminate to form a prison, a place dictated only by the rule of "survival of the fittest."
而「自然」总是伴随着掠夺与牺牲…它的反面，叫做「秩序」。
Nature is always accompanied by predation and sacrifice... Its antithesis is known as Order.
我要做的正是这样的事：将众生的幸福归于唯一的「秩序」之下。人们不必再做出苦涩的抉择，不必再直面人性的弱点，抛却野兽的痼习，才能建立属于人的乐园。

That is what I want to do: Unite people's happiness under the banner of Order. They won't need to make bitter choices any longer, nor face the weaknesses of humanity. They can cast aside their primal instincts, to build a haven for mankind.
单单描述思想还是太过抽象，让我举个简单的例子吧。各位也许知道，在某些世界存在着名为「双休日」或「三休日」的社会运作制度。
Simply describing thoughts is far too abstract, so allow me to provide a simple example: As you all may know, there are societal norms like "weekends" and "long weekends" that exist on some worlds.
在来之不易的休息日里，人们得以从生活的重压中解脱，回归灵魂的平静。
During these hard-earned rest days, people are given the chance to extricate themselves from the stresses of everyday life, allowing a certain tranquility to return to their souls.
也只有在这样的日子里，人们不必面对弱肉强食的法则，能够在这短短数日中「幸福地活着」。只可惜…两三个日夜相较漫长的人生还是太过短暂。

And it is only on these days, that people do not have to adhere to the law where the strong prey on the weak — they can live out their lives happily during these brief intermissions. It's just a pity... that two or three days are still too fleeting compared to the span of a lifetime.
在我看来，社会的理想制度应当是「七休日」。在星期日的明天，是第二、第三、乃至永远的又一个星期日——这就是新世界的面貌，无所事事的永恒安宁之日。

From where I stand, society's ideal system should be "seven rest days." Following Sunday, there should ensue a second, a third, and indeed an infinite procession of Sundays. This should be the face of the new world — idyllic, eternal, peaceful days.
由此，每个人都能在乐园中回归自己原本的位置。有人瞻仰银河，全神贯注地计算孤绝世界{RUBY_B#银轨的起点}「裴伽纳」{RUBY_E#}离我们的距离，有人在角落彼此相拥，不必承担多余的职责……

And thus, every person can return to their base selves in this utopia. Some gaze in reverence at the stars, pouring their whole beings into calculating the distance between us and the isolated world of {RUBY_B#Silver Rail's starting point}Pegana{RUBY_E#}. Meanwhile, some seek refuge in quiet corners, holding one another, unencumbered by the chains of unwelcome obligations...
无需再承受现实之苦，唯有如此，人类才能以最高洁的姿态面对命中注定的结局，度过充满尊严的一生。这就是「幸福地活着」。

There would be no need to bear the hardships of reality. Only in this way can humanity face the inevitable end with the purest of spirit. Living a life of dignity — this is what it is to live in bliss.
流萤小姐——患有失熵症的你，一定能理解这意味着什么吧？
Miss Firefly, you who are stricken with Entropy Loss Syndrome — you of all would surely understand this?
听起来…好像无懈可击啊……
It sounds... like a flawless theory...
那…这一切的代价是什么？
But... what is the price to attain all this?
代价微不足道，只是一场属于我个人的…永久殉难。如果要为万众维持这座乐园，总得有一人陷入孤独的清醒中，直到宇宙的尽头。
The cost is minute, merely a personal... and eternal sacrifice. If this paradise is to be maintained for everyone, someone must remain trapped in solitary wakening, until the end of the cosmos.
清醒…也就是说，那乐园仍是一场梦。踏入乐园，便意味着要放弃现实，对么？
Wakening... Which means that this so-called paradise is still a dream. Stepping into this paradise means forsaking reality, correct?
这并非放弃，而是超越。血肉苦弱。如果物质是精神苦难的根源，那我们理应战胜它。
It is not forsaking, but transcending. Flesh, blood, sorrow, weakness. If the physical is the root of spiritual suffering, it is only logical that we defeat it.
但在这样的「幸福」中，人们从未战胜苦难，也永远失去了战胜苦难的机会。换一种说法…这是「逃避」。
But in this supposed "bliss," people won't have defeated their demons. The chance to overcome their tribulations would be forever lost to them. In other words... it is an escape.
你可以这么认为，但逃避并不可耻。恰恰相反，每个人心中都有逃避的种子。
That's another way of understanding it, but there is no shame in escape. On the contrary, the seeds of escape exist in everyone's hearts.
流萤小姐不也这么觉得吗，生命因何而沉睡？是因为人们害怕从梦中醒来。
Don't you agree, Miss Firefly? And as for why life slumbers? It is because we are afraid to awaken from our dreams.
但这与伟大的事业并不冲突。唯有承认这点，我们才能理解人性的软弱，进而包容，进而庇佑。
But this is not in conflict with the grand plan. Only in acknowledging this, can we truly understand the frailty of human nature, and from there, show compassion and protection.
我…认可你是一位天生的领导者。你对人类充满悲观，却依然怀抱着否定的心，予以众生平等的怜悯。
I... I admit that you are a born leader. Your perspective on humanity brims with pessimism, yet you express compassion for all, even when your heart pities them.
但我和你不同，我是为「自我」而活的。在我看来，人为自己做出选择，是理所应当的行为，也是他们与生俱来的权利。
But unlike you — I live for the "self." From my perspective, individuals making choices for themselves is their birthright.
也许逃避是弱者的天性，但谁是弱者…不应由他人来定义。
The want to escape may be innate in the weak, but whether they are weak or not... It is not up to another to decide.
难道在你眼中，我也要被归类为弱者吗？
Perhaps in your mind, you also view me as "weak"?
既然流萤小姐已经表明了自己的观点，星穹列车自然也会给出我们的回答。
Since Miss Firefly has said her piece, the Astral Express will also naturally give you our answer.
交给你了，{NICKNAME}，就像米哈伊尔先生嘱咐的那样，告诉他我们的选择吧——
We'll leave it to you, {NICKNAME}. Just as Mr. Mikhail instructed before: Tell him our choice...
两位，请接受「纯美」的考验！
Dear friends, please ready yourselves for this trial set forth by the Beauty!
Your convictions, my friends, are indeed awe-inspiring...
但很可惜…桂冠依旧属于伊德莉拉！
It's a pity... The laurels of victory belong to Idrila!
够了！我已明白各位的真意…我服输！
That's enough! I have come to grasp the sincerity of your cause... I yield!
你对这里有印象吗，米沙？
Does this place ring any bells, Misha?
我…说不上来。但好像有种似曾相识的感觉。这是哪儿？
I... don't know, but I feel a sense of déjà vu. What is this place?
这是一枚梦泡，我们的意识进入了其中。这是一位无名客留给星穹列车的礼物，但奇怪的是，我们打开时却发现里面什么都没有。
It's the realm within a dream bubble. This was left to the Astral Express by a Nameless, but weirdly when we entered it, it was completely empty.
梦境贩售店的爱德华医生告诉我，梦境由记忆凝聚而成，如果内核空无一物，梦泡是无法成形的。
Dr. Edward from the Dreamscape Sales Store told me that dreams are formed from memories, and a dream bubble can't take shape if its core is empty.
所以我想，作为酒店门童，星穹列车的朋友中最了解匹诺康尼的人，小米沙，你应该能帮我们解开这个疑惑？
So I thought you might be able to help us in unraveling this mystery, Misha? As a hotel {RUBY_B#bellboy}doorman{RUBY_E#}, you know Penacony best among us.
唔，梦泡的事我懂的不多。但如果各位想弄明白这幢大房子是什么…我会努力试试的！
Hmm, I don't know much about dream bubbles, but if you want to figure out what this mansion is... I'll do my best!
姬子姐…我还是很疑惑，为什么你就断定<color=#dbc291ff>米沙和这枚梦泡有关</color>呢？
Himeko... I still don't get it. Why were you so sure that <color=#dbc291ff>Misha had a connection with this dream bubble</color>?
我无法断定，只是有些猜测。但既然米沙对这里感到熟悉…说明我的猜测可能是正确的。
I wasn't sure. It was just a hunch, but since Misha feels familiar with this place... my hunch might be correct.
This place looks a bit familiar...
This place feels a bit nostalgic...
没错，你和流萤小姐就是在这里遭遇了「死亡」——现在该叫它「沉眠」了。考虑到它和流梦礁的关联，出现在这倒是不难理解。
Exactly, this is where you and Firefly encountered "Death," which we now know as "Dormancy." Considering its connection to Dreamflux Reef, it's not surprising it appeared here.
现在的问题是，是谁把你们带进了这里。依照目前的线索来看，可能并不是那位愚者，那么他是谁就十分关键了。
The question now is — Who brought you here? Based on the clues we have so far, it's unlikely to be that Masked Fool, so identifying them is crucial to us.
我们已经再次接近真相的核心。给米沙一点时间吧，他一定能为我们揭开梦泡的秘密。
We're drawing closer to the truth once more. Let's give Misha some time, as I believe he'll unveil the secret of this dream bubble.
好吧。可这里到处都是门，该从哪扇门出去呢…米沙，你知道吗？
Alright, but there are doors all over the place... Which one should we choose...? Do you have any idea, Misha?
Hmm... I guess... maybe this way?
I... I'm not entirely sure, but... let's give it a try.
Wait, you managed to choose the right door on your first try?
这么说来，钟表小子去哪了…是去守护美梦小镇了吗？
So, where has Clockie gone...? Did he leave to protect Dreamville?
I think I hear the sound of water...
记得{NICKNAME}说过，前面有个特别壮观的喷泉。
{NICKNAME} once mentioned there's a magnificent fountain up ahead.
We're going to the opposite side, right?
No, we should turn left here...
Huh? Something feels different about this place?
就是这，我记得这条走廊。
This is it. I remember this corridor.

为了让大家有能够安身的土地，米哈伊尔必须不断出海探索，找到海水的源头。
To ensure that everyone had land to settle on, he had to continue exploring the sea and search for the source of the rising seawater.
那一天，他把我叫到书房里，说他要像往常那样出海了。但我看得出来，爷爷的表情很严肃，爸爸最后一次远航前，我在他脸上见过同样的表情。

On that day, he called me to his study, telling me that he was embarking on another journey. However, I could sense the gravity in his expression. It... It was the same look I had seen on my father's face before his final voyage.
我恳求他把我带上，他却说我的冒险不在这里，让我留在家中，耐心等待门外的声音。
I asked him if I could go with him, but he said that my adventure lay elsewhere and told me to stay home and patiently await a certain sound at the door.
米哈伊尔说，天上有更浩瀚的海洋，是星星的海洋。有一辆列车载着想要去远方的孩子，永不停息地穿越星海。
He told me about a vast ocean in the sky — an ocean of stars. He spoke of a train that transports children with a desire to venture far away, traversing the sea of stars without ever stopping.
他认识那辆车上的人，他会拜托对方带上我一起离开，我梦寐以求的旅行…会从这里开始。
He said that he knew the crew on the train, and that he had asked them to take me along. He said the journey I had always dreamed of... would start there.
是「星穹列车」。我想起来了，米哈伊尔的朋友是一群无名客。他们来到我们的世界，为了解决一颗星星引发的灾难。
It's the Astral Express. I remember now, Grandpa's friends are a group of Nameless who came to this world to resolve a disaster caused by a star.
然后米哈伊尔把自己的怀表给了我。那是他的宝物，出现在每一个扬帆远航的故事里。他说往后的日子不好走，但怀表的指针会为我指明方向。

Then he gave his pocket watch to me. It was his cherished treasure, appearing in every one of his adventure tales. He explained that difficult times were ahead but assured me that the watch would guide me.
只要不停踏出向前的那一步，我一定能抵达自己想去的地方。然后，我好像就听见了……
He said, as long as I kept moving forward, I'd eventually reach my desired destination. And then, it was as if I heard...
列车的鸣笛声，它从房间的另一头响起……
The distant sound of a train whistle, echoing throughout the room...
是的，米沙！然后我们就循着声音的方向去了，对不对？
Exactly, Misha! And then we followed that whistle, didn't we?
对，我应该还能找到当时的路。
Yeah, I think I can still find the way we took back then.
今天过后，耶佩拉的名字就会从银河历史中消失，而永火官邸将取而代之，在不远的未来收到一封邀请函……
After today, Jepella's name will disappear from cosmic history, and the Ever-Flame Mansion will take its place. In the not-too-distant future, you'll receive an invitation...
祝你在那里找到想要的答案…或者，解脱。
I hope you find whatever you seek there, be it answers... or salvation.
你说的…是那三次「死亡」吗？
是银狼告诉我的。我只是遗憾它们不在我的剧本里。
Silver Wolf told me about it. It's such a shame that it's not part of my script.
我想要活下去，但我不害怕死亡。死亡的反面是永生，那从来…不是我的所求。
While I want to live, I'm never afraid of death. The opposite of death is eternal life, and that's... that's something I'll never desire.
人终有一死，我也一样。死亡就像剧本，是无法违抗的命运。但也正因如此……
People die, and I am no exception. Death is like a script, a fate that cannot be defied. But that's exactly why...
我们才要为自己选择埋骨之地。
We have to choose where we want to rest forever.
Do you exist just to perish?
你不也一样吗？刃，你渴望的终结…从来不是由他人定义的。
Are you not the same, Blade? The end you desire is not one dictated by others.
如果现在死去，我就只是一件「兵器」。但我想…我应该要以一个「人」的身份死去。
If I were to die now, I would only be a weapon. I believe... I should die as a human.
尽管它的定义离我还很遥远，可普通人终其一生寻找的，不也是这么一个答案吗？一个能在墓志铭里留下的…短短的名字。
Though its definition escapes me, isn't this the answer that ordinary people look for their whole lives? A name that can be carved onto their tombstone.
属于我的那一块，它曾经刻着「格拉默铁骑」，如今刻着「星核猎手」，而总有一天……
The tombstone that belongs to me once bore the inscription "Glamoth's Iron Cavalry," then it changed to "Stellaron Hunter," but one day...
它会写下「流萤」的名字，和她在生命尽头绽放的华彩。
It will bear the name "Firefly" and the brilliance she showed at the end of her life.
…出发前，「命运的奴隶」告诉我，此行会让我得到难以忘怀的收获。他给出的剧本只有寥寥数行，却让人难以忽视。
...Before I left, Destiny's Slave told me that this journey would bring unforgettable rewards. Even though the script he gave me only had a few lines, I couldn't ignore them.
因为其中一行写着…我会在梦想之地经历三次「死亡」。
Because one of the lines said... I'll experience "death" three times in the land of the dreams.
三、三次死亡？！这一定是打引号的吧……
Three times!? This can't be serious, right...?
第一次是如同死亡般的痛苦，我的身体被「沉眠」的翼刃贯穿，才有了后来所有的故事。剧本必定会应验，但形式…只在翻开那一页时才会显露。

The first time was a painful death when I was stabbed by the blade of "Dormancy," which led to all subsequent events. The script will always come true, but in a way... that will only be revealed when that page is turned.
所以现在，我已经理解了第二次「死亡」的含义，并要将它付诸行动。如果一切顺利，这会为你们提供至关重要的支援。
So now, I've understood the meaning of my second "death," and I am prepared to face it. If all goes well, my efforts will provide crucial support for you.
只有赢得这场胜利，匹诺康尼才有未来可言。也唯有如此，那尚未到来的第三次，也是最后一次死亡…才不会以最糟糕的样子呈现。
Only by achieving victory in this battle can we secure a future for Penacony. And only then, my third and final death... won't come true in the most terrible form.
最糟糕的样子，那不就是……
The most terrible form? Does that mean...?
真正的「死亡」…匹诺康尼的所有人都会在「秩序」的美梦中永远沉沦。
The true "death"... where everyone in Penacony loses themselves completely in the eternal sweet dream of the Order.
那是我们无论如何都要避免的未来。
We must do everything we can to prevent that.
流萤小姐，你…已经做好觉悟了吗？
Have you... made up your mind, Firefly?
嗯。如果没有，我就不会来到这里。
Yes, otherwise I wouldn't be here.
再次感谢你对星穹列车提供的帮助。祝愿我们在现实中再见。
Thank you again for your assistance for the Astral Express. May we meet again in reality.
嗯，再见，各位。愿你们的「开拓」之旅——永不终结。
Yeah, farewell, everyone. May your Trailblazing expedition never end.
与此同时，流梦礁的某处……
In the meantime... somewhere at Dreamflux Reef...
没想到啊，老头，你那没头没脑的计划真成了。难道你们无名客全都是些只会意气用事的傻瓜么？
That's quite unexpected, old man. Who would've thought your crazy plan would actually work? Do all you Nameless fools just act on a whim?
我能嗅到，虚假的美梦就要结束了。那群无名客虽然年轻，但确实有能力做到这件事…就像你们当年那样。
I can sense that this false sweet dream is coming to an end. The Nameless may be young, but they had the ability to achieve this goal... just like you did in your time.
可惜啊，没能让你亲眼见证这一幕。恐怕我也没这个福分了…「虚构」的事物被看穿，也就相当于不存在了。
It's a shame you won't be able to see it firsthand. Heh, maybe I won't either... Once something {RUBY_B#Fictionologist}fictional{RUBY_E#} is seen through, it ceases to exist.
哼，不谈那群无名客，那头上长翅膀的小子也跟你一模一样，死心眼儿，不见棺材不落泪…天意弄人啊，要不是这该死的命途，咱几个没准真能聊到一起去。

Yeah, not just those Nameless, even Mr. Wings is just like you... Stubborn, won't listen or give up, no matter what... Well, fate is unpredictable, I guess. If we weren't bound by those cursed Paths, maybe we could've had some good talks.
不过，咱最后到底是狠狠出了口恶气。这下舒服了。还记得那帮混蛋当年是怎么咒咱们的吗，嗯？他们说：「下地狱去吧，该死的叛徒」……
But in the end, we managed to do it, and now we can find solace. Remember how those idiots cursed us? They said, "Go to hell, you worthless traitors!" Heh...
米哈伊尔啊，米哈伊尔，我不知道他们说的是不是真的，但如果心向自由就活该要下地狱……
Well, I don't know if they really meant it, but if longing for freedom means going to hell...
那我很快就要下去找你了，老东西。
Then I'll be joining you soon, you old fool.
让我们在地狱里再次共进晚餐吧……
Let's get together and have supper again in hell...
哦，差点忘记了，还有件事……
Oh, I almost forgot. There's one more thing...
用这杯「聚散有时」向你致意…{NICKNAME}……
Here's to you, a glass of "Hello and Goodbye"... {NICKNAME}...
真暖和啊。这死海边平时连个活物都见不着，你倒是幸运，找到了避雨的地方不说，还有新鲜浆果，真不容易。
It's warm here, isn't it? You're lucky to have found shelter from the rain, let alone fresh berries, in this desolate place.
只是循着「生命」的气息来了。在这种地方，这气息格外分明。
I was just following the scent of life. It's particularly strong in a place like this.
只可惜，尝起来实在是有点淡。
It's a shame these berries don't have much flavor.
真的？你可能不知道，这种果实倒也算得上多汁，唯一的问题只是放在口中咀嚼时……
Seriously? In case you didn't know, this fruit is pretty juicy. The only downside is that when you chew it...
Have you... lost your sense of taste?
有些味道还是能尝见的…比如微微的「甜」。
I can still taste certain things... like a faint sweetness.
来到这里前，我的上一站叫俄尔刻龙。那里也有荒无人烟的山崖，也有火堆照亮的夜晚。天上会下紫红色的雪，含在嘴里…有树莓的味道。

Before coming here, I stopped by a place called Orkron. It had barren cliffs and nights lit by bonfires. Burgundy snow would fall from the sky, and when it landed on my tongue... it tasted like raspberries.
那味道算不上甜美，却令人记忆犹新。每当我回首时，总会发现串联起来时路的…不是刻骨铭心的起承转合，而是这么一个个难忘的瞬间。

The flavor wasn't exactly sweet, but it left a lasting impression. When I think back on my past, I realize that what's tying everything together... isn't the big events, but rather these small yet unforgettable moments.
别在意。逐渐丧失自我的存在…是每个自灭者都要面对的现实。至少，我还没有完全失去感官和记忆。
Don't worry about it. Losing oneself is a reality that every Self-Annihilator must face. At least, I haven't completely lost my senses and memories yet.
那就祝贺你又为旅途添上了新的注脚吧。
Well, congratulations on adding another footnote to your journey.
By the way, are you always alone?
不，我在俄尔刻龙还有个同伴。她个头小小的，是个无名客，想把自己发射到「IX」里去…她总说自己要走一条「比阿基维利更深、更远的路」。
No, I had a companion in Orkron. She's a short Nameless girl who aspired to explore IX... She always said she'd walk a path "deeper and farther than Akivili's."
个子不大，野心不小…那结果呢？
Quite an ambition for such a small girl... So, what happened?
哀伤么？我不这么认为。那女孩是笑着离开的，她从未对自己的选择感到后悔，也一定希望我能笑着和她道别…我的确是这么做的。
Condolences? I don't need them. The girl left with a smile. She never regretted her choice and most definitely wanted me to say goodbye with a smile... So that's what I did.
这就是你在为她感到悲伤的证明。
That's proof that you're grieving for her.
害怕？我很难从你身上感受到这种情绪。你怕什么？
Afraid? I rarely sense that emotion from you. What do you fear?
我怕会忘记和她一起走过的三十天，就像我生命中的每个三十一天。它们中的大部分已经同雨水一起逝去，消失在看不见的彼岸。
I'm afraid I'll forget the thirty days I spent with her, just like all the other days in my life. Most of them have already washed away with the rain, disappearing into an unseen realm.
我怕这些鲜红的记忆也离开我。我能看到的颜色已经不多了，除了这一点淡淡的、温暖的「红」，我几乎一无所有。
I fear that those vivid red memories will fade away too. There isn't much color left, and besides this faint, warm red, there's almost nothing.
真是难以想象…一个看惯了鲜血、破灭和混乱的「游侠」居然能从红色里看出温暖。
Hard to imagine... a "Ranger" accustomed to bloodshed, destruction, and chaos finding warmth in the red color.
因为这样的温暖，我也拥有过许多。很久以前，我和他人约定过，要把它带给更多的人，在余生的每一刻都去追寻…「对所有人都更好的结局」。

Because I have experienced this warmth many times. Long ago, I promised someone that I'd bring it to more people, and that for every remaining moment of my life, I'd strive for... a better ending for all.
只要这一抹「红色」尚在，我就还有机会履行约定。它可以是燃烧的火，是盛放的花，是这岩洞里的一丛浆果…它就是生命本身，转瞬即逝、却足够夺目。

As long as this red color still lingers, I have a chance to fulfill that promise. It represents a burning fire, a blooming flower, the berries in this cave... and life itself, fleeting yet still dazzling.
最后，它会引领我跨越「存在的地平线」，在彼岸的尽头…斩断「虚无」。
In the end, it will lead me beyond the Horizon of Existence, and on the other side, I will... cut off Nihility.
身受沉眠无相者的祝福，却想着要如何杀死祂？这可真是…彻头彻尾的「虚无」啊。
The one blessed by the sleeping and shapeless is considering how to kill THEM? That's truly... pure Nihility.
不过，有一点你说得对。在这阴雨绵绵的死水边待久了，只有望着这团鲜红的火时，我才发觉自己原来还活着。
But you're right about one thing — After spending so much time near this stagnant water, only when I look at this vibrant red fire do I realize that I'm still alive.
雨啊…什么时候才会停呢？
When will this rain... ever stop?
也许…等亡者的怨念悉数平息，天就放晴了吧。
Perhaps... when the sorrows of the departed have finally quieted down, the sky will clear up.
丹恒先生，你听说过比亚里-斯卡曼德洛斯星么？那是「同谐」影响下的地上天国之一，大小达耳达努星系居民们趋之若鹜的人间天堂。

Have you heard of a planet named Byari Skamandros, Dan Heng? It's one of the paradises under the influence of the Harmony, a sought-after wonderland for the inhabitants of the Dardanu Major and Minor systems.
半个琥珀纪前，家族在那里举办了一场空前绝后的庆典，而宴会过后…星球上的每个人都成了「家族」的一员。
Half an Amber Era ago, The Family held an unprecedented festival there, and after that... everyone on the planet became part of The Family.
你认为同样的事会发生在匹诺康尼？
Do you think the same thing will happen on Penacony?
不然要如何解释呢？家族特意借「钟表匠」的邀请让一众命途行者滞留其中，却唯独放逐了「虚无」的令使……
Yes, or how else can we explain it? The Family deliberately used the Watchmaker's invitation to keep all the Pathstriders here but banished the Emanator of the Nihility...
受「虚无」影响，我很难受到其他命途力量的影响，反倒能无意识地侵染它们…这或许就是他们不想看到的「变量」。
Because of the Nihility, I'm rarely affected by the power of other Paths, but somehow I can unconsciously infiltrate them... Maybe that's the "risk" they're trying to avoid.
恕我难以苟同。那颗星球既没有加入信用体系，也没有连通银轨，是「同谐」庇护下的偏远文明…但匹诺康尼不一样。

I would disagree. Byari Skamandros is not part of the credit system or connected to the silver rail. It's nothing more than a remote civilization sheltered by the Harmony... But Penacony is different.
这么做意味着向全银河近半数的派系宣战，家族没有理由这么做。
If The Family messes with Penacony, that would be like declaring war on almost half of the factions in the Cosmos. They have no reason to do that.
前提是…他们真的心向「同谐」。
No, they don't... if they truly serve the Harmony, that is.
被笼罩在匹诺康尼光芒下的命途并不纯粹，这里的「同谐」中混入了杂质。
The Path in Penacony is impure. The Harmony here has impurities.
还记得那场古老的「寰宇蝗灾」么？「繁育」塔伊兹育罗斯给宇宙带来无尽浩劫，而这场浩劫最终却在混乱和迷茫中演变为列神之战。
Do you remember the ancient Swarm Disaster? Tayzzyronth the Propagation brought endless havoc to the universe, and it eventually evolved into a fierce battle among all Aeons.
共有两道命途在这场大战中失去了星神：「繁育」和「秩序」。巧合的是，这两道命途的转折都与某位星神有关……
Two Paths lost their Aeons in that war — the Propagation and the Order. Coincidentally, their downfall is related to a certain Aeon...
…「同谐」的希佩。据说祂参与了列神对虫皇的讨伐，又出于不明原因吞纳了「秩序」太一。
...Xipe the Harmony. Legend has it that THEY participated in the crusade against the Imperator Insectorum and devoured Ena the Order for unknown reasons.
他小宝贝的，好家伙…你们是想说可能是两道无主的命途在暗中捣鬼？
Holy forkeroni... So, you're saying that the two leaderless Paths are working behind the scenes?
可匹诺康尼并未出现「繁育」的子嗣。我可否理解为是「天外合唱班」的残党潜伏于家族中，并且想要复活一位陨落的星神？
But I don't see any descendants of the Propagation in Penacony. Could it be that the remnants of Beyond the Sky Choir are hiding within The Family, trying to resurrect a fallen Aeon?
尚不能断定，但至少能确定他们准备利用「谐乐大典」做些什么。
I can't say for sure, but they're definitely planning something for the Charmony Festival.
我了个呜呜伯，这么复杂啊。那你要求我们立刻离开阿斯德纳的意思是？不会是没辙了吧？
Holy Wubbaboo! This is getting way too complicated. Is this why you want us to leave Asdana right away? Are you giving up?
谐乐大典开幕在即，有一件事…我无论如何都需要求证。跃迁是最有效的手段。
The Charmony Festival will start soon. There's one thing that... I need to confirm no matter what. A warp jump is the best way to do so.
我会立即动用其他手段。
你不会是要用「结盟玉兆」吧！
Hold on, are you thinking of using the Jade Abacus of Allying Oath?
正是。有罗浮云骑支援…应当够了。
Exactly. The assistance from the Luofu Cloud Knights... would be enough.
那东西一辈子只能用一次，你最好想清楚了。
Think it over carefully. You can only use that once in your lifetime.
我想清楚了。我的伙伴们…也是一辈子只能拥有一次的。
I have considered it thoroughly. My companions are... They're also once-in-a-lifetime treasures.
在这里的只有你么，孩子？
Are you the only one here, my child?
那无名客确有一手，我等的{RUBY_B#「秩序」}秘密{RUBY_E#}已在家系间不胫而走，公司的星舰也在向阿斯德纳集结……
The Nameless is quite the diplomat. Our {RUBY_B#Order}secrets{RUBY_E#} have spread like wildfire within The Family, and IPC starships are gathering towards Asdana...
眼下正是关键时刻，试问，那位调和众音的{RUBY_B#知更鸟}神选者{RUBY_E#}在哪里？
This is a crucial moment for us. So, where is the {RUBY_B#Robin}chosen one{RUBY_E#} who harmonizes the varied sounds?
我不是正好端端地站在你面前么？
I'm right here in front of you, aren't I?
你知道，在我们的计划中，她才是谐乐大典的主角。
You know, she was supposed to be the star of the Charmony Festival in our plan.
可计划有变。身为她的兄长，我知道为「秩序」献唱必不是她的本愿。这里有我足矣。
But the plan has changed. As her brother, I know she doesn't want to sing for the Order, so I'll take her place.
呵。你从小就智慧过人，想必一定明白，自己此刻的作为要付出何种代价。
Heh, you've always been wise beyond your years. I'm sure you understand the consequences of your choice.
如果您认为这是一场「背叛」……
If you consider this a betrayal...
天无二日。如有必要，我会出手将太阳击落。
Well, there can't be two suns in the sky. I'll step up and take down the other sun if necessary.
如果报应真的存在，那么众生皆有报应——你有你的，我也有我的。
If karma exists, then everyone has their own karma. You have yours, and I have mine.
而我的报应与你无关，歌斐木先生。
And my karma has nothing to do with you, Mr. Gopher Wood.
无妨。既然你愿意代她牺牲，那我就成全你吧。
Alright, since you're willing to sacrifice yourself for her, I'll grant your wish.
让步比我预想中来得更快。为什么？
Well, the compromise came sooner than expected. Why?
你们生来便是「秩序」的双子，命运注定会有一人踏上这条道路，抵达应至的结局。
You and your sister were born as twins of the Order, and one of you is destined to follow this path to the end.
这也在您的设计之中么？
Is this part of your plan?
当然，你还是和小时候一样聪明。
Of course. You're still as clever as you were when you were a child.
开幕的时刻近了。去吧，孩子。窃夺「同谐」的权柄，揭晓你的报应。
The opening is near. Go, my child. Seize the power of the Harmony and reveal your karma.
先生，我还有最后一个问题。
I have one final question, Master.
为何您会选择让「秩序」降临在匹诺康尼？一个走投无路的世界理应会是更好的选择，可您还是选择了这么一座人们心中怀有自由的梦想之城。为什么？
Why did you choose to bring the Order to Penacony? Wouldn't it have been better to choose a desperate world instead of a city filled with hope and dreams? Why?
失去心中的公义，我们便会重蹈「同谐」的覆辙。
If we lose justice in our hearts, we'll make the same mistake as the Harmony did.
所以，利用「星核」操纵梦境的人果真不是您，而是——
So, it's not you who manipulates the Dreamscape with the Stellaron, but...
我们言尽于此。动手吧，橡木家系的十万七千三百三十六道灵魂已梦见这一刻太多次了……
Well, that's where our conversation ends. Go ahead. The <unbreak>107,336</unbreak> souls of the Oak Family have dreamed of this moment too many times...
「我将飞上高空，变作天上的太阳。」
"I shall ascend to the heavens, becoming the scorching sun."
「万众在我的光芒中热烈生长，而一切罪恶将无所遁形。」
"Bathed in my light, my people shall flourish, while all evil shall be eradicated."
这就是匹诺康尼大剧院的内部了。
This is the interior of the Penacony Grand Theater.
被汽水冲上天的感觉还挺刺激。不过…谐乐大典都要开始了，怎么还没开放入场啊？
It's quite exhilarating to be flushed into the air by SoulGlad, but... why is the venue still closed when the Charmony Festival is about to start?
不仅如此，这整座剧场也安静得出奇。不仅没有观众，连工作和演职人员都没看到……
And not only that, the entire theater is eerily quiet. No audience, no staff, no one around...
就算我们来晚了，这么大的剧院也不可能空无一人。
Even if we're late, a grand theater like this shouldn't be completely empty.
看来「谐乐大典」票房不佳啊！
Looks like the Charmony Festival was a flop at the box office!
是哦，一个人都没有…你的关注点不对吧！
Yeah, I wonder how many tickets... Hey, that's not what we should be concerned about!
我们先四处探探吧。各位，小心前进。
Let's explore around. Be careful, everyone.
天哪，这大剧院的气氛也太诡异了，好瘆人啊……
Gosh, the atmosphere here is so creepy and unsettling...
就算观众没有入场，也总该有场务吧，怎么一点声音都没有……
Even if there's no audience yet, there should be some staff around. Why is it so silent...?
「不妨就从这天地初开讲起吧——」
"Let us commence with the dawning of the world..."
「自黄昏战争以降，天穹空虚，大地混沌。」
"After the Dusk Wars, darkness veiled the sky, and chaos consumed the earth."
「为教天地万物归于可知，『秩序』太一降生。」
"Ena the Order emerged, destined to restore all existence."
「祂采星云作成羽拨，造了有黑白键的大琴。」
"THEY gathered nebulae and forged them into picks, thus creating a grand lyre with black and white keys."
「击打白键，太阳升起，击打黑键，月亮升起。」
"Strike the white keys, and the sun rose. Strike the black keys, and the moon rose."
「如此三十又一日，三个轮转为休止，复又敲击四个等程。」
"Thus, thirty-one days a cycle, three cycles a solstice, and four solstices marked the passage of time."
「昼夜就这样成了。这便是第二日。」
"And so, the cycle of day and night arose. That marked the second day."
大剧院的舞台怎么成这样了？
What happened to the Grand Theater stage?
人偶都聚集在画框周围，是想让我们进去么？
The puppets are gathering around the frame. Are they expecting us to enter it?
「诸位是远道而来的客人，我终究不希望刀兵相见。所以在一切变得无法挽回前，我安排了三出剧目。」
"I genuinely wish to avoid a violent clash with my esteemed guests from afar. Therefore, I've arranged three acts before the situation becomes irreparable."
「故事该从哪里开始呢，就从『匹诺康尼』还是『边陲监狱』的时候开始吧。」
"Where shall we start our narrative? Well, let's start with the time when Penacony was still a frontier prison."
「这里曾经是逼仄的囚牢。但我们要让它变成自由的乐园。」
"This place was once a place of confinement, but we will turn it into a haven of freedom."
「琥珀历<unbreak>2147</unbreak>纪，囚犯哈努努掀起了声势浩大的战火，并获得胜利。公司称其为『边陲战争』，而阿斯德纳人称其为『独立战争』」。

"In <unbreak>2147</unbreak> AE, a prisoner named Hanunue ignited a struggle for liberty and emerged triumphant. IPC referred to it as the 'War of the Frontier,' while the Asdanians dubbed it the 'War of Independence.'"
「囚笼被粉碎了！狱卒被驱逐了！可我们…又该去哪里？」
"We've shattered the cages and expelled the guards! But... where shall we go?"
「哈努努先生是一位伟人。但我们不应讳言，他能够带给囚徒自由，却不知晓如何给予他们真正的自由。」
"It's true that Hanunue was a legendary hero, but it must be acknowledged that while he bestowed freedom upon the prisoners, he didn't grant them true liberation."
「可敬的旅人，感谢你们留下。可你也无法驱逐那些狱卒，即便他们早已不在阿斯德纳。」
"Thank you for staying here, honorable travelers. However, not even you could banish the guards, though they are no longer in Asdana."
「三位无名客留在此地，试图向边陲监狱传递『开拓』的教益，但可惜，无济于事。」
"The three Nameless stayed on the planet, endeavoring to spread the tenets of Trailblaze throughout the frontier prison. Alas, their efforts proved futile."
「我们应当再造一个囚笼，不在这世上，而在人心中。只要我们不使他们自由，便永远不会流离失所。」
"Let's build another prison, not within the physical world, but within their minds. As long as we keep them imprisoned, they will always have a sanctuary."
「阿斯德纳再度被战火席卷，这次的敌人来自内部。囚徒至死仍是囚徒，只知为自由而战，不知为自由而生。」
"Once again, Asdana was engulfed in war, this time the enemies originating from within. The prisoners remained prisoners for the rest of their lives, fighting for freedom rather than living for it."
怎么看个戏还要打架啊！
Hey, why do we have to fight while enjoying the show?
「因为我不止想要诸位欣赏这出剧目，还希望你们…帮助我完成它。」
"For I desire not only your enjoyment but also your... assistance in its completion."
这些人偶…又想让我们去哪儿？
These puppets... Where are they guiding us this time?
「祂撷星流制成笔尖，拟了发音和计数的符号。」
"THEY transmuted streams of stars into inked nibs, creating symbols to be pronounced and counted."
「祂使星尘汇成河流，指认那善与义的在上游，那恶与不义的在下游。」
"THEY molded stardust into flowing rivers, assigning the righteous upstream and the unjust downstream."
「万物自此蒙受各自的记号，世人自此得以知晓善恶与利害。」
"Thus, all things were marked, and the world learned to discern between good and evil."
"That marked the third and fourth days."
「接下来的故事围绕着权力斗争。树、草、花、鸟、兽、果、虫七大家系在匹诺康尼一一落成。」
"Behold the ensuing tale, a struggle for power. Penacony witnessed the ascent of the seven major lineages — Tree, Grass, Flower, Bird, Beast, Fruit, and Insect."
「和平从未真正降临在流放之地。这段历史千头万绪，太过复杂，请允许我用寓言的方式向诸位呈现。」
"Peace never truly graced land of the exiles. The history in this era is rich and intricate, so please allow me to present it in allegorical form."
「欢迎来到这幢宅邸，外来的宾客。它的建立者已被下人驱逐，而七位仆人都认为自己能取代旧日的主人。」
"Welcome to this mansion, dear outsiders. Its founder has been exiled by those beneath them, and now the seven servants believe they can replace their former master."
「流放之地的秩序十分混乱，又有内忧外患虎视眈眈。七大家系表面统一，实则各自为政，纷争不断。」

"Land of the exiles was in disarray, besieged by both internal and external perils. Though the seven major lineages appeared united on the surface, each harbored their own ambitions, leading to ceaseless conflict."
「会计！你我是宅邸的基柱，曾经盟誓团结一致，永不背弃——你为何要杀我？」
"Accountant! We are the pillars of this mansion, bound by an oath of loyalty and unity... Why are you plotting my downfall?"
「因为主人用泥土造化了你，用烈火造化了我，我比你更高贵！」
"Because Master shaped you from clay but forged me from fire! I'm superior to you!"
「最先退出内战的是黑布林家系，在苜蓿草家系策划的『白色沙漠』事件中，他们永远成为了历史。」
"The Blackplum Family was the first to fall. They withered away in the White Desert event orchestrated by the Alfalfa Family."
「孩子，你不曾为旧主效命，而不清楚他的威能。他能夺走我们自由，便也能赐予我们自由。」
"My child, you did not serve the old master and know not of his power. Just as he can strip us of our freedom, he can also grant it to us."
「苜蓿草的家主意图投靠公司，用自由换取生存，却被长子大义灭亲，而后者接任了家主之席。」
"The leader of the Alfalfa Family sought to defect to the IPC, trading freedom for survival. However, his eldest son slew him in the name of righteousness and ascended as the new family head."
「与蜂共舞者，必遭蜂毒所害。我早已知晓我的命运，这一天早晚会到来。」
"Those who dance with bees are bound to fall victim to their stings. I have long foreseen my fate, and this moment is inevitable."
「银河残酷而无情，灯蛾家系试图开垦列车留下的银轨，却遭遇虫群余孽，惨遭覆灭。」
"The Lampmoth Family endeavored to extend the silver rail left by the Express, only to be eradicated by the remnants of the Swarm, leaving nothing in the unforgiving Cosmos."
「而我——我将成为诸位新的家人，并将你们从死去的幻影中解放。」
"As for me... I shall forge new bonds of Kinship and liberate you from the clutches of death."
「直到歌斐木带领家族来到流放之地，五大家系先后皈依，匹诺康尼才得以拥抱它的新名——梦想之地。」
"Only when Gopher Wood led The Family to land of the exiles and earned recognition from all five major lineages did Penacony earn its new name, the Land of the Dreams."
听，整个阿斯德纳都在下雪！天空摇摇欲坠，大地积重难返。银色宇宙的尽头——朝阳冒出了初生的芽！
Listen, snow blankets all of Asdana! The sky trembles, and the earth teeters on the brink of collapse. At the edge of the silver universe, the first buds sprout under the rising sun!
「祂拾星环陈明法度，同人群立了行事的典章。」
"THEY used the planetary rings to establish the law, forging a code of conduct among the masses."
「以有黑白键的大琴为乐器；以发音和计数的符号为音符；以有下行无上行的河流作旋律；以陈明法度的典章定曲式。」

"A grand lyre with black and white keys served as an instrument, while symbols of articulation and numerical notation took the form of musical notes. The downward-flowing river became a melody, and the canon of law dictated the form."
「世人遂在乐章中找准唯一的位置，这便是第五日与第六日。」
"Thus, all mortals found their unique place within this symphony. That marked the fifth and sixth days."
他真的好喜欢用这些人偶来引导啊。
This guy is really into these puppets.
「这是最后一幕戏了。我已向诸位展现了匹诺康尼的过去与现在，并衷心希望你们能理解我究竟为何要改变现状。」
"This is the concluding act of this play. I have showcased the past and present of Penacony, hoping that my desire for change resonates within you."
「而接下来，我将为诸位揭示——匹诺康尼的未来。」
"And now, I shall reveal its future to you."
「我从无限延伸的螺旋阶梯，向着未来缓缓坠落。不必恒久地记住我，或试图将我寻获。我心中的轮廓，必将与其他经验交错。」

"Descending from the infinite spiral staircase, I traverse towards the future with measured steps. No need to remember me or seek my existence, for the contours of my mind shall intersect with other experiences."
「祂赐了世间众人『意义』，天地万物都造齐了。祂歇了一切创造的工。」
"THEY imbued the world with meaning, perfecting all things in the heavens and on earth. Then, THEY rested from the labors of creation."
「然而，众生复向太一呼告：『你以「秩序」为万民定义，却令我等晓得自己不过是你的傀儡！』」
"Yet, all beings cried out to Ena — 'Under the banner of the Order, you have defined all things in the Cosmos... but this made us realize that we are but puppets in your hands!'"
「故在那日，万众集结一心，将神投入毁灭坑中。」
"Thus, on that day, all beings united and cast the Aeon into the abyss of oblivion."
普世同谐，群星共熠，无上功德颂神主！
The world is in harmony and the stars shine bright. Praise the Great One!
秩序已死！秩序已死！秩序已死！
The Order is dead! The Order is dead! The Order is dead!
妈呀——吓我一跳！这售票处怎么有这么多…人偶？
Yikes! They scared the life out of me! Why are there so many... puppets at the ticket office?
它们不会突然动起来吧？
They won't suddenly start moving, will they?
好多模特啊，这是时装店？
So many mannequins! Is this a fashion store or something?
Can't believe you're in the mood to crack jokes...
什…什么！你好讨厌啊！别吓人家嘛！
Wh—What...? Ah! You're so annoying! Stop scaring me!
这些人偶是舞台上的布景吗？可即便如此，连前厅都完全不见人影，有些太过异常了。
Are these puppets part of the stage setup? Even so, it's so eerie that the entire front hall is empty.
我还真怕它们突然动起来…快离开吧！求你了！
I'm seriously scared they might start moving... Let's just leave, please!
我有种奇怪的预感，我们不会是走错地方了吧？
Something feels off... We're in the right place, right?
这梦境里应该也没有第二个「大剧院」了。
There's no other Grand Theater in the Dreamscape.
那就是星期日在晃点我们？说好了在舞台上一决胜负，怎么人都没了？
So, Sunday is messing with us? He said we'd have a final showdown on the stage, but why is there no one here?
「抱歉，让你久等了，三月七小姐。」
吓我一跳！你…你在哪儿说话呢？
You scared me! Wh—Where... are you now?
「我就在幕布后方等待各位。在盛典开场前，遵循阿斯德纳的古老传统，我想邀请诸位一同观赏三出幕前剧。」
"I'm waiting for you behind the curtain. Following the Asdana tradition, I invite you to enjoy a stage play in three acts before the Festival begins."
「历史是面镜子，它映照出宇宙最本真的面貌。我们也可借这个机会，更深入地了解匹诺康尼和星神的历史。」
"History is a mirror reflecting the universe's true essence. Let's use this opportunity to delve into the rich history of Penacony and the Aeons."
「而未来的轮廓——自然就在其中显现。」
"Within it, naturally, the future takes shape."
不对，不是这个画框，是那个有很多人偶围着的。
No, not this frame. It's the one surrounded by puppets.
咱们这是到什么地方了？
这地方的氛围…和星期日的内心世界很像。也许这所谓的「幕前剧」也是相似的能力。
The atmosphere here... looks similar to Sunday's inner world. Perhaps this so-called "stage play" is created with his abilities.
这出剧目名叫《囚人颂》，结合周边的氛围…恐怕接下来要上演的是匹诺康尼的过去。
This act is named Ode to Prisoner. Given the atmosphere here... I believe it's about Penacony's past.
最近几次开拓之旅都没进监狱，我还以为自己时来运转了呢！结果还是难逃此劫……
I thought things were finally looking up as I managed to dodge prison during my recent trailblazing expeditions! But now it looks like I'll be back behind bars again...
「希望你喜欢这片焦土之上的——自由之地。」
"I hope you like this land of freedom... on a scorched earth."
「看吧，他们的刑期早已结束，公司的狱卒也已被驱逐。可这些囚犯仍是奴隶之身，因为囚禁他们的不是外物，而是内心。」
"As you can see, their sentences have long ended, and the IPC guards have long been expelled. Yet, these prisoners remain enslaved, not by external forces, but by the confines of their own minds."
「自由存在于任何地方，唯独不存在于软弱的灵魂。它襄助不了任何人，只能襄助信它存在的人。」
"Freedom permeates every corner except fragile souls. It gives solace only to those who believe in its existence."
「囚徒们啊！我命令你们学会自由，并教会你们的兄弟——为生而战！」
"Prisoners! This is my order! Learn the essence of freedom and teach your fellow prisoners to fight for their lives!"
「已经不再有人能阻断你们的道路，你们自由了。」
"No one can restrain you any more! You are free!"
「至此便是第一幕。盛燃的战火中，『边陲监狱』逐渐走向『流放之地』。」
"Thus concludes the first act. Amidst a raging war, the frontier prison headed toward becoming Land of the Exiles."
这大概就是匹诺康尼的建成史。囚犯们在外来者的帮助下，终于走向自由，建立起了宇宙中的「流放之地」。
This must be how Penacony was constructed. With the aid of outsiders, the prisoners were finally liberated and established the Land of the Exiles.
只是比起肉体的囚笼，星期日似乎更侧重于表达人们精神的困境。
However, it appears that Sunday aims to convey the spiritual plight of the prisoners more than the physical aspects of imprisonment.
这戏剧对我来说有点太文艺了，最好懂的反而是打架的部分…不过可算是到出口了，我们快走吧！
Ah, this show is a bit too literary for my taste, but the battle part is quite easy to understand... Anyway, we've arrived at the exit. Let's go!
《愚仆颂》…想必这就是第二出剧目了。
Ode to Fool... This must be the second act.
环境也和刚才不一样了。周围的陈设…似乎变得整齐了些？
The surroundings are different from before. The stage decorations... look a bit tidier now?
「外来的宾客，我请求你帮助这间宅子，摆脱潜藏的教唆者的毒害。」
"Dear outsider, I beseech your aid in purging this mansion of the poison spread by the lurking instigators."
呃…帮助你们？需要做些什么？
Uh... You want us to help you? What do you need?
「我希望他们都能恢复理性的镇静，不再受到虚伪的操控。」
"I wish they could regain their reason and cast away the shackles of hypocrisy."
看起来，这第二幕讲的是匹诺康尼走向「梦想之地」的过程，而家族的到来在其中发挥了不可或缺的作用。
This is the second act. Looks like it's about Penacony's journey to becoming the Land of the Dreams, during which The Family plays a crucial role.
可这位「新至的主人」…怎么感觉不是什么好东西？
But this New Master... seems like a bad guy to me, don't you think?
这或许就是星期日暗藏在文脉下的内容——「同谐」改变了匹诺康尼，但做法却与过去的狱卒无异。
Perhaps this is the truth Sunday is trying to express, if you read between lines. The Harmony changed Penacony just as the guards once did.
那听起来，就是得让这几个跪拜的家伙全都变得「镇静」，对吧？
Looks like we've got to help those guys kneeling down over there calm down a bit, right?
「外来的宾客呀，你要往何处去？」
看来在完成这出剧目前，它是不会让我们离开的。
Guess we won't be able to leave until this act is complete.
「我希望他们都能恢复理性的<color=#dbc291ff>镇静</color>，不再受到虚伪的操控。」新至的主人如是说。
"I wish they could {RUBY_B#<color=#dbc291ff>calm down</color>}<color=#dbc291ff>regain their reason</color>{RUBY_E#} and cast away the shackles of hypocrisy," proclaimed the new master.
「惟有<color=#dbc291ff>理性</color>才能令其免于过去的流毒。」新至的主人如是说。
"Only {RUBY_B#<color=#dbc291ff>calmness</color>}<color=#dbc291ff>reason</color>{RUBY_E#} can shield people from the lingering poison of the past," proclaimed the new master.
「惟有<color=#dbc291ff>理性</color>才能令其免于过去的流毒。」新至的主人如是说。
"Only {RUBY_B#<color=#dbc291ff>calmness</color>}<color=#dbc291ff>reason</color>{RUBY_E#} can shield people from the lingering poison of the past," proclaimed the new master.
「<color=#dbc291ff>镇定</color>者方能避免潜藏的教唆者的毒害。」新至的主人如是说。
"Only the <color=#dbc291ff>calmed</color> ones can evade the insidious influence of the hidden instigator," proclaimed the new master.
「非<color=#dbc291ff>宁静</color>无以于死去的幻影中解放。」新至的主人如是说。
"In the absence of <color=#dbc291ff>calmness</color>, there exists no path to liberation from the clutches of death," proclaimed the new master.
