将军为人深明大义。能有仙舟联盟从中斡旋，匹诺康尼的和平指日可待。
The general possesses a deep understanding of the greater good. With the Xianzhou Alliance mediating, peace for Penacony is within reach.
愧不敢当！到底还是多亏了列车组的各位，否则这座美梦乐园还没等来和平，反教那群「秩序」残党捷足先登了……

You flatter me! But ultimately, it's been all down to the Express. Without your efforts, this Sweetdream Paradise would have been claimed by the last remnants of "Order" before there was even a shot at peace...
瞧，咱们的大功臣这不就来了么？
Well would you look at that. Here comes the big hero.
哈哈哈，不愧是「银河球棒侠」——侠之大者，虚怀若谷！
Hahaha, here's the Galactic Baseballer — the paragon of both heroism and humility!
哈哈哈，不愧是「银河球棒侠」——侠之大者，敢作敢当！
Hahaha, if it isn't the Galactic Baseballer — a true hero who dares to take action!
Lemme guess, you were thinking about me... again?
哈哈哈，不愧是「银河球棒侠」——侠之大者，明察秋毫！
Hahaha, if it isn't the Galactic Baseballer — a hero with unparalleled insight!
{NICKNAME}，如何了？听说你始终不醒，身体可有不适？
{NICKNAME}, are you okay? I heard you couldn't wake up. Are you feeling unwell?
放心吧，杨叔，这家伙精神得很，一路上都快把{M#他}{F#她}这辈子能开的玩笑全开完了。
Don't worry, Mr. Yang. There's nothing wrong with {M#him}{F#her}, {M#he}{F#she} practically burned through a lifetime's worth of jokes on the way here.
倒是杨叔你怎么样了？听说那家伙连知更鸟小姐都没放过，把你们全都给关起来了……
What about you, Mr. Yang? I heard that even Miss Robin wasn't spared, and that guy locked you both up...
哎，说来话长…不过，那位星期日先生是个体面人，没有对我们两个下狠手。
It's a long story... but, at least Mr. Sunday took it easy on us.
他只是使用了一种名为「调律」的能力，将我们的意识和他自己连缀在一起。换句话说，他把我们囚禁在了意识中。
He used an ability called "tuning" to connect our consciousnesses with his. In other words, he imprisoned us within his consciousness.
多亏了景元将军击溃了「齐响诗班」，我们才能逃出生天。
Thanks to General Jing Yuan's destruction of the Harmonious Choir, we were able to escape.
啊，他也对我们用过那个…「调律」！这岂不是意味着，我们也差点惨遭囚禁……
Ah, he used that "tuning" on us, too! Does that mean that we were almost imprisoned as well...?
现在我可以确信，他确实是想和我们公平决斗。否则他当时完全有能力解决掉我们…不费吹灰之力。
I can confidently say now, he was truly after a fair fight with us. Had he wanted, he could have easily taken us down... without so much as lifting a finger.
说到这位橡木家系家主…他如今又在哪里？
Speaking of the Oak Family head... Where is he now?
很复杂，但一言以蔽之，他现在是前橡木家系家主了。
It's complicated, but in a nutshell, he's now the former Oak Family head.
公司指认他为家族在匹诺康尼分家的主要负责人，以威胁银河和平为由要求他代表家族为动乱负责，并将此案交由庇尔波因特审判……

The IPC has named him the key figure in The Family's Penacony split, citing a threat to Cosmic peace. He must represent The Family and answer for the unrest caused. His trial is set to take place at Pier Point.
但家族立刻将包括他在内的「秩序」残党打为敌人，坚称这场骚动是内部叛乱。如此一来，公司于情于理都无法介入「家族内务」了。

The Family quickly labeled him and the remnants of the Order as enemies, declaring the turmoil an internal rebellion. This move effectively barred the IPC from intervening in "Family affairs" on both moral and rational grounds.
Everyone really has their own agenda after all...
那…知更鸟小姐会怎么样？她和星期日都和这场谐乐大典脱不了干系吧，还是亲兄妹……
Then... what's going to happen to Miss Robin? She and Sunday won't be able to deny their involvement in the Charmony Festival, they're siblings after all...
只能说，这对那女孩实在是无妄之灾。我联盟在调停过程中会尽量说服家族对此事慎重裁夺的。
I can only say that this incident is an unexpected mess for the girl. The Alliance will try to persuade The Family to consider this matter carefully during mediation.
到时候了，各位。我与公司的各位要员约定就接下来的谈判先行磋商，不知各位是否有意前来旁听？
It's time, everyone. The IPC's key members and I have agreed to consult one another before the upcoming negotiation. Do any of you wish to sit in?
既然将军邀请，又事关宇宙大事，列车组自然不会拒绝。可要是公司方面对此不甚欢迎……
Given the general's invitation and the matter's significance to the universe, the Crew will naturally accept. However, if the IPC has any reservations...
怎么会，当然欢迎！他们表示各位是公司在匹诺康尼的可靠盟友，没有不欢迎的理由。
Why of course you're welcome! They've mentioned that your team is a trusted ally of the IPC in Penacony, so there's no reason not to welcome you.
况且，若是像星穹列车这般可靠的观察员在场，讨论想必一定能进展得更加顺利。怎样，各位意下如何？
Besides, if there can be reliable observers from the Astral Express present, discussions will go more smoothly. So, what do you all think?
那我们就恭敬不如从命了。
噫…本、本姑娘对这种场合有点过敏，我还是先回房间打包行李好了。
...I'm a kind of allergic to those types of situations. I think I'll just head back to my room and start packing.
没关系，去吧。这里由我和姬子小姐出面就可以。
Not to worry. Himeko and I will take care of things.
我恐怕也要先一步回列车了。列车长很担心我们，我还是去说明一下现状为好。
I'm afraid I'll also have to return to the Express first. The conductor is worried about us. It's best I go and explain the situation.
嗯，拜托你了。{NICKNAME}，你呢？你想跟我和瓦尔特一起去，还是说你也有别的事要做？
Thank you. What about you, {NICKNAME}? Will you join Welt and me, or have you got other plans?
我得帮三月七收拾行李…
I HAVE TO help March pack her suitcase...
呃…其实我一个人就可以收拾好啦……
What? I can pack it myself, you know...
哈哈，既然如此，那还是请我们的「银河球棒侠」一道来吧。
Haha, if that's the case, our Galactic Baseballer can join us.
直觉告诉我这里只有一种选择…
Dunno why, but something tells me I only have one real option here...
虽然我不清楚个中缘由，但公司的代表们表示务必要让{NICKNAME}前来旁听——我为各位带路，这边请！
Although I'm not too sure of the reason, the representatives from the IPC have insisted on {NICKNAME}'s presence — allow me to lead the way, follow me please!
久违了，星穹列车的各位。
It's been a while, my Astral Express friends.
也向您致以诚挚的谢意，罗浮将军。能有各位在场共同见证，想必此次谈判一定能以令各方都满意的结果圆满落幕。
I would also extend my sincere thanks to you, General of the Luofu. The presence of everyone here assures that the talks will likely reach a conclusion that satisfies all sides.
哦？看来各位已经有所预期了。不妨说来听听？
Oh? Looks like everyone has come with expectations. Care to share?
Of course. Topaz, if you please?
总的来说，是好消息——经过战略投资部「重大事务组」会议审议表决，以绝对多数成员同意通过了以下决议：
In summary, it's good news — after much deliberation from the Strategic Investment Department's council, the absolute majority of members have agreed to the following resolutions:
「基于对星际和平的长久考虑，经由庇尔波因特总部授权，战略投资部将代表公司永久放弃对匹诺康尼主权之宣称，并无条件支援家族对匹诺康尼的重建工作。」

"In light of long-term considerations for interastral peace, and by authority of Pier Point HQ, the Strategic Investment Department — on behalf of the Interastral Peace Corporation — will permanently relinquish its claim on Penacony sovereignty, and offer unconditional support of The Family's rebuilding efforts on Penacony."
So, the IPC does see the big picture, huh?
「一切为了和平」——这就是我司的基本价值观。
"All in the name of peace" — that's our motto.
What's in it for you guys?
老实说对公司没有任何好处…但对全宇宙的长远发展却是非常有利的。
To be honest, it does nothing to benefit the IPC... but it is extremely beneficial to the long-term development of the entire universe.
那砂金岂不是白挨了一刀？
Doesn't that mean Aventurine took a hit for nothing?
哈哈，要是这样能为全宇宙带来和平，那也算值了。
Haha, if that's what it takes to bring peace to the entire universe, it's a price I'll gladly pay.
咳咳…这样人都到齐了帕。那我们现在开始航线会议吧！
Ahem... looks like everyone's present. Let the navigation meeting commence then!
是要决定下一站去哪儿的会呗？怎么说，投票还是？
This a meeting to decide on our next stop? How we doin' this, by show of hands?
别心急，牛仔。客随主便，交给他们定夺吧。
Hold your horses, cowboy. It's for those to decide.
Hah, I'm just catching a lift. Don't sweat it!
Black Swan, how come you're here too?
这对一位忆者来说不是很正常的事么？
Shouldn't this be expected of a Memokeeper?
What in tarnation are you guys doing here?
让我来解释吧。波提欧先生和黑天鹅小姐出于各自需要，提出了想要暂时与列车组同行的请求……
Allow me to explain: Mr. Boothill and Miss Black Swan submitted a request to temporarily travel with the Express for their own personal reasons...
各位也知道，星穹列车向来不会拒绝任何心向远方的旅客。所以，他们接下来将和我们一起旅行一段时间，直到抵达目的地为止。

As you all may also know, the Astral Express never declines any passenger whose heart yearns for the distant stars. Therefore, they will be traveling with us for a while, until they reach their destinations.
喔…这下列车里要热闹起来了。不过，黑天鹅小姐，你可不能在列车里用忆者的能力恶作剧哦！
Whoa... The Express is going to be much livelier now. But Miss Black Swan, you'd better not use your Memokeeper abilities to pull any pranks!
好啊，三月七小姐。我答应你，休息时间里你绝对不会在自己的房间里看见我。
Understood, Miss March. I promise you, you'll never see me in your room while you're taking a break.
Uhm... Don't, you're freaking me out...
好了，好了。既然各位乘客都相互认识过了，那我们就继续航线会议了帕！
All right. All right. Now that everyone's met everyone, we can continue our navigation meeting!
希望这次旅行平安无事，希望这次旅行平安无事，希望这次旅行平安无事……
Please let this trip be uneventful. Please let this trip be uneventful. Please let this trip be uneventful...
希望这次旅行平安无事…
Please let this trip be uneventful...
你怎么这么喜欢学我说话呀！
What's with you and always copying the way I talk!
什么叫碎碎念，我这叫祈祷！
唉，最近几次开拓之旅都太吓人了，动不动就有性命之忧…也该来点轻松愉快温暖人心的可爱冒险了吧！
The last couple of trailblazing expeditions have been downright terrifying... It's about time we had some fun, cozy, and cute adventures for a change!
你也来，快和我一起祈祷！希望这次旅行平安无事，希望这次旅行平安无事，希望这次旅行平安无事……
Come on, start praying with me! ! Please let this trip be uneventful. Please let this trip be uneventful. Please let this trip be uneventful...
不知怎么，突然和你有一种…「好久不见」的感觉。
For some reason, I'm suddenly stricken by the feeling that... we haven't crossed paths in quite some time.
It has indeed been a while.
大概…「久别重逢的喜悦」，也算是「开拓」的一部分吧。
Perhaps... the joy of reuniting after a long time can also be considered just another part of the Trailblaze.
哎…我就不该期待你说出什么正经的话。
...I should have known better than to expect anything serious from you.
到了目的地，你要一起下车哦！
This time, you must disembark with us when we reach our destination!
这星穹列车倒真是挺舒服的…但，我就一个小意见啊，你们列车上咋没啥*带劲的*饮料啊？
This Astral Express sure is comfy... but, I got one tiny problem with it. How come there ain't no potent drinks on this ride?
没有麦芽果汁也就算了，好歹来点别的嘛！比如「白宝石」之类稀烂贱的牌子，又不贵。
I can live without malt juice, but at least stock somethin' else! Like that "White Gem," common as dirt and not too pricey.
No way! Our express is only rated <unbreak>12</unbreak>+!
那你也不能用<unbreak>12</unbreak>岁的标准要求我这样一个精壮的游侠啊！
You can't use that <unbreak>12</unbreak>-years-of-age rule against a mighty Ranger like me!
姬子的咖啡还不够上头吗？
Is Himeko's coffee not strong enough for you?
呃…那是不同意义的「上头」……
Uh, well... That's a different kind of "strong"...
I'll help you ask the conductor.
谢了！{M#哥们}{F#姐们}！来点便宜的就行，我不挑嘴的。
Thanks, {M#brother}{F#sister}! Any low-cost swill will do, I ain't fussy.
哈，这些年我都风餐露宿惯了，现在突然让我住到这么好的地方…啧，还挺不错的。
Ha, all these years out in the wild, and now I'm bunkin' in luxury... Gotta say, it's quite the treat.
{NICKNAME}，你已经是一个越来越优秀的开拓者了。能见证你的成长，我非常欣慰。
{NICKNAME}, you're fast becoming an excellent Trailblazer. It's an honor to be able to watch you grow.
不必谦虚，你的成长大家都有目共睹。我以前认识非常多的战士，能像你一样成长的人，在我的故乡…至少要评为S级吧。

Don't downplay your achievements, everyone has witnessed your growth. I've known many warriors in my time, and only a few achieve the kind of growth you have. Back home, where I'm from you'd be rated at least an S-tier.
是啊，你超厉害的。我以前认识非常多的战士，能像你一样成长的人，在我的故乡…至少要评为S级吧。
Yes, yes, you are. I've known many warriors in my time, and only a few achieve the kind of growth you have. Back home, where I'm from you'd be rated at least an S-tier.
这段时间辛苦你了。好好休息一下吧，我很期待你在下一场旅程中的表现。
It's not been easy for you these past few days. You've earned some downtime. I'm looking forward to seeing how you'll perform on our next journey.
说起来，{NICKNAME}，匹诺康尼这次，还是你第一次和我一起开拓吧？
Come to think of it, {NICKNAME}, this trip to Penacony was the first time we Trailblazed together, wasn't it?
希望以后还能和你一起开拓！
I hope we can Trailblaze together again someday.
放心吧。我们能在列车上一起相处的时间还有很长，这样的机会也一定不会少的。
Don't worry. We'll have plenty of time to spend together on the Express, so there'll definitely be more chances for adventures like this.
这太危险了，真希望你没下去。
It was too dangerous. I wish you hadn't gone down.
好啦～我明白你担心。但没关系，我可也是个顶天立地的无名客，不会有事的。
It's alright! I understand your concern, but it's okay. I'm also a capable Nameless, just like yourself.
今天早些休息吧。这段时间你太累了，若是不趁这个机会好好修养精神，可是会落下病根的…你现在年轻还好，老了以后可是要遭罪的哦。

Turn in early today. You've really been pushing yourself hard recently. If you don't take this chance to recharge, it could lead to long-term problems... It seems fine when you're young, but it's a different story as you age.
哦？你来啦，{NICKNAME}。你的倒影映在舷窗里的繁星之间…呵呵，有点教人看不真切呢。
Oh? You're here, {NICKNAME}. Seeing your reflection among the stars in the porthole... really does seem somewhat surreal.
怎么样，这趟美梦之旅…可还令你满意？
How about it, this journey of beautiful dreams... Was it to your liking?
跌宕起伏，非常满意，多来点！
What a rollercoaster ride! It's just... so peak... Keep it coming!
我能感受到你喜悦的心情…如此一来，你的记忆也会变得非常美妙呢。
I can feel your obvious excitement... That means your memories will also become even more beautiful.
It kind of left me wanting more, you know...
这种略带遗憾和落寞的情绪…嗯，这种回味悠长的记忆我也很喜欢哦。
That tinge of regret I sense... Ah, these are the kinds of lasting memories I cherish.
感觉很多东西还没讲清楚？
Seems like there are still lotsa loose ends, no?
好奇心的气息非常浓郁啊…这种记忆会令人欲罢不能呢。
There's a rich scent of curiosity here... Such memories can be irresistibly captivating.
It's nothing short of a deus ex machina!
呀，真是好激烈的情感…呵呵，让人直冒汗，却也欲罢不能。
Ah, such an intense emotion... Heh, makes you break out in a sweat, but you just can't get enough.
When the next survey comes, I'll be checking the "Too Easy" box... AGAIN.
哦？如此捉摸不透的情绪…这种记忆倒是第一次遇见，有点勾起我的好奇心了。
Oh? Such elusive emotions... I've never encountered memories quite like this before, it's stirred my curiosity.
那…就把那件「小小的临别礼物」还给我吧？我已经迫不及待了。
So... How about you hand that "small parting gift" back to me? I'm quite eager to have it back.
I... I wasn't the one who broke it...
我只是…在你的「记忆」中发现了一处非常有趣的地方。
I just... stumbled upon a particularly fascinating spot in your memory.
在向你道出缘由前…我要向你道歉，{NICKNAME}。其实我给你的这份「临别礼物」并非忆域的罗盘…而不过是一枚<color=#dbc291ff>「空光锥」</color>而已。
Before I explain... I would like to apologize to you, {NICKNAME}: This farewell gift I gave you isn't really a compass from the Memory Zone... but merely an <color=#dbc291ff>empty Light Cone</color>.
还记得我们初入梦境酒店时，我向你的伙伴分别索取了几样饰品么？它们的功能是类似的。
Remember when we entered the hotel in the Dreamscape for the first time, and I procured a few trinkets from your companions? Their functions are similar.
这样，我就可以随时感应到你，以便在你遇到危险的时候及时出手了。
This way, I can always be attuned to your location, ready to assist immediately if you encounter any threats.
但…那并不是它最本质的功能。
But... this is not its most intrinsic function.
「光锥」是用于封装{RUBY_B#记忆}凝固事象{RUBY_E#}的光之切片，这枚空光锥也一样。
Light Cones are slices of light used to encapsulate {RUBY_B#Remembrance}solidified phenomena{RUBY_E#}. This empty Light Cone is the same.
它能够将你的记忆以最鲜活的形式刻录下来，然后…为我欣赏把玩，成为独一无二的回忆。
It can etch your memories in their most vivid form, and then... allow me to admire and manipulate them, turning them into unique mementos.
世间万物皆出自精神和灵性的力量——这力量正是「记忆」。要想使我们免于被世界遗落在身后，便要让世界记住我们…或者，用我们的「记忆」重塑世界。

All the world is born from the power of mind and soul, and that power is "memory." To prevent ourselves from being forgotten by the world, we must make the world remember us... or, use our memories to recreate it.
人生看似漫长，却也只能提取出不过寥寥数份饱含力量的记忆：或欢欣、或悲伤，或轻快、或沉重…但你不一样，{NICKNAME}。
Life, seemingly vast, offers but a scant collection of impactful memories: Some joyful, some sorrowful, some light, some heavy... But you, {NICKNAME}, are different.
「记忆」是未来的倒影。从那倒影中，我能看到你独一无二的价值。你能创造出令世界为之倾倒的回忆…你的记忆能够映照出宇宙未来的方向。

Memory is a reflection of the future. Within that reflection, I see your unparalleled worth. You have the power to craft memories that can captivate the world... Your memory can illuminate the universe's future path.
而那记忆…将要璀璨得如同这舷窗中举目可见的点点繁星。
And that memory... will be as scintillating as the star clusters you see in this porthole.
所以你想收藏我的记忆？
Which is why you want to collect my memories?
正是。不过，你知道更深层的原因是什么吗？
Precisely. But, do you know the deeper meaning behind it?
真可爱。不过，你知道我这么做更深层的原因是什么吗？
How adorable. But, do you know the deeper meaning behind it?
帮我看看，我是不是要飞升了？
Help me take a look, am I about to ascend?
我手中与你有关的记忆还太少，远不能助我占卜太过遥远的未来。
The memories I have of you are not enough for me to predict a future that lies too far ahead.
不过，我可以告诉你一件事，那就是我对你如此青睐有其更深层的原因。
But, I can tell you one thing: My favor towards you stems from a more profound reason.
理由很简单——<color=#dbc291ff>在家族这场盛大而浮华的梦里，只有你亲历了全程</color>。
The reason is simple: <color=#dbc291ff>In this grandiose and ostentatious dream of The Family's, only you personally experienced the entire course</color>.
别心急。我会揭晓答案的…只是现在不是时候。
Patience, my friend. I will reveal the answer to you... but that time is not now.
回头看看你的朋友们吧。他们每个人都在为下一个目的地欢欣鼓舞，对各自的现在与未来充满了期待。要是现在就道破一切，岂不是太扫兴了么？

Turn around and take a look at your friends. Every one of them is reveling at the arrival of their next destination, all filled with hopes and expectations of their own present and future. Revealing everything at this moment would be a bit of a buzzkill, wouldn't it?
我想要挑一个好的时候，一个你完全放松的时候…或许，夜色每一次模糊，你每一次行将入睡的时刻正是最合适的。
I'm looking for an opportune time, a time when you're totally at ease... Perhaps, when the night grows hazy, and you're about to drift off would be the most opportune.
不如就挑个夜晚吧。我会备好烛光、香氛，还有软榻，为你打造一个舒适的梦乡。然后，我就把那答案当做一个小小的睡前故事说给你听，哄你入睡……

How about one fine night? I will prepare the candles, aromatics, and even a cushy couch to create a cozy dream land for you. And then, I will tell you the answer in the form of a little bedtime story to lull you to sleep...
喂——喂喂——各位乘客请注意——
Ahem, hi, hello~ Attention all passengers.
列车即将跃迁——列车即将跃迁——请坐稳扶好帕——！
The Express is about to make the jump — please be seated and hold on!
呵呵，看来我们终于要出发了。远方还有那么多闪耀的记忆在等待着我们…就先聊到这里吧？
Heh, it looks like we're finally about to set off. There are countless gleaming memories out there waiting for us... Why don't we just leave it at that for now?
啊，对了。作为对用那枚「空光锥」戏弄了你的小小补偿，我想送你一句话。它对我有着十分重要的意义……
Ah, that's right. As a small token of compensation for playing that little trick on you with the empty Light Cone, I will gift you with some words — they hold great significance to me...
「生命是一座迂回的迷宫，除了记忆，我们一无所有。」
"Life is akin to a winding labyrinth, where memories serve as our sole companions."
你可一定要好好地记在心里哦？
You'll remember these words dearly, won't you?
琥珀历<unbreak>2158</unbreak>纪，纪元的第一年，宇宙再次回到它应行的轨道上。阴谋的火种在「梦想之地」匹诺康尼闷烧，尚未成燎原之势，便成为克里珀铁砧上的一簇火花，转瞬即逝。

In the year <unbreak>2158</unbreak> of the Amber Era, the first year of the new epoch, the universe resumed its intended trajectory. The kindling of conspiracy smoldered in Penacony, the Land of the Dreams. Failing to erupt into a blaze, it instead flickered briefly on Qlipoth's anvil, before vanishing in the blink of an eye.
应死者和已死者照旧沉眠，生者也得以酣睡。所有人都在用沉默大声喧哗，并各行其是。银河焕发出每一个纪元之初应有的活力，代价不过是一对兄妹轻微的悲伤。

The dead and those fated to die remain in their eternal slumber, while the living find solace in deep sleep. All clamored in a cacophony of silence, and then went about their own ways. The cosmos emanated a vitality characteristic of a new era, all for the modest price of a brother and sister's mild grief.
婴儿在诞生，恒星在熄灭。银轨在铺展。星穹列车的故事既告一段落，也重新开始。
Babies are born as stars extinguish. The silver rail unfolds. The story of the Astral Express comes to a close, yet it also embarks anew.
时间滚滚向前，而「开拓」之旅亦将翻开新的篇章。
Time marches forward, heralding the arrival of a new chapter in the history of Trailblazing expeditions.
无数流星划过今夜的天空…如果选中了正确的那一颗，它将把你的愿望，带向千百个世界。
Countless shooting stars streak the sky tonight... If you can pick the right one, it will carry your wish to thousands of distant worlds.
你现在感到十分放松了，对吧？那么……
You're feeling very relaxed now, aren't you? So then...
现在，是时候为你讲一个<color=#dbc291ff>小小的睡前故事</color>了。
It's time to tell you <color=#dbc291ff>a little bedtime story</color>.
先说结论吧：<color=#dbc291ff>在与星期日的对抗中，列车组的各位、乃至匹诺康尼的所有人都失败了，无人生还</color>。
Well, let's start with the conclusion — <color=#dbc291ff>The Crew was defeated in the battle against Sunday. Everyone in Penacony failed, and no one survived</color>.
不过别紧张，事实尽管骇人，但还未到无可挽回的地步。各位仍有一线生机，而我正是为此而来。
But don't panic. The truth, as horrifying as it may be, is not yet irreversible. There's still a glimmer of hope, and that's why I'm here.
接下来，我将用这张记录了你全部记忆的「空光锥」，为你重新讲述此前发生的一切。而当故事的尾声来临时，相信聪明的你一定会发现……

Next, I'll use this empty light cone that carries all your memories to relive everything that happened before. And when this story reaches its end, I'm sure someone as clever as you will notice that...
在你亲身经历的这段故事中，存在一处<color=#dbc291ff>致命的破绽</color>——而那一线生机，就藏在这破绽的背后。
There's a <color=#dbc291ff>major flaw</color> in the story you have experienced, yet within that flaw lies a glimmer of hope.
还记得吗？当时钟的指针拨回起点，列车启动跃迁，将你送入一场陌生的梦境。虽然摸不着头脑，但那位巡海游侠「黄泉」为你指明了出路。

Do you remember everything? When the clock turned back, the Express started a warp jump, sending you to a strange dream. You were bewildered back then, and then a Galaxy Ranger named Acheron showed you a way out.
你们抵达「白日梦」酒店，在这里<color=#dbc291ff>遇到了门童米沙</color>，还与公司使节砂金起了冲突。所幸黄泉小姐再次路过，才让你及时脱身。

When you arrived at The Reverie Hotel, you <color=#dbc291ff>met the</color> {RUBY_B#<color=#dbc291ff>bellboy</color>}<color=#dbc291ff>doorman</color>{RUBY_E#} <color=#dbc291ff>Misha</color> and had a confrontation with Aventurine, an IPC representative. Thankfully, Acheron appeared again and helped you.
随后，你在梦境里救下流萤小姐，与她一起游览了匹诺康尼。你们中途遭遇<color=#dbc291ff>假扮成桑博的花火</color>，意外坠入了稚子的梦。
After that, you saved Firefly and explored Penacony together. During the tour, you ran into <color=#dbc291ff>Sparkle disguised as Sampo</color> and accidentally entered a child's dream.
我从「死亡」手中救下二位，可流萤小姐却没能返回现实。她察觉到真相，想要邀你入局，却促成了一起意外的「死亡」。而更可怕的是，你很快便撞上了另一起命案。

There, I rescued both of you from "Death," but Firefly didn't return to reality. She realized the truth and tried to involve you in her plan, but that resulted in an accidental "death." Even more unsettling, you soon encountered another "murder."
<color=#dbc291ff>两起「死亡」</color>促使你们决定调查美梦背后的真相。你们想从二人的信息入手，却不得要领，反倒从加拉赫那里得知了有关「钟表匠」的情报。

<color=#dbc291ff>The two cases of "death"</color> prompted you to investigate the truth behind the sweet dream. Despite your efforts to gather information about the two victims, you didn't make much progress. But you did learn about the Watchmaker from Gallagher.
与此同时，砂金也在暗中筹备自己的计划，你们被他选为计划的推力。黄泉小姐在激战中拔刀，迫不得已<color=#dbc291ff>暴露了「虚无」令使的身份</color>。

Meanwhile, Aventurine was secretly carrying out his scheme, in which you were one of the pawns. In the midst of a fierce battle, Acheron <color=#dbc291ff>revealed her true identity as an Emanator of the Nihility</color> and unsheathed her sword.
这一击不仅将砂金击落，也撕开了美梦与原初忆域的通道。你们抵达流梦礁，得知了<color=#dbc291ff>「死亡」实为「沉眠」</color>，更得知了梦境、星核乃至门童米沙的真相。

That strike foiled Aventurine's plan and opened a passage between the sweet dream and the original Memory Zone. Upon your arrival at Dreamflux Reef, you learned the truth that <color=#dbc291ff>"Death" was actually "Dormancy"</color>, as well as the truth about the Dreamscape, the Stellaron, and the bellboy, Misha.
你们和星期日、知更鸟决定分头寻找封印星核的方法。谁曾想，星期日与「梦主」早就另有图谋，你们终究不得不在谐乐大典的舞台上一决生死。

You split up with Sunday and Robin, looking for a way to seal the Stellaron. However, it turned out that Sunday and the Dreammaster had their own hidden agenda, and you had to engage in an ultimate duel on the stage of the Charmony Festival.
终于，故事来到了尾声。你们战胜了他，「开拓」压倒「秩序」，匹诺康尼也得以迎接光明与和平的未来……
Finally, the story reached its conclusion. You emerged victorious, with the Trailblaze triumphing over the Order and Penacony embracing a bright and peaceful future...
至此，如梦似幻、跌宕起伏的匹诺康尼之旅到此为止了。想必你已经有所察觉了，对吧？
This marks the end of the thrilling journey in Penacony. I'm sure you've already noticed something unusual, haven't you?
那一处与已知信息截然相悖的<color=#dbc291ff>致命破绽</color>，就出现在这部分故事里——
<color=#dbc291ff>The major flaw</color>, which contradicts all the known information, hides in this story...
在酒店与米沙初次相遇…
My first encounter with Misha at the hotel...
呵呵，小米沙…或者现在应该称呼他为「钟表匠」先生？
Heh, little Misha... or should I call him the Watchmaker?
他身为梦泡中的记忆，却因为心怀「开拓」之志离开了梦泡，竟然还在匹诺康尼开展了一段大冒险……
He is only a segment of memory in a dream bubble, but his ambition for the Trailblaze led him to leave the bubble and embark on a grand adventure in Penacony...
可惜这位小米沙说到底也不过是个特别的忆域迷因。就算「开拓」的力量再怎么让他神通广大，唯独一件事是他无论如何也做不到的——
While Misha is a rather special Memory Zone Meme, and he was granted power by the Trailblaze... there's still one thing that he shouldn't be able to do—
——<color=#dbc291ff>忆域中诞生的生命绝无可能出现在现实中</color>。那么，他又为何会在现实的「白日梦」酒店里与你相遇？
...<color=#dbc291ff>A life born in the Memory Zone could never manifest in reality</color>. So, why did he appear in The Reverie Hotel in reality?
答案很简单：因为他正是那与一切已知信息相悖的<color=#dbc291ff>致命破绽</color>。而这也意味着，对这段记忆深信不疑的你……
The answer is simple — He is <color=#dbc291ff>the one fatal flaw</color> that contradicts all our known information. This means that you, who wholeheartedly believe in this memory...
<color=#dbc291ff>此时此刻，仍然身处于梦境中</color>。
<color=#dbc291ff>Are still trapped in the Dreamscape at this very moment</color>.
醒来吧，{NICKNAME}。从这场没有尽头的梦中脱身，回到清醒的世界去——我们都将在那里找到{RUBY_B#一线生机}答案{RUBY_E#}。
Wake up, {NICKNAME}. Break free from this eternal dream and return to the real world. We'll find our {RUBY_B#a glimmer of hope}answers{RUBY_E#} there.
被假扮成桑博的花火袭击…
I was attacked by Sparkle disguised as Sampo...
花火啊花火，整个故事里最难以捉摸的神秘人物。可惜，她率先领悟到答案是真的，为了搅混水故意袭击你们也是真的。

Sparkle — yes, Sparkle, the most enigmatic and elusive character in the entire story. But unfortunately, she was the first to uncover the truth, and she did purposefully attack you to create confusion.
对了。她临走前托我给你带个话：「千万要区分现实和想象的界限」……
By the way, she left me a message to pass on to you. "Always make sure you can distinguish reality from imagination."
你问这是不是提示？我不知道，只能说那<color=#dbc291ff>致命破绽</color>和这位愚者无关。
Is that a clue, you may wonder? I'm not sure, although I'm pretty sure that <color=#dbc291ff>the fatal flaw</color> has nothing to do with that Masked Fool.
流萤与知更鸟的两起假死…
The fake deaths of Firefly and Robin...
嗯，虽然两位女士的「死亡」与最初的设想并不一致，但事到如今，这一事实与我们目前所知的信息也并不冲突。
Well, although the fake "deaths" of those two ladies don't align with our initial assumptions, this fact itself doesn't contradict the information we have so far.
看来我可以帮你把这个答案排除掉了。那么，这<color=#dbc291ff>致命的破绽</color>到底出现在哪里呢？
I'll go ahead and eliminate that incorrect answer for you. So, what is <color=#dbc291ff>the fatal flaw</color>?
黄泉拔刀展露「虚无」的力量…
Acheron unsheathed her sword and revealed the power of the Nihility...
你是想说，{RUBY_B#「虚无」IX}沉眠无相者{RUBY_E#}从不瞥视任何人，因此绝无人可能分得「虚无」的权柄，对么？
Are you suggesting that {RUBY_B#IX, the Nihility}the sleeping and shapeless{RUBY_E#} never bestows its gaze upon anyone, and thus no one can truly possess the power of the Nihility?
这观点非常犀利，但很遗憾。尽管讽刺，黄泉小姐确实在「虚无」的命途上越走越远。只因她那愿从命途枷锁中解救世人的信念非常人所能及。

That's a very astute guess, but unfortunately, Acheron did progress further down the Path of the Nihility. Her unwavering belief in liberating the world from the grasp of Paths surpasses the capabilities of ordinary humans.
我来为你去掉这个错误答案吧。开动脑筋，再仔细想想，那<color=#dbc291ff>致命的破绽</color>究竟是什么？
I'll discard that incorrect answer for you. Take your time and think it through — What is <color=#dbc291ff>the fatal flaw</color>?
虽然加拉赫先生的身份是虚构史学家，但他在这件事上确实没有说谎。更何况「死亡」和「沉眠」本就并蒂双生，不是么？
It's true that Gallagher is a History Fictionologist, but he didn't lie in this matter. In addition, "death" and "dormancy" do arise from the same concept, don't they?
这并非你冒险故事里最<color=#dbc291ff>致命的破绽</color>。还有时间，不妨再认真思考一下吧。
This is not <color=#dbc291ff>the fatal flaw</color> in your adventure. Take your time and think it through.
公司的意见聊完了？那轮到我们了。
Has the IPC finished sharing all its thoughts? Then it's our turn.
学会和天才俱乐部同样对匹诺康尼此次灾难报以高度关注。最后，我双方决定达成全面合作，对匹诺康尼的重建予以技术支持……

The Guild, much like the Genius Society, has taken a keen interest in the recent calamity in Penacony. Ultimately, both parties have agreed to a comprehensive collaboration, offering technical support for the reconstruction of Penacony...
…具体内容还是听听这位天才的说法吧。轮到你了，螺丝咕姆先生。
...The floor is yours for the finer points, Mr. Screwllum. Enlighten us, please.
有机生命对内在精神世界的不懈探索既令我赞叹，又令我羡慕。无机生命没有做梦的机能。但当智能脉冲激活，灵感回路开始运作，我会进入被定义为「想象」的状态。

Organic life's unrelenting search to understand the realm of inner spirituality is something I both admire and envy. Inorganic life has no mechanism to evoke dreams. But when my mechanical impulses are activated, my inspiration circuits will start to operate, and I will enter a state defined as "imagination."
每一次，想象之中都有一团火从黑暗中升起。它温暖，明媚。我时常思考，那火焰或许就是智能的本质——一簇因高温激发的灵感。宇宙未来的方向或许就在其中。

Every time, within the realm of imagination, there emerges a fire from the shadows. It is warm, bright. I frequently ponder, this flame might represent the essence of intelligence — a cluster of inspiration ignited by high temperatures. The future direction of the universe may well lie within it.
可惜，它对我而言不过是思维系统折射出的虚像，可望而不可即。但在了解到匹诺康尼如今的成就后，我终于意识到，那火焰并非不能攫取。

Alas, they are nothing but projections of my thought system to me — desired, but unattainable. But after learning of Penacony's accomplishments, I have come to realize that the flame is not beyond my grasp.
在与几位合作伙伴讨论后，我们决定暂缓对模拟宇宙项目的推进，并将以技术顾问的身份支持博识学会对梦境与忆域的研究，以便这种物质更好地为全人类服务。

After deliberations with my partners, we have decided to defer the progress of the Simulated Universe project, and instead assist the Intelligentsia Guild as technological consultants in the research of the Dreamscape and Memory Zone, so that these assets may be better used to serve humanity.
不仅如此，我们还通过公司与忆庭取得联系，他们也承诺会协助开展研究……
Not only that, we've also established contact with the Garden of Recollection through the IPC, and they've pledged their support for our research endeavors...
呵，真为匹诺康尼的逐梦客们感到开心——全宇宙最智慧和最愚钝的头脑现在全都为他们所用了。
I am truly happy for the Dreamchasers on Penacony — the cosmos's brightest and, let's admit, dimmer intellects are now at their service.
Hooray! It's a big win for everyone!
但…罢了，无论如何结果是好的。
But... *sigh* Never mind. At the end of the day, this is a positive outcome.
总感觉美好得有点不真实…
I keep getting this feeling that this is all too good to be true...
确实，尤其很难想象天才俱乐部的成员也会对俗世的研究感兴趣……
Agreed. It's hard to imagine members of the Genius Society taking an interest in such mundane research...
*sigh* Never mind. At the end of the day, this is a positive outcome.
难怪各位一定要{M#他}{F#她}出面呢。
No wonder everyone insisted that {M#he}{F#she} be there.
能了解到各位都愿为匹诺康尼排忧解难，这可真是再好不过了。相信各位一定能在接下来的谈判中达成共识。
It heartens me to learn that everyone is willing to put aside their differences for Penacony's plight. I trust that everyone will surely reach consensus in the upcoming negotiations.
看来匹诺康尼的未来已成定局。不知列车组的各位是否还有所牵挂？
Looks like Penacony's future is decided. I'm wondering, is there anything else the Crew is concerned about?
